name: Devin
subject: Peter, your ACTION GUIDE is ready! 🥳
body:
15 TOP ORGS to makes it simple to connect with your tribe and protect the vulnerable, our rights, and our democracy. | | | | | |
---
[](https://devinhermanson.us22.list-manage.com/track/click?u=183f0f0d7b868d7a3cf101385&id=79b1832f16&e=10cc7d1928)
| | | | |
---
| Hi Peter,This election was a gut punch and I’ve found it hard to process. Maybe you have, too. I’m in contact with several democratic groups and one thing I’m hearing consistently is that**it’s important to find community.**
Even if it’s all you do, find your tribe and begin to discuss where we are and where we’re going.
I’ve put together this [ACTION GUIDE](https://devinhermanson.us22.list-manage.com/track/click?u=183f0f0d7b868d7a3cf101385&id=2beb591cd7&e=10cc7d1928) to help you do that and much more. It’s a **simple, one-page, carefully curated list of absolutely amazing organizations**.

---
[](https://devinhermanson.us22.list-manage.com/track/click?u=183f0f0d7b868d7a3cf101385&id=b5a1d744c4&e=10cc7d1928)
| From helping you **find a local chapter of activists to connecting you with outstanding independent, investigative journalism and fact-checkers** , this [ACTION GUIDE](https://devinhermanson.us22.list-manage.com/track/click?u=183f0f0d7b868d7a3cf101385&id=3ded3dd49e&e=10cc7d1928) gives you what you need to join the critical movement to defend the vulnerable, protect our rights, and preserve our democracy.

We have more power than you may think and these organization will be fighting the good fight, every day. **They give me hope!**
As grim as things may seem right now, it’s in times like these the most beautiful, amazing things happen. **Hope Heroes everywhere are dusting themselves off and beginning the work of bringing people together. Hope is stirring and love will crowd out hate in America.** It won’t be easy, but facing down tyrants is in our DNA.
[**Click here to see our list of 15 “Hope Hero” organizations and find your place in this movement**!](https://devinhermanson.us22.list-manage.com/track/click?u=183f0f0d7b868d7a3cf101385&id=b427bde15d&e=10cc7d1928)
Onward!
\- Devin
_There’s an adage a historian once called ‘a law of history,’ true of every society across the ages. The adage is: ‘Only when it is dark enough, can you see the stars.’_ \- Kamala Harris

---
[VISIT THE ACTION GUIDE!](https://devinhermanson.us22.list-manage.com/track/click?u=183f0f0d7b868d7a3cf101385&id=8c00c33cdd&e=10cc7d1928)

body:
Meanwhile, Nancy Mace is fighting to protect women's privacy.
| [ ](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=ea953368d0344116b03518527e2fe731&_e=NTEARj2CJRjWIE8s78xOzrZzBiYuWZb5eFTsg3mSJ9pOHlBjp1H8XrCI_gJepjiedVFsFXyTD9OUs8VEw1xPJ0Bnpt97TomauGrWzz-anI88mi7GqiyoUy9htBpy2qGSKF46z_oC4S9uZgVj8ThgSPbggcM7pnIDFkANjpPPV4nDSiTXdfNOXuA3m9kO5778qo3v87pSb8RSTRQj554i0_Vyu0N0MN0qWSIbkY-BHgZ-4tbXQlJ9fvELg3K2jxHWv6KPeO7hGQ-MTkVZpz9qI8Ut9MiEUaaA2baUV_vbHkbcxDaBWjsP9uZN5nmFh3Xf4_5OBfivJzVGh4N7BggoMA%3D%3D)
---

Peter,

**Over 65,000 people liked this post from Tim Walz.**

At the same time, Nancy Mace is fighting off attacks and threats from the Trans Mob and Radical Left for simply wanting biological men to stay out of the women's restrooms.

_Is this how crazy our country has become after four years of Joe Biden and Kamala Harris in the White House?_

**THIS IS EXACTLY WHY THE AMERICAN PEOPLE VOTED FOR DONALD TRUMP AND MAGA REPUBLICANS! WE ARE SICK OF PANDERING TO 1 PERCENT OF THE POPULATION!**

Instead of standing up for a woman's right to privacy in bathrooms and locker rooms, the Radical Left is THREATENING Nancy Mace and her staff.

_Now, she 's DOUBLING DOWN by introducing a NATIONAL BAN ON MEN IN WOMEN'S BATHROOMS ON FEDERAL PROPERTY!_

**If the Trans Mob and Radical Left are attacking her THIS MUCH, it must mean she 's doing something right.

[Can you chip in to support women's right to privacy and safety from men who want to invade their bathrooms and locker rooms?](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=ea953368d0344116b03518527e2fe731&_e=NTEARj2CJRjWIE8s78xOzrZzBiYuWZb5eFTsg3mSJ9pOHlBjp1H8XrCI_gJepjiedVFsFXyTD9OUs8VEw1xPJ0Bnpt97TomauGrWzz-anI88mi7GqiyoUy9htBpy2qGSKF46z_oC4S9uZgVj8ThgSPbggcM7pnIDFkANjpPPV4nDSiTXdfNOXuA3m9kO5778HR5uGYsMzZEABaK9gqwnN_yT5jvOvGeUj95O5mJQSTxXwdWW_M2VNjZWGdo2dvVoUb8L9BsDZBxrjjPUqlWQPjuG5T4-DsCxVXky8HLThPBfpAgIORcXvIW4J-6VNK6wj06gNMollc2JTztm1WjESg%3D%3D)**

name: holiday-meals@uso.org
subject: We missed our Thanksgiving goal.
body:
But there's still time to close the gap by Christmas.
Thanksgiving is over, and we're sad to report that we fell short of our goal to fund 2,500 Thanksgiving meals for deployed service members. We can't turn back the clock, **but _together_ , we can make sure those who missed out on a Thanksgiving meal have a warm dinner on Christmas Day.**
Please, don't let us fall short for funding Christmas meals for our deployed service members!
**The NFL has generously agreed to 2X-match all gifts, so please,[will you rush $37.50 or more right now while every dollar is MATCHED* to provide the holiday support our heroes in uniform both need and deserve?](https://links.e.uso.org/els/v2/R30rHgq-EKfd/VldUVkVkcWZUZ0hscUlvd29qTHpoNlZxVFhocEFMUFY4ZEdtRTNSeUV5VWRialIxNVloK1Nwc2JZZjhOd2NielhmcXBCM3dmQ2pXaWxYeGxBUUVRUWRPZDQ0QVZzK3VhUlRXUlZyUGVQRFE9S0/TktEcU1rdkNXOERLdFdXZ1U0SitSR3Q4RENUMlljZDZGUWRUS1BtL0QvczNyWmR5akZIRVZCNitzYUtEaFJGQnliOXNJSHNNRUtaTkk5L3RKMUJZU2xGbVZ1bTBVdHhES0)****
[$37.50 MATCHED CAN HELP FUND
ONE WARM HOLIDAY MEAL**](https://links.e.uso.)
---
[$75 MATCHED CAN HELP FUND
TWO WARM HOLIDAY MEALS**](https://links.e.uso.org/els/v2/rjbeH2KD~wcr/VldUVkVkcWZUZ0hscUlvd29qTHpoNlZxVFhocEFMUFY4ZEdtRTNSeUV5VWRialIxNVloK1Nwc2JZZjhOd2NielhmcXBCM3dmQ2pXaWxYeGxBUUVRUWRPZDQ0QVZzK3VhUlRXUlZyUGVQRFE9S0/TktEcU1rdkNXOERLdFdXZ1U0SitSR3Q4RENUMlljZDZGUWRUS1BtL0QvczNyWmR5akZIRVZCNitzYUtEaFJGQnliOXNJSHNNRUtaTkk5L3RKMUJZU2xGbVZ1bTBVdHhES0)
---
[$150 MATCHED CAN HELP FUND
FOUR WARM HOLIDAY MEALS**](https://links.e.uso.)
---
[HAVE ANOTHER AMOUNT MATCHED](https://links.e.uso.)
---
Christmastime can be especially hard for our heroes serving far away from friends, family and loved ones. Thank you in advance for supporting our service members this holiday season.
--The USO
* * *
**From: **thanksgiving-meals@uso.org
**Sent: **Tuesday, November 19, 2024
**Subject:** Your support means service members can eat Thanksgiving dinner.
[](https://www.uso.org)
[MATCH MY GIFT](https://links.e.uso.org/els/v2/A-VKBb0vgqBx/VldUVkVkcWZUZ0hscUlvd29qTHpoNlZxVFhocEFMUFY4ZEdtRTNSeUV5VWRialIxNVloK1Nwc2JZZjhOd2NielhmcXBCM3dmQ2pXaWxYeGxBUUVRUWRPZDQ0QVZzK3VhUlRXUlZyUGVQRFE9S0/TktEcU1rdkNXOERLdFdXZ1U0SitSR3Q4RENUMlljZDZGUWRUS1BtL0QvczNyWmR5akZIRVZCNitzYUtEaFJGQnliOXNJSHNNRUtaTkk5L3RKMUJZU2xGbVZ1bTBVdHhES0)

[](https://links.e.uso.org/els/v2/mWbZT-E7KWB8/VldUVkVkcWZUZ0hscUlvd29qTHpoNlZxVFhocEFMUFY4ZEdtRTNSeUV5VWRialIxNVloK1Nwc2JZZjhOd2NielhmcXBCM3dmQ2pXaWxYeGxBUUVRUWRPZDQ0QVZzK3VhUlRXUlZyUGVQRFE9S0/TktEcU1rdkNXOERLdFdXZ1U0SitSR3Q4RENUMlljZDZGUWRUS1BtL0QvczNyWmR5akZIRVZCNitzYUtEaFJGQnliOXNJSHNNRUtaTkk5L3RKMUJZU2xGbVZ1bTBVdHhES0)

[** THANKSGIVING ALERT: **](https://links.e.uso.) [**All gifts will be MATCHED*
to fund warm meals
for our heroes!****](https://links.e.uso.) [GOAL: ** 2,500 MEALS **](https://links.e.uso.) ****
| [MATCH MY THANKSGIVING GIFT](https://links.e.uso.org/els/v2/KAeVs7z_E9fV/VldUVkVkcWZUZ0hscUlvd29qTHpoNlZxVFhocEFMUFY4ZEdtRTNSeUV5VWRialIxNVloK1Nwc2JZZjhOd2NielhmcXBCM3dmQ2pXaWxYeGxBUUVRUWRPZDQ0QVZzK3VhUlRXUlZyUGVQRFE9S0/TktEcU1rdkNXOERLdFdXZ1U0SitSR3Q4RENUMlljZDZGUWRUS1BtL0QvczNyWmR5akZIRVZCNitzYUtEaFJGQnliOXNJSHNNRUtaTkk5L3RKMUJZU2xGbVZ1bTBVdHhES0)
---
Next week, Americans will celebrate Thanksgiving with family, friends, food and fun. However you celebrate, we sincerely hope you enjoy this time with your family and loved ones.
But for service members deployed far from home, it'll just be another Thursday. Another day in a lonely barracks, thousands of miles away from their loved ones. Another day of the same old mess hall food. Another day of hoping they'll be able to find a secure internet connection to call home before their kids go to bed. **It 's up to us to brighten this day for them.**
The USO is determined to uplift our service members on this important day. That's why we've set a goal to fund 2,500 Thanksgiving meals at military bases and USO Centers around the world.
**And we 're so glad to share that the NFL is _matching_ all gifts, [but we're counting on YOU to help us reach this ambitious goal by Thursday at midnight.](https://links.e.uso.)**
[$37.50 CAN HELP PROVIDE
ONE THANKSGIVING MEAL**](https://links.e.uso.)
---
[$75 CAN HELP PROVIDE
TWO THANKSGIVING MEALS**](https://links.e.uso.)
---
[$150 CAN HELP PROVIDE
FOUR THANKSGIVING MEALS**](https://links.e.uso.)
---
[GIVE ANOTHER AMOUNT ](https://links.e.uso.)
---
Spending Thanksgiving far away from their loved ones is just one of many, many sacrifices our military members make throughout the year in service of our country while asking nothing of us in return. **We may not be able to bring them home or fully understand the challenges they go through -- but we can make sure they enjoy a warm, festive Thanksgiving meal.**
**[Please, will you rush $37.50 or more right now to DOUBLE the value of your gift to support our heroes this Thanksgiving and year-round? There couldn't be a better time to donate this holiday season.](https://links.e.uso.)**
[MATCH MY GIFT](https://links.e.uso.)
---
Thank you for supporting our heroes in uniform when it matters most,
The USO
*The NFL is matching all gifts to the USO through a USO mail, email and text message campaign, dollar for dollar, up to a total of $50,000, through December 15, 2024.
**Your contribution will be joined with the contributions of others and used where it is needed most to strengthen the well-being of the people serving in America's military and their families.

name: Pass the No Kings Act (VPP)
subject: We haven’t heard from you...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
Donald Trump is NOT a king!
| We still haven’t received your response to our urgent poll.

We only have 7 weeks before Donald Trump takes office, _and the Supreme Court’s disastrous immunity decision gives him free reign to commit whatever crimes he wants._

**The No Kings Act would REVERSE this decision and ensure NO President is ever above the law! subject: I knew I had a duty to take action.
body:
Radical librarians call Adventure of Huckleberry Finn and To Kill a Mockingbird “racist.” They’ve stripped Laura Ingalls Wilder’s name from a prestigious book award because of her “problematic” Little House series.| | | If you haven’t heard about the “See You at the Library Day” on Fox News or Newsmax or your other favorite news sources, please let me tell you why it’s so critical.

| | Fellow Conservative,Back when you were growing up, you may remember lazy Saturdays at the library with a kind but stern librarian. She would fill your mind with classics like _Pat the Bunny_ and _The Little Engine That Could_. And eventually you got old enough to roam by yourself and discover adventures like the _Three Musketeers_ , _Treasure Island_ and _Charlotte’s Web_.But today, all that has changed.The president of the American Library Association (ALA) is a self-described “Marxist lesbian.”Radical librarians call _Adventure of Huckleberry Finn_ and _To Kill a Mockingbird_ “racist.” They’ve stripped Laura Ingalls Wilder’s name from a prestigious book award because of her “problematic” _Little House_ series.And they bring men in wearing full makeup, dresses, and high heels for “Drag Queen Story Hours” where books like these are read to children of all ages... A is for Activist. An ABC board book for “families who want their kids to grow up in a space that is unapologetic about activism, environmental justice, civil rights, LGBTQ rights, and everything else that activists believe in and fight for...”

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=d978f0a2a9ad4089ba59360a9208d0dc&_e=eElwYqWuybrJ8_Ae-AH_G96MZnCErM5FFFhei9PSj3aRHG1icIlENA_j9U_e7icgwk2SEsGOtawjCpI9GI8m4jA0MCpo8VWtaebVI2S2c7beYvmIc29axA9rKLQiB2Gr-GSl62n4wSABGOcF5-O1ge74BCbNRMTLjHmT2luJL6A-Ki7jn2NMis5W1J07ryBCC7N8VMKlcjN2v5JjiKtzNu7kSudmSN3_ylgbMCwRMoA-lliqpOyww-THNrfF7I_ciVF4jwmX5B1fzNJ6xDuRhW87xDBTm5pQKuVesANi6lw9Ow8XYNPaRI0AgYLXNWOM4jw4_aY7cFVw2HUgVBCcTS1jyNUukM4-Vlb5StH1aqNoiVVT4232BUMA68QPdSXfzuw9ttD5NPEjIu0XK3RaYw%3D%3D)

| | For decades, the ultra-liberal Bill and Melinda Gates Foundation and George Soros’ Open Society have spent millions radicalizing the ALA. And as a result, a new generation of pink-haired, activist librarians have made it their mission to fill library shelves with anti-American, LGBTQ-friendly, and explicitly sexual content.Maybe you’ve noticed all the displays at your own library celebrating Pride Month or elevating “the environment” to a type of religion. The “Teen Zone” is filled with books like: _Rick_ about a cross-dressing Grandpa, _Melissa_ filled with graphic nudity, and _Darkstalker_ featuring gory violence and domestic abuse.But here’s what’s really alarming.We can’t just sit back and say, “Well, I’ll just make sure my family doesn’t go to “Drag Queen Story Hour” and we won’t check out those inappropriate books.”That may be good for your family – for now.But meanwhile, the ALA uses our taxpayer-funded libraries to lure in millions of other children who grow up to be the very activists who are destroying our country and conservative values! **[**I hope you see why I need your help today to TAKE BACK OUR LIBRARIES.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=d978f0a2a9ad4089ba59360a9208d0dc&_e=eElwYqWuybrJ8_Ae-AH_G96MZnCErM5FFFhei9PSj3aRHG1icIlENA_j9U_e7icgwk2SEsGOtawjCpI9GI8m4jA0MCpo8VWtaebVI2S2c7beYvmIc29axA9rKLQiB2Gr-GSl62n4wSABGOcF5-O1ge74BCbNRMTLjHmT2luJL6A-Ki7jn2NMis5W1J07ryBCC7N8VMKlcjN2v5JjiKtzNu7kSudmSN3_ylgbMCwRMoAOK7oxXiB0H9rZGpLV63znpUCjxmLi87b0Vh-yPFhZtiaChs6nQE8l6VtrW2jbB0ZrkjtZ2xTjef7vx2_oJWulrq8Z90oakDa5ntM4ZYkvgrJVgzCZdlaaB1B675AQor2P-rdr5hwGAEMCp8brAtytt7ogdiRTdsl2E2xPlpXePw%3D%3D)** My name is Kirk Cameron. Maybe you recognize me from the 1980’s family sitcom “Growing Pains” or from my work in inspirational movies like “Fireproof” and “Left Behind.”I know firsthand how dangerous it is to be indoctrinated by leftist values. Pride almost took me down as a young actor in Hollywood.But the gospel saved me. I love being an actor, but what’s far more important is being a husband, dad, grandad, and a Christian.When I saw what book publishers and libraries were doing to indoctrinate children with anti-God, anti-family, anti-America messages, I knew I had a duty to take action. So together with a small Christian book publisher aptly named **Brave Books** , I wrote “As You Grow” to teach children how to grow in wisdom through the fruit of the spirit.And then we decided to go one step further and counter those awful “Drag Queen Story Hours” with a wholesome Story Hour of our own. Our idea was to read the classic books you and I grew up with plus new wholesome Brave Books that captivate children with lessons in bravery, honesty, kindness, and patriotism.And boy, the ALA and radical librarians didn’t like that one bit.>> Over 50 libraries rejected our request to host our Story Hour. >> The ALA helped local libraries scheme ways to keep us out including booking all the event rooms for themselves.>> Social media blew up with attacks: I was compared to a Nazi (that’s original), Brave Books was accused of trying to “confuse and demoralize children,” our supporters were described as “bored moms/busybodies who need something to feel good about,” and on and on. I can’t even print most things these radicals said because it’s so vile.In the end we got two libraries to reverse course by reminding them that their censorship violated the Constitution of the United States.And thousands of parents and grandparents brought their little ones to those Story Hours where we pledged allegiance to the flag, sang “God Bless America,” and read wholesome and Godly books.It was incredible.But here’s the greatest part...From there, parents and grandparents started asking Brave Books how they could host Story Hours of their own.So Brave Books has organized a nationwide grassroots “See You at the Library” movement to take back our libraries. Now with the guidance of Brave Books, committed conservatives just like you book event rooms at their local library for conservative Story Hours that fill children’s hearts with goodness, gratitude, and God.And whenever we can, Brave Books authors like swimmer Riley Gaines, TV personality Missy Robertson, and myself stand shoulder-to-shoulder with conservative parents, grandparents, and patriots at these Story Hours......for a very simple mission – to reject the Left’s radical ideas and reclaim childhood innocence in America’s libraries.And our ambitious goal is to expand our “See You at the Library” movement to reach over 100,000 children in the next year.Which is why we need you! __**[_I hope you’ll be able to give a sponsorship gift of $35, $50, $75, $100, $150 or more today._..](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=d978f0a2a9ad4089ba59360a9208d0dc&_e=eElwYqWuybrJ8_Ae-AH_G96MZnCErM5FFFhei9PSj3aRHG1icIlENA_j9U_e7icgwk2SEsGOtawjCpI9GI8m4jA0MCpo8VWtaebVI2S2c7beYvmIc29axA9rKLQiB2Gr-GSl62n4wSABGOcF5-O1ge74BCbNRMTLjHmT2luJL6A-Ki7jn2NMis5W1J07ryBCC7N8VMKlcjN2v5JjiKtzNu7kSudmSN3_ylgbMCwRMoBq43GNm3fH5IGR3sP23A6tOPhU72utG2UqKHyZ_rOZUAq4xhRmJMmd0DkVMlMRCVZo6rkzPPV9oRD9-PJpDKnb2zPs5ZFHjySNmKr1RY9snq1sivKJ-6VKA0ttLFWvnCqLfoJURzvry23lcFOjCGAYmRiTXeGs27dLJ3fhXqHjcQ%3D%3D)**Your sponsorship gift will be used to send a “Story Hour Kit” to every parent, grandparent, and patriot who’s organizing an event at their library.The kit includes everything they need to bring your conservative values back into our public libraries: instructions for booking their library space and running their Story Hour, small American flags for the little ones, fun stickers, wholesome books, Bible memory verse cards, and other specialty items. Brave Books is a small Christian company. They don’t have the millions behind them like the giant taxpayer-funded ALA.Your sponsorship gift is the only way we can fund our Story Hours for over 100,000 children to counter the radical leftists who’ve taken control of our libraries. Knowing that, **_[_please consider a sponsorship gift of $175._](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=d978f0a2a9ad4089ba59360a9208d0dc&_e=eElwYqWuybrJ8_Ae-AH_G96MZnCErM5FFFhei9PSj3aRHG1icIlENA_j9U_e7icgwk2SEsGOtawjCpI9GI8m4jA0MCpo8VWtaebVI2S2c7beYvmIc29axA9rKLQiB2Gr-GSl62n4wSABGOcF5-O1ge74BCbNRMTLjHmT2luJL6A-Ki7jn2NMis5W1J07ryBCC7N8VMKlcjN2v5JjiKtzNu7kSudmSN3_ylgbMCwRMoDsW7bpe0m8gxiaFvCLfhuwQokw9ixN77ouGeWADGygx02Y_yDAJo9unSVf16MNOugBLOPTCV5xgGyenr1qyvQpaYu6b_fgUeZKPHorEygi5IG4IYSZoNEqrZnHJ4Sf1Maf_BnxUfG5PYa5BPMsfZM8sOOTP1h_tbVw_6oEgVfcaA%3D%3D)_** That’s enough to sponsor one entire “Story Hour Kit” yourself. Singlehandedly, you’ll be reaching 50 children with our wholesome, Godly, and patriotic message. **_[Whatever you can give whether it’s $35, $175, or anything higher or lower will be necessary for the success of the next “Story Hour Kit” to be sent.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=d978f0a2a9ad4089ba59360a9208d0dc&_e=eElwYqWuybrJ8_Ae-AH_G96MZnCErM5FFFhei9PSj3aRHG1icIlENA_j9U_e7icgwk2SEsGOtawjCpI9GI8m4jA0MCpo8VWtaebVI2S2c7beYvmIc29axA9rKLQiB2Gr-GSl62n4wSABGOcF5-O1ge74BCbNRMTLjHmT2luJL6A-Ki7jn2NMis5W1J07ryBCC7N8VMKlcjN2v5JjiKtzNu7kSudmSN3_ylgbMCwRMoCvGV8ysS8AGEgAjf2x76GBQmkVZ-E6QhFgnPXeIx6OnZy-PTTvQyvzF6q8mV3Cp0cVSQeKodwvKcq-0xLRhxRMTY3Teht_4wZ25HQyeamlAKoBP5FhrWvzv1gDbLxXIBseVMXXXeQtrvtHLPCcPITs6Xdua0R4ofi2Wao8MWntBg%3D%3D)_**

clean_body: Radical librarians call Adventure of Huckleberry Finn and To Kill a Mockingbird “racist.” They’ve stripped Laura Ingalls Wilder’s name from a prestigious book award because of her “problematic” Little House series.| | | If you haven’t heard about the “See You at the Library Day” on Fox News or Newsmax or your other favorite news sources, please let me tell you why it’s so critical. | | | | Fellow Conservative,Back when you were growing up, you may remember lazy Saturdays at the library with a kind but stern librarian. She would fill your mind with classics like Pat the Bunny and The Little Engine That Could. And eventually you got old enough to roam by yourself and discover adventures like the Three Musketeers , Treasure Island and Charlotte’s Web.But today, all that has changed.The president of the American Library Association (ALA) is a self-described “Marxist lesbian.”Radical librarians call Adventure of Huckleberry Finn and To Kill a Mockingbird “racist.” They’ve stripped Laura Ingalls Wilder’s name from a prestigious book award because of her “problematic” Little House series.And they bring men in wearing full makeup, dresses, and high heels for “Drag Queen Story Hours” where books like these are read to children of all ages... A is for Activist. An ABC board book for “families who want their kids to grow up in a space that is unapologetic about activism, environmental justice, civil rights, LGBTQ rights, and everything else that activists believe in and fight for...” | | | Woke Baby. “For all the littlest progressives, waking up to seize a new day of justice and activism. Woke babies raise their fists in the air. Woke babies cry out for justice. Woke babies grow up to change the world.” | | Woke Baby. “For all the littlest progressives, waking up to seize a new day of justice and activism. Woke babies raise their fists in the air. Woke babies cry out for justice. Woke babies grow up to change the world.” | | Prince and Knight. The “premier queer-friendly fairy tale” about a prince who marries a knight instead of a princess. | | And The Hips on the Drag Queen Go Swish, Swish, Swish. A “family-friendly celebration of drag” that encourages children to “work it.” | | | And The Hips on the Drag Queen Go Swish, Swish, Swish. A “family-friendly celebration of drag” that encourages children to “work it.” | | I wish I could tell you this was only happening in places like New York City and San Francisco. | | | But that’s just not true.<\- this is a man leading “drag queen story hour.”< p style="box-sizing: border-box;"> | | But that’s just not true.THIS IS A MAN leading “Drag Queen Story Hour.” | | For decades, the ultra-liberal Bill and Melinda Gates Foundation and George Soros’ Open Society have spent millions radicalizing the ALA. And as a result, a new generation of pink-haired, activist librarians have made it their mission to fill library shelves with anti-American, LGBTQ-friendly, and explicitly sexual content.Maybe you’ve noticed all the displays at your own library celebrating Pride Month or elevating “the environment” to a type of religion. The “Teen Zone” is filled with books like: Rick about a cross-dressing Grandpa, Melissa filled with graphic nudity, and Darkstalker featuring gory violence and domestic abuse.But here’s what’s really alarming.We can’t just sit back and say, “Well, I’ll just make sure my family doesn’t go to “Drag Queen Story Hour” and we won’t check out those inappropriate books.”That may be good for your family – for now.But meanwhile, the ALA uses our taxpayer-funded libraries to lure in millions of other children who grow up to be the very activists who are destroying our country and conservative values! My name is Kirk Cameron. Maybe you recognize me from the 1980’s family sitcom “Growing Pains” or from my work in inspirational movies like “Fireproof” and “Left Behind.”I know firsthand how dangerous it is to be indoctrinated by leftist values. Pride almost took me down as a young actor in Hollywood.But the gospel saved me. I love being an actor, but what’s far more important is being a husband, dad, grandad, and a Christian.When I saw what book publishers and libraries were doing to indoctrinate children with anti-God, anti-family, anti-America messages, I knew I had a duty to take action. So together with a small Christian book publisher aptly named Brave Books , I wrote “As You Grow” to teach children how to grow in wisdom through the fruit of the spirit.And then we decided to go one step further and counter those awful “Drag Queen Story Hours” with a wholesome Story Hour of our own. Our idea was to read the classic books you and I grew up with plus new wholesome Brave Books that captivate children with lessons in bravery, honesty, kindness, and patriotism.And boy, the ALA and radical librarians didn’t like that one bit.>> Over 50 libraries rejected our request to host our Story Hour. >> The ALA helped local libraries scheme ways to keep us out including booking all the event rooms for themselves.>> Social media blew up with attacks: I was compared to a Nazi (that’s original), Brave Books was accused of trying to “confuse and demoralize children,” our supporters were described as “bored moms/busybodies who need something to feel good about,” and on and on. I can’t even print most things these radicals said because it’s so vile.In the end we got two libraries to reverse course by reminding them that their censorship violated the Constitution of the United States.And thousands of parents and grandparents brought their little ones to those Story Hours where we pledged allegiance to the flag, sang “God Bless America,” and read wholesome and Godly books.It was incredible.But here’s the greatest part...From there, parents and grandparents started asking Brave Books how they could host Story Hours of their own.So Brave Books has organized a nationwide grassroots “See You at the Library” movement to take back our libraries. Now with the guidance of Brave Books, committed conservatives just like you book event rooms at their local library for conservative Story Hours that fill children’s hearts with goodness, gratitude, and God.And whenever we can, Brave Books authors like swimmer Riley Gaines, TV personality Missy Robertson, and myself stand shoulder-to-shoulder with conservative parents, grandparents, and patriots at these Story Hours......for a very simple mission – to reject the Left’s radical ideas and reclaim childhood innocence in America’s libraries.And our ambitious goal is to expand our “See You at the Library” movement to reach over 100,000 children in the next year.Which is why we need you! sponsorship gift will be used to send a “Story Hour Kit” to every parent, grandparent, and patriot who’s organizing an event at their library.The kit includes everything they need to bring your conservative values back into our public libraries: instructions for booking their library space and running their Story Hour, small American flags for the little ones, fun stickers, wholesome books, Bible memory verse cards, and other specialty items. Brave Books is a small Christian company. They don’t have the millions behind them like the giant taxpayer-funded ALA.Your sponsorship gift is the only way we can fund our Story Hours for over 100,000 children to counter the radical leftists who’ve taken control of our libraries. Knowing that, That’s enough to sponsor one entire “Story Hour Kit” yourself. Singlehandedly, you’ll be reaching 50 children with our wholesome, Godly, and patriotic message. Thank you! God Bless You and God Bless America, Kirk Cameron | | | Brave Books 13618 Poplar Cir, Suite 302Conroe, TX 77304 | | | ---|---|---

name: Jason C. Johnson
subject: Political prosecution
body:
| |
---
| |
---
Dear Fellow Patriot,I’m reaching out to you with a plea for help—Former Atlanta Police Officer James Burn faces life in prison for doing his job, _and he desperately needs your help today._ James’ entire prosecution has been a witch hunt. This good American cop did nothing wrong. But, the radical left prosecutor in charge of James’ case is on a mission to ruin James’ life in exchange for political capital.I’m sure you’ve heard of liberal prosecutors attacking conservatives and hard working Americans they disagree with by abusing the legal system as a tool for their Anti-American schemes. . . Well, that’s exactly what’s going on here._**Let me quickly give you the facts:**_
---
* On June 23, 2016, James responded to a call about a suspect breaking into a parked vehicle.
* James arrived on scene and watched a person matching the suspect’s description enter a vehicle. So, James did what any police officer would do – he put on his emergency lights.
* Well, the suspect immediately spooked and drove the vehicle he was breaking into directly at James’s police car. _This was a life-threatening attack on James, a police officer, which is a crime in and of itself!_
* Fearing for his life and hoping not to be struck by the suspect’s car, James tried to stop it by discharging his weapon one time.

---
James struck the violent suspect and killed him. Now I’ve got to say, it’s a tragedy that a life was lost, but James was just doing his job – he was protecting his community from a thief and protecting his own life from being taken by a vehicle charging towards him.But soon after the incident, the Fulton County, Georgia District Attorney charged James with _murder_. . . and is trying to put him away for life. . . when all James was trying to do was protect his life and his community.Now, after 8 long years of a messy legal battle and James losing everything he has, James is finally scheduled to go to trial this fall. Friend, the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund is doing everything we can to scrape together enough money to help James with his legal fees. **[**Will you help us defend this honest man with a $35 donation today?**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=96b241f49e504b96a10730891a9aa15b&_e=zXCZ7hfKCaMV8gn4-aaw4qfuvUTvFmwajRzIDf0mcyFnnBjo6laigY10r6T5Dd1FBneFaAvLuwgRDt0nq1WZzeRdom8aWSRG80oqVORZNZJwSSSRcLxbTgxtf5r5KmBs4QUqyp2c-WCm6q2EmJs6trDbuXgaaKFzLk7ilVpy_8wJJ-1wrd_ijTzg2dBZsTZXOmGEJ-CZ4sUoEtALC3fC5KbOyyDRiFEif9a4Ow6VdTnUQx5EuUG1L_WpOoQRhaI5r7oAPAa37YlXVf5o7jn492F68rnykNXHU9lZPXgcy7-3VO7FvT-HBLftCrNYj0mAHlAwzKKmITcCSeU5D4Z2s10i5IDyIQjsgfy1pTZFl8qmTQVNJEACElR_nFuF0ADy)****_James’s case is as political as it gets._** **The District Attorney who charged James in 2016 ran his campaign for re-election promising to prosecute cops.** James is just a pawn to this District Attorney._**But he was a hero to his community!**_ And now the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund is doing everything it can to make sure that James knows his work is appreciated . . . and that his life isn’t ruined by a sham legal case that puts him in jail. **[Will you tell James _“thank you”_ for his service on the police force with a $35 or more donation today?](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=96b241f49e504b96a10730891a9aa15b&_e=zXCZ7hfKCaMV8gn4-aaw4qfuvUTvFmwajRzIDf0mcyFnnBjo6laigY10r6T5Dd1FBneFaAvLuwgRDt0nq1WZzeRdom8aWSRG80oqVORZNZJwSSSRcLxbTgxtf5r5KmBs4QUqyp2c-WCm6q2EmJs6trDbuXgaaKFzLk7ilVpy_8wJJ-1wrd_ijTzg2dBZsTZXOmGEJ-CZ4sUoEtALC3fC5KbOyyDRiFEif9a4Ow6VdTlAa1ERDa3T3tIR7IXXyXP_2txFLvXHK7XLhOt5dgQHiMP368JW9aulonVN3AdMkDI3B5bDCXEKxz-us9eJALYR-SHvEGMLxppWOKmoV9Rg6eA6gtXDLvqrk1NYJioJkQ-K2c93owcgAUXBth6lua2M)**Friend, James should not even be being prosecuted. But, sadly the current District Attorney who is trying to put James behind bars is none other than . . . Fani Willis . . . Yes, **_that_** _Fani Willis_ – the same prosecutor who brought election interference charges against President Donald Trump.It won’t shock you to learn that Fani Willis is as anti-cop and progressive as prosecutors come. After so much time, _and taxpayer money,_ spent on this case, Fani Willis’ office refuses to dismiss the charges against James!So the only way for James to get justice is to win his case! **_That’s where you come in_** – **[**Friend, will you stand with James and with all wrongly prosecuted American police officers with a $35 donation to the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund today?**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=96b241f49e504b96a10730891a9aa15b&_e=zXCZ7hfKCaMV8gn4-aaw4qfuvUTvFmwajRzIDf0mcyFnnBjo6laigY10r6T5Dd1FBneFaAvLuwgRDt0nq1WZzeRdom8aWSRG80oqVORZNZJwSSSRcLxbTgxtf5r5KmBs4QUqyp2c-WCm6q2EmJs6trDbuXgaaKFzLk7ilVpy_8wJJ-1wrd_ijTzg2dBZsTZXOmGEJ-CZ4sUoEtALC3fC5KbOyyDRiFEif9a4Ow6VdTke9hfKeRZNlV8mc6k9TYw5gM8fyalMeJCL0LyqSvorNwOqMdGILk20uhzK4zCnQiY1uswLJxwTW-iPq7LmfYRXWWtPy6_hxK_XyJO9bUtPNevgQl1Hsz5ymt4_CauU1m0UpAW7BQZY62HqOPHQIa6X)** Now that you know what James is up against, you see why your donation is so critical.**[If you’re able and want to help James, will you consider making a larger gift of $50, $100, $500, or even $1,000 today to help keep James out of jail and with his family?](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=96b241f49e504b96a10730891a9aa15b&_e=zXCZ7hfKCaMV8gn4-aaw4qfuvUTvFmwajRzIDf0mcyFnnBjo6laigY10r6T5Dd1FBneFaAvLuwgRDt0nq1WZzeRdom8aWSRG80oqVORZNZJwSSSRcLxbTgxtf5r5KmBs4QUqyp2c-WCm6q2EmJs6trDbuXgaaKFzLk7ilVpy_8wJJ-1wrd_ijTzg2dBZsTZXOmGEJ-CZ4sUoEtALC3fC5KbOyyDRiFEif9a4Ow6VdTmoGyQEkxGP9kky2264uIdtqr7WVTDa0aunOuJrMrw8-BOfEuiDX-4kD2QXosQz7nLaR3YzOmP-f8Y9JoIU3cD2tL-yyVODZrGhmy35ug73ZanqLDBtqqpWgHdaSLKAnPvE86DIUSnTgGPB0WbFbMGD)** James and his extended family have already invested well over a _million dollars_ of their own personal money into his legal defense over the last eight years._Their resources are depleted. . . they have nothing left._ LELDF is James’ only chance to receive the legal defense he deserves. And we can’t fund this case without your **[**generous donation**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=96b241f49e504b96a10730891a9aa15b&_e=zXCZ7hfKCaMV8gn4-aaw4qfuvUTvFmwajRzIDf0mcyFnnBjo6laigY10r6T5Dd1FBneFaAvLuwgRDt0nq1WZzeRdom8aWSRG80oqVORZNZJwSSSRcLxbTgxtf5r5KmBs4QUqyp2c-WCm6q2EmJs6trDbuXgaaKFzLk7ilVpy_8wJJ-1wrd_ijTzg2dBZsTZXOmGEJ-CZ4sUoEtALC3fC5KbOyyDRiFEif9a4Ow6VdTlFwKWTbpkVbd2ywo9TojhFEDAmFTbARcp8cKWTMZpnci8A1ZegbFUpcKqCIjWZPc_Q7xVPX-rnHxYoOCzekwE-dOU9uysxvV9Hq77p5bbZrB1RaZMWbPfjkhXXIvnI8uCb5EO4LIHMl7aO0-O5kTG6)**.**Friend, James’ life has been ruined by this political prosecution. . . but the radical prosecutor does not care about fairness, justice, or truth. . . **. . . They only care about their political agenda.It breaks my heart to see James being used as a political pawn— at the expense of his freedom. That’s why we have to do whatever it takes to make sure that he doesn’t go to jail – and that the selfish prosecutors involved in his case know not to bark up this tree again. When officers like James have nowhere else to turn, LELDF partners with generous supporters like you to defend them in court. **[**Will you join us today?**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=96b241f49e504b96a10730891a9aa15b&_e=zXCZ7hfKCaMV8gn4-aaw4qfuvUTvFmwajRzIDf0mcyFnnBjo6laigY10r6T5Dd1FBneFaAvLuwgRDt0nq1WZzeRdom8aWSRG80oqVORZNZJwSSSRcLxbTgxtf5r5KmBs4QUqyp2c-WCm6q2EmJs6trDbuXgaaKFzLk7ilVpy_8wJJ-1wrd_ijTzg2dBZsTZXOmGEJ-CZ4sUoEtALC3fC5KbOyyDRiFEif9a4Ow6VdTmZYZd1spydncqFANUNucxD6u6YXDbPxaGLtneltBItjl1aAjm3LWqWbJvgMIB3vl41hVVlnrB-rnzvz-XcVsQEs6I1wR2gEPvEEPILFzgrTVaS87Cu0BmUmsCm1ipOrTtAcfHk4On7SQj2B8jR51oV)** LELDF supports and defends the law enforcement profession and those law enforcement officers who have devoted their lives to upholding the Constitution and serving the United States and its citizens while enforcing its laws.We also educate the public about the many risks and threats to law enforcement officers – _like sham prosecutions by left wing prosecutors like Fani Willis._ Friend, I hope you’ll [**stand with LELDF and with James today**.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=96b241f49e504b96a10730891a9aa15b&_e=zXCZ7hfKCaMV8gn4-aaw4qfuvUTvFmwajRzIDf0mcyFnnBjo6laigY10r6T5Dd1FBneFaAvLuwgRDt0nq1WZzeRdom8aWSRG80oqVORZNZJwSSSRcLxbTgxtf5r5KmBs4QUqyp2c-WCm6q2EmJs6trDbuXgaaKFzLk7ilVpy_8wJJ-1wrd_ijTzg2dBZsTZXOmGEJ-CZ4sUoEtALC3fC5KbOyyDRiFEif9a4Ow6VdTlcEQoqtbP-2m8Me8YOzkx0RjvSY-xPFjZbJjTEc-kAfGmcnzqXyFNd-sW2Pfk04vZ6E5Tho5P6S_O3inrWcIFz35aK1UIouahUCOkC5-KOEeQ4Qsh-s9nFA7uwytsmOBZLj-NKHkqYU72Zr8o7NMSg)Thank you for supporting our men and women in blue.Gratefully,

clean_body: | | | | Dear Fellow Patriot,I’m reaching out to you with a plea for help—Former Atlanta Police Officer James Burn faces life in prison for doing his job, and he desperately needs your help today. James’ entire prosecution has been a witch hunt. This good American cop did nothing wrong. But, the radical left prosecutor in charge of James’ case is on a mission to ruin James’ life in exchange for political capital.I’m sure you’ve heard of liberal prosecutors attacking conservatives and hard working Americans they disagree with by abusing the legal system as a tool for their Anti-American schemes. . . Well, that’s exactly what’s going on here.Let me quickly give you the facts: On June 23, 2016, James responded to a call about a suspect breaking into a parked vehicle. James arrived on scene and watched a person matching the suspect’s description enter a vehicle. So, James did what any police officer would do – he put on his emergency lights. Well, the suspect immediately spooked and drove the vehicle he was breaking into directly at James’s police car. This was a life-threatening attack on James, a police officer, which is a crime in and of itself! Fearing for his life and hoping not to be struck by the suspect’s car, James tried to stop it by discharging his weapon one time. James struck the violent suspect and killed him. Now I’ve got to say, it’s a tragedy that a life was lost, but James was just doing his job – he was protecting his community from a thief and protecting his own life from being taken by a vehicle charging towards him.But soon after the incident, the Fulton County, Georgia District Attorney charged James with murder. . . and is trying to put him away for life. . . when all James was trying to do was protect his life and his community.Now, after 8 long years of a messy legal battle and James losing everything he has, James is finally scheduled to go to trial this fall. Friend, the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund is doing everything we can to scrape together enough money to help James with his legal fees. ’s case is as political as it gets. The District Attorney who charged James in 2016 ran his campaign for re-election promising to prosecute cops. James is just a pawn to this District Attorney.But he was a hero to his community! And now the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund is doing everything it can to make sure that James knows his work is appreciated . . . and that his life isn’t ruined by a sham legal case that puts him in jail. , James should not even be being prosecuted. But, sadly the current District Attorney who is trying to put James behind bars is none other than . . . Fani Willis . . . Yes, that Fani Willis – the same prosecutor who brought election interference charges against President Donald Trump.It won’t shock you to learn that Fani Willis is as anti-cop and progressive as prosecutors come. After so much time, and taxpayer money, spent on this case, Fani Willis’ office refuses to dismiss the charges against James!So the only way for James to get justice is to win his case! That’s where you come in – Now that you know what James is up against, you see why your donation is so critical. James and his extended family have already invested well over a million dollars of their own personal money into his legal defense over the last eight years.Their resources are depleted. . . they have nothing left. LELDF is James’ only chance to receive the legal defense he deserves. And we can’t fund this case without your , James’ life has been ruined by this political prosecution. . . but the radical prosecutor does not care about fairness, justice, or truth. . . . . . They only care about their political agenda.It breaks my heart to see James being used as a political pawn— at the expense of his freedom. That’s why we have to do whatever it takes to make sure that he doesn’t go to jail – and that the selfish prosecutors involved in his case know not to bark up this tree again. When officers like James have nowhere else to turn, LELDF partners with generous supporters like you to defend them in court. LELDF supports and defends the law enforcement profession and those law enforcement officers who have devoted their lives to upholding the Constitution and serving the United States and its citizens while enforcing its laws.We also educate the public about the many risks and threats to law enforcement officers – like sham prosecutions by left wing prosecutors like Fani Willis. Friend, I hope you’ll you for supporting our men and women in blue.Gratefully, Jason C. President Joe Biden pardoned his son, Hunter Biden, on December 1, 2024, despite previous assurances he would not intervene in his legal issues. The pardon erases Hunter's convictions for tax evasion and federal gun charges. The White House stated the decision aimed to prevent further political targeting of Hunter. The fact is they lied!!

# One Week From Today!
🎄 **OKGOP Christmas Party at Capitol View Event Center** 🎄 Join us for a joyous celebration at the **Capitol View Event Center**! We'll be honoring the Birth of our Savior, Jesus Christ, and the election of our 47th President, Donald J. Trump. name: Andrew Yang
subject: Being Thankful
body:
My Mom did a great job of maintaining a Thanksgiving tradition for years, and now it's our turn. | |
---
| | |
---
| [ ](https://yangspeaks.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7448319cdb745ea2fd1b1b8a8&id=421d436315&e=0f227c2ae3)
---
|
---
| [ ](https://yangspeaks.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7448319cdb745ea2fd1b1b8a8&id=b8d14dd746&e=0f227c2ae3)
---
| Hello, I hope that you had a wonderful Thanksgiving holiday. We spent it with family and friends. My Mom did a great job of maintaining a Thanksgiving tradition for years, and now it's our turn.

I sometimes get asked how I stay positive. There are a few things I try to do. Exercise. Spend time outdoors. Reading and writing.

One other thing – which is very appropriate for the season – is being grateful. “Science shows that expressing gratitude is one of the best things we can do for our own happiness,” says Rajiv Satyal, a comedian and public speaker I interview on the podcast this week.

“Every day I jot down a few things I’m grateful for that day. It could be something as simple as a free pizza I got. And then I express it either in writing or as part of a dinner toast.” Rajiv’s technique is a bit different than mine; I have a file on my phone with the big things: my parents are still with us and healthy, my family is doing well, etc. Rajiv goes with the little things instead of the big things. It turns out they both work.

One reason I wanted to talk to Rajiv is that these are kind of depressing times. Heck, even the holiday season is depressing for many as it gets colder and the sun isn’t out as much. We can all use a little bit of happiness nudging.

In addition to gratitude, Rajiv has a number of other techniques. “Don’t try to measure your progress so often. A lot of the time you’re in a plateau. A plateau can last for a while and then you level up. One day is definitely too short. One week or one month might also be too short. Now, if you don’t make progress in six months, that’s another story.”

Rajiv also says to define yourself and your activity accurately. “Look, I’m a comedian. I can be a comedian whether a certain joke worked or not, or a certain concept worked, I’m still working it out. If I define myself by what the market is saying or how much I made in a particular period, then I might think of myself a different way. Define yourself in a way that gives you the ability to grow.”

Rajiv is a very positive guy. “Out of 64 people in that first comedy competition that I won, I might be the only one who is still onstage.” But he also remembers giving someone some very unusual advice. “There was another comedian, I told him to quit. And it wasn’t because he wasn’t funny. The problem is he was getting less funny. You could tell. When that’s your trend, you should probably rethink your line of work. I saw him years later and he pulled me aside and said, ‘Thank you, you’re the only one who would tell me.’” Sometimes being positive means letting it go.

For my convo with Rajiv, click [here](https://yangspeaks.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7448319cdb745ea2fd1b1b8a8&id=077bcba6f9&e=0f227c2ae3). Find things to be grateful for. Happy Holidays and let the people in your life know how much they mean to you!
---
| **
Andrew Yang**
Co-Chair, Forward Party
[forwardparty.com](https://yangspeaks.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7448319cdb745ea2fd1b1b8a8&id=7bf6fb5579&e=0f227c2ae3)
[andrewyang.com](https://yangspeaks.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7448319cdb745ea2fd1b1b8a8&id=f74c516cbf&e=0f227c2ae3)
---
| | | Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://yangspeaks.us5.list-manage.com/profile?u=7448319cdb745ea2fd1b1b8a8&id=de65787ec1&e=0f227c2ae3&c=c0762ffe21) or [unsubscribe](https://yangspeaks.us5.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=7448319cdb745ea2fd1b1b8a8&id=de65787ec1&t=b&e=0f227c2ae3&c=c0762ffe21).
---

body:

| | |

| | | Because no one is above the law! | Dec 2, 2024

| RIGHTS AND FREEDOMS IN PERIL _"When it comes to fighting for the American people’s ‘right to know,’ no one holds a candle to Tom Fitton and his team at Judicial Watch"_ **\- Sean Hannity**

Tom Fitton returns with an exhaustive investigation into the progressive movement’s efforts to dismantle the venerable institutions of American rights and freedoms. [Order Tom Fitton's Must-Read Today!](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=71348&L=32849&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9qdWRpY2lhbHdhdGNoYm9vay5jb20/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249dGlwc2hlZXQmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=2d4ef7f355a4ae58114b59484ce7da67eecb4a6531f3b54561a26a85955f8099)

clean_body: Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton issued the following statement on Special Counsel Jack Smith moving to drop all charges against President Donald Trump... | | | | | | Because no one is above the law! | Dec 2, 2024 ---|---|--- | | | | RIGHTS AND FREEDOMS IN PERIL "When it comes to fighting for the American people’s ‘right to know,’ no one holds a candle to Tom Fitton and his team at Judicial Watch" \- Sean Hannity Tom Fitton returns with an exhaustive investigation into the progressive movement’s efforts to dismantle the venerable institutions of American rights and freedoms. Today's Top Stories | | | | | Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton issued the following statement on Special Counsel Jack Smith moving to drop all charges against President Donald Trump: At last this egregious political persecution comes to an end. This is a good day for the rule of law. The political decision to seek this dismissal is forced recognition that the American people essentially found President Trump innocent of the political and baseless lawfare charges brought against him by the Democratic Party machine. ---|--- | | | | | Thankfully, some positive news involving the national epidemic of local governments that protect criminal aliens from federal authorities. Legislators in North Carolina overrode the veto of the state’s Democratic governor to pass a bill that requires all local law enforcement agencies to cooperate with Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE). Under a program known as 287(g) local authorities are supposed to notify ICE of jail inmates in the country illegally, enhancing the safety and security of communities by creating partnerships with state and local police to identify and deport dangerous migrants amenable to removal from the United States. ---|--- | | | | | Judicial Watch announced recently that it received 274 pages of records from the U.S. Department of Homeland Security (DHS) revealing an extensive effort by government and non-government entities to monitor and censor social media posts on fraud during the 2020 election. ---|--- | | | | | Judicial Watch announced recently that through the Freedom of Information Act (FOIA), after almost 19 years, the Department of Defense produced 62 pages of records out of hundreds of previously withheld documents regarding the U.S. intelligence program “Operation Able Danger.” The Defense Department identified hundreds of pages of responsive records but withheld them, claiming the overwhelming majority are still classified to this day. ---|--- | | | The Daily Wire President Joe Biden celebrated Dr. Anthony Fauci, a divisive former government health official, as a “true hero” at the White House on Sunday. Tom Fitton, president of conservative watchdog group Judicial Watch, simply declared: “Fauci should be under criminal investigation.” VOX A majority of voters support President-elect Donald Trump declaring a national emergency to address the immigration crisis. So revealed a Napolitan News Service poll conducted online by Scott Rasmussen. According to the poll, 55% of voters favor the GOP president-elect’s plan. Meanwhile, 38% oppose the measure. Washington Examiner The group Judicial Watch is calling on the U.S. Supreme Court to reverse federal court rulings that upheld Illinois’ law allowing mail-in ballots to be counted for 14 days after Election Day. Roy Horras, a leader for an Illinois election integrity group, said that in a split decision, a Seventh Circuit U.S. Court of Appeals panel found that U.S. Rep. Mike Bost, R-Murphysboro, had no standing to challenge the provision. But now, the Fifth Circuit U.S. Court of Appeals just ruled in a separate Judicial Watch lawsuit that counting ballots received after Election Day is unlawful. | CLIPS | | | | | | Keep our investigators on the job uncovering the truth: | | | | | ---|---|--- Judicial Watch, Inc. 425 3rd St Sw Ste 800, Washington, DC 20024 202.646.5172 (C)2017-2024, All Rights Reserved |

| | [Qasim Rashid](https://substack.com/@qasimrashid)

I've never shied away from dialogue with conservatives, because I believe my arguments and positions stand up to scrutiny. So, when I received an invitation today to interview on a conservative program about Joe Biden pardoning his son, I happily accepted. Watch how I cite receipt after receipt to debunk their attempt to frame Donald Trump as a victim. Then, enjoy their backtracking as they realized that facts don't care about their feelings.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/0f29d4b6-e425-456a-bed5-a98986897c54?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Screenshot of interview. Full video of interview below.
Note -- the host flat out lied when he claimed that New York changed its statute of limitations law specifically to prosecute Trump. I declined to answer that allegation during the interview because I was unfamiliar with it, and I would rather simply admit I don't know something than misrepresent the truth.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/6eb799ba-dddf-455c-bc89-7dd58f0939c7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[In reality](https://substack.com/redirect/af8ab9da-2a71-4186-a1d1-65800d612b8c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), as I have since learned, New York did not arbitrarily change its statute of limitations rulings to attack Trump. New York had already _previously_ extended its statute of limitations in certain felony cases due to the COVID-19 pandemic, and that decision had absolutely nothing to do with Trump.
In short, Donald Trump is not the victim here. In my article earlier today I detailed the horrifying reality that those objecting to Biden pardoning his son also celebrate Trump pardoning convicted war criminals--[you can read that here](https://substack.com/redirect/efb3b30f-fb78-4746-a730-0cdf017dbfef?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). I am hopeful Joe Biden does not stop the pardons with his son, and instead extends pardons to ensure all Americans in need of protection receive the support they deserve.
**Before you go!** I am doing everything in my power over the next four years to stave off fascism in the United States, and I need your support. **Subscribe and join the movement.**

subject: Tomorrow is a Big Day...

| |

Support TFVC this Giving Tuesday! | [View in browser](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0yNjI2NjQyMjk0NzIzMzIwMjk4JmM9bzhlNCZlPTAmYj0xMzkyMTQxMTk1JmQ9ajdoNXQ2bQ==.OrU0CgJsZsnCnbDEiqUarT7akaFsv9JrGEsgVFZOrqA)
| | |

| | |
Tomorrow is Giving Tuesday! I hope that you are excited to give tomorrow or any day during this unique opportunity to boost amazing nonprofits all over the world. There will be many charities reaching out to you today, and we know that we have worthy competition, but let me take a moment to tell you about the life-changing mission of the Texans for Vaccine Choice Foundation. Not only are we educating people like your friends and families about vaccine risks and rights, but we are also taking our knowledge to Austin. Our foundation has been instrumental in teaching legislators about the harsh realities of vaccine injuries and why informed consent, medical privacy, and vaccine choice should be protected. Because of your support over the years, we have truly made a difference for the people of Texas, and we hope that you will help us expand our outreach. With Christmas just around the corner, it might seem like every dollar is accounted for, but your donation protects our future from the dangers of medical tyranny.

---
| |
---
| | [Give Today!](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0yNjI2NjQyMjk0NzIzMzIwMjk4JmM9bzhlNCZlPTAmYj0xMzkyMTQxMjAzJmQ9azBvOXcyZg==.7w9HqQQNqx2Fq1WmfDYXJErcqA0NxOOoPrtbSf5VsGA)
---
---
| | | Remember, the year will be over before you know it, so make those tax-deductible donations now before it’s too late. As we head into a new year, a gift of [$500, $250, or even $20.24](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0yNjI2NjQyMjk0NzIzMzIwMjk4JmM9bzhlNCZlPTAmYj0xMzkyMTQxMjA3JmQ9azd4NGk4Zw==.cPGwwYEotP4EA4tmSE-56658FYCrnqPAQqKfTj61_RY) will go a long way!
---
| |
---
| | |
---
| Gratefully,
---
| Rebecca Hardy
---
---
President, TFVC

| | |
P.S. Don’t forget to tell your friends about [Giving Tuesday](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0yNjI2NjQyMjk0NzIzMzIwMjk4JmM9bzhlNCZlPTAmYj0xMzkyMTQxMjExJmQ9ajNyMWg1cw==.r41g0stuPoLzu1OLKc_K5m5mBZtykUEvclw68-6bn1o) tomorrow and give before 2025!

Our foundation has been instrumental in teaching legislators about the harsh realities of vaccine injuries and why informed consent, medical privacy, and vaccine choice should be protected. Because of your support over the years, we have truly made a difference for the people of Texas, and we hope that you will help us expand our outreach. With Christmas just around the corner, it might seem like every dollar is accounted for, but your donation protects our future from the dangers of medical tyranny. | | | | | | | Remember, the year will be over before you know it, so make those tax-deductible donations now before it’s too late. As we head into a new year, a gift of will go a long way! | | | | | | Gratefully, | Rebecca Hardy President, TFVC | | | P.S. Don’t forget to tell your friends about tomorrow and give before 2025! | | | Texans for Vaccine Choice | | 1540 Keller Parkway, Ste 108, #166, Keller TX 76248 United States | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- You received this email because you signed up on our website or made a purchase from us.

subject: I Almost Got Kicked Out Of A LAKER Game The Other Night In LA... Good Laugh From A Wild Story
body:
The other night in LA, I almost got kicked out a Laker game... If you want a GOOD laugh then check out this WILD story. Watch it here: https://youtu
| | [](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17837552.9607.1.19f992b0ffe59d4d4f6349a7c026529a) |

The other night in **LA** , I almost got kicked out a **Laker** game... If you want a _GOOD laugh_ then check out this **WILD story**. Watch it here: [https://youtu.be/kVAHilLRt-I](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17837552.9608.1.bdb71a6edb8890edb389d048ad45f41b)

Recently at [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17837552.9611.1.a2f6a9b77b3194f64f3677fce22e44c3), I started a _mini-series_ within our _WKND series_ over the [Book of Acts](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17837552.9612.1.169755e08c87083f5340b940a9d69692). In **Acts 17** , the **Apostle Paul** spent 3 weeks in Thessalonica **reasoning** , **explaining** and **proving** **Jesus** from the Old Testament Scriptures. Therefore, I took the **Book of Genesis** and _reasoned_ , _explained_ and _proved_ **Jesus as Messiah** from those 50 chapters in the 1st book of the Bible. The next Sunday, we looked at Jesus in the **Book of Exodus**. I believe these sermons will really teach you some things that maybe you have never seen before from the _*Torah_. Watch "[Jesus In The Torah | Genesis](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17837552.9613.1.ef42a1fa179837acde6b93e99edbfbd5)" here: [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=634OIj06ZbU](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17837552.9614.1.ea84cf36fa877e952aedb6476510af78) **Upcoming Events At Sheridan.Church** -Saturday, December 7 @6pm: **Christmas Gala w/Mayor Giuliani** (6 tickets left) | RSVP: [https://www.tickettailor.com/events/sheridanchurch/1453870](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17837552.9615.1.77ccdb2a00ce37cdad4640587891b259) -Sunday, December 22 @10am: **Sheridan Christmas Concert** -Sunday, January 12 @10am: **Erick Stakelbeck** -Wednesday, February 26 @7pm: **Rabbi Jonathan Cahn** Please consider partnering with the mission of [Sheridan](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17837552.9616.1.31da04ec640d674c20fa162c938c1e4a): [https://sheridan.church/give](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17837552.9617.1.bdaa080767a0509a2ac517ea3550f741) Thank you,
Pastor Jackson Lahmeyer

Over the last year at [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17837552.9623.1.daf63195174f37360af009624c07a557), we have been BLESSED with so many great guest speakers from preachers to politicians to athletes and beyond. Including: [Perry Stone](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17837552.9624.1.bc49f1ba55a981d66aa440b8f29a5c11), **Tim Tebow** , [Donald Trump Jr](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17837552.9625.1.53ee6de2b4751676cb3ade8c072df989)., [Eric Trump](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17837552.9626.1.6ad7a43c98ceb7e9cbfdbbb659d409cd), [Lara Trump](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17837552.9627.1.313d76a12844ef5c7223641cb1a0c532), [Rabbi Jonathan Cahn](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17837552.9628.1.c1dd84e40881e76d555b3fd4af04aefc), [Darryl Strawberry](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17837552.9629.1.63d0476e5b5c8fef9a9ccc575931e3b2), **General Michael Flynn** , [Riley Gaines](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17837552.9630.1.ca33d30268b2f8c0b6adb486d9e4d51f), [Mayor Rudy Giuliani](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17837552.9631.1.f110c42ca7285c76e827a064e3a4d1e5), [Dr. Randy Caldwell](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17837552.9632.1.e66e64e3a9af8d7146e9a0c0fc3fd201), [Roger Stone](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17837552.9633.1.9d5de8c5dd3ca172db72a3b67e86a0bb), Rodney Howard-Browne and so many others...
But our first guest speaker of 2025, I am very excited about!
Mark your calendars for **Erick Stakelbeck** at [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17837552.9634.1.717e05a3ebafb6809ca682aef57fb79c) on Sunday, January 12 at 10am CT.
Erick's show on **TBN** is _phenomenal_ and that Sunday in January will be just as great!

name: Trent Staggs
subject: This is how Trump will save the country
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trent Staggs_
body:
| | | [ ](https://trentstaggs.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b4d3a67df0780c81313473198&id=83a1c00ad5&e=048116bc24)
---
| | Friends,

I am beyond thrilled that **Donald Trump won** the 2024 presidential election. He swept the swing states and won a decisive victory. This is exactly what our country needs and I am confident that when we look back on 2024 historians will mark this year as a pivotal moment in American history.

A lot is about to change in this country. Conservatives have long sought for a change-agent to dismantle the Federal administrative state and restore Congress' law making power and responsibility. Republican control of the House and Senate, combined with fantastic cabinet nominees by **Trump will give the GOP a once-in-a-lifetime opportunity** to institute accountable government as prescribed by the Constitution.

Let's make sure to hold our senators and representatives in Congress accountable in supporting these goals.
---
|
---
| I am particularly excited by Trump's nomination of **Kash Patel** as our next FBI director. I know Kash; he endorsed me in my campaign for U.S. Senate, and I am confident he will root out corruption at our country's top law enforcement agency.

I encourage you to ask our nation's Republican senators to **support Kash's nomination.**

I hope you all have a Merry Christmas with your family and friends. Stay tuned and I'll be in touch.

The best is yet to come!

Yours in freedom,
Trent Staggs
---
|
---

| **Wow, it’s official:** California has the final uncalled House race that will impact the balance of power in the U.S. House of Representatives. We have the opportunity to send Speaker Mike Johnson back to Washington with his smallest ever Majority — a margin so small that Democrats could potentially retake the U.S. House by winning special elections over the next year. **[But we need to flip this final seat from red to blue, and that means keeping our operations online to ensure every eligible vote is counted. We’re now in December and our budget has been pushed to the absolute max, will you help fund our efforts with a donation today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98033161/515379861/986905691?refcode=20241202_FR_90DO_LastUncalled&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzUvMS84MDk5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYjNiY2VhYi0yM2IxLWVmMTEtODhjZi02MDQ1YmRmZThkMjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=I08kCwUKP3ztlz5oHMbLyQT45qJKfZ64adujRoAHU9I=)** [CHIP IN $15 >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98033162/515379862/986905691?&refcode=20241202_FR_90DO_LastUncalled&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzUvMS84MDk5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYjNiY2VhYi0yM2IxLWVmMTEtODhjZi02MDQ1YmRmZThkMjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=I08kCwUKP3ztlz5oHMbLyQT45qJKfZ64adujRoAHU9I=) _Take a look at this map:_ [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98033163/515379863/986905691?refcode=20241202_FR_90DO_LastUncalled&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzUvMS84MDk5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYjNiY2VhYi0yM2IxLWVmMTEtODhjZi02MDQ1YmRmZThkMjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=I08kCwUKP3ztlz5oHMbLyQT45qJKfZ64adujRoAHU9I=) _These are all the U.S. House districts across the entire country. We know you have been so supportive this whole election cycle, and the Presidential result might have you questioning whether your support was worth it. **But your support has meant the world.** It’s *why* we have flipped multiple U.S. House seats from red to blue here in California and have already narrowed Mike Johnson’s Republican Majority. **[Will you please help us finish the job in this final uncalled race? clean_body: So, so small ... | = | Wow, it’s official: California has the final uncalled House race that will impact the balance of power in the U.S. House of Representatives. We have the opportunity to send Speaker Mike Johnson back to Washington with his smallest ever Majority — a margin so small that Democrats could potentially retake the U.S. House by winning special elections over the next year. = = Take a look at this map: = These are all the U.S. House districts across the entire country. And as of today, there is only one that is uncalled —California’s 13th Congressional District in our Central Valley. This was one of the closest races in 2022 as well, and it just narrowly went red. We don’t want that to happen again. Our teams are on the ground right now to ensure every single eligible vote is counted. If we can flip this seat blue, Speaker Mike Johnson will have an unbearably small majority and Democrats will have maximum leverage to hold Donald Trump accountable in the U.S. House. We know you have been so supportive this whole election cycle, and the Presidential result might have you questioning whether your support was worth it. But your support has meant the world. It’s why we have flipped multiple U.S. House seats from red to blue here in California and have already narrowed Mike Johnson’s Republican Majority. = = = = = = Thank you, \- CADEM | | = Our Democratic leaders are working hard to make California a better place to live. name: Speaker Johnson
subject: In the dead of night – Hunter Biden gets pardoned.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Johnson for Louisiana
body:
We’re not shocked. Are you?

| | | [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zgtqfs4sq15v4sc028stjnfa1dj0u42v8arngkag_rp22sh2s8i6epj6c9h6cor5cjh2bs)
---
Friend, Joe Biden lied again! Earlier this year, President Biden **_PROMISED_** he wouldn’t pardon his son Hunter for his crimes. Now, in the dead of night on Thanksgiving weekend, Joe Biden has pardoned his son for **_ALL OF HIS CRIMES!_** And it’s not just the crime he got convicted for, it’s **_ANY CRIME_** Hunter committed in the last **DECADE!** **_[What did Hunter Biden do that we don’t know about yet?](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zfv8t6q00qovnie7c1l5hprj7un9ku6t0o6clgjo_rp22sh2s8i6epj6c9h6cor5cjh2bs)_** The Biden family has caused almost irreparable damage to trust in our justice system, and reforms cannot come soon enough! Friend, we’ve got just one question for you as Republicans begin to organize our plans for when we take office as a trifecta: **[Should Republicans continue to investigate the corrupt establishments’ misconduct?](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zc0bfrbvhi0rksa3u716p704hall47pdc7orp0tg_rp22sh2s8i6epj6c9h6cor5cjh2bs)**

As a Constitutional lawyer, I firmly believe we must root out every bit of corruption in the DC Swamp. Thanks for standing with us. Sincerely, Speaker Johnson

name: Hillsdale College via American Action News
subject: Some social media companies won’t let us tell you this
body:
What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zgcicoa08edvmlsoo08ocf4j98hjliqrplcv2ke8_rp22sh2s8i6epj6c9h6cor5c1h2bs)

| | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zcnpkg533df1d7u2fvc766qis3olnans9eg52d60_rp22sh2s8i6epj6c9h6cor5c1h2bs) Dear Fellow American,

A few years ago, members of the world's elite met at the annual World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland, and launched the Great Reset initiative.

What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

In short, they aim to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, "We need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, their plan would also have the effect of destroying our American way of life.

This initiative is not merely about economic reform. It is an attempt to impose global rule by so-called experts.

Some social media companies are censoring our efforts to promote a seminar we hosted on the Hillsdale campus that explored the topic of the Great Reset. Fortunately, we can communicate directly with you.

In this seminar, we...
* Consider the idea of the Great Reset and its implications for America.
* Explore how the ideology of “woke capitalism” is infiltrating large corporations.
* Delve into pro-freedom alternatives to this tyrannical plan.

**Sign up now using the secure link below, and we 'll send the Great Reset seminar lectures--absolutely free--directly to your inbox.**

[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/the-great-reset-cca/](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z0h50njqqoi06072u8lhf3icu195q8mijr8lj74g_rp22sh2s8i6epj6c9h6cor5c1h2bs)

Don't miss this opportunity to learn lessons that are essential to the defense of American liberty.

Use the link above to receive your Great Reset video series today.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

name: Hillsdale College via First Look News
subject: What is the Great Reset?
body:
What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

This sponsored message from First Look News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zi5v698cnhc4btg98f2jj8q30c1g5coobnaq36g0_rp22sh2s8i6epj6c9h62pb2cdh2bs)
---
| | [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z4r4bpu6cv50mvpse0474031oitv38osq5va1dmo_rp22sh2s8i6epj6c9h62pb2cdh2bs) Dear Fellow American,

A few years ago, members of the world's elite met at the annual World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland, and launched the Great Reset initiative.

What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

In short, they aim to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, "We need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, their plan would also have the effect of destroying our American way of life.

This initiative is not merely about economic reform. It is an attempt to impose global rule by so-called experts.

Some social media companies are censoring our efforts to promote a seminar we hosted on the Hillsdale campus that explored the topic of the Great Reset. Fortunately, we can communicate directly with you.

In this seminar, we...
* Consider the idea of the Great Reset and its implications for America.
* Explore how the ideology of “woke capitalism” is infiltrating large corporations.
* Delve into pro-freedom alternatives to this tyrannical plan.

**Sign up now using the secure link below, and we 'll send the Great Reset seminar lectures--absolutely free--directly to your inbox.**

[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/the-great-reset-cca/](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z6soceb4nibcv5svdn2lh06ij7e1ulacoisu8ba0_rp22sh2s8i6epj6c9h62pb2cdh2bs)

Don't miss this opportunity to learn lessons that are essential to the defense of American liberty.

Use the link above to receive your Great Reset video series today.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
| |
---

_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

subject: There’s a lot going on.

body:
But we need to stay FOCUSED!

| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z9fveg3k68ueig3l6p8khmp36b1660di72e2m4b0_rp22sh2s8i6epj6c9h6eoj4chh2bs)
---
Friend, we have a lot going on right now. Cabinet appointments are flying. We have a new Senate Majority Leader. I was unanimously nominated to be re-elected as Speaker of the House. And the America First agenda is moving FULL STEAM AHEAD! **_[But there’s something I must ask you to stay focused on: Our Republican House majority is RAZOR thin and we need to fortify our resources as much as possible in the last weeks of the year.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zpmtr5hvpk6pmjgdb0qu46h91n6l4cdr3g9ntjig_rp22sh2s8i6epj6c9h6eoj4chh2bs)_**

I cannot overstate how critical it is that we defend our House GOP majority against ALL attacks from the radical left. Without the House majority, the road to implementing President Trump’s agenda becomes extremely difficult. **_[**_So I am requesting your immediate support to enable my team and I to DEFEND the House majority as we face a number of Special Elections across the country!_**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zebgsg2m9sqdl20q7q5k9t6s4upcjs88606j09i8_rp22sh2s8i6epj6c9h6eoj4chh2bs)_**

name: The Liberty Ledger
subject: Journalist John Harwood gets hammered over previous claim about Hunter Biden pardon
body:
Mainstream media journalist John Harwood was mocked into oblivion for a June post about the possibility of a presidential pardon for Hunter Biden. Harwood appeared to deride the character of those who did not believe President Joe Biden's statements that he would not pardon his son over numerous charges, including gun and tax crimes. 'He is an example of why no one trusts the press anymore.' "People who insist Biden will pardon Hunter after specifically ruling it out are telling on themselves," he wrote, "they can't imagine someone acting on principle and keeping his word. | [](http://trk.libertyledger.)

Bill
Gray, '01

Hillsdale
College

subject: We have 48 days to get this done
disclaimer_text: paid for by Evergreen Action
body:
And it's possible with your help: TRIPLE your gift!
| | | | [](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3094219/87SdQ4wZ) |
---|---|---
---
| Friend,

After a bruising election year, are you hungry for some potential climate wins?

How about a chance for us to reject **six mega-polluting fossil gas projects** before Trump moves back into the White House?

It's possible if we act fast, and [**right now a generous donor is TRIPLING all gifts made to Evergreen Action this #GivingTuesday to help us make it happen.**](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3094220/87SdQ4wZ) Every dollar counts, and every dollar you donate until midnight tonight can count three times as much. |
---
[TRIPLE YOUR IMPACT](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3094221/87SdQ4wZ)
---
---
| Here's why [**a donation today could be one of the most effective gifts you could give the climate**](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3094222/87SdQ4wZ), _especially_ in this dark season for democracy...

Here's the opportunity. Weve got less than 50 days to make the most of President Biden's remaining time in office. If we can bring enough pressure, our climate policy experts have identified three hugely impactful ways Biden and our climate movement can Trump-proof our climate wins before inauguration day. **Our first target is to get President Biden to reject six super-polluting liquefied natural gas (LNG) projects.**

If we can meet our **$25,000 match goal** by midnight tonight, your TRIPLED gift today will: |
---
|
* Fund a targeted campaign to pressure the Biden administration to block these disastrous projects.
* Help us push the Department of Energy to reject all remaining LNG export authorizations.
* Amplify the voices of frontline communities fighting back against these fossil fuel giants.

|
---
| If President Biden doesn't act, these mega-polluting projects could be approved and locked in for decades. In this fraught lame-duck season, we must keep the pressure on to ensure Biden listens to us, not Big Oil.

**We have just 48 days.** Evergreen Action knows that smart, targeted policy moves right now can Trump-proof our wins and stymie his climate-denying agenda. We can buy crucial time for frontline communities and the broader movement to fight back. **We need to stay smart, get loud, and act fast.**

With your support, we can pour everything we've got into amplifying the demands of frontline communities, powering grassroots campaigns, and showing Biden that his climate legacy depends on bold action now.

**Our solidarity matters more than ever:**[**Make our climate progress stronger and protected with your tripled gift today.**](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3094223/87SdQ4wZ) |
---
[DONATE NOW](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3094224/87SdQ4wZ)
---
---
| This is our moment. Let's seize it before it's too late. |
---
| | |
---
### Jessica Hamilton
Director of Digital Advocacy and Platforms
Evergreen Action
