name: Amanda Chase
subject: My "Why" for Running for Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Amanda Chase
body:
Watch this 5 minute video
| | | | Greetings! Here's the Real Reason I'm Running for Senate
---
---
|
# Please Watch this 5 Minute Video
---
| | [](https://byh4wqwab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001XNKZfFZMFoFackN6RRJ4iVTb9-hEAKMJhxFpHnS1CfoASEMpGZnv2cN9L9MuFMqThQUyI4Pt8hHgqoRoMBpt99l2hPWIrltlL0jhbdjkps3AofiO50j938RY94NBaIrSVnIlYzEujhZKqP5LehGUxvCsdsnabM-d&c=YKiFaOcbAT0gPVoWlaRlvAZzh4j2-iaXrZQQS-hqGYCxQinSmwPO_w==&ch=8SqWQVuP_Sz8s0CbNtsS-ATa2EScqImFFpXbvzfB0Zm_JuNS8OF0gA==)
---
| Greetings!, I'm not a typical politician. Although I've served in the Virginia Senate for 8 years, I've never forgotten the grassroots who have supported me over the years.
Since 2019, I have not taken a dime from political action committees and lobbyists. My campaigns are run by volunteers, not paid operatives, and funded by donations from "We the People."
I've challenged the status quo in Richmond, when I believed it was not in the best interest of "We the People," who many times take a backseat to the lobbyists who drive the policy in Richmond.
I've never forgotten that I work for you, not the special interest groups.
I've been put to the test, and I've prevailed. I never gave in to the political pressure. I'm tested, proven, reliable and trusted by those who have followed my journey over the past 10 years. I'm thankful and honored to be a trusted politician who has a history of fighting for the people.
This is your opportunity to send me back to the Virginia Senate, so that I can put my 8 years of experience and knowledge to work for the people of Senate District 10. While there are many others running, I'm the only one who has the experience, knowledge and conservative voting record that you can trust.
For those who have not followed me, I hope you will watch this 5 minute video to better understand my "why" behind why I'm running for state senate.
Voting will take place on Friday, December 13, which is only 10 days away.
I'm running for state senate in a Special Election to fill John McGuire's term in the Virginia Senate to represent Amelia, Appomattox, Buckingham, Cumberland, Prince Edward, Fluvanna, Goochland, Louisa, Western Hanover, the Shady Grove precinct in Henrico and Powhatan counties.
The Republican Mass Meeting will be held Friday, December 13 at the Goochland Sports Complex, located at 1800 Sandy Hook Road, Goochland, Virginia 23063. Registration at the door begins at 4:30pm and ends at 6:30pm. Any registered voter may participate. You will need to bring your driver's license with you.
I hope you will save the date and join us.
---
| |
---
The Republican Mass meeting takes place Friday, December 13. The General Election when we face our Democrat opponent will most likely be Tuesday, January 7. The Senate will gavel in the very next day, Wednesday, January 8 at noon. Why would you vote for anyone else?
I'm the only candidate of the 7 running, that will be able to hit the ground running day one. You can't expect a newly elected candidate with little to no experience to successfully serve senate district 10, the day after they've been sworn into office and finishing off a Senate term that's already underway. There are thousand of bills that must be reviewed and dealt with all within 30 to 45 days.
Senators have full days of committee meetings in the morning, session that begins at noon and more committee meetings in the afternoon, which typically don't end until dinner time. If you're not used to the fast pace of the General Assembly and understand the flow of the legislation, you will get steamrolled.
There's absolutely no time for training or getting up to speed. The choice is clear. Today I humbly ask for your support and your vote.
Thank you! For God & Country,
---
|
---
Served as a Virginia State Senator from 2016-2023
---
| |
---

You won’t find higher quality night vision for a better price.

name: From the Desk of the COO
subject: Exclusive MATCH offer
body:
Give now to DOUBLE the value of your gift for service members
[](https://www.uso.org)
[MATCH MY GIFT*](https://links.e.uso.)
---
★ ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ ★
---
[](https://links.e.uso.)
[GOAL:** $500,000 **](https://links.e.uso.)
[DEADLINE: **MIDNIGHT TONIGHT**](https://links.e.uso.)
[](https://links.e.uso.)
[**TODAY, all gifts
will be DOUBLED to support
our heroes in uniform**](https://links.e.uso.)
| | [MATCH YOUR GIFT](https://links.e.uso.org/els/v2/mWbZT-E77LQr/eTEwdVFEMDJQemlDZ0lLY2J0T2N0Uy9qWHFMMUZ5WHJ3QS9IOXJreWVWUzVrSlg1UnRoSGVNNjNybmNGbUNBTWRiTWJ3eHN0cE8rT1RmYlBqTlFweUNZV1NwRWd3V1ZIdWN2dzNndmZ1Zms9S0/bm5FVk5yU3ZSMlRkdWJYS3d3VmxNUXJPcmNVS2lLalpKdk93cWNlQ01ld1p0akxWOWpYUGRBQisrSnpRWlBUWE8xckwraFVueXFLOE5PL3BjblZuR1NkUHVVY3lDZUsvS0)
---
We've got three important reasons for reaching out so early on Giving Tuesday:
1. Supporting those who serve: We know you support our service members and their families, who make countless sacrifices for our country.
2. Limited-time MATCH: Our friends at Jeep® are MATCHING all gifts, dollar for dollar, up to a total of $125,000, to help us reach our $500,000 Giving Tuesday goal before midnight tonight.
3. Holiday Support: Many service members are currently preparing for a holiday season deployed far from their loved ones. We need _you_ to help us support these heroes and provide them with connections to home, care packages and other vital support year-round. **[Will you make a MATCHED donation now?](https://links.e.uso.)**

[MATCH YOUR GIFT](https://links.e.uso.org/els/v2/2dpGh-YqqEQa/eTEwdVFEMDJQemlDZ0lLY2J0T2N0Uy9qWHFMMUZ5WHJ3QS9IOXJreWVWUzVrSlg1UnRoSGVNNjNybmNGbUNBTWRiTWJ3eHN0cE8rT1RmYlBqTlFweUNZV1NwRWd3V1ZIdWN2dzNndmZ1Zms9S0/bm5FVk5yU3ZSMlRkdWJYS3d3VmxNUXJPcmNVS2lLalpKdk93cWNlQ01ld1p0akxWOWpYUGRBQisrSnpRWlBUWE8xckwraFVueXFLOE5PL3BjblZuR1NkUHVVY3lDZUsvS0)

When service calls for sacrifice, our heroes in uniform step up for us. >From giving up their holidays at home to serve their country, to responding to natural disasters like Hurricanes Helene and Milton, our service members continually put their country first -- no matter the cost.
Today, will you answer the call for them? **When you make a tax-deductible gift this Giving Tuesday, every dollar will be worth TWICE as much to help ensure these heroes and their families have all of the support they need, especially during the holidays.**
**[So please, donate $29 or more by midnight tonight and have the value of every dollar DOUBLED to support our service members:](https://links.e.uso.)**

I'm reaching out to you today because I'd like to send you your **2025 Hillsdale College calendar**.

I know, I know. It's a little early to be thinking about 2025. But since you're someone who cares about liberty, I wanted to make sure you had this chance to receive your 2025 calendar.

This calendar is a small thank-you gift for everyone who helps our efforts to reach and teach Americans about our nation's great heritage of liberty.

You can make a tremendous difference for our country.

**That 's why I hope you'll claim your 2025 Hillsdale College calendar by October 31.** You can reserve your calendar by clicking on this secure link:

**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/2025calendar](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=85ecf4a52c764fee972aa52536282297&_e=nw7QMUx38zKRC8nPZbM6-_7rv1mVmRvzlZBHyX4Dv-I3NyQU2Yn-YEmggrSA3hZPFfxISGl8vkLbZN_Uo7kEvLA25PEJXpkfOZ2MbmqxREWpILdfjZC0SxQvlwLtda0upH5RpTEVaYmCdq_nCI6-peobAZKvhacpzOPEQ5dFWOSyoVBeWYWvyd--H4gtjaxyaRwEHi2EWCGxUTduuRjGY3PloOJwG0Bn9N93eNyTa31SZk34RpnHXQLRh2QbDLTW5rbnLPH9lJE40JsvjyFhMHsv-LglOdbAzUH2-QmVpYgtAoFvRW-jx3zXlZmxLLPALcGLARpOz5bdHz3Uafzfb_nCBHFPNZ-FGQI6U4pxb7maWtViNx4oFi8X36rdP1eZh6BCPwLqz_W7PZ81sj3Kmg%3D%3D)**

name: @BlueAmpAction
subject: Dr. Oz AGAIN?!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC
body:
Another clown to deal with under Trump 🤡
| | | |
---
| | | | |
---
| _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T70035149-6a93-42f8-8e12-033b6b6b7faf/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
| Peter – another clown was picked to be part of the Trump circus. Mehmet Oz – the doctor we saw on midday TV and failed wannabe Senator of Pennsylvania – is now going to be IN CHARGE OF MEDICARE AND MEDICAID under ROBERT F. KENNEDY JR. [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T63acf58c-1e45-4fcc-a885-dff94d4b3618/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [HELP US PROTECT MEDICARE](https://default.salsalabs.org/T50356ca9-3121-4f9a-b7bf-313e2015a811/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | | It’s clear that the Trump administration wants to stay in the spotlight, and he chose someone who has vowed TO PRIVATIZE MEDIACARE. His plans could cut access for millions of Americans, leading to dangerous consequences. That’s especially bad when you realize Oz has told people that he thinks uninsured Americans don’t have a “right to health”. What a ridiculous thing for a “medical professional” to say. Somehow, he’s supposed to work with RFK Jr. “to make America healthy again” – whatever that means – when these two don’t have ANY experience working in the government. [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6ffb1104-631e-46e6-94f4-885d9995f28c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [HELP US PROTECT MEDICARE](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta5cf54c3-7758-4647-a938-96e6bfe01c7c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| [Peter – healthcare access for MILLIONS OF AMERICANS will be on the line this November. Will you show your support for protecting Medicare by chipping in $10 or more today?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5bef8eca-8dbe-4c53-a631-5bf48b7ecfc7/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2ba249ea-db52-4dce-80a7-6df78180e1c4/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Hillsdale College via Conservative Liberty Wire
subject: What is the Great Reset?
body:
What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c06954c6f6ce4ddaa91b93cc450bbbd3&_e=SeHVxkv_Aj3kFQdiYYvBuxC-RDEWL4Z_1p7DpyobeSfXRJ4kXA3eHBP959D_EoMUG-QfJ-HcSfvWY3QtpNppTMhznw5rhOM7qbfAhfMQ8VlwyxmQBcKR3ju8jVZ_bzucA2jVFYvstXtX-6NUl3flGcusmKh9kFSh__wHTdBeq-IUZdplxHnja7LasET_awpahs6tIMJO5OeDR29tMI053ozVPAzxShgL9XcJA-Aui38IrnRnRUvO1lpj-vsOLEbJNN4shrRFoicluz4nRo3Vm2OzC4gwTXXm8qZcIw897yhnHBd5PA5vASrlbd38K8d8I9Zp30vFHUl9U5VdJvJdlQyjgAK03xr6dQCadLSzvhFn4ksFB06lEhknipvQhhUwZ6CBZ7R5_gMWvpSv34Bc3g%3D%3D)
---
| | [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c06954c6f6ce4ddaa91b93cc450bbbd3&_e=SeHVxkv_Aj3kFQdiYYvBuxC-RDEWL4Z_1p7DpyobeSfXRJ4kXA3eHBP959D_EoMUG-QfJ-HcSfvWY3QtpNppTMhznw5rhOM7qbfAhfMQ8VlwyxmQBcKR3ju8jVZ_bzucA2jVFYvstXtX-6NUl3flGcusmKh9kFSh__wHTdBeq-IUZdplxHnja7LasET_awpahs6tIMJO5OeDR29tMI053ozVPAzxShgL9XcJA-Aui38IrnRnRUvO1lpj-vsOLEbJqDwcUoWMIGB9UK3bD3EZCJoJvxdEwmSP_7lydjoq1gXtV0rDnVPOjI2RHc5kpB0gXMTKKVAYK-tXGAo6vf4gmutMaXHGcdNDwphS-B47IMnRCJB5Q5_25W4tKiO5HdGv2LgQpkzpTHtS78piJVfhAQ%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American,

A few years ago, members of the world's elite met at the annual World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland, and launched the Great Reset initiative.

What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

In short, they aim to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, "We need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, their plan would also have the effect of destroying our American way of life.

This initiative is not merely about economic reform. It is an attempt to impose global rule by so-called experts.

Some social media companies are censoring our efforts to promote a seminar we hosted on the Hillsdale campus that explored the topic of the Great Reset. Fortunately, we can communicate directly with you.

In this seminar, we...
* Consider the idea of the Great Reset and its implications for America.
* Explore how the ideology of “woke capitalism” is infiltrating large corporations.
* Delve into pro-freedom alternatives to this tyrannical plan.

**Sign up now using the secure link below, and we 'll send the Great Reset seminar lectures--absolutely free--directly to your inbox.**

[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/the-great-reset-cca/](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c06954c6f6ce4ddaa91b93cc450bbbd3&_e=SeHVxkv_Aj3kFQdiYYvBuxC-RDEWL4Z_1p7DpyobeSfXRJ4kXA3eHBP959D_EoMUG-QfJ-HcSfvWY3QtpNppTMhznw5rhOM7qbfAhfMQ8VlwyxmQBcKR3ju8jVZ_bzucA2jVFYvstXtX-6NUl3flGcusmKh9kFSh__wHTdBeq-IUZdplxHnja7LasET_awpahs6tIMJO5OeDR29tMI053ozVPAzxShgL9XcJA-Aui38IrnRnRUvO1lpj-vsOLEbJXqSlSuxOwtsKa5THz1UmaWsVAeLQr6wvKg7doWi6Q3t1NeFcqnPgy33bj129zNt3JXuwwKa0wbngvN0Km7BkeXAb7Kc2j1Mac0d0aRSWdPz3zy-MF7OZDdCoA3pMp8YdnGw8sGVbURs7Nh_pFQywSg%3D%3D)

Don't miss this opportunity to learn lessons that are essential to the defense of American liberty.

Use the link above to receive your Great Reset video series today.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

| | | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=75b03b56159c40439055a09c0521a8af&_e=1Fdsi36IkwcoSL3LVk2mUJGEFyglfSTTXxTBjyA_psZUJWd4Lf47aTu2u7YIK-CtonKo42lwl4Owp4nJLd894dSCDsmjZNBI6OelWGGKBvo5_RqQzOgU9UM0BvERaMmsQk9FLVTjYMl4Ij5II0zD_p_sROAAQ_SwClMOzS3yritnNkmOQLTKKjn2dlNmfm6rsf92bZI_28_UQX2JosQSktDWboRMLDyXjb46mopH9ohf81G6a0-wqKQqgjR9RigpXfafO6fPIBHXhFEVyiHVNtd5oa-WZVFcRb-91QT9uOtF-bTFAsdp5CI_lvln6ORxj_6yMZTSc8trupLGcifRcIP5gpsG-0AdYiRuJEwd9mJCxsHbSxktgc9jG5jrozp4NOenvp-brfYdrwNtfvxosycqI5aPA9BHiQFyBCKvJGnt2XzFpdyOG3W2FZRBlBKVLjs5uBLc1PtPhyGwVFrxeg%3D%3D)

**Friend, I’ve opened this up exclusively for TOP PATRIOTS like you!** Guiding our country back on track is absolutely critical for the future of our country and our Party. What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

This sponsored message from Restore Our Nation is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/J05AVQnvPI4b4MmDiZywpw~~/AARclAA~/RgRpMX6gP0SsaHR0cHM6Ly9scC5oaWxsc2RhbGUuZWR1L3RoZS1ncmVhdC1yZXNldC1jY2EvP3NjPTAwMTIzTjAyNDJMMDZET0RFRVMmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wcm9zcGVjdGluZyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj10aGVncmVhdHJlc2V0JnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUJFTkVGSVRTX1BBLVJPTi0yMDI0MTIwM1cDc3BjQgpnRsvlTmceoiE_UhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)

| | [](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/J05AVQnvPI4b4MmDiZywpw~~/AARclAA~/RgRpMX6gP0SsaHR0cHM6Ly9scC5oaWxsc2RhbGUuZWR1L3RoZS1ncmVhdC1yZXNldC1jY2EvP3NjPTAwMTIzTjAyNDJMMDZET0RFRVMmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wcm9zcGVjdGluZyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj10aGVncmVhdHJlc2V0JnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUJFTkVGSVRTX1BBLVJPTi0yMDI0MTIwM1cDc3BjQgpnRsvlTmceoiE_UhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~) Dear Fellow American,

A few years ago, members of the world's elite met at the annual World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland, and launched the Great Reset initiative.

What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

In short, they aim to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, "We need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, their plan would also have the effect of destroying our American way of life.

This initiative is not merely about economic reform. It is an attempt to impose global rule by so-called experts.

Some social media companies are censoring our efforts to promote a seminar we hosted on the Hillsdale campus that explored the topic of the Great Reset. Fortunately, we can communicate directly with you.

In this seminar, we...
* Consider the idea of the Great Reset and its implications for America.
* Explore how the ideology of “woke capitalism” is infiltrating large corporations.
* Delve into pro-freedom alternatives to this tyrannical plan.

**Sign up now using the secure link below, and we 'll send the Great Reset seminar lectures--absolutely free--directly to your inbox.**

[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/the-great-reset-cca/](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/J05AVQnvPI4b4MmDiZywpw~~/AARclAA~/RgRpMX6gP0SsaHR0cHM6Ly9scC5oaWxsc2RhbGUuZWR1L3RoZS1ncmVhdC1yZXNldC1jY2EvP3NjPTAwMTIzTjAyNDJMMDZET0RFRVMmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wcm9zcGVjdGluZyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj10aGVncmVhdHJlc2V0JnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUJFTkVGSVRTX1BBLVJPTi0yMDI0MTIwM1cDc3BjQgpnRsvlTmceoiE_UhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)

Don't miss this opportunity to learn lessons that are essential to the defense of American liberty.

Use the link above to receive your Great Reset video series today.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

subject: Some social media companies won’t let us tell you this
body:
What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

This sponsored message from Full Mag News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c31001000d58471c888fbea1f38ad83e&_e=Shk1Y6VB6p0ynnIR-HiLdeaq19Z2UlkOd_ST7YCG0fRFs_gslOxynH_pnU3DjSVXCLPb5DjzurEKKGPIOo-ajMp69KFzDVHCLFJwga2iJc4GvMHgrTkReR_A5FLJkxwJMjcRFdAulL-t-bd8yK-EqDLdyoFcnjQHx4w1gwORj5SwDkgCri5iKAenoRO-0jQZ1myTF-1DFJNQPhfwC57vnEhDsOzgiaoRgHWR17dc2ruRzmJvOlrLQmBRLuBVKe6A6IiIRlkr5EPwtOQeHtTIlhW708eSUY5vss-6SPNJp8-CihLMgJ6lmO7lBRD7UgUTaJuv4eoOc_3SQi79-DQkOwKu1WBuQYfZNtHw6KukwiG2Bbq1jYf1ecou4h_APCBtbVmgwAUJ8LSVGTingQ_VIg%3D%3D)

| | [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c31001000d58471c888fbea1f38ad83e&_e=Shk1Y6VB6p0ynnIR-HiLdeaq19Z2UlkOd_ST7YCG0fRFs_gslOxynH_pnU3DjSVXCLPb5DjzurEKKGPIOo-ajMp69KFzDVHCLFJwga2iJc4GvMHgrTkReR_A5FLJkxwJMjcRFdAulL-t-bd8yK-EqDLdyoFcnjQHx4w1gwORj5SwDkgCri5iKAenoRO-0jQZ1myTF-1DFJNQPhfwC57vnEhDsOzgiaoRgHWR17dc2ruRzmJvOlrLQmBRLuBVKe6AHj-EIpx075RfQzaUSw2nSYDpLv6eyjSilpnyJ7PtsO76qmhjjxwcQixI4BOyH_fGpppLVdG6EKTEjq2jgL-w904im7owH_-97bXy8gORnptDfGMtoglsrWQcU5NIZa-Y1hQEC_hvqTozQuQP562y2w%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American,

A few years ago, members of the world's elite met at the annual World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland, and launched the Great Reset initiative.

What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

In short, they aim to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, "We need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, their plan would also have the effect of destroying our American way of life.

This initiative is not merely about economic reform. It is an attempt to impose global rule by so-called experts.

Some social media companies are censoring our efforts to promote a seminar we hosted on the Hillsdale campus that explored the topic of the Great Reset. Fortunately, we can communicate directly with you.

In this seminar, we...
* Consider the idea of the Great Reset and its implications for America.
* Explore how the ideology of "woke capitalism" is infiltrating large corporations.
* Delve into pro-freedom alternatives to this tyrannical plan.

**Sign up now using the secure link below, and we 'll send the Great Reset seminar lectures--absolutely free--directly to your inbox.**

[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/the-great-reset-cca/](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c31001000d58471c888fbea1f38ad83e&_e=Shk1Y6VB6p0ynnIR-HiLdeaq19Z2UlkOd_ST7YCG0fRFs_gslOxynH_pnU3DjSVXCLPb5DjzurEKKGPIOo-ajMp69KFzDVHCLFJwga2iJc4GvMHgrTkReR_A5FLJkxwJMjcRFdAulL-t-bd8yK-EqDLdyoFcnjQHx4w1gwORj5SwDkgCri5iKAenoRO-0jQZ1myTF-1DFJNQPhfwC57vnEhDsOzgiaoRgHWR17dc2ruRzmJvOlrLQmBRLuBVKe6AjKt2lINXz642jtKq6aY56cxfU6_WzI32aAip2AC20JyIc0RQLoHD0DPLUtb1OTBopCovCwJrfunaDRTlihXrbEtrfIJ2SzgWtJ7rTduLJhu8zibk8IctwaQKg5CQInYPaG3GFue6TzZeRUCLWic1JA%3D%3D)

Don't miss this opportunity to learn lessons that are essential to the defense of American liberty.

Use the link above to receive your Great Reset video series today.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

| | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ac52bc650a0840bba4af71d9e6ae3792&_e=eCxbbusitO4GXoFswsOpxp-boUpHZF3T8zWypW9YvpbfR3BOUxfvnpU7GqYHQddhZ94xWm-OPUi5Nddeh5p_EJJYt2HihspW0r2kCu9kdYr8KiA70dwcRzx63PR5wFcqZ1dWGIusKC7XK5jT8q08yLQH3jr7_5L5Av-wC2PBqig2xYm0k4ITB_76eZhYWl9CKk_2RuJi_aD9-WuZdPW6_n_LIBCReR3LxCggyDHtcumXpuf6BaUl5cS9dt8i4DO9hTBvGzZvdFbOS0ZyCs_sP18EZ6kae6ct9B2zE-cMAK13HxOkGDyVZZ0RFhOfea0bhRxxKYzylf78INRGcJMG3HAM9JYg10FkBoYZMSRqgux6XE3oAsscHZqnoaYDjiuMqUHwQsFfONVHpp2Ql_pNLA%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American,

I'm reaching out to you today because I'd like to send you your **2025 Hillsdale College calendar**.

I know, I know. It's a little early to be thinking about 2025. But since you're someone who cares about liberty, I wanted to make sure you had this chance to receive your 2025 calendar.

This calendar is a small thank-you gift for everyone who helps our efforts to reach and teach Americans about our nation's great heritage of liberty.

You can make a tremendous difference for our country.

name: Hillsdale College via Defend the Constitution
subject: What is the Great Reset?
body:
What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

This sponsored message from Defend the Constitution is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4ef29af77b954953aa51e215e10f6479&_e=2GEmGNGvo8Dm5OiDwtjGNK_0CFWZ4rcBhArz_3CixnWsplRnZvZSD1SLsCR6V3ulbTjEAqeZ8yIjG8Vx-SEMxR3BWvH_7be4DOmDnxeXeDnLgKAtBoBUSWGl_N-bNAZbADvePMZIztCEwaUa8rat86suUt7d4-l0Grp4Fb8pnW5zBtr2jYYmyPBJ5yZfxNX24dLKiCD8g1_2SUYqdhRp3grBLENRkOUadgw2cTAgJuF6VpFfIK6Klk5YaPJiWe2r88Xhhm-OfqodRlAQvCM-VdiuUCMBppLMPOXtTQwKcV2h91FnWZ0ggnxIsZE5rkxKWINhzntiEFpUOmAPOXdMPBVgTqPker3dW48aSX5kAYGkGXsainn6UN8CZGKGA64Q34bePhtxVdkXZWnOgrO25w%3D%3D)
---
| | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4ef29af77b954953aa51e215e10f6479&_e=2GEmGNGvo8Dm5OiDwtjGNK_0CFWZ4rcBhArz_3CixnWsplRnZvZSD1SLsCR6V3ulbTjEAqeZ8yIjG8Vx-SEMxR3BWvH_7be4DOmDnxeXeDnLgKAtBoBUSWGl_N-bNAZbADvePMZIztCEwaUa8rat86suUt7d4-l0Grp4Fb8pnW5zBtr2jYYmyPBJ5yZfxNX24dLKiCD8g1_2SUYqdhRp3grBLENRkOUadgw2cTAgJuF6VpFfIK6Klk5YaPJiWe2rAjCvtuKdAAeV52txwwzOynZoSBRW4NXoa_BmQWmtW_PJ_lTUCIQqmvvWwuWQBEDvP6Rs4VbLrXllLwPFZKIPkVY2x9KZq0nDGOO1SkhA1gyYNR8GPOhLOdDn72BHF6T1MnfF4Ph7nR3Dxa0r23a1PA%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American,

A few years ago, members of the world's elite met at the annual World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland, and launched the Great Reset initiative.

What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

In short, they aim to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, "We need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, their plan would also have the effect of destroying our American way of life.

This initiative is not merely about economic reform. It is an attempt to impose global rule by so-called experts.

Some social media companies are censoring our efforts to promote a seminar we hosted on the Hillsdale campus that explored the topic of the Great Reset. Fortunately, we can communicate directly with you.

In this seminar, we...
* Consider the idea of the Great Reset and its implications for America.
* Explore how the ideology of “woke capitalism” is infiltrating large corporations.
* Delve into pro-freedom alternatives to this tyrannical plan.

**Sign up now using the secure link below, and we 'll send the Great Reset seminar lectures--absolutely free--directly to your inbox.**

[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/the-great-reset-cca/](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4ef29af77b954953aa51e215e10f6479&_e=2GEmGNGvo8Dm5OiDwtjGNK_0CFWZ4rcBhArz_3CixnWsplRnZvZSD1SLsCR6V3ulbTjEAqeZ8yIjG8Vx-SEMxR3BWvH_7be4DOmDnxeXeDnLgKAtBoBUSWGl_N-bNAZbADvePMZIztCEwaUa8rat86suUt7d4-l0Grp4Fb8pnW5zBtr2jYYmyPBJ5yZfxNX24dLKiCD8g1_2SUYqdhRp3grBLENRkOUadgw2cTAgJuF6VpFfIK6Klk5YaPJiWe2r_FUjHEjdYPO-zeo_OgecX4nmqESptkmUiebEYdUYtTlzAWxR6n78EzqEVU2b3TiC5WSXXWK0ki583QLmgfZJ32t0foyIgGAxtcdA46L690-hXhWHORC5lrVwhRqEF2S1riNQQamobM40z1ySTkanzg%3D%3D)

Don't miss this opportunity to learn lessons that are essential to the defense of American liberty.

Use the link above to receive your Great Reset video series today.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

name: The Flyover
subject: Trump's Ultimatum, Christmas Bucket List, and McDonald's Ski-Thru
body:
President-elect Donald Trump demanded on Monday the immediate release of Israeli hostages in Gaza via Truth Social, announcing there would be "[HELL TO PAY](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGu4yAQRb_G7oiGAQcoKLZJl223tAYYbFY4tjCbKPv1T3n9K6-udHR0_tznO5VaHstv2tj3vM8IqIVEAWpOVOp71mPymRlZjeylUQpxsgrG1U9TwGs2WqMJ5Ay5GJUEkJRtsFLDWPyHJhGUlMqAvThU0tk4XaPJyZEcNHAqfW-Xv3t59JVzfe9Pbpe4b2P1a-_HOahfA94GvNHx4Nf5uT6j9RIrD3jr7d92iL42pi7W_ey08CnK2YirWOg_CUnkKCNGMEDBMkOygbIzIcCUsh2bT8er1FrOqxk0LBuV-q3Qf0ry9PgVAAD__xhhYjk)" if they weren't freed before his Jan. 20 inauguration.

| | |
---
| [](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kL1qwzAURp9G3mKkexX_DBoKrrd06NLRKNa1fIt-jK2k5O1LStauB77Dx_m6TBfLgZP_sJFMWfIEEvRJwUni5CyHx6QrZxYiIKzIqBYR4NyhrFazdN0VF9v1S4ctzthcUYKTZ62uTksFFZunTYFEpbCVXd0Dqr6bz83cLq63SmhJjkve6-_Mqay0hEe-017POVbBrKVsh8A3AaOA0fOdk69zojVvVCcqAsbNehIwgk7saWc773zwIXC8lTgd-bbPJHB4aQU0TxzJ8S0KHChaDi8427hZ9kngMIyfoBHeY6h247YfDoGPphVa-ufg71z5L9bdwG8AAAD__wnDa-s) | |
# Tuesday, December 3, 2024
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this day in 1910, the world’s first neon lights were turned on for public display at the Paris Motor Show by French inventor Georges Claude. [Take a look at the video here.](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0z7GOhCAUheGngW4M3IuiBcUmG7vZYpstDcJlZIPDRFHj22_cftpzki_5f-7D3cYUn48vO5MpIQ8gQN0k3AQO3sZ0Dop7E4iAkJORGhGgblHwyYBVrYaGfKDGuoCtoFFjrUYYnXCj4NFcmgSBUqIWbdUByq51deN08J2VTAnyseSl-s3xWSYK6cw7LZXLM09mKuW1Mvxg0DPoj-OozryVbaTrvxZb3MSw3xl-fq-rklpsJa58Mf51xJTi2mimxGO2Mf2T5V3ibuAvAAD__2VcUn8) Today is Giving Tuesday, and we're working with two charities dedicated to helping children in Africa: [World Concern's](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0z71u6yAUAOCngS0WHLCxB4YMl-FKzlJV6WZR_nwqbCyCHOXtq3bvC3zSd5-X2WLGPd3sFnSLZQEG8sLhwsTiLebXIqnXMQQIggbNlRAA_SgYXbWL3A-fowPGZHBqmBS3DiyzXCoRp56i_tE4MMG5UGzsJhB8Gl0_OBX9ZDmRLHhspXZfBfe2hphf5Qy1c2WjWa-tHQ8irgQMAZPwxD11z1Kzd2V3oe5dqYmAOWwKBIx5v93nf2__P66GVu2PJ-aMj0ERydJmMf-q7a_lqeE7AAD__xPVUxU) mission to provide emergency nutrition to children in Somalia (we'll send you their message later today), and [OneHope](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kL1qwzAURp9G3mKkexX_DBoKrrd06NLRKNa1fIt-jK2k5O1LStauB77Dx_m6TBfLgZP_sJFMWfIEEvRJwUni5CyHx6QrZxYiIKzIqBYR4NyhrFazdN0VF9v1S4ctzthcUYKTZ62uTksFFZunTYFEpbCVXd0Dqr6bz83cLq63SmhJjkve6-_Mqay0hEe-017POVbBrKVsh8A3AaOA0fOdk69zojVvVCcqAsbNehIwgk7saWc773zwIXC8lTgd-bbPJHB4aQU0TxzJ8S0KHChaDi8427hZ9kngMIyfoBHeY6h247YfDoGPphVa-ufg71z5L9bdwG8AAAD__wnDa-s), today's edition sponsor supporting Christian children in Nigeria. Let's make this Giving Tuesday count and transform young lives.
|
---
## Trump Issues Gaza Hostages Ultimatum
President-elect Donald Trump demanded on Monday the immediate release of Israeli hostages in Gaza via Truth Social, announcing there would be "[HELL TO PAY](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGu4yAQRb_G7oiGAQcoKLZJl223tAYYbFY4tjCbKPv1T3n9K6-udHR0_tznO5VaHstv2tj3vM8IqIVEAWpOVOp71mPymRlZjeylUQpxsgrG1U9TwGs2WqMJ5Ay5GJUEkJRtsFLDWPyHJhGUlMqAvThU0tk4XaPJyZEcNHAqfW-Xv3t59JVzfe9Pbpe4b2P1a-_HOahfA94GvNHx4Nf5uT6j9RIrD3jr7d92iL42pi7W_ey08CnK2YirWOg_CUnkKCNGMEDBMkOygbIzIcCUsh2bT8er1FrOqxk0LBuV-q3Qf0ry9PgVAAD__xhhYjk)" if they weren't freed before his Jan. 20 inauguration. Trump's emphatic warning came after confirmation of [U.S.-Israeli citizen Omer Neutra's death](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kDuO4zAQRE9DZW2QTVmfgMEmyrzphgLNbllc8yNQHAu6_UCTT1JJFR4K799jflgffHr9tZFNXfKMEltQCFLPZH0457YhszAj64aN6rVGvA9aNqtpndPK9tThsx-1ZedsJwdJ2Dk38nNovLloCqVWSvdyuI2o1Ti4e-f6hUarRCuZfM3l9j_7VFdewpk_XG4uxyaYtdZtF_qPwEnglM4t7_WqBE4XWOCkUOAkrzhyCQSJj_2a8gFnLm8u4GmBatMbXI7RJuICOXKBxF-1WHh7SnbbmOB5wmqj3SEnyK5CDy6nxZfIBMSWBE5NMbQdPgS_d71o5StaH36-1t_cfQx-BwAA__-Rq3Ec), shown in footage of Hamas fighters pulling him and others from a burning tank during the Oct. 7 attack. Hamas also released a recent hostage video featuring captured [Israeli soldier Edan Alexander](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0z7GOhCAQgOGngU4DMyhYUFxjt9deaTgZ1tmgGCVr9u0ve_3Wf_Il_89tugXOvN2_w0q-pjKBAtNoaBROMXB-TUZGn4iAUJLXFhGgc6jk4jtMSvcq9HMA-B1sn1S0JppAenAOSbJ_axoUao1WuXYA1IObu362KQ5BC6Moci1H-yi81YVSfpUnHe1cVpn9Uut-CvwSMAoYr-tqH3s567sKGPk8AuVmo-sUMIaj8pypcai7zsjDx_3inPnsrTDqvgbO_2r9dPn08BcAAP__2fhSsA). In the video, Alexander, under apparent duress, appeals to Trump to negotiate the hostages' release. Of 251 total hostages taken following Hamas's Oct. 7 attack, 97 remain in Gaza, with 35 confirmed dead.
## Hunter Biden Pardon Rattles Democrats

## FBI's Most Wanted Domestic Terrorist Caught After 21 Years
A fugitive on the [FBI's most wanted terrorist list](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0z7FuwyAUheGngS0W94IDHhi6eEvXjhaGS0yLTWSjoPTpK3fPdqQjfdL_dZtuLuW03T_dSrbGMqFAdQG8CDkFl_JrUjzYSIQkOVnQUiL2Rgq-2F6Z2ShCbbRRSKCMwNnE6AFCmB3wZE8NUEgAqYXpBpQwGN9fvY5hcMCUoJBq2bvvkra6UMyv8qS982Xl2S61Pg4mPxiODMfWWjfP_vwYjhu1g-Ho9pp8pnP63133RtIPUOG7DY-Wck7HVTMl7qtL-V-t7yqfFv8CAAD__8A3UqI) for 21 years was arrested in North Wales, ending a decades-long international manhunt. Daniel Andreas San Diego is accused of two bombings targeting companies associated with animal testing in California in 2003. The FBI had [offered a $250,000 reward](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kL1uxCAQBp8Gd2vB4t-CIo27S5vS2jPLmQibE5BDfvvo0qf_9M1ovm7rjXzw5-OTDjbFxRUldqAQpF4t-XCtXWONY0bWDRs1ao3YT1o2u9ETyvk-OCTreu063OZR4zyP937Qqtsab95vCqVWSo9yamfUap62fthGZ2dSopNsfYmp_Y7-LDu7cMUXp3aLRxPMXsozC_0hcBG41FrbQPXiBEc8yx6u90zg8oYIXJQSuLi7z3DEXKDSWdiCpdNzgEwnWM-PCBs9y09iC_6ESoEzkCucACVcTCkLXJpk7LP6EHweRtHJx0E-_DmV_xq9DP4GAAD__6dqaBs) for his arrest. San Diego now faces extradition to the U.S. to stand trial. He [operated under aliases](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kD2PozAQQH8NdIP8ATgULq5Jl2uvRIM9hrk1OLJNUP79Kttv-4qnp_fvMT-QIx_rX9zJ1pBmJVQPUoHQs0eO77lvvQ1EinRLVhqtlRpuWrSbHZwxo_E6SEeL68XoRTDLgjg4VGhCy_Zjk0poKbURt25SWk43N4zOBD-hbHpBnmvK3f_ER90oxHd6Ue5c2ttot1qfpdF_GnVv1P26ro6XyjuVzqXu_PqwLYHHgylCwQM805rg2rCCZw8bgU9wFgjnypVfBJgzlUoejpTrBhdGKoChUgYl4E2YC-TzAGnUJHTfZuufF8fIZTRNL9YdOf7E1d9mvaz6DgAA__-JlG2d), including "Danny Webb," which he used to purchase a £425,000 secluded property near a wooded area in Llanrwst, Wales. The remote location likely provided natural cover and isolation, but the property purchase left a digital trail that led to his capture.

## Dengue Virus Acquired in Texas
Cameron County reported the [first locally acquired case of dengue](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx00L_OozAQBPCngc7If4gNhYtr6HLtlWixF1hpg3PYQPL2n5L-q2c0-mn-3cc7ENO2_IUH-vKa06ilboXSQpoxAvF7bOvoJxl7VaNXzhitb10v69Xf4DZpay2qyU16UrN11nYhBuPaqMHV5D9jSkujlOmka6yTfS9t6KTBYCRUrcRIJe1NWbHgC_LM73Ti3oT0qNmvpTxzZf5Ueqj0cF1XE_Oam2-zWdJZ6WHDKwtg3Euu9PBNxPOYmIJYEbisIs0zBQLOArYtHVtAMdOei-AUgPktIPw_aMcoAmQUEbflQHHSfmTx8de7j8-LmClbV7VyeQDxF1h-fez0-icAAP__u3Fwow) last week amid a global outbreak of the mosquito-borne viral disease, which has infected 12 million people worldwide. Texas has recorded 106 travel-related dengue cases this year, the highest count since 2002. Dengue causes nausea, pain around the eyes, vomiting, and rashes. About 25% of those infected [develop symptoms within 3 to 14 days](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kL2u4yAUhJ8Gd1iHA_FPQbGNu2y7pUXgEKPFEBkcx29_5fS3G2mkbz7Nv_t8NyGG9PxrVtL14_OMgIoL5CBnZ0I8Z9U4_QA3ioa06KVEvA0jNIt-eIUCvLiB7QDHXj28G4wAQU6Nim5N0BdMIEgh5AB92_UwjtDZASRZCYYpIBdq3tq6UKWPKT6e-U1ba_PaRL3U-ipM_mE4MZyO42j_F1OvkuGU6CgMp5itiQyna4rhJMSVB4aTD1up3JpCPHvuKD134u-w7YX7vCfHQ-LWrLTlxG3eUz35V4G7shRezHnRm0271xFiDKXrmYLnakL82tVf73pr_AkAAP__IGlrvA), and about 5% of cases become severe. [Preventative measures](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx00LuOwyAQheGnwR3WMPhGQbGNu2y7pUVgHI-EjdeQOHn7VdJvfaTvSP_PZbo4jrzdvt1KtjznNCFgIxVK0FNwHF9TUwV7hWBURVb1WiO2g4FqsbptwQwNKOiJuqt2szLOuaA6r3yn54rtG1MIWik9QF93PRgDnR9Ak9fgRAMUuKSjLgsVero8x1d60FH7tFbRLqXsWegvgaPA8TzP2i9H2t6rwHGjMwsc3VHYRxI4Btpud5Jryr93Lkk--Lhn-XElbzP5wmmTypjGtIOq92WvDhv2k2Pk3PWigdvqOH7Oy781Hhb_AgAA___YX2H0) include wearing pants and long sleeves while outside, using mosquito repellant, and eliminating sources of standing water. A vaccine is available, but only for children ages 9-16 in areas where the virus is common.
## Texas Primed To Become 'Green Hydrogen' Leader
Researchers believe Texas could become a leading producer of "green hydrogen," according to a [study published yesterday](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0z7tuwyAYQOGngS3ov2CDB4YubOna0SIGx0g4WDaKk7evmr370Sedn-t4Dbnkx_07rMm111xHAtIXpAvwGEMu71HL6G4QB5TJoWEm6uwAcnHWWt1PSHOX2HQ00cwQ0cyhY46kQWb3hyEBI7IFo3oDwwD9ZIHTxBCEhhRzq7tqS2rpFY65vOsz7WqqqyxuaW07BH8J8oL8eZ5qe4RD1f0uyMeaBflwOwR5BIVgWJD_BMSErA0Syt3F7cyl5KM3QsN9Dbl89Pbv7tPRbwAAAP__3GdSlw) by the Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences. Green hydrogen is produced by using renewable energy sources, like wind and solar power, to divide water molecules into hydrogen and oxygen through a process called electrolysis. Scientists suggest that the state’s existing renewable energy infrastructure—Texas is the nation’s leading producer of wind power and accounts for 26% of the national output—[makes it a prime candidate](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGO4yAURb8Gd7YeD2OgoFhp5S7brFZbWhhebCRiImCS-O9HST_11T06Ov8vy8XFFI_tj7uRba9rXhBw7Dn2IJbgYjqXsQt2hWB4R5YrIRClNtDt1mgcpfRKOr2C1E7LqwcTJlQhGL-GLto3jCMIzoUGNUwKjIHJaxDkBTg2AoXYchnaTo1erl7TmR9UBp9vXbJ7a_fKxC-GM8PZrf6gZx22_J4Zzv_-Mpw_t36NW38vOXx5Kv1WiI5-P0PJGx19oUqu-J1KZTjXlsvJxBwDE785n4RClGNXbLg_Y0qxToqNsN1cTB-L9mOWh8XvAAAA__8owWP2) for investments in green hydrogen. Last month, the U.S. Department of Energy [awarded $1.2 billion to HyVelocity](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0z7GOrCAUANCvgU5zuahAQfEau3ntloaBK5KgTJTR8e83u_3-wEnO12N6uJTTFv-7lWz9zGVCwK4R2ICcgkv5njoe7BOCEZysUFIi9toAX6zuqfdu7oUm0w2BpNHq6QapUQo1e8GT_cEEghRCalDtoMAYGLwGSV6CYx1QSLXsbV2o0scdc77LSXvry8qzXWp9HUz-YzgyHK_rammjPd5tLCfDsXgKDMf4znPjiztqs9xhL5G2Znk_-W7D60o5p2NQrIO4upR_4frn9LT4HQAA__-1xlWT)—a collaborative of six major energy corporations, including Chevron and ExxonMobil—to build hydrogen production facilities in Corpus Christi, Houston, and other locations along the Texas Gulf Coast.
## Nurse Gets Job At Hospital That Removed Her Tumor
Erica Cash, a 42-year-old from Rockwall, learned she had a [brain tumor the size of a tennis ball](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx00LGu4yAQheGnwR0RDI4xBcU27rLtltbEjGO0g7GAJM7br7L97Y8-Hf1_bvMNI8f98RsT-XaueQYFvdQglZkDRv7MfRf8XQWnO_LaGgNwHZ3qNh9W55wetTV0hdGuBoJb-2AIrLrqgbrov5gGZbQ2o7KXwSrn1LCMytBiFIpeUYgtl0vbqNGJdeVPflG5LDl17LfWjirMLwGTgCkgM1Y6j0K1fhcCpkSt5IPpFDCVvPx9I7N854S7_DpLTlTlvWDcZXumXGSh9ix7lS3LLdcjNmSJVe7PUknA1BUfjndkjnWwolePhJH_v2k_5nl5-BcAAP__TFdqBQ) after collapsing at home earlier this year. Doctors removed the tumor during an eight-hour surgery, and biopsy results confirmed it was noncancerous. The life-threatening ordeal didn’t deter Cash from enrolling in nursing school three months later. Now a licensed vocational nurse, she works at Texas Health Rockwall, the [same hospital where she was treated](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kL2O6yAQRp8Gd1jDQPxTUNzGXW67pUXMEKPFJgJskrdfefvtvuLT0dH5us9344Pfn__NRrq8XZwRUHGBHORsjQ-fWTVWP8COoiEteikRb8MIzaof0g1OWeysc7feWiJBIwrqpVVCKtd4fcEEghRCDtC3XQ_jCN0ygKRFgmEKyPoSU1tWKvQ22YVPPCm1S9yaoNdSXpnJfwwnhlOttXXxrXaq-TownK7JcEpx-a4mBF7jZnaej3T6kzJ_JON3Xo4tJp6oHGnPPJuN-BrzyxcT-H6kTE3S9lV9CD53PVPw3IwPvwrlzyanxp8AAAD__54oZyM). _"I'm just blessed to be able to know how my patients feel,"_ she said. _"__I take that in with me every time I go in with a patient._ ”

Abilene 🌧️ 59/40° | Amarillo 🌥️ 56/35° | Austin ☁️ 64/45° | Brownsville 🌦️ 76/64° | Corpus Christi 🌦️ 71/62° | DFW ⛅ 60/37° | El Paso ☁️ 64/50° | Houston ☁️ 66/47° | Lubbock ☁️ 55/42° | San Antonio ☁️ 62/53° | Texarkana ☀️ 53/32° | Dengue Virus Acquired in Texas Cameron County reported the last week amid a global outbreak of the mosquito-borne viral disease, which has infected 12 million people worldwide. Texas has recorded 106 travel-related dengue cases this year, the highest count since 2002. Dengue causes nausea, pain around the eyes, vomiting, and rashes. About 25% of those infected , and about 5% of cases become severe. include wearing pants and long sleeves while outside, using mosquito repellant, and eliminating sources of standing water. A vaccine is available, but only for children ages 9-16 in areas where the virus is common. Texas Primed To Become 'Green Hydrogen' Leader Researchers believe Texas could become a leading producer of "green hydrogen," according to a by the Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences. Green hydrogen is produced by using renewable energy sources, like wind and solar power, to divide water molecules into hydrogen and oxygen through a process called electrolysis. Scientists suggest that the state’s existing renewable energy infrastructure—Texas is the nation’s leading producer of wind power and accounts for 26% of the national output— for investments in green hydrogen. Last month, the U.S. Department of Energy —a collaborative of six major energy corporations, including Chevron and ExxonMobil—to build hydrogen production facilities in Corpus Christi, Houston, and other locations along the Texas Gulf Coast. Nurse Gets Job At Hospital That Removed Her Tumor Erica Cash, a 42-year-old from Rockwall, learned she had a after collapsing at home earlier this year. name: Justin Balik, Evergreen
subject: RIGHT NOW: Triple your climate impact
disclaimer_text: paid for by Evergreen Action
body:
How we can seize climate wins in key states and beyond!
| | | | [](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3097209/87SdQ4wZ) |
---|---|---
---
| Friend,

Here at Evergreen Action, we're in the thick of an intense sprint to Trump-proof climate wins before Inauguration Day. And right now, our team is accelerating one of the most crucial aspects of our strategy: **Kickstarting the state and local leadership that will drive real climate progress in the next four years.**

Our team knows that states will need to effectively take the leading role in climate change policy over the next four years. And this #GivingTuesday only—we have a chance to **TRIPLE** the funds we can pour into this all-important effort. [**Will you have your gift tripled right now to empower the state and local climate leadership that can thwart Trump's Big Oil agenda?**](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3097210/87SdQ4wZ) |
| [](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3097211/87SdQ4wZ) |
---|---|---
---
| Your gift right now will help our team **accelerate state-level climate action** that can withstand the pressures of Trump's presidency.

You'll empower us to push Biden and state leaders to get critical Inflation Reduction Act investments out the door and into communities ASAP, and to **expedite the approval and implementation of critical state policies** —like New York's congestion pricing program and California's waivers for clean vehicle and zero-emission appliance standards.

State policies can be a game-changer during the four years we're facing with a Trump presidency. New York's congestion pricing is poised to reduce emissions by cutting traffic and incentivizing cleaner transportation. California's standards will benefit the entire country by reducing carbon pollution from vehicles and appliances.

But here's the thing: **We need to keep the pressure on.** In this fragile moment, every win matters—and that means making sure Biden and state leaders listen to communities, not just fossil-fuel lobbyists.

Thanks to a generous donor, **every dollar you give today will be TRIPLED.**[**Together, let's seize this rare chance to triple our impact and amplify our efforts.**](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3097212/87SdQ4wZ)

Your triple impact will transform the way we win and help us to... |
---
|
* **Supercharge our advocacy efforts** in New York, California, and elsewhere, ensuring these groundbreaking state policies don't just survive—they thrive.
* **Equip our small but mighty team with the resources** to work hand-in-hand with local activists, partners, and policymakers on the ground to see these policies through to fruition.
* **Elevate state-level leadership** to the national stage, showing the world what real climate action looks like.

|
---
| We're counting on you to help us get this right. **Let's make sure this opportunity isn't lost.**[**Triple the gift means triple the impact—use your power to make our climate goals a reality!**](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3097213/87SdQ4wZ)

Together, we can create a climate future that is both bold and resilient, no matter what happens in D.C. |
---
| In solidarity, |
---
| | |
---
### Justin Balik
Senior State Program Director
Evergreen Action

name: History Facts
subject: The movie star related to Abraham Lincoln
body:
Tom Hanks has played historical figures such as Walt Disney and Mister Rogers throughout his illustrious career, but he’s never been a president — not even the one he’s related to. [](https://track.historyfacts.com/?xtl=1krv9cfc68cmwpq45aa2wn6esbnilp7cwib77kdelunn156urh2kze1i6bmsqeunjsr7nv6it63eysrcs9p3pg8bhtw2ciklxhqcn3sg3jov32iqea3nsgxeaytzsn043to7xxarqe85upi6539gncljl&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=snx2s7&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)

---
# [Tom Hanks is related to Abraham Lincoln.](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=snx2s7&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
### [Famous Figures](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=snx2s7&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=snx2s7&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
| T om Hanks has played historical figures such as Walt Disney and Mister Rogers throughout his illustrious career, but he’s never been a president — not even the one he’s related to. As if he weren’t already enough of an American icon, the Oscar-winning actor is also a [distant relative](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=snx2s7&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) of Abraham Lincoln. Honest Abe’s mother was named Nancy Hanks Lincoln, and through her, the president and actor are third cousins four times removed. Though Hanks has never depicted his distant relative on film, he did narrate _National Geographic_ ’s 2013 docudrama _Killing Lincoln_ , based on the book of the same name.
---
Everyone’s favorite everyman isn’t the only actor related to a president. Brad Pitt and Barack Obama are ninth cousins, Richard Gere is the sixth cousin four times removed of James Garfield, and Marilyn Monroe and George H.W. Bush were ninth cousins once removed, [among others](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=snx2s7&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com). Most surprising of all: Richard Nixon and James Dean, whose public personas couldn’t be more different, were seventh cousins once removed.
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=snx2s7&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) | [](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=snx2s7&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)

## Tom Hanks owns more than 250 typewriters.
Stamps and coins have inspired many a collector over the years, but Tom Hanks doesn’t get out of bed for anything less than a typewriter. He has no fewer than 250 of them — as revealed in the 2017 documentary _California Typewriter_ — 90% of which are in perfect working order. “What thrills me about typewriters is that they are meant to do one thing and one thing only,” he said during an interview conducted for the film, “and with the tiniest amount of effort, and maintenance, it will last a thousand years.” His obsession began in 1978, when he attempted to get a poorly made typewriter fixed and was instead sold a Hermes 2000 for $45. He even wrote a collection of short stories called [_Uncommon Type_](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=snx2s7&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com), with each tale featuring a typewriter.

clean_body: Tom Hanks has played historical figures such as Walt Disney and Mister Rogers throughout his illustrious career, but he’s never been a president — not even the one he’s related to. | T om Hanks has played historical figures such as Walt Disney and Mister Rogers throughout his illustrious career, but he’s never been a president — not even the one he’s related to. As if he weren’t already enough of an American icon, the Oscar-winning actor is also a of Abraham Lincoln. Honest Abe’s mother was named Nancy Hanks Lincoln, and through her, the president and actor are third cousins four times removed. Though Hanks has never depicted his distant relative on film, he did narrate National Geographic ’s 2013 docudrama Killing Lincoln , based on the book of the same name. Everyone’s favorite everyman isn’t the only actor related to a president. Brad Pitt and Barack Obama are ninth cousins, Richard Gere is the sixth cousin four times removed of James Garfield, and Marilyn Monroe and George H.W. Bush were ninth cousins once removed, . Most surprising of all: Richard Nixon and James Dean, whose public personas couldn’t be more different, were seventh cousins once removed. | Thank you for supporting our advertisers! | By the Numbers | | Year Nancy Hanks was born 1784 | | Oscar nominations received by Tom Hanks (two wins) 6 | Oscar nominations received by Tom Hanks (two wins) 6 | | Box-office gross of 2012’s Lincoln $275 million | | Children born to Nancy Hanks and her husband, Thomas Lincoln 3 | Children born to Nancy Hanks and her husband, Thomas Lincoln 3 | | | Did you know? ---|---|--- Tom Hanks owns more than 250 typewriters. Stamps and coins have inspired many a collector over the years, but Tom Hanks doesn’t get out of bed for anything less than a typewriter. He has no fewer than 250 of them — as revealed in the 2017 documentary California Typewriter — 90% of which are in perfect working order. “What thrills me about typewriters is that they are meant to do one thing and one thing only,” he said during an interview conducted for the film, “and with the tiniest amount of effort, and maintenance, it will last a thousand years.” His obsession began in 1978, when he attempted to get a poorly made typewriter fixed and was instead sold a Hermes 2000 for $45. He even wrote a collection of short stories called , with each tale featuring a typewriter. name: Heidi Ganahl
subject: The Mountain Minute: 12/3/2024
body:
Fmr. Denver Mayor Hancock now a lobbyist for companies that made hundreds of millions during his tenure
| | | | [](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
---
**PRESENTED BY[ROCKYMOUNTAINVOICE.COM](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
| | Hi friends,
I wanted to personally invite you to an upcoming fundraiser where we are partnering with an amazing farm animal sanctuary, Random Ranch. Saddle up for a festive evening and join us at Random Ranch Christmas on Thursday, December 12th, from 4-7 PM in Sedalia, CO! Enjoy live music, a silent auction, and delicious food & drinks. **[Learn more and RSVP here!](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** Now, a summary of today's newsletter:
**Here in Colorado...** Former Denver Mayor Michael Hancock [transitions to lobbying](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) for companies that benefited significantly during his tenure, raising questions about ethical practices. Meanwhile, the [growing impact of special districts](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) on local taxes and governance is examined in a detailed piece highlighting their importance in Colorado. Plus, hear from Colorado residents [facing buyouts in Aurora](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) and their fight for relocation terms.
**In National News...** President Biden issues a [sweeping pardon for Hunter Biden](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), drawing comparisons to Nixon’s pardon in 1974 and sparking controversy about political legacies. Additionally, the Biden-Harris administration allocates another [$725 million to Ukraine](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) for military assistance, a decision met with mixed reactions as the administration approaches its end.
**Commentary Spotlight...** Explore how populist platforms could [strengthen Republican majorities](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), and read a reflection on the challenges and opportunities for GOP leadership moving forward.
This is the Mountain Minute for Tuesday, December 3, 2024.
– Heidi Ganahl
---
|
---
**TODAY'S TOP STORIES**
**[Fmr. Denver Mayor Hancock now a lobbyist for companies that made hundreds of millions during his tenure](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [DENVERITE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
Former Mayor Michael Hancock has a new lobbying firm, Hancock Global, serving companies that do big business with the city.
He’s registered as a lobbyist in the City and County of Denver. While a few of his clients are obscure, many were major contractors on projects the Hancock administration oversaw, especially at the airport.
His clients have combined for hundreds of millions of dollars in contracts with the city, according to city data going back to 2017. Some have worked for the city for decades, long before Hancock took office.
**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
The Rocky Mountain Voice is a 501(c)(3) that exists to promote informed civic engagement and the principles of self-governance through enterprise reporting on public policy, politics, government, and culture throughout the state of Colorado. The only way we can continue to spread truth is with your support!
[DONATE TO ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
|
---
**[Schumann: Understanding special districts. Where your tax dollars meet local decisions and why you should care](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY JEN SCHUMANN, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* Special districts in Colorado, numbering over 3,000, are responsible for crucial local services such as water, sanitation, fire protection, and parks. They influence taxation, infrastructure, and long-term community planning.
* Despite their impact, voter turnout in special district elections remains extremely low, averaging 8% for some state elections. This leaves decision-making vulnerable to disproportionate influence from special interest groups.
* Upcoming elections provide an opportunity for residents to influence local governance. Citizens are encouraged to research their districts, attend meetings, and even run for board positions to ensure representation that aligns with community values.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**[Russel: If Republicans can deliver on populist platform, they can expand on majorities](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY ROBERT RUSSEL, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* Robert Russel highlights the importance of Republicans adhering to a populist platform to deliver on voter priorities like job creation, border security, and combating inflation. This approach is essential for maintaining and expanding their current majority.
* The article underscores the need for expanded early voting operations and strategic outreach efforts to strengthen Republican voter turnout, particularly in midterm elections.
* Republicans are cautioned against divisive internal conflicts, as seen in the leadership struggles, and urged to focus on cohesive and effective governance to retain public trust and achieve lasting success.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**[Residents at Aurora apartments see improvements but face buyout offers they say are too low to relocate](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [CBS COLORADO](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* Residents at Whispering Pines Apartments in Aurora, previously under scrutiny for unsafe conditions and gang activity, are now seeing management improvements, including security upgrades and pest control measures.
* Tenants have been offered a $1,200 buyout to vacate, but many argue the amount is insufficient to secure alternative housing in Aurora's expensive market.
* Tenant advocates highlight the challenges faced by residents, citing the risk of homelessness and lack of adequate relocation support, as well as the contentious decision by some tenants to withhold rent to demand further repairs.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**[Hunter Biden receives most sweeping pardon since Nixon](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [WASHINGTON EXAMINER](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* President Joe Biden issued a "full and unconditional pardon" for his son Hunter Biden, covering offenses over an 11-year period, a move compared to President Gerald Ford's controversial pardon of Richard Nixon.
* Legal experts note the extraordinary breadth of the pardon, as it seemingly includes offenses not yet charged, marking a rare precedent in U.S. history.
* The decision has sparked significant backlash and questions about its implications for Biden's legacy, echoing the divisive public reaction to Nixon's pardon in 1974.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**[Biden-Harris admin to send an additional $725 million in military assistance to Ukraine](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [THE POST MILLENNIAL](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* The Biden-Harris administration is sending an additional $725 million in military assistance to Ukraine, including counter-drone systems, munitions, and controversial anti-personnel landmines, as part of its ongoing $64 billion military support program.
* This latest package aims to use all allocated funds before the administration ends in January, alongside a recent $24 billion request for further aid to Ukraine.
* Ukrainian President Zelensky has indicated willingness to cede territory to end the war, while President-elect Trump promises to negotiate peace and avoid escalation into global conflict.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**ONLY ON ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE ⤵️**
**[Rep. Thomas Massie, the 2024 keynote to RMGO, notes irony of President Biden pardon](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** **BY BRIAN PORTER | NATIONAL | DECEMBER 2** _In the wake of President Joe Biden pardoning his son, Hunter, for a variety of criminal offenses, including the unlawful purchase of a firearm, one 2nd Amendment advocate familiar to gun-owning Coloradans noted the irony._
**[Boddie: Independent expenditure committees effect election outcomes](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)****BY CS BODDIE | COMMENTARY | NOVEMBER 30** _One of the reasons candidates lost in the 2024 election may be that independent expenditure committees (IECs), with millions to spend, negatively affected the races. Was it mainly Democrat-leaning IECs at work or did Republican-leaning IECs play too?_
[**Mesa County makes progress in eradicating Japanese beetle from Western Slope**](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
[****](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**BY LINDY BROWNING | LOCAL |****NOVEMBER 30** _Mesa County commissioners are breathing just a little bit easier after discovering that their efforts, combined with resources from the state and the community, are working to get rid of the Japanese beetle infestation on the Western Slope._

**Feel like you have a unique story or commentary to share?** We'd love to talk with you about becoming an RMV Contributor. Reply to this email (or reach out to [brian@rockymountainvoice.com](mailto:brian@rockymountainvoice.com?subject=Contributor%20Interest%20\(via%20Mountain%20Minute\))) or send us a message on social media to chat!
|
---
|
---
**🇺🇸 DID YOU KNOW?** The 50-star flag we know today was **created by 17-year-old Robert Heft for a high school project in 1958** , when there were only 48 states. Believing Alaska and Hawaii would soon gain statehood, Heft designed the flag with 50 stars. Initially, his teacher gave him a B–, but after Heft submitted his design to the White House and it was chosen as the official U.S. flag, President Eisenhower's call prompted the teacher to revise his grade to an A.
|
---
**CARTOON OF THE DAY**
|
---
**QUOTE OF THE DAY** "Never regret anything that made you smile." - Mark Twain

|
---

name: John Pierce
subject: TRIAL TODAY: DOJ Helped Kill Stephanie's Babies…
body:
Today, Joe Biden’s DOJ will go to court with one brutal aim: They plan to crush peaceful patriot, Stephanie Baez. And steal 20 years of her life with a prison sentence you’d expect in a third world police state.

[](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zk515hsjhtljio271b19ntbdksjieimaceme7558_rp22sh2s8i6epj6c9gmep74clh2bs)

**[Your crucial gift of a critically important $25, $50, $100 or more immediately will help us fight for Stephanie and keep beating Joe Biden's DOJ in court!](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zdksvv6n3ca5e2g7nc8dr9qi29bqu9fimntj394o_rp22sh2s8i6epj6c9gmep74clh2bs)**

Today, Joe Biden's DOJ will go to court with one brutal aim:

**They plan to crush peaceful patriot, Stephanie Baez. And steal 20 years of her life with a prison sentence you 'd expect in a third world police state.**

As you know, the DOJ terrorized Stephanie so badly, that she lost two of her babies. And they still plan to throw her in prison for a crime she didn't commit.

And they're determined to ram through their case against her before President Trump is sworn in on January 20th.

As you recall, Stephanie can't even afford the plane ticket to fly to her trial.

And she can't afford the legal fees to defend herself from brutal DOJ lawyers.

**That 's why NCLU will fight for her in court today.**

**[Patriot, please help us fight for Stephanie with your critical gift of $25, $50, $100 or more right away.](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2z2kat6v8sp6s4pif65aca5fvdcusepnu6k8buduo_rp22sh2s8i6epj6c9gmep74clh2bs)**

In Vigilance,

John M. Pierce
Chairman and Founder
National Constitutional Law Union

**P.S. Patriot, Stephanie 's trial starts today, and the DOJ wants to throw her in prison for 20 years. **But NCLU is fighting for her. **[Please give at least a crucial $25, $50, $100 or more immediately](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zckgbhdf9ilapf2mi9t08oa51thqeeevt6b3khcg_rp22sh2s8i6epj6c9gmep74clh2bs)**[.](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zsemoagr3b8niflkbtbhq9r1btaapeh2qfjltgd0_rp22sh2s8i6epj6c9gmep74clh2bs) Thank you!

name: Marjorie Taylor Greene
subject: Justice for All? Or just some?
body:
| | | | [](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9xVF/?__vbtrk=MjYzMTA1OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjYzMTA1OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
---
Friend – History was made. President Trump’s overwhelming victory proves one thing: the American people are ready for **bold leadership** and **fearless action**.
But there’s a dark cloud that we cannot ignore.
**The men and women who stood up on January 6th, 2021, have been targeted relentlessly by a corrupt system desperate to crush their voices.**
These patriots deserve our gratitude—not persecution.
**__[That’s why I’m demanding immediate action: a full pardon for every American wrongfully prosecuted for standing up for what they believed in.](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9xVF/?__vbtrk=MjYzMTA1OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjYzMTA1OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)__**

[SIGN THE OFFICIAL J6 PARDON PETITION NOW](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9xVF/?__vbtrk=MjYzMTA1OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjYzMTA1OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
These aren’t criminals—they’re **citizens**. **Fathers**. **Mothers**. **Veterans**. **Neighbors**. _**The very fabric of our great nation.**_
They gathered at the Capitol to exercise their rights, **_and now they need us to exercise ours_**.
This is more than a petition— _**_[it’s a fight for our freedom](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9xVF/?__vbtrk=MjYzMTA1OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjYzMTA1OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_**_. A fight against a government that thinks it can silence you.

What was done to those brave men & women on that day proves one thing:
The Deep State doesn’t just want to silence you... **They want to erase you**. They want to watch you sit in prison, and smear anybody who would stand up to them over it.
I won’t be silenced, and I will _**never**_ stop fighting for what’s right. I’m reaching out to you, Friend, because I know... _**you feel the same**_.
[SIGN THE OFFICIAL J6 PARDON PETITION NOW](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9xVF/?__vbtrk=MjYzMTA1OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjYzMTA1OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
_For Freedom_

[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9xVF/?__vbtrk=MjYzMTA1OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjYzMTA1OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
_Marjorie Taylor Greene_

[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9xVF/?__vbtrk=MjYzMTA1OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjYzMTA1OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
| |
---

_[Unsubscribe from this list](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9xVG/?__vbtrk=MjYzMTA1OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjYzMTA1OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_

name: Mark Ronchetti
subject: Pie Fights, Crime Waves, and Cabbage Patch Kids! 🎙️
body:
NEW No Doubt About It for dpwillis67@gmail.com! | | | | | |
---
[](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=64d790425a&e=567664f14c)
| | | | | This week’s episode of [No Doubt About It](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=89ec350e94&e=567664f14c) is packed with family laughs, hard-hitting truths, and a dash of 80s nostalgia that will have you hooked from start to finish. Trust us—you don’t want to miss it.
---
[](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=e783eebf66&e=567664f14c)
| **🥧 Pie-tastic Thanksgiving Drama:** Krysty instituted a new family policy: four straight days of pie leading up to Thanksgiving! Which pie reigned supreme in the Ronchetti household? The answer might surprise you.

**🎤 Ava Takes on Mayor Tim Keller:** Our daughter and producer Ava found herself face-to-face with Albuquerque Mayor Tim Keller at an event—and she didn’t hold back. With Albuquerque now ranked as one of the most violent cities in the world, Ava asked the tough questions:
---
|
* Why won’t the mayor work with the federal government to end sanctuary city policies?

* Why are violent criminals allowed back on the streets instead of being deported?

---
| **❗ The Mayor’s shocking claim:** No one here illegally has committed a violent crime in Albuquerque in the last three years. Mark pulls out the receipts to prove otherwise. It’s a must-listen exchange that shows what happens when a 17-year-old holds a city leader accountable.

---
[Stream Episode Now](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=bc2667c2d4&e=567664f14c)
| 🏢 Crime Is Driving Businesses Away: We also dive into the growing trend of businesses fleeing downtown Albuquerque and what needs to change to save the city.

📰 A Media Outlet Makes a Smart Move: Could one formerly biased media outlet be turning the corner? We discuss a surprising hire that could signal a major shift.

🏈 Mascot Mayhem & Cabbage Patch Chaos: Two football mascots face off in an epic on-field brawl, and we take a hilarious look back at the Cabbage Patch Kids mania of the 80s. Remember the frenzy? We sure do!
---
[Stream Episode Now](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=f36969ab53&e=567664f14c)
| 🎧 [Watch and Listen Now!](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=f757f846f7&e=567664f14c) This episode has it all—family fun, bold conversations, and a walk down memory lane. Tune in now to hear the full breakdown!

👉 [Listen, like, and subscribe ](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=b8604713e0&e=567664f14c)to No Doubt About It on YouTube or your favorite podcast platform. Don’t forget to share it with friends and family!

💻 Want to support the podcast? Head over to nodoubtaboutitpodcast.com to [make a donation](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=58c8f70e9b&e=567664f14c). Your contributions help us keep bringing you the conversations you care about.

Thanks for listening—and Happy (post) Thanksgiving!

Mark & Krysty Ronchetti

name: Hassan Martini, Executive Director of No Dem Left Behind
subject: Putin bombed the hospital that I was born.
body:
| | | | | | [ ](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2vmcts-lj3efs-kyd76rh5/)
---
| | | | Vladimir Putin bombed the hospital where I was born yesterday. Aleppo's University Hospital was bombed by Russian warplanes. Why is it that hospitals always seem to be the first target? You may be seeing a lot of confusing stories in the news about what is happening in Syria, so let me take a moment to fill you in on the realities on the ground. Syria is one of the most beautiful places on the planet, and right now, it is fighting for survival. Bashar al-Assad is a war criminal, no different from Putin, Netanyahu, and the Iranian Ayatollah. Syrians want nothing to do with any of these figures, yet they can't seem to escape them. The Syrian rebels are fighting America's enemies—Russian, Iranian, and Hezbollah fighters have joined forces to back Bashar al-Assad. I am not going to delve into the history of the Syrian civil war, but I want to focus on what is happening right now. Syrians have launched an impressive offensive, taking advantage of the current geopolitical climate and surprising everyone with how quickly they were able to recapture Idlib (the village my family is from), Aleppo, and are now marching toward Hama, Homs, and ultimately Damascus. Obviously, this is no easy task. Bashar al-Assad has fled the country to Moscow to beg Putin to save him. Putin, wanting to preserve his strategic military base in Syria, obliged and did what he does best—bomb hospitals and civilians from the sky. This time, however, the rebels are prepared. They have built suicide drones to combat the aerial assault, but we know that's no match for the Russian air force. It's a temporary solution at best. What is required is a political solution because a purely military one would be catastrophic for the millions of Syrians who still live in Syria. As of 2010, almost 10 million Syrians have been forced to become refugees, displaced across the globe, with the majority relocating to Turkey. What I want you to understand is that this is not a war about religion or politics—it’s about a people living miserably under an evil dictatorship who desperately want and deserve to live with freedom and dignity. The first thing the Free Syrian Army did when they captured Aleppo was visit the Christian community and pledge safety and prosperity. That was no accident—it was a deliberate, thought-out mission to show the world who they are and what they represent. Actions speak louder than words, so they took it a step further and made the same pledge to Aleppo’s Shia community. It is small but exists, and the rebels extended their promise to them as well. I spent a few summers as a child in Syria. I never saw any segregation or hostility toward people of different faiths. Syria is the melting pot of the world's oldest religions. The next couple of weeks, before Trump takes office, will be critical for Syria. We have no idea how Trump will react, but historically, he has given in to Putin very easily—either because he fears him, respects and admires authoritarian dictators, or for other reasons I won't get into right now. Trump's presidency will have global ramifications, and I won’t lie—the next four years are going to be rough for all of us. I don’t know what he will do, but I do know this: we must not give in. We cannot give up. Others across the world have sacrificed their lives for freedom. It is not something we should ever take for granted, and I certainly do not.
---
| [](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2vmcts-lj3eft-kyd76rh6/)
---
In solidarity, -Hassan Martini
---
| | | | |
---

name: Elizabeth Nader
subject: NJ gov candidates and the great gaslighting
body:
Peter, These candidates for New Jersey governor don’t give us much credit as voters. They must think our memory of everythi
|
---
| Peter, These candidates for New Jersey governor don’t give us much credit as voters. They must think our memory of everything that happened before November 5th has been wiped and we’re ready to buy whatever they peddle as gospel truth. To hear many of them talk, you’d think they were running as candidates on the right, not committed leftists who’ve spent their careers voting for everything voters just repudiated last month. Yep, it’s crazy. **Mikie Sherrill** would have us believe that _“I[listen](https://xtz223.keap-link005.com/v2/click/5a6f32ea118ecd690479855842195f04/eJyNkE0LgkAQhv_LnKVlV7PFW0SEWB76OMeiAy3ZuqxjWOJ_b63oVNB15nmf4Z0eCI0ylJaQQEd3IUIIwGGhrUZDi9qQKp5bMY14yAOotDmvXN1aSPqv4Q8wjkPBRQB0s-iR_Xa-yNJ8dVyneeZJq5y_8a8n_niWm3m6hmH4KcaLpuXVuxtIyLU4Niq1b0UHV3n-RGSbhLFuUtQXttFnjbsTOqerijWkqG0YlzHnfBZPZTSTMhJCxl6srEVTvr-S4e2lHx5BOWhE) to people in the district and I focus on those things that most impact their lives.”_ Was she “listening” to her district when she **_voted against_** the Secure the Border Act and **_voted against_** requiring proof of citizenship to vote?
---
| | [Give to Promote Common Sense in 2025](https://xtz223.keap-link005.com/v2/click/577879440e87b002eddee6372d7aa284/eJyNkMkKwkAMht8l59Ldhd6kiJRWDy6gXmSYRh3aTodpFBf67o4LPSl4Tb7_C3_uQCiZpCSHCC508_0ALNDIhRIoKa4lMf7a-r3QCzwLSiGLia5PCqL713AHPMeB77kW0FWhQZbzUZwms8kuS2apIRXT5sa_nn7nGU9HSQZt-1OMlaDx2bgbiEif8NkoF6YVrXRp-CORaiLHyWvJCO2GtFBo87py9lvE9ZAvNjwchIep6xZGx5RCmX9-keL1LW0fbVlmkQ==)
---
| **Josh Gottheimer** wants to be the “low taxes” and “low costs” candidate who believes in “Jersey values.” Then why did he [support](https://xtz223.keap-link005.com/v2/click/df27132791e710a2c175cf15daae0853/eJyNkMFqwkAQht9lzsHtTnQNuUkIEmI8BD2XJRlwadwsm0nbVPLurlo8teB15pvv558LMFltuWghhW_-QYwhAk-NcYYsZ71l3dy3uFrKWEbQGfux9f3oIL38efwEbuMY5TICnhwF5FBvsrLYb993xb4MpNM-ZLzqUU9PXm2KHczzv2I6G84_g3uAlP1It0atCa346LvAn5jdkArBX4aZ_KLpz6IyzYm6jupKJWJgzeMgZIJKJWt8Q5QyWaGSGOzaObLt72tKmh4Z8xVXhGnG) Harris’ communist price-control proposal, vote for _billions_ more in funding to Ukraine, and oppose protecting women in sports to kow-tow to the radical trans agenda? Or take **Steve Sweeney** , who makes bold pledges to oppose higher taxes in New Jersey – while as corrupt party boss and Senate President, he championed plenty of tax increases. But we’re just supposed to forget all that. It’s a new day, friends, and gaslighting voters to sound like a Republican is the politically expedient thing to do. This is a moment tailor made for the Common Sense Majority. In 2025, we’re going to say “wait a second!” and hold them accountable to their records. We’re not going to let them get away with business as usual in campaigning or governing. The establishment Left may have underestimated us before, but the tide is turning. Help us turn it. [JOIN](https://xtz223.keap-link005.com/v2/click/494ddff97d05947b42ec9e75516da01d/eJyVkE0LgkAQhv_LnCVRq4M3EZFF8xB1Dj-GXHI_WMfIxP_eWtGpDsGcZp55hncmIJSlJNZACDe6-34ADhisueYoKVaSyvo59TdrL_Ac6Li8pEYNGsLp6_IHWNqB720doFGjRQ77KM5YkZ5yVmSW1KWxN_73JLuI5TDPP8UoOCVX6-4hJDPgkqjhNhUdTWf5lkj3oevWSggle7RVd0O1UubsChQVmr7l2rWmUmuUzfsNGY4v3_wAquVmXg==) Common Sense Club – or bring a friend aboard if you’re already a member! For New Jersey, Elizabeth Nader

Common Sense Club [Share this newsletter on social media!](https://xtz223.keap-link005.com/v2/click/910e24b38ce95109ca2794d4a3216b41/eJyNkEFrwzAMhf-LznGzJO0YuZVSSkjbw9jOw7OF4zaRja2UdiX_fe42etpgoIOQPr3H0xUYSRI3Gmo480dZVpBBQGW9ReKVI5bqa1su5kVVZNBbOm6CGz3U11-P78BtXJUPTxnwxWNCXp6Xq7bZb962zb5NpJchefxTp3i866x3y2YL0_SnMA6W16ekHaHmMOItkbYpFb-GPvEds491nis3DI4iplL9-D5zweR0EMadhJKkrZaMUaROcIfCBJQsjIy9NR1bMnmykt4j6Z8_tXj5Npw-AaqVco0=)

| Did you catch our previous email? If not, you can read it here now: We know (by “we,” I mean common sense New Jerseyans, not Hollywood, coastal elites or the mainstream media) that woke extremism is one major reason the Left lost big last Tuesday night. Taxpayer funding of sex-change surgeries for prison inmates. Pushing a sexual agenda on kindergartners. Biological men beating up women in athletics. It’s this type of woke extremism that so many common sense New Jerseyans rejected on Tuesday when Trump got closer to winning New Jersey than any Republican since 1992. Why? Because common sense is that a criminal’s gender transition (or really anyone’s) shouldn’t be the financial responsibility of the taxpayer. Common sense is that children should be children and that indoctrinating them with sexually explicit materials is abusive behavior. And that women shouldn’t be losing medals and scholarships to biological men – who were usually mediocre athletes at best before deciding to compete against women. That’s the “patriarchy” the Left should be worried about. So as we look to 2025 and saving New Jersey from Left Wing Lunacy in offices from top to bottom, have candidates on the Left learned anything? Will they be moving from wokism towards common sense to, if nothing else, save their political rears? If you look at gubernatorial candidate Sean Spiller, it’s clear they won’t. Sean Spiller, the President of the New Jersey Education Association (NJEA) has been the center of some controversy for funneling NJEA resources (i.e., teacher dues) to his political campaign. But that’s just the beginning. A few days ago, “Drag Queen Entertainment” posted this video of their presence and “Banned Book Story Time” at... the NJEA Convention. This is on top of convention calls for “queering the curriculum.” The convention theme – “Learning. Equity. Justice.” should have told us all we needed to know. The message at this convention for New Jersey educators? Pushing a sexual agenda on children is not only welcomed, but encouraged. This is grooming, plain and simple. And NJ educators shouldn’t have this agenda forced on them either, especially at a time when our students are struggling and they need to be focused on core academic subjects. This is all going on under President Spiller’s lead and it has his fingerprints all over it. He has all but said he’s running to force his NJEA agenda on the entire state of New Jersey. And let’s just call this like it is – crazy, and dangerous. If the commentary from media elites and leftist insiders is any indicator, Spiller won’t be alone in continuing to push a woke agenda. But unfortunately for them, my hunch is that common sense New Jerseyans aren’t going to take it in 2025 either. So what do we do? It’s simple. 1) Identify more members of the Common Sense Majority. 2) Recruit common sense candidates for the ballot at every level. 3) Get the Common Sense Majority out to vote in the Primary and the General. It might be a simple strategy, but it’s not going to be easy. We need all of us working together to grab back that megaphone and save our state. Here at the Common Sense Club, we want you to feel like this is your home. The place where you aren’t alone in saying “that’s nuts!” and the place where you can do something about the lunacy you see around you. So as you celebrate, make plans to get back in the fight with us because 2025 is just around the corner... Let’s go, Common Sense friends! For New Jersey, Elizabeth Nader
---
|
---
| [Unsubscribe](https://xtz223.infusionsoft.com/app/optOut/0/4fd6eb57577aacb0/23999454/c1ade2e37d53e930) Common Sense Club 165 Route 35 Red Bank, New Jersey 07701 United States
