| | Dear Fellow American, We generally remember ancient Rome for its sprawling empire and powerful emperors. But overlooked by our fascination with the might and drama of imperial Rome is the fact that Rome reached its greatness through a far different form of government. Did you know that Caesar Augustus inherited 90% of the territory of his Empire from the Roman Republic? The story of how the Roman Republic emerged from a group of warring tribes in the middle of the Italian peninsula to dominate the Mediterranean and, later, most of Europe is a captivating narrative of achievement, political and military genius, and the perils of success.
---
| | To help tell this important story to Americans nationwide, we recently released our free online course, **“The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic.”** **[You can now receive your own DVD box set of “The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic”](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=7bca2252c4d44edd903d1954ecb16457&_e=4BWl_qM0eAG8IuK1AhmKEqNqQfvxF5IahF9gMi_CF6VUIjd5ROq8eAmTa_QJBjjtvCaNbVUSzz72fOm3OMlz-9u8VjWubIL3Nq_1-_sOLahsAcNhbIhCIQdzMcEha6cTdyx_-8ztLJosQy7IE8AJNiJGybEh4zrlGWU7kzrjb7iO4QQyugFA0pWlVT33lDDpwDqHh98lTaW6iWMsF7XEi2Nu3UJhYLvW2aiw5RIoPfb6W5q4XQTWEY4NtmUyOwuuIg6DJ0F1LqGn7QvrqE--u44aGYNH0KYtGXVwicXH3BodcDzjUfkiXpCD4zA18vNEaSw_BExPzigqpXfafxCEIvaEvyEcOfy02_KvCgbgWvCQPe3dmf7IFH7m4C0ApJR3TRyz5Z4SSeRNZ2um5gExjg%3D%3D) when you make a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. **
---
| [](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=7bca2252c4d44edd903d1954ecb16457&_e=4BWl_qM0eAG8IuK1AhmKEqNqQfvxF5IahF9gMi_CF6VUIjd5ROq8eAmTa_QJBjjtvCaNbVUSzz72fOm3OMlz-9u8VjWubIL3Nq_1-_sOLahsAcNhbIhCIQdzMcEha6cTdyx_-8ztLJosQy7IE8AJNiJGybEh4zrlGWU7kzrjb7iO4QQyugFA0pWlVT33lDDpwDqHh98lTaW6iWMsF7XEi2Nu3UJhYLvW2aiw5RIoPfb6W5q4XQTWEY4NtmUyOwuuGPh1RgWlJri18fYn3bu-wbI7mdgZlQ6fGAMVKaT33fHLTchpncBYEbW5lD0lwJuE8fyqSRtisvmG4F6iUsNRIpJQdEAa0wWOujfdAKNWFW7AGwG713ZqXDdPCpWoiCW3XsmA-7128POWhlg9yRcyEg%3D%3D)

| | And, for a limited time, we’ll also send you a free color map of the Roman world at the end of the Republic printed on high-quality paper. This map is a helpful companion to the course DVD and will illustrate many of the topics discussed in the lectures. Simply use this secure link to reserve your DVD box set of **“The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic,”** along with the companion map today: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/roman-republic-dvd](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=7bca2252c4d44edd903d1954ecb16457&_e=4BWl_qM0eAG8IuK1AhmKEqNqQfvxF5IahF9gMi_CF6VUIjd5ROq8eAmTa_QJBjjtvCaNbVUSzz72fOm3OMlz-9u8VjWubIL3Nq_1-_sOLahsAcNhbIhCIQdzMcEha6cTdyx_-8ztLJosQy7IE8AJNiJGybEh4zrlGWU7kzrjb7iO4QQyugFA0pWlVT33lDDpwDqHh98lTaW6iWMsF7XEi2Nu3UJhYLvW2aiw5RIoPfb6W5q4XQTWEY4NtmUyOwuuQ2Dpuu4dDXyf1aL3vBINnwxxjFdk3JXXqOY9tSyCGPGjR8zdmV82K7fUi73kbVYFCSnJ03fEc-cN9IzExKZsac8dd0lHR6JTEZog_0gDTJZpCgaShRv8w5sGY9G14KzNraTmErBtAAq_KYI_GmtQgg%3D%3D)** Learning the fascinating history of Rome reveals the conditions necessary to preserve a republic...and how a republic may lose its way. That’s why we produced **“The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic”** and why I hope you’ll watch and share the course on DVD. Before I go, thank you for helping to preserve liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! name: David McIntosh
subject: We are united
body:
Today is Giving Tuesday, a day when Americans unite to support causes that make a difference.

| | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2za0h86880n7l5netulinol5j1v2c918s9sp64sto_rp22sh2s8i6epj6c9gm1o74cph2bs)

| | Friend, Today is Giving Tuesday, a day when Americans unite to support causes that make a difference. At Club for Growth, we’re on the front lines fighting to shrink the size and scope of government, unleash pro-growth policies, and hold every legislator accountable on policy—no matter their party. We never back down from a fight because we know what’s at stake: _your freedom and prosperity._ When others cave to the pressure of Washington’s broken system, we double down on our mission to protect taxpayers and promote economic growth. **[This Giving Tuesday, I’m asking you to support us.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z0r6cvgcflrltidcmlio6ufcnl6ajl1jjj5pscrg_rp22sh2s8i6epj6c9gm1o74cph2bs)****** Your donation fuels our efforts to advocate for policies that will ensure America’s best days are ahead of us.

name: Neil Parrott
subject: Update...
body:
Happy Giving Tuesday! Good news! Thanks to many who have already given, we are now down to | | | [View this email in your browser](https://us2.campaign-archive.com/?e=5a45ee1154&u=fac7efbc0801875f99034b204&id=a03f2d1503)
---
|
---
| |
Happy Giving Tuesday!

Good news! Thanks to many who have already given, we are now down to $27,000 owed after spending the $50,000 last-minute match required to air our last commercial with the NRCC.

I'm writing to ask for your help again on this Giving Tuesday. Keeping my word is very important to me, and we will make sure that we pay our vendors, even at personal cost to April and me. _If you are able, would you please consider making a donation of_ _ $10, _$____25__ __, $____50__ __, $____100, or more ___to Parrott for Congress to help us take care of these amounts?_
---
| [Donate $10](https://mdpetitions.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fac7efbc0801875f99034b204&id=275b8b809d&e=5a45ee1154 "Donate $10")
---
| [Donate $25](https://mdpetitions.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fac7efbc0801875f99034b204&id=795d4fa504&e=5a45ee1154 "Donate $25")
---
| [Donate $50](https://mdpetitions.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fac7efbc0801875f99034b204&id=4c9ecb810a&e=5a45ee1154 "Donate $50")
---
| [Donate $100](https://mdpetitions.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fac7efbc0801875f99034b204&id=081875e6ad&e=5a45ee1154 "Donate $100")
---
| [Donate More](https://mdpetitions.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fac7efbc0801875f99034b204&id=9b73179876&e=5a45ee1154 "Donate More")
---
| Your help made a difference as we worked to share our positive, hopeful message for our district and country. Thankfully, the Republicans maintain control of the House. I am very glad that we picked up the US Senate, and I am very thankful that President Trump won.

Our race forced state-wide and national Democrats to spend lots of money on Maryland's Congressional District 6. Had this race not been so close, that money would have gone to other races where Republicans won. We went all out, and I am thankful for the many people who got involved. This is one of the reasons why I am asking for your help right now.

If everyone reading this email donated even $10, this amount could be taken care of today. Thank you for your consideration to help us at this critical time, and I look forward to talking with you soon.

Sincerely,
Neil
---
| [PLEASE HELP US PAY THE LAST-MINUTE EXPENSE](https://mdpetitions.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fac7efbc0801875f99034b204&id=aa60cc2592&e=5a45ee1154 "PLEASE HELP US PAY THE LAST-MINUTE EXPENSE")

name: Derrick Evans
subject: Stomp out the snakes
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Evans For West Virginia
body:
I was the only elected Republican peacefully protesting on January 6th.

| | |
---
| |
---
| |
---
| | Here’s a side-by-side of my mugshot with President Trump’s.
---
[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z6k3ucbe6ugd59alaq7p7mp86bbm3kd23pplbhko_rp22sh2s8i6epj6c9gm9pr2chh2bs)
---
I was the only elected Republican peacefully protesting on January 6th. And the Left tried to make an example of me for it.Locking me away in solitary confinement for 90 days to try to mentally break me.But they could never break me – just like you – I’ll never stop fighting for our President.Friend, you and I stood by him when things were tough. Unlike cowardly establishment “Republicans” who backstabbed him to stay in power.And now I need you to help me hold them accountable.It starts with “Republican” Senator Shelley Moore Capito.Here’s what she said about January 6th:
---
_“It was horrifying, It was unfathomable they would come into the Chamber and defile the building. I think it was the lowest day”. “I think the president does own this,”_ she added
---
Shelley Moore Capito betrayed our president, betrayed the Americans that elected her, and continues to try to undermine President Trump’s new administration. With razor thin margins in the senate, we absolutely cannot afford to have a RINO never-Trumper in the senate undermining this administration at every turn.It’s time for her reckoning.It’s time to stomp out the snakes. **[Please rush a contribution to my campaign to Defeat Shelley Moore Capito today](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2ztbubiu56fomhfa82bas1kmf59oa79gsb20jg1rg_rp22sh2s8i6epj6c9gm9pr2chh2bs)**
---
[ **DONATE **](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zn4fob497r45lef1a6ncf309l12gqt60hlaqok00_rp22sh2s8i6epj6c9gm9pr2chh2bs)
---
Thank you,
---

clean_body: I was the only elected Republican peacefully protesting on January 6th. | | | | | | | | | Here’s a side-by-side of my mugshot with President Trump’s. I was the only elected Republican peacefully protesting on January 6th. And the Left tried to make an example of me for it.Locking me away in solitary confinement for 90 days to try to mentally break me.But they could never break me – just like you – I’ll never stop fighting for our President.Friend, you and I stood by him when things were tough. Unlike cowardly establishment “Republicans” who backstabbed him to stay in power.And now I need you to help me hold them accountable.It starts with “Republican” Senator Shelley Moore Capito.Here’s what she said about January 6th: “It was horrifying, It was unfathomable they would come into the Chamber and defile the building. I think it was the lowest day”. “I think the president does own this,” she added Shelley Moore Capito betrayed our president, betrayed the Americans that elected her, and continues to try to undermine President Trump’s new administration. With razor thin margins in the senate, we absolutely cannot afford to have a RINO never-Trumper in the senate undermining this administration at every turn.It’s time for her reckoning.It’s time to stomp out the snakes. name: John Pierce
subject: TRIAL TODAY: DOJ Helped Kill Stephanie's Babies…
body:
Joe Biden’s brutal Department of Justice helped kill Stephanie Baez’s babies ... and now they want to throw her in prison.

[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z3fjr00fut128h5l1akksunm459552merpan7be0_rp22sh2s8i6epj6c9im0or6clh2bs)

[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zqaur6656qpg3c6qac8bi88j9r3q44evmvbcm4s8_rp22sh2s8i6epj6c9im0or6clh2bs) Dear Patriot,

**[Your crucial gift of a critically important $25, $50, $100 or more immediately will help us fight for Stephanie and keep beating Joe Biden's DOJ in court!](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zqepl52ggnfd6f8fv0pusr5fnqri5nupl9pkd2lg_rp22sh2s8i6epj6c9im0or6clh2bs)**

Joe Biden's brutal Department of Justice helped kill Stephanie Baez's babies ... and now they want to throw her in prison.

Let me tell you, Stephanie is a happy, beautiful young woman you'd want as your friend or next door neighbor.

All she wanted was to start a family, and help heal sick people. She applied to medical school to make that dream come true.

Like many other patriots, Stephanie peacefully protested outside the US Capitol on January 6, 2021.

And like many other patriots, she peacefully entered the Capitol for just a few minutes.

She wasn't violent. She didn't destroy any property.

**Stephanie peacefully took a stand for fair, honest elections. But Joe Biden 's DOJ went after her like she was Public Enemy #1!**

First, they charged her with four misdemeanors. And they turned up the pressure to force her into pleading guilty and taking a plea deal.

But she refused to knuckle under.

**The DOJ was outraged. So they charged Stephanie with a felony that could put her in prison for 20 years!**

As you can imagine, this terrified her.

What's more, the brutal stress of facing 20 years in prison for a crime she didn't commit destroyed her health.

**Since 2022, Stephanie has endured 10 surgeries. She lost two of her babies in miscarriages. And now she faces a vicious show trial on December 3 rd.**

But there's something you can do about it.

I'm John Pierce, founder of National Constitutional Law Union.

Right now, NCLU represents 50 clients who peacefully protested at the United States Capitol on January 6, 2021.

**I 'm proud to say President Trump has endorsed our legal fight for January 6 prisoners. Because he knows we're beating Joe Biden's Department of Justice and FBI in case after case:**

We fought like devil dogs for our client, Kenneth Joseph Thomas, and WE WON!

Another January 6 client of ours, Dominic Pezzola, was found NOT GUILTY of committing seditious conspiracy.

**In fact, we 've defeated 23 charges against our 50 January 6 clients so far!**

And while we're excited about our hard won victories, we know Joe Biden and his lawless DOJ are pulling out all the stops to railroad Stephanie and other innocent Americans we're defending in court.

**NCLU is fighting for them because they deserve a strong defense, and because Joe Biden will turn his DOJ and FBI loose on you and me, our families, and other patriots if we don 't defeat them in court.**

The stakes couldn't be higher.

**[Patriot, please help NCLU defend Stephanie and our other innocent clients with your crucial gift of $25, $50, $100 or more right now.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zlltmse7phj2jchsfd59jnsevagiscir14m5kgoo_rp22sh2s8i6epj6c9im0or6clh2bs)**

Frankly, we're stretched to the absolute breaking point.

There's too much critical work to do, and not enough lawyers, paralegal, secretaries, and more to do it.

**[Patriot, PLEASE help NCLU fight back in court for our clients with your vital gift of at least a critical $25, $50, $100 or more RIGHT NOW.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zembnph920510nv3a0ve9gh0rgvgab1so924iokg_rp22sh2s8i6epj6c9im0or6clh2bs)**

Don't miss out on helping these patriots get freed from prison!

Thank you!

In Vigilance,

John M. Pierce
Chairman and Founder
National Constitutional Law Union

**P.S. Patriot, Joe Biden 's DOJ helped kill Stephanie's babies. And now she faces 20 years in prison for a crime she didn't commit. **Her trial is on December 3rd.But President Trump endorses NCLU because we're beating the DOJ in court.

**[Please help NCLU defend Stephanie with your critically important gift of at least a vital $25, $50, $100 or more IMMEDIATELY.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zfs2h9oevrvalr18bqd6ldqvpll8n4pu2mkca6s0_rp22sh2s8i6epj6c9im0or6clh2bs)**

body:
I was the only elected Republican peacefully protesting on January 6th.

| | |
---
| |
---
| |
---
| | Here’s a side-by-side of my mugshot with President Trump’s.
---
[](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2znc5u4kujhnuv15rkfv71kvmgae4kvddhoap77eo_rp22sh2s8i6epj6c9im8pb0cjh2bs)
---
I was the only elected Republican peacefully protesting on January 6th. And the Left tried to make an example of me for it.Locking me away in solitary confinement for 90 days to try to mentally break me.But they could never break me – just like you – I’ll never stop fighting for our President.Friend, you and I stood by him when things were tough. Unlike cowardly establishment “Republicans” who backstabbed him to stay in power.And now I need you to help me hold them accountable.It starts with “Republican” Senator Shelley Moore Capito.Here’s what she said about January 6th:
---
_“It was horrifying, It was unfathomable they would come into the Chamber and defile the building. I think it was the lowest day”. “I think the president does own this,”_ she added
---
Shelley Moore Capito betrayed our president, betrayed the Americans that elected her, and continues to try to undermine President Trump’s new administration. With razor thin margins in the senate, we absolutely cannot afford to have a RINO never-Trumper in the senate undermining this administration at every turn.It’s time for her reckoning.It’s time to stomp out the snakes. **[Please rush a contribution to my campaign to Defeat Shelley Moore Capito today](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zbgr5o318nvo3d5annbm3ta065kq9hq77unikcl8_rp22sh2s8i6epj6c9im8pb0cjh2bs)**

---
Thank you,

_That 's why we had to make sure you saw this exclusive Giving Tuesday offer right away._
Today, your gift will be matched, dollar for dollar, up to a total of $125,000, thanks to Jeep®. Every dollar DOUBLES to help us reach our $500,000 goal before midnight. Don't miss this chance to show our heroes they're remembered and appreciated.

If you believe that women belong in the rooms where decisions are being made, [**please consider making a monthly donation to Her Bold Move today.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98052417/515418768/1701071684?refcode=EM_F_241203giving_N_CD_90DO_13_NG_N_L1&recurring=auto&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjk4NGZiN2YzLTdlYjEtZWYxMS04OGNmLTYwNDViZGZlOGQyOSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Vu7EMSEYB83AQV5d-hOmklrqaE7MvjTuBtAnIm0GbEc=) We are gearing up for a productive and important year ahead – each and every dollar will help make our work possible. Thank you.
---
Hi Peter,

As pundits continue to reflect on the results of the 2024 election, many Americans are feeling despair and distrust in strategies they believed would work to protect from another Trump presidency. Americans are, understandably, searching for what to do next and where to turn our energy.

[**On this Giving Tuesday, we are reaching out to be an outlet for that energy. The truth is, the work we’re doing at Her Bold Move is going to be unbelievably critical over the next four years.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98052422/515418774/1701071684?refcode=EM_F_241203giving_N_CD_90DO_13_NG_N_L2&amount=20.25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjk4NGZiN2YzLTdlYjEtZWYxMS04OGNmLTYwNDViZGZlOGQyOSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Vu7EMSEYB83AQV5d-hOmklrqaE7MvjTuBtAnIm0GbEc=)

Women’s issues will continue to be attacked by a cabinet composed of some of the most powerful sexual predators of our time (we wish this were hyperbole...). With that very real threat at the forefront, electing WOMEN to public office is the best possible defense against attacks on women – and the best strategy for securing women’s autonomy in America.

**We have a vision for this country and a dream of FINALLY seeing ourselves, our daughters, our friends, and our fellow American women represented at the highest level of our government. It starts with electing more women to ALL levels of government.** [**This Giving Tuesday, join us in the fight to make that a reality by pitching in $20.25 or more today →**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98052429/515418778/1701071684?refcode=EM_F_241203giving_N_CD_90DO_13_NG_N_L3&amount=20.25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjk4NGZiN2YzLTdlYjEtZWYxMS04OGNmLTYwNDViZGZlOGQyOSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Vu7EMSEYB83AQV5d-hOmklrqaE7MvjTuBtAnIm0GbEc=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [**$20.25 »**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98052434/515418782/1701071684?refcode=EM_F_241203giving_N_CD_90DO_13_NG_N_B20.25&express_lane=true&amount=20.25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjk4NGZiN2YzLTdlYjEtZWYxMS04OGNmLTYwNDViZGZlOGQyOSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Vu7EMSEYB83AQV5d-hOmklrqaE7MvjTuBtAnIm0GbEc=)

---
Here is why our work is so important:

✅ By electing qualified, pro-choice women to state and local offices, we are building necessary guardrails to defend against the potential damage of the incoming administration. Research shows women leaders spend time working on women’s issues. The more women in the rooms where decisions are being made – the more likely we are to see women’s rights protected.

✅ We are not afraid to work in deep red abortion ban states. These are the states where women are truly being left behind and most desperately need women representing them in their government. We’re chipping away at the male, GOP supermajorities in those states.

✅ We are building a bench of qualified, pro-choice women. The more women serving in our government, the more opportunities there will be for a woman to run for president and, FINALLY, win.

✅ Seeing is believing. It is critical that our daughters see themselves reflected in their leaders. We must ensure that there is female representation at every level of the American government.

Thanks to your support, we have grown exponentially since our founding. We are seeing results and success stories year after year. This past election, 44% of our winners were women of color, and 47% of our _winners_ came from _abortion-ban states_ (!!!!!). Almost ALL of our winners shattered glass ceilings with their victories. That ^ is the impact that we are having, and we are asking for your support to keep up the fight.

[**We know exactly where we go from here: We must continue the work to elect pro-women WOMEN so we can have a voice in the rooms where decisions about our bodies are being made. This Giving Tuesday, help us continue the fight for our future by rushing $20.25 or more immediately.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hbm-pac/?refcode=EM_F_241203giving_N_CD_90DO_13_NG_N_L4&amount=20.25)

We wouldn’t be able to do all of this without your support. Thank you so much for joining us in this fight. Happy Giving Tuesday!

Colleen Davis
Endorsements Manager
Her Bold Move
| | Her Bold Move believes that ambitious women will transform our country. We provide critical support for fiercely pro-choice women candidates and their campaign teams: financial support, endorsements, message amplification, campaign media, fundraising support, and more.

subject: Your signature has been requested on JD Vance’scongratulations card.
body:
We are opening up this card to EVERYONE tomorrow morning, but we are giving you the exclusive opportunity to be FIRST signature!

| |
---
| | | **_" CONGRATULATIONS on your major MAGA Victory! You will make us proud as Vice President!"_

TO: Vice President-Elect JD Vance
FROM: Friend**

Friend - we have an exclusive opportunity JUST for you!

We just finished combing through our records to find the TOP 500 Trump-Vance supporters on our file, and your supporter profile blew us away!

So now we are inviting YOU, Friend, to be the FIRST signature on our victory card to say CONGRATULATIONS to Vice President-Elect JD Vance!

We are opening up this card to everyone on our list first thing tomorrow morning, so make sure to take advantage of this exclusive opportunity as soon as possible to be the first to sign and leave a message!

_**[Will you sign your name now and leave a message of support?](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zieqv1gj6ngp68jg12rjnoimhlvaruen1gpqh9jg_rp22sh2s8i6epj6c9imcpj6cph2bs "Will you sign your name now and leave a message of support?")**_

name: API PA
subject: Celebrate GivingTuesday with Us - Your Support Powers Our Work
body:
https://www.apipennsylvania.org/ [https://www.apipennsylvania.org/] Giving Tuesday logo [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/AV/AV001/1/82704/images/Giving%20Tuesday.png]
Hi Peter,
Today is GivingTuesday , a global movement that celebrates the power of generosity and reimagines a world built on shared humanity. We’re grateful to have you with us as we reflect on what we’ve achieved together this year through your incredible support.
A young Chinese woman crouches next to an old man sitting on a bench. She is helping him check his voter registration on her phone. [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/AV/AV001/1/82704/images/10.26.2024%20Jenny%20Zhang%20talking%20to%20elder.jpg] API PA [https://www.apipennsylvania.org/donate] achieved significant milestones in our political program this year, running our largest campaign to date. We more than doubled our outreach efforts, both in door-to-door canvassing and phone banking, expanding from 15 to 22 languages to ensure broader community engagement. Our team knocked on over 325,000 doors, and we made an astounding 5.5 million calls in 22 languages. In addition, we mailed 1 million pieces in 10 different languages, reaching a wide and diverse population. Our digital ads, available in 8 languages, garnered an impressive 32.7 million views, amplifying our message and engagement across various communities.
One of our key areas of focus has been mental health reform, particularly in relation to Justice for Christian Hall. Thanks to your support, we celebrated a major victory with the passage of House Bill 2533. Supporters of Justice For Christian Hall speak in Allegheny County while holding up signs about mental health care [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/AV/AV001/1/82704/images/20241127-Katrina%20Speaking%20at%20Justice%20for%20Christian%20Hall%20Hearing.jpg]
This important legislation ensures access to culturally competent, multilingual crisis care, helping to address mental health needs within marginalized communities. It’s a powerful step forward in honoring Christian’s legacy and promoting justice for all.
We’ve also been fighting to protect Philadelphia’s Chinatown, one of the city’s last remaining cultural gems. With ongoing threats of development, we are dedicated to preserving this historic neighborhood - not just as a physical space, but as a vital hub of cultural and community heritage. We are committed to safeguarding our beloved Chinatown for future generations.
Protestors at Philadelphia City Hall hold up signs that say ''No Arena'' and ''Protect Chinatown'' [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/AV/AV001/1/82704/images/9.7.24%20City%20Hall%20Rally-2.jpg]
These efforts are only possible because of supporters like you. Together, we’ve made real progress toward justice, equity, and community empowerment. But there’s still more to be done, especially with the challenges ahead under the new administration. We need your continued support to keep up the fight.
Today, on GivingTuesday, we ask you to stand with us once again. Your donation will ensure we have the resources to continue this critical work and make a lasting impact.
Donate [https://www.apipennsylvania.org/donate?am=20.00&contactdata=6FWWFfNwzj9cYtCuvt7axCQLx4gShB1tm2sjAnPKlLpHXoA5yrdcqSEGdxIlgb50S3L/T/F0QLsxulON8UHmuHODs7vlr7N3G7S2h2ox+20Cl8BZspAuN5lMSTju5DcXTV6soXKhVl5lYfDQ9x9m+ydQyMts0U+1tXPJZaZRQYQ=]
Thank you for your unwavering support. With your help, we will continue to rise to the challenge and fight for the future our community deserves.
https://www.facebook.com/apipennsylvania [https://www.facebook.com/apipennsylvania] https://twitter.com/apipennsylvania [https://twitter.com/apipennsylvania] https://instagram.com/apipennsylvania [https://instagram.com/apipennsylvania] https://www.tiktok.com/@apipennsylvania [https://www.tiktok.com/@apipennsylvania]

API PA
PO Box 22611
Philadelphia, PA 19110
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.everyaction.com/p/SxZcLwbmqUib9krCmDRzmw2?unsubscribedata=NNFIuPuRHJcfcw7AOO2vPG8Sf6RNO47u2ZQuHC%2BCqLgqENPqOXCNGLDHZFrghhJbyRAQG2d%2BvuLpUZKLOIufTW%2BzbDlxnUtDf2YnMoezWSOqV9YfYup0%2BHDR5Y6QG9xJT6aanIDtnWPGZJnfbPwbUjiez1uXKQAO5WQLHjVD%2BG%2BYqlnUaW0PBn5Ehqrs7vWvOzc5Pq7Z2OTWfwjVlTKu3UZq059t9i1l7AVc5lExygE87zIZMCzCjKnftgX%2FKZfh70djuM9776%2F%2FRTGfbFbBEpnstm5jAm1sJUqwFzGInVC%2FfX3aEyz7I5XMLgwy9N%2F2QH3MUkaRbcPtX%2FijtOTyFZetF8TWIhXGeM41hsDdmCRoWi4zkrxZmBCHbdMB8JEJZXw9aMP68lrV02QxrFB%2FLguchI3ORcRITxY074hFTgI%3D .

body:
We are opening up this card to EVERYONE tomorrow morning, but we are giving you the exclusive opportunity to be FIRST signature!

| |
---
| | | **_" CONGRATULATIONS on your major MAGA Victory! You will make us proud as Vice President!"_

TO: Vice President-Elect JD Vance
FROM: Friend**

Friend - we have an exclusive opportunity JUST for you!

We just finished combing through our records to find the TOP 500 Trump-Vance supporters on our file, and your supporter profile blew us away!

So now we are inviting YOU, Friend, to be the FIRST signature on our victory card to say CONGRATULATIONS to Vice President-Elect JD Vance!

We are opening up this card to everyone on our list first thing tomorrow morning, so make sure to take advantage of this exclusive opportunity as soon as possible to be the first to sign and leave a message!

_**[Will you sign your name now and leave a message of support?](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zqo764bl5bom0uvrjb48bc659vdmt5unp2malt4g_rp22sh2s8i6epj6c9im2oj4cth2bs "Will you sign your name now and leave a message of support?")**_

name: Jessica McCabe
subject: Why it matters
body:
& why we will never give up | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98060607/515444074/59579377?sourceid=1150074&utm_campaign=25emkge-1117aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=6xmatch&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNjIxZGNhMC04M2IxLWVmMTEtODhjZi02MDQ1YmRmZThkMjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dlmKqaN808itCo4UvntuNN3_nTersD91ilpYyXhBAbw=&emci=65eaf1e5-edac-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&emdi=f621dca0-83b1-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&ceid=954237)
---
Peter—

Each of us has our own story about reproductive care and our own reasons for supporting the fight for reproductive rights. _No matter your reason, we are grateful to have you on our team._

**Make your impact even bigger today:** [**Your Giving Tuesday gift will be matched 6X—up to $100,000! But this match ends at midnight tonight!**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98060608/515444075/59579377?sourceid=1150074&utm_campaign=25emkge-1117aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=6xmatch&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNjIxZGNhMC04M2IxLWVmMTEtODhjZi02MDQ1YmRmZThkMjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dlmKqaN808itCo4UvntuNN3_nTersD91ilpYyXhBAbw=&emci=65eaf1e5-edac-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&emdi=f621dca0-83b1-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&ceid=954237) | [**MATCH MY GIFT 6X**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98060609/515444076/59579377?sourceid=1150074&utm_campaign=25emkge-1117aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=6xmatch&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNjIxZGNhMC04M2IxLWVmMTEtODhjZi02MDQ1YmRmZThkMjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dlmKqaN808itCo4UvntuNN3_nTersD91ilpYyXhBAbw=&emci=65eaf1e5-edac-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&emdi=f621dca0-83b1-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&ceid=954237 "MATCH MY GIFT 6X")
---
This fight is deeply personal. And no matter how tough the road ahead looks, we’re inspired every day by supporters like you. Here’s what keeps us going:
> _"I support the Center because as an OB/GYN that both provides care and teaches residents and medical students in Tennessee, I was well aware that things weren't going well in the U.S. before a lot of other people started paying attention. The Center represented me in a case against my state's legislative interference, and knowing the people at the Center and watching the work being done, I am inspired to support them."_
> – Nikki Z

> _"The Center is the only organization I feel strongly about donating to every year. Their mission is clear, and I feel like they're on the right side of history. It's upsetting to think about all the women who are scared during their pregnancies, and I'm comforted knowing that the Center is there to help them."_
> – Logan C
Our future belongs to all of us—not to extremist politicians or judges. [**That's why we won't back down. clean_body: & why we will never give up | Peter— Each of us has our own story about reproductive care and our own reasons for supporting the fight for reproductive rights. No matter your reason, we are grateful to have you on our team. Make your impact even bigger today: | "MATCH MY GIFT 6X" This fight is deeply personal. And no matter how tough the road ahead looks, we’re inspired every day by supporters like you. Here’s what keeps us going: "I support the Center because as an OB/GYN that both provides care and teaches residents and medical students in Tennessee, I was well aware that things weren't going well in the U.S. before a lot of other people started paying attention. The Center represented me in a case against my state's legislative interference, and knowing the people at the Center and watching the work being done, I am inspired to support them." – Nikki Z "The Center is the only organization I feel strongly about donating to every year. Their mission is clear, and I feel like they're on the right side of history. It's upsetting to think about all the women who are scared during their pregnancies, and I'm comforted knowing that the Center is there to help them." – Logan C Our future belongs to all of us—not to extremist politicians or judges. Onward, Jessica McCabe Senior Manager, Individual Giving P.S. Whether your own experience or that of a loved one brought you to this fight, your Giving Tuesday gift today will help protect reproductive rights. "DONATE NOW" | | | | ---|---|--- The Center for Reproductive Rights uses the power of law to advance reproductive rights as fundamental human rights around the world. name: Gabby Giffords
subject: Personally asking for your support this Giving Tuesday
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
When you think of an organization you’d like to give to today, I hope you’ll consider choosing GIFFORDS PAC
#

Today is Giving Tuesday, the day Americans across the country give back by making donations to support causes they believe are making a difference.
**I know there are many worthy causes out there. But when you think of an organization you’d like to give to today, I hope you’ll consider choosing GIFFORDS PAC to support us in our ongoing efforts to end gun violence:**
**[DONATE TODAY](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-dec24.MAKoxe&refcode=em241203-1-30&t=1&akid=9548%2E3935704%2EioTj7b)**
While a lot of people might think it was my own shooting that inspired me to commit my life’s work to ending gun violence, that wasn’t the case. The shooting at Sandy Hook Elementary School in Newtown, Connecticut was the reason I decided to devote myself to this fight.
And while I was still in the midst of my own recovery, when I saw the unspeakable events of that day unfold, I was determined to take action. So my husband Mark and I founded GIFFORDS—known at the time as Americans for Responsible Solutions.
We have come such a long way since the first days of GIFFORDS over eleven years ago. Back then, most elected officials avoided talking about gun violence at all costs. It was considered too politically divisive.
Now, we have been able to bring gun violence to the forefront of the national conversation. In 2022, we helped pass the _Bipartisan Safer Communities Act,_ the most significant federal gun safety legislation passed in nearly 30 years.
I’m so proud of the progress we’ve made, and I hope you are too. But we still have so much work ahead of us to make sure that every person in our nation is safe from the threat of gun violence.
[**In honor of Giving Tuesday, I’m personally asking you to make a contribution to GIFFORDS PAC. When we say that a majority of our fundraising comes from people like you donating to emails like these, we really mean it.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-dec24.MAKoxe&refcode=em241203-1-30&t=2&akid=9548%2E3935704%2EioTj7b)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://go.giffords.org/go/17015?c0=giffords-em-dec24.YP__Dn&amount=3&refcode=em241203-1-30&t=21&akid=9548%2E3935704%2EioTj7b)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://go.giffords.org/go/17017?c0=giffords-em-dec24.Tl-4ZJ&refcode=em241203-1-30&t=22&akid=9548%2E3935704%2EioTj7b)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://go.giffords.org/go/17010?c0=giffords-em-dec24.Wil-xB&refcode=em241203-1-30&t=23&akid=9548%2E3935704%2EioTj7b)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://go.giffords.org/go/17011?c0=giffords-em-dec24.5v9WVG&refcode=em241203-1-30&t=24&akid=9548%2E3935704%2EioTj7b)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://go.giffords.org/go/17012?c0=giffords-em-dec24.DV10SI&refcode=em241203-1-30&t=25&akid=9548%2E3935704%2EioTj7b)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://go.giffords.org/go/17015?c0=giffords-em-dec24.YP__Dn&refcode=em241203-1-30&t=26&akid=9548%2E3935704%2EioTj7b)**
---
****
Thank you so much for all that you do for the movement to end gun violence.
My very best,
Gabby Giffords

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=27&akid=9548%2E3935704%2EioTj7b) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

name: Christina Bohannan
subject: A heartfelt thank you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Christina Bohannan for Congress
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98063139/515450523/-678669148?refcode=em_logoheader&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYWFmNGJlYS04NWIxLWVmMTEtODhjZi02MDQ1YmRmZThkMjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=v78NcGqfSBN7E2JbcTNdfow2fw3M5csb6Fjbd7QJOT4=)

Peter,

I want to first say thank you for your patience and support as we have been in the recount process. Our goal was to ensure every voter’s voice was heard, and that is what happened.

Although we came up short, and this wasn’t the outcome we fought so hard for, I want you to know that every bit of energy, dedication, and hope you poured into this campaign has been meaningful beyond words.

We knew this journey wouldn’t be easy. We understood the odds from the start, yet we pressed forward together – fueled by a shared belief in a better Iowa and a brighter future for IA-01. We knocked on doors, made countless calls, and connected with our neighbors, building a movement rooted in hope, courage, and integrity. And though the results weren’t what we had hoped, that strength we built, that hope we shared, remains.

The work we did together will carry on. This race was one of the three closest in the country, and despite Trump winning the district by more than eight points, we fell short of my opponent by only 0.19% – or about 800 votes out of 413,000. We built a field program that knocked over 115,000 doors and made over 237,000 direct voter contact attempts. We even outperformed Harris-Walz by 8.2% in the district – more than any other Red-to-Blue candidate in the country.

I am profoundly grateful for every one of you, and I am deeply honored to have had you by my side. Let’s hold our heads high, regroup, and carry this momentum forward. Our work isn’t done – it’s just beginning.

With gratitude,

– Christina

name: Sarah McBride
subject: Thank you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McBride for Delaware
body:
We know the fight ahead won’t be easy, but with your continued support, I’m ready to roll up my sleeves and get to work.
#
I'm filled with gratitude.
Delawareans elected me their next member of Congress on November 5, and the weeks since have been awe-inspiring!
I’m grateful for the _thousands of people_ up and down the First State and across the country who showed their support for our movement rooted in hope and joy. I can’t thank this grassroots team enough for helping us reach our November fundraising goal and having my back when it mattered most. Knowing I can count on you means the world to me.
**As I prepare to be officially sworn in next month, I couldn’t feel more determined.** I ran to fight for working people and their families in Congress, and that’s exactly what I’m focused on.
We know the fight ahead won’t be easy, but with your continued support, I’m ready to roll up my sleeves and get to work.
Thank you!
Sarah McBride
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-footer?refcode=em20241203-1&t=1&refcode2=1591_21716_ts2xe9&akid=1591%2E21716%2Ets2xe9)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:

The investments in this movement to end gerrymandering and restore democracy are paying off:
This election, in both Louisiana and Alabama, thanks to the fair maps that were finally put in place after the _Allen v. Milligan_ decision, voters elected two Black members of Congress — ensuring both states are far closer to representation that _truly_ reflects their voters.
And in Arizona, the work we did to educate voters helped defeat a ballot initiative that would have essentially _ended_ term limits for state supreme and appellate court judges and locked in extreme partisan court majorities for decades.
**The months ahead might be even tougher. We need to be ready for concrete threats ahead like Donald Trump and his MAGA allies undermining the census, more attacks on the Voting Rights Act, and ongoing attempts to gerrymander at the state level.**
We've taken on challenges like this before. Our track record is proof that we know how to effectively fight back — but it's only possible with supporters like you. [**Please chip in today as a part of our Giving Tuesday 2x match and let’s fight for our democracy with everything we’ve got.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98067036/515460909/-1475603515?refcode=don_aotl_redite_email_GvngTues_email_20241203-AOTL-RedLite-GvngTues-BS_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20241203-AOTL-RedLite-GvngTues-BS_&utm_campaign=GvngTues&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjFmYzc2MDUwLTg3YjEtZWYxMS04OGNmLTYwNDViZGZlOGQyOSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=3Dmr5v3V0QKUk3tOY003Nr-VWnnTi_ZKqVjl344N37I=)

clean_body: We need to be ready for concrete threats ahead. | Peter, I’m writing today to ask you to include All On The Line in your Giving Tuesday plans. We have a huge opportunity to take advantage of, but we need your help. A generous donor has committed to matching all Giving Tuesday donations [[up to $50,000]]. That means whatever this community raises today — up to $50,000 — will be matched dollar for dollar. Essentially, your donation will have double the impact on efforts to safeguard and strengthen our democracy. = = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = The investments in this movement to end gerrymandering and restore democracy are paying off: This election, in both Louisiana and Alabama, thanks to the fair maps that were finally put in place after the Allen v. Milligan decision, voters elected two Black members of Congress — ensuring both states are far closer to representation that truly reflects their voters. And in Arizona, the work we did to educate voters helped defeat a ballot initiative that would have essentially ended term limits for state supreme and appellate court judges and locked in extreme partisan court majorities for decades. The months ahead might be even tougher. We need to be ready for concrete threats ahead like Donald Trump and his MAGA allies undermining the census, more attacks on the Voting Rights Act, and ongoing attempts to gerrymander at the state level. We've taken on challenges like this before. Our track record is proof that we know how to effectively fight back — but it's only possible with supporters like you. = Thanks so much, Brianna Shamsuddoha Director of Mobilization is the grassroots advocacy campaign supported by the National Redistricting Action Fund. Support our work to end gerrymandering. Text FAIR to 88228 to receive recurring updates from AOTL by automated text message. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: Brand-new kid's book "The 10 Commandments for Kids"
body:
Do you ever despair that Jesus will never return?
| | | [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=74da1e1f682544649f27706596b65cf6&_e=wNSuAIpE28JT_2ome9oS12lVhJOJgnQxZS2jt_OF-ncvwWLi0QHcg3bYMz2xCIgyNuHYAQac07Zs_mpDTUIMf4PWIADlOQFqv_YgfMP-MMqiJqYhQRDnQR5padyzCrPo8rlGLLyBTcphvj64c5c14GNMuPBxapFHejNQ9cW_CP1u8lKXYMn8GpyXBvrGd1XlgY32POS-svMqkG-at38ushDFMaKtlFq2fn5uh9FoPWN_EHn2iZotNYxat5o6dgyuVydS8zXl2O-DWoDjNiHH12hSyDlwz_KDxOZwfb7ZpoK-77CK7RGPo9zyRGsE5kMhVAfaAdf8poWGVK-QFdmQyDuf4txU8xVrP37wrTIslz10C6oqi1rBtO2kYCp-Tvgz)
---
Hello Friend,

Despite court rulings in Louisiana and Oklahoma that make the teaching of the Bible and the 10 Commandments mandatory in public schools and universities, we still live in a time when the foundational teachings of the Ten Commandments are no longer emphasized in our public schools and daily lives. As a result, our children are growing up without these essential, God-honoring rules for living.

In this culture of moral confusion, the Ten Commandments provide clear, simple answers about what it means to live a righteous life. Teaching these commandments to children not only instills a sense of security and purpose but also fosters emotional resilience, intellectual acuity, and ethical integrity. The Ten Commandments uphold traditional values and celebrate the family unit as foundational to society, helping children navigate life's challenges with confidence and grace.
---
| | That's why I'm excited to introduce my brand new kids book, _The 10 Commandments for Kids_ book. This book offers kids ten Bible lessons about God's simple rules for living, with each chapter explaining one commandment, discussion questions, applications, and prayers to say together. It's a trustworthy resource for children to read on their own, during church services, or as part of vacation Bible school studies.
---
| [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=74da1e1f682544649f27706596b65cf6&_e=wNSuAIpE28JT_2ome9oS12lVhJOJgnQxZS2jt_OF-ncvwWLi0QHcg3bYMz2xCIgyNuHYAQac07Zs_mpDTUIMf4PWIADlOQFqv_YgfMP-MMqiJqYhQRDnQR5padyzCrPo8rlGLLyBTcphvj64c5c14GNMuPBxapFHejNQ9cW_CP1u8lKXYMn8GpyXBvrGd1XlgY32POS-svMqkG-at38ushDFMaKtlFq2fn5uh9FoPWMLYLKKAzk827SmyuhXMOQYlSxM2Wyq51pGD0wtrhna0DIJ1QeYqDRqieQPaeFGBRjChMT_vQld6MfNP_ulIcMEnPKp7LxSPHdiRa9uWRCH1xP1HrTOslWGywyi8I5dekfsvGR36G5Ox8QKYYAKEXfL)
---
| | Additionally, for the adults in your life, I've written,_The 10: How to Live and Love in a World That Has Lost Its Way_. This book will refresh your understanding and application of the Ten Commandments, showing how living by these principles can improve our personal lives, relationships, churches, and communities.

**I encourage you to point your children or grandchildren towards Jesus Christ.**

For a gift of any amount to support Pathway to Victory, I will send you both books: [https://secure.ptv.org/the-10-commandments-for-kids-generous-gift-1](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=74da1e1f682544649f27706596b65cf6&_e=wNSuAIpE28JT_2ome9oS12lVhJOJgnQxZS2jt_OF-ncvwWLi0QHcg3bYMz2xCIgyNuHYAQac07Zs_mpDTUIMf4PWIADlOQFqv_YgfMP-MMqiJqYhQRDnQR5padyzCrPo8rlGLLyBTcphvj64c5c14GNMuPBxapFHejNQ9cW_CP1u8lKXYMn8GpyXBvrGd1Xl3r2o3VxTls0hGWNcHeDW604WwQqo8jiwxPUxkAZWh96jXPUmxfCbHtXwUh5wB8oRofjjQifnwUTEK6BFSh1AfWOBMseS0ZJx1F7mVnqAjTShyTfCSRizS4duI1VjUkFbT2IjxgEUitBjvSQz763lAyoMpK5W3pKq0nTBWkggrbS6T8gsyqCdtRJ8EpkZJg2J)

Your generosity enables _Pathway to Victory_ to share bold biblical truths with a broken world. Together, we will make a difference and bring people closer to Christ.

Thank you for standing with us and sharing the gospel of Jesus Christ.

Sharing the Truth of God's Word,

Dr. Robert Jeffress

PO Box 223609. Dallas, TX 75222
[
Unsubscribe](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_s=74da1e1f682544649f27706596b65cf6&_t=oY_yaDPUXemBMdB2UqB0HRszZVtx99ESwRWS3F6mnsR1bh3g_z80w7uUe6W4TbtpKn9q0O35l-EMj0HHgEH7gX2jOH0H9h5XbVPhGChm4-f7om1EmOApo4Igee-yAMVd)

Add your personal finances and family obligations... it can feel like you're losing control. But there's good news in all the doom and gloom. Here's what you [**CAN control**](https://financeinsights.net/ZnBeiYdVAFb0MYQFwdzJVF8QNJe?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com). Taking action on your taxes. You could potentially save on your taxes with specific strategies you can use now. **These strategies may not all be around forever.** You now have access to this FREE guide: [**Discover 5 Strategies You Can Use Now to Lower Your Taxes...Before Dec 31, 2024**](https://financeinsights.net/ZnBeiYdVAFb0MYQFwdzJVF8QNJe?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) Inside, you'll discover:

name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: can’t afford to let this continue
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Serve America PAC
body:
|
---
Team, **November's election showed us an alarming trend that could impact our race in 2025. Donald Trump gained ground nationwide, including in key counties across Virginia.** This election was a crucial test for Democrats as we approach 2025. National Republicans are feeling the momentum after the win, and they think that 2025 will be a key opportunity to keep this Governor’s seat red. We can’t afford to let Donald Trump and his allies gain any more ground next year. We must demonstrate that Virginia is not turning its back on progress or on our neighbors. We must have the resources to continue our campaign for stronger schools, safer communities, and lower costs for Virginia families. And we must show that we can build a future that brings people together and listens to the challenges facing all Virginians. Next year, National Republican groups and GOP leadership will work relentlessly to defeat us. We need to build a strong foundation now. [**Will you split a contribution today between my campaign and Serve America to help us prepare for the tough race ahead in November 2025?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98067380/515461803/-2101623703?refcode=241203&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NTk0NWIzZS04OGIxLWVmMTEtODhjZi02MDQ1YmRmZThkMjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ud_IrfhXcOB13cQBDn4aYnxZ6knMd25oKsq3MGwVEXw=) [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98067381/515461805/-1451023484?refcode=241203&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NTk0NWIzZS04OGIxLWVmMTEtODhjZi02MDQ1YmRmZThkMjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ud_IrfhXcOB13cQBDn4aYnxZ6knMd25oKsq3MGwVEXw=) Thank you,

name: Carolina at United We Dream
subject: We need to raise enough to help 100 DACA recipients by the end of the year.
body:
We help DACA recipients keep their protections by covering the $555 renewal fee. | | | Peter — It’s _never_ been more important than right now for DACA recipients to renew their protections as soon as they are eligible. To make that process one step easier, we help cover the $555 cost of renewal for immigrant youth who need help paying the fees. **[This Giving Tuesday, consider making a 100% tax-deductible charitable contribution to our DACA Renewal Fund to help cover the cost of life-changing protections for immigrant youth:](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvkqBZ6VW_VFbtBGGVx_RZ5VCCvtkN9uAOvzHzMHvndWQh1BTe-7tCJiq6zWHBNBPq1zavvxJTef-QJt5j0Z_tAWFoNjSCfeN1FZB_4VZCH_lkiWZitZFfZH3YtE4-IBIwHMsQuoshgK9SErvwah5Qm34TS7rmG_XWCHZewUpQ0ynG458uPJuTN3RVAn2oWd4VDDCwFe1LzgJXSCwdow_6ovmvMXJ4WCfmiFSv1G0bzrP7UYkovydnkwcsVytOKOyawJGYEX1h-lsG2gHg9hp_n5Ljh2k4Pc24YBMJoROPiNb7lVtOyMYW6vUjJ79dneJ22eeaH1jZGSDGsa6TD52D9aR5LOdAy4cEG_RRzHVyrqI4dPg00ciI0XTwWPyzbSAhu0hvDBE7A6EU8MviAwPSl8WGg7GmcbH8jw3ChkzRD5bNvZohvf14ycx2SvLILT2BhHjHMm9iCQBSR1svC54e_v7AtqQ3SHT92MDjvYybEsw/4bz/_rCobtvzTTWDdQeifKzEGQ/h0/h001.PONzTEB_T7vuuuNmIGgJyAEOkVEXzvq622K0lQQ4JWU)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [express donate: $10](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvkqBZ6VW_VFbtBGGVx_RZ5VCCvtkN9uAOvzHzMHvndWQh1BTe-7tCJiq6zWHBNBPq1zavvxJTef-QJt5j0Z_tA6Sa7th6eqUEzpK1BR2c2HhtD46p9GHydiKRPHfCHG-Pn_Q0A8qJACOD0dWQT9lRu1VmFtUWQE4uoAuPanajHd9nUnIEQbvPAquJf2WPFnVLHsfRVGZTWWfbF4exsjGlwJylTvAaPKwIAbTtRfcnQ1MF--IdxVB4SDQ9eYKKXhhV9074uq2vN2DKBX9_na9leqN1PpdVNTEKdtgYd8qAyQylgKH-Bv4IbrxFDV7FTfs1VXQNU4wOpyUa7hX9AsYtv1JmVL1xqa5m-h6P6VNNtywcD7M-v8sZsZyhj_YVPIYCEk8aoCmcENcrI5F44PLUdNRTePPLNQGi_ngeuoEPzSpfxX54g9uJaa8PluGClSjw8HD7JVSgrLzshe9PvrvcjqD_DTfXHAqO6LZjPjJ0l8ULb9YCp_ZQdA_mQpmVoYoyCUqnp7vRfzBXXW4Ib2i3P/4bz/_rCobtvzTTWDdQeifKzEGQ/h1/h001.2bf5gU2CJN1OXrbzKFhDn-NWONbaW_ZRi3ZOYac7-h4)

Your support is coming at a critical moment. Donald Trump tried to destroy DACA just months into his first term, and the program has been caught up in the courts ever since. We’re still waiting on the latest decision from the fifth circuit, but with Donald Trump returning to office in the new year, we know **DACA faces more tough battles ahead.**
Thanks to supporters like you, we were able to support over 250 immigrant youth by fully funding their renewal costs, but in light of the election results, we set a goal to help _100 more DACA recipients by the end of the year._
That means raising another $55,500 this month. It’s going to take a big effort, but we’re confident this team will meet the magnitude of the moment.
The DACA Renewal Fund is currently closed to new recipients. We had too many folks on our waiting list and not enough funds to help them all. We can’t open it back up until we raise enough to clear our waitlist — and we won’t do that without a surge of support today.
**[We want to be able to offer support to every DACA recipient who asks. clean_body: We help DACA recipients keep their protections by covering the $555 renewal fee. | | | Peter — It’s never been more important than right now for DACA recipients to renew their protections as soon as they are eligible. To make that process one step easier, we help cover the $555 cost of renewal for immigrant youth who need help paying the fees. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | | Your support is coming at a critical moment. Donald Trump tried to destroy DACA just months into his first term, and the program has been caught up in the courts ever since. We’re still waiting on the latest decision from the fifth circuit, but with Donald Trump returning to office in the new year, we know DACA faces more tough battles ahead. Thanks to supporters like you, we were able to support over 250 immigrant youth by fully funding their renewal costs, but in light of the election results, we set a goal to help 100 more DACA recipients by the end of the year. That means raising another $55,500 this month. It’s going to take a big effort, but we’re confident this team will meet the magnitude of the moment. The DACA Renewal Fund is currently closed to new recipients. We had too many folks on our waiting list and not enough funds to help them all. We can’t open it back up until we raise enough to clear our waitlist — and we won’t do that without a surge of support today. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | Thank you for your continued support, Carolina, United We Dream | Our most dedicated supporters chip in monthly to ensure we never have to turn down a DACA recipient who asks for help — which will be especially critical as we enter the second Trump era. Join them and maximize your support for immigrant youth by making your donation recurring: | | Follow us on: | | | | |

subject: TFVC Tuesday: Cautious Optimism for MAHA

| President Trump continues to build his administration piece by piece, delivering on some **key promises to change the way business is done in D.C.** TFVC continues to watch these developments closely, and so far we have more to be optimistic about than otherwise. However, there is one notable outlier amongst the people he has picked to lead our federal public health efforts: Dr. Janette Nesheiwat, who has been nominated for US Surgeon General. In his statement announcing this pick, President Trump spoke highly of Dr. Nesheiwat, giving her particular credit for her role in **Operation Warp Speed**. Additionally, interviews from late 2021 have resurfaced during which Dr. Nesheiwat strongly advocated for mask mandates for young public school children and emphasized the need for public school teachers to be vaccinated against COVID-19. This somewhat peculiar choice for Surgeon General overshadowed **three incredible appointments - Dr. David Weldon to lead the CDC, Dr. Jay Bhattacharya to head the NIH and Dr. Marty Makary to run the FDA.** All of these medical professionals have long been outspoken about vaccine injuries and corruption inside the alphabet agencies they have been tapped to lead. These MAHA-related developments remind us that we cannot put all of our eggs into the Trump basket, so to speak. In fact, **we must keep our energy focused on Texas** , where we can effect the most impactful changes.

| | Peter, it’s Troy.

I am only ONE MONTH AWAY from being sworn in, and I couldn't be more proud to serve as Montana’s next Congressman. But, the radical Left is ready to oppose anything my America First colleagues and I try to put forward. We have a historically narrow Majority, and with the Democrat money machine prepared to take us down, we need all the help we can get before January 3rd.

[**Will you help me get off to a strong start in the 119th Congress?**](https://trk.emails.troydowning._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTI5JmV4X3RpZD0yMDI0MTIwM19YQS1YRC4xMTAxMTdfdDE1ODQ3NjMtMjg5OSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNDEyMDNfWEEtWEQuMTEwMTE3X3QxNTg0NzYzLTI4OTkifQ/dPXPphSNc_7mg--V63q9VQ)

body:
Please make a special gift to help end the hunger crisis. Emails like these are an important aspect of our strategy to keep in touch with our supporters. If you want to receive fewer emails, click **[here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98070441/515470173/889329980?source=LOC_EM_FR_2024.12.03_GivingTuesday_B1_F1_S1_C1_Actives_N-T1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkODkzNzE3Ni04YmIxLWVmMTEtODhjZi02MDQ1YmRmZThkMjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AN3fXtwcZ6luosRfNejaRVAkLCFc9qCaWqbfMeyfszo=&emci=a98965f7-c5b0-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&emdi=d8937176-8bb1-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&ceid=2727974)** If you want to unsubscribe, click **[here.](https://action.durbinforsenate.com/p/vDVgS6znzEiztuxYJdeQwA2?unsubscribedata=twhH7ZqfKeTZ4MbW5Fyx49X%2FZ0ILP3PM2ZH7detXMolBEwudPq4dniq4OTVIRquBgeENulamBvrQsOPc0AMIpzaEMPNpbEmul7Y5c%2FkMM%2FepJsZW0ofw7wnqFl%2BwbkRGn26GytrI7xt3qFDmp476h%2BKf799eW%2BWAee7bQqzgQoIwO4U0%2BJePSqZSj8I%2Bxy6Nn2JZIbNCCLKmuBCxDJgBEWCzAcou6wNEQi3rmZrplhMNX5m57U6SsP1RwO%2F2a%2BlV4RBaJV98Zid%2BNkFeIc3CcMN8%2B34qUnhQIr0MJvjzoE5nQBOiMYMMzQ3kLlxZEf1QFyMiz3Yx8dr6xA4iKRqiP0xrvaCmW24jLa6Y8T0XhUyGlpVA3Ou5XxH9sMejxquZ7cOR%2BkZx5zVZqpZX6oVwB0KuJHx7Rq1nfsY7v7djVcs%3D)**

#
Hi Peter, it’s Dick. As the holiday season gets into full swing, it's a time for reflecting and being grateful for what we have. More importantly, it’s a time to give back to the communities that need it most.
So this Giving Tuesday, my team is fundraising to support six food banks across Illinois: the Greater Chicago Food Depository, Midwest Food Bank, Operation Food Search, Northeast Community Fund, the Central Illinois Food Bank, and the Northern Illinois Food Bank.
[**These six food banks serve different parts of the state and will help feed families that are in need. Will you donate $10 or more directly to these food banks?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98070443/515470177/1580721019?amount=10&source=LOC_EM_FR_2024.12.03_GivingTuesday_B1_F1_S1_C1_Actives_N-T1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkODkzNzE3Ni04YmIxLWVmMTEtODhjZi02MDQ1YmRmZThkMjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AN3fXtwcZ6luosRfNejaRVAkLCFc9qCaWqbfMeyfszo=)
**[DONATE TO ILLINOIS FOOD BANKS →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98070444/515470180/1580721019?amount=10&source=LOC_EM_FR_2024.12.03_GivingTuesday_B1_F1_S1_C1_Actives_N-T1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkODkzNzE3Ni04YmIxLWVmMTEtODhjZi02MDQ1YmRmZThkMjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AN3fXtwcZ6luosRfNejaRVAkLCFc9qCaWqbfMeyfszo=)**
These food banks provide **critical services** and help people get back on their feet. Those facing hunger rely on these food banks as a lifeline – and **_any amount_** can make a difference in making sure no one goes unfed during this holiday season.
[**So right now, please make a donation to Illinois food banks to help hundreds (if not thousands) of families across Illinois this Giving Tuesday.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98070446/515470182/1580721019?source=LOC_EM_FR_2024.12.03_GivingTuesday_B1_F1_S1_C1_Actives_N-T1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkODkzNzE3Ni04YmIxLWVmMTEtODhjZi02MDQ1YmRmZThkMjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AN3fXtwcZ6luosRfNejaRVAkLCFc9qCaWqbfMeyfszo=)
**[DONATE TO ILLINOIS FOOD BANKS →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98070448/515470184/1580721019?source=LOC_EM_FR_2024.12.03_GivingTuesday_B1_F1_S1_C1_Actives_N-T1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkODkzNzE3Ni04YmIxLWVmMTEtODhjZi02MDQ1YmRmZThkMjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AN3fXtwcZ6luosRfNejaRVAkLCFc9qCaWqbfMeyfszo=)**
Grateful for your generosity
Dick Durbin

* * *

If you want to receive fewer emails, click **[here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98070450/515470187/889329980?source=LOC_EM_FR_2024.12.03_GivingTuesday_B1_F1_S1_C1_Actives_N-T1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkODkzNzE3Ni04YmIxLWVmMTEtODhjZi02MDQ1YmRmZThkMjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AN3fXtwcZ6luosRfNejaRVAkLCFc9qCaWqbfMeyfszo=&emci=a98965f7-c5b0-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&emdi=d8937176-8bb1-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&ceid=2727974)** If you want to unsubscribe, click **[here.](https://action.durbinforsenate.com/p/vDVgS6znzEiztuxYJdeQwA2?unsubscribedata=twhH7ZqfKeTZ4MbW5Fyx49X%2FZ0ILP3PM2ZH7detXMolBEwudPq4dniq4OTVIRquBgeENulamBvrQsOPc0AMIpzaEMPNpbEmul7Y5c%2FkMM%2FepJsZW0ofw7wnqFl%2BwbkRGn26GytrI7xt3qFDmp476h%2BKf799eW%2BWAee7bQqzgQoIwO4U0%2BJePSqZSj8I%2Bxy6Nn2JZIbNCCLKmuBCxDJgBEWCzAcou6wNEQi3rmZrplhMNX5m57U6SsP1RwO%2F2a%2BlV4RBaJV98Zid%2BNkFeIc3CcMN8%2B34qUnhQIr0MJvjzoE5nQBOiMYMMzQ3kLlxZEf1QFyMiz3Yx8dr6xA4iKRqiP0xrvaCmW24jLa6Y8T0XhUyGlpVA3Ou5XxH9sMejxquZ7cOR%2BkZx5zVZqpZX6oVwB0KuJHx7Rq1nfsY7v7djVcs%3D)**

# Join or Renew your BIZPAC Membership
_Good Morning,_ _I hope you are planning to attend the BIZPAC Christmas reception._ _Kim, Sonu and I have been diligently working to produce one of the most fun, exciting and classiest Christmas receptions BIZPAC has ever held for our members. (see attached Christmas party invite) and RSVP with Kim@BIZPAC.us)_ _So, we are reaching out to ask TWO things from our members:_ _1) please bring a qualified member candidate with you to the Christmas Party...you never know, it might be just the thing their business needs to go to the next level_ _2) If you have not just joined or renewed, please Upgrade or Renew your membership today. BIZPAC needs your support to do our work in the Texas Legislature that has already started with bill filings._ _We ask for your support today. https://bizpac.us/join-now_ _See the special opportunities for membership below with our new VIP Founders Club._ _Sincerely,_
_JL Trahan_
_BIZPAC.us Founder and Executive Chairman_

Kim, Sonu and I have been diligently working to produce one of the most fun, exciting and classiest Christmas receptions BIZPAC has ever held for our members. (see attached Christmas party invite) and RSVP with Kim@BIZPAC.us) So, we are reaching out to ask TWO things from our members: 1) please bring a qualified member candidate with you to the Christmas Party...you never know, it might be just the thing their business needs to go to the next level 2) If you have not just joined or renewed, please Upgrade or Renew your membership today. BIZPAC needs your support to do our work in the Texas Legislature that has already started with bill filings. We ask for your support today. _**Today is Giving Tuesday!**_

This past year, we had incredible candidates run all across this country for local, state, and federal office from school boards to Congress across 30+ states. Emerge left a big imprint on the most consequential election of our lifetime. More than 550 Emerge alums ran for office and more than 350 won their races with a win rate of around 70%!

[_**Will you contribute anything you can before midnight tonight to 2X your impact today on Giving Tuesday? We’ve already hit the ground running to recruit, train, and empower our next class of Democratic women because we have no time to waste. That’s why this is your best opportunity to DOUBLE your impact this Giving Tuesday!

Please take our national census | | | We’re still in shock with what you did, Peter.
Thanks to your incredible support, President Trump ushered in the biggest Republican victory in history.
The old GOP is gone. In its place is a new America First party with a diverse coalition of patriots from every state in America.
That’s why we at NRSC HQ are now issuing a BRAND NEW National Party Census that better reflects the historic shift in our Party’s membership.

| | We hope you had an amazing Thanksgiving celebration with friends, family, and loved ones. As Americans, we have **thousands** of blessings to be thankful for as we enjoy every day of life here in _the world’s greatest country_. But this Thanksgiving felt a bit different after the **resounding** Election Day wipeout of the Democrats that we all enjoyed on November 5th. _We were truly** _one_ _election_ _loss_ _away_** from becoming a __**socialist**_ _****__**country**_ _._ And whether you know it or not, it was **YOU** and every selfless patriot like you who pulled our great nation out from the rubble this year.

| | Congressman Russell Fry, South Carolina’s Seventh Congressional District Congressman, is honored and humbled to represent the Pee Dee and Grand Strand areas in Washington, D.C. Russell Fry is the successful product of the American Dream. He learned from his parents that there is no such thing as a free lunch and that success comes from hard work and determination. Russell self-funded his undergraduate education at the University of South Carolina and then earned his law degree at the Charleston School of Law. In law school, he served as Student Bar Association president, helped the school achieve its American Bar Association accreditation, and received the prestigious Civility Award. For over a decade, he practiced law all along the Grand Strand. Russell has always been a public servant and an advocate for the conservative movement. Prior to his election to U.S. Congress, Russell Fry represented Horry County in the South Carolina General Assembly. As Chief Majority Whip in the State House, he fought to lower taxes, defend the unborn, and safeguard the 2nd Amendment. Additionally, Russell fought to put 18 policy initiatives into law in his time as Chairman of the SC House Opioid Abuse Prevention Study Committee. This legislation provided funding for education on opioids, opioid prevention, and opioid treatment. Russell and his wife, Bronwen, have one son, James. The family lives in Murrells Inlet with their beloved chocolate lab, Jasper.
---

clean_body: | | | | You won't want to miss this! Friend, We are excited to invite you to join us for a special panel discussion at this year’s Annual Advance in Charlottesville, Virginia. The panel, titled "Open Conversation with 168 RNC Members" , will provide a unique opportunity to hear directly from members of the Republican National Committee representing Virginia. Panel Details Time: 1:30 PM Location: Grove Ballroom We want this discussion to be as engaging and interactive as possible, and we encourage you to submit any questions you would like our panelists to address. Whether it’s about party strategy, upcoming elections, policy priorities, or issues affecting Virginia, this is your chance to hear directly from the RNC members. | We look forward to a lively and informative conversation with you and our esteemed panelists. Thank you for your participation, and we look forward to seeing you in Charlottesville! | Our room block at the Forum Hotel & Omni are officially full, but we still have a limited number of rooms available at our alternative locations. Click below to book your room now —and make sure to purchase your ticket at the same time to secure both your accommodation and event access! Reminder: A ticket purchase is required to confirm your hotel reservation. Don't wait—book today to guarantee your spot! | See you in Charlottesville! The Republican Party of Virginia PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY THE REPUBLICAN PARTY OF VIRGINIA Code "THANKFUL" active from 12:00AM EST Friday, November 29, 2024 to Monday, December 2, 2024 at 5:00PM EST. Only valid on All-Access and Saturday Only Passes. Not valid on Reagan Hosts, Young Republican, or any Sponsorship/VIP level ticket. Will not be honored via check nor over the phone sales. Must be purchased on Eventbrite by 5:00PM EST December 2, 2024.

name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: A charity that’s helping our neighbors put food on the table
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
| Will you make a donation to Meals on Wheels this Giving Tuesday?
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=4536%2E35263%2ElkLHMc)
Hi Peter, Today is Giving Tuesday, so I wanted to take a moment to highlight a charity that’s helping our neighbors put food on the table. Every year, Meals on Wheels serves over 2 million seniors with nutritious meals and moments of connection. The holidays can be especially challenging for seniors as loneliness and hunger intensifies this time of year. But this giving season, your gift can help change that. **[This Giving Tuesday, will you make a charitable donation to Meals on Wheels and help provide meals to those who need it most this winter?](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-meals.62OpwI&refcode=AU_STB_FR_CHA_GEN_AC_20241203_PM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=4536%2E35263%2ElkLHMc)** | | [DONATE](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-meals.62OpwI&refcode=AU_STB_FR_CHA_GEN_AC_20241203_PM1_V1_S1&t=5&akid=4536%2E35263%2ElkLHMc)
---
Thank you for being there for our neighbors. I hope you have a safe and happy holiday season.
— Tammy
P.O. BOX 696 MADISON, WI 53701
**[www.tammybaldwin.com](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=2&akid=4536%2E35263%2ElkLHMc) | [INFO@TAMMYBALDWIN.COM](mailto:INFO@TAMMYBALDWIN.COM) | [Privacy Policy](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/68?t=3&akid=4536%2E35263%2ElkLHMc)**

Eileen Marx strives to bring light to those in darkness. Together with her husband, Victor, she co-founded All Things Possible, a
ministry that reaches some of the most vulnerable around the world. Their focus is on those afflicted by trauma: physical,
emotional, spiritual.

Eileen shares vulnerably about her own journey of faith and her husband’s story of overcoming trauma. Her family's healing
inspires their mission to help heal those most in need. Like, share and subscribe.

Four Gifts That Make Lasting Christmas Memories

The holiday season can seem overwhelming. With a to-do list a mile long, it can be easy to spend December rushing around. But what
are we really celebrating?

This week, on the blog, we're sharing four simple ways to give gifts to those we love. Gift-giving does not need to be complicated
and expensive. When we give from the heart – with a little thought and creativity – we can create lasting memories.
