---
This is an _**OUTRAGEOUS**_ abuse of power. Remember when Biden looked Americans in the eye and swore he’d **NEVER** pardon his son? Well, guess what? **He just did.** Hunter Biden has now been granted a blanket pardon for a decade of alleged crimes— _**tax fraud, influence peddling, even felony gun violations.**_ This is Hayden with Young Republicans here, and frankly, we’re not surprised. **Biden’s actions are as predictable as his excuses**. This is the same administration that’s bent the rules and twisted the law at every turn, all while claiming _**“no one is above the law.”**_ Let’s not forget—if Trump had done this for any of his children, the media would be in a total frenzy. The Left would be calling for his head. But when Biden does it? Silence. **This is the real story** : **_Biden’s pardon of Hunter isn’t just a get-out-of-jail-free card for his son—it’s an attempt to cover up the corruption of the entire Biden family._** We’re calling on every America First patriot to take action. **Do you believe Hunter deserves this pardon? Or do you think it’s time to hold the Bidens accountable?** Your response is critical to show Washington that we won’t tolerate two sets of rules—one for them and one for us.
---
| | [ADD YOUR NAME: Tell Biden You Won’t Stand for This Betrayal](https://email.update.insidescooppolitics.org/c/eJyMkb2K3TAUhJ9G7nTRv-XCRcAYUmyaLVIaWTrX94AlGf1ks28fHJLUOd0Zhhk-5vvb9ubwxHR8cxFmrHUrdXvW7bPQ3FtxB1C39wqbYEJRLiiTGx_CrAW3TzvAzEcphWajYcNr5oFbq_dpNGHUbLdGO2fc5DgTAbi2A853DhdM8lFPYny4ncmg-f40ilu3C6JYv4Jr8MBUMUD1OV9XPrGhr49cjuGcX61dlcgvRKxErBV8L_D4wFQgPHyORKyfuaeDFrj6fqJ3iSbXMCd30icEKL8fiskTsaqJWXpRiCd99dSgVOoLRiBy7S1u3sXL4ZGIXNi_4yNTIxHmNkQI2CORC0SH5x-xeSKXr-_v9C8tEeZnT5nIRRnlldZWKjlJJi0RptwEBdNB5NJKByKMi7mnRuQi2FDmcH3geWI1I1HsuHtuzqH9914_ZvErAAD__4-ymrg)

**This is about more than just Hunter Biden. It’s about standing up for truth, fairness, and the future of our country.** **Will you stand with us?** Let’s fight back together.

subject: It’s Giving Tuesday – help save our country
body:
It’s time for the administrative state to go.

| | | | _Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_s=b48f3f57477d4a07be5a175621fba134&_t=iti2yYSph5jFLoUZMAcbIygLh_sPJ4khcjpeyXf9ir7touF1Ihl64K0loQjhCKHtDr2-6jPiLsBmSBLfXFD0JicPVUBuMaXG8fJC7uXMhiwdjptrnUhI3wlR8CKs5i6j)_

[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=b48f3f57477d4a07be5a175621fba134&_e=Mq0drpBYAOZkFlmdok2cTh72PLD_g5LRYEfrv3wwab3n9PfYv44pwFw1cQIdZiyjezBN3IXsMEjgIL_xP-_385DAkLf9stw76BI72ttBO_clgKOyzosaQsSgAH5ZvruQzP8yenpwWeZX9zDusPCAg9WnU8sdtaE0eRZN6Ml3cP0UvzWI37yEWg0ZOExQl8dEo4fU7PsNtrUukgOXk3qu42kQNQx5GEchHeQXttzVInuzO6vwK0al9oMgh8h6mQCffYX-rcNcPa-Nr4MQP3iwFKL_KpVTOKKhUVOdFGzdEHsB5OmBLVhHFZkhN8cO85jEwNagkB_nFuDBLd1D-KcekbTW5cHmYr04fzN24eJ1GUs%3D)
---
| | Dear Fellow American,

It's time for the administrative state to go.

The administrative state has become too large, too powerful, and far too costly.

Even worse, they push destructive leftist policies even when the American people elect conservative candidates like President Trump. We witnessed the administrative state directly sabotage conservative policies during the first Trump administration.

[**That 's why on this Giving Tuesday, I need your help to dismantle the administrative state.**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=b48f3f57477d4a07be5a175621fba134&_e=Mq0drpBYAOZkFlmdok2cTh72PLD_g5LRYEfrv3wwab3n9PfYv44pwFw1cQIdZiyjezBN3IXsMEjgIL_xP-_385DAkLf9stw76BI72ttBO_clgKOyzosaQsSgAH5ZvruQzP8yenpwWeZX9zDusPCAg9WnU8sdtaE0eRZN6Ml3cP0UvzWI37yEWg0ZOExQl8dEo4fU7PsNtrUukgOXk3qu4x39h5nTJNBg45aTkCtMFz-OyBkVewdNHx9aNXs8yCADYCa38PA37oBig95ZeAiIbiw4rI1v3TeF5DSNc1QD7BKhxgtcS4-6tL6nm1GKwSCtWR104PGmBlwlGHfzpDajt7rSzvDU8LTtWrdCj2FiVsc%3D)

Your Giving Tuesday gift will help The Heritage Foundation:
* Replace Washington's leftist bureaucrats with loyal patriots so they can dismantle the administrative state from within.
* Create and promote conservative policies that will restore the federal government to its proper size and save the American Dream.
* Promote the Good Life for all American families.

The war to rescue our republic will continue until we dismantle the administrative state and restore self-governance.

**That 's why I need you to make your most generous Giving Tuesday gift to The Heritage Foundation today using the secure link below. **

[**http://secured.heritage.org/thf-giving-tuesday/**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=b48f3f57477d4a07be5a175621fba134&_e=Mq0drpBYAOZkFlmdok2cTh72PLD_g5LRYEfrv3wwab3n9PfYv44pwFw1cQIdZiyjezBN3IXsMEjgIL_xP-_385DAkLf9stw76BI72ttBO_clgKOyzosaQsSgAH5ZvruQzP8yenpwWeZX9zDusPCAg9WnU8sdtaE0eRZN6Ml3cP0UvzWI37yEWg0ZOExQl8dEo4fU7PsNtrUukgOXk3qu42adivC570vPu741DGajOOxJ1R06eh6zpUmkaeGlbiRKgIHF8zstOUGcEMG4ITNmlGd1_3DbZBJD14iGpZrc6wxs3B1JBF2cfygzI_4zXfz-HQgyTQcWJhzbwPPiGnxXhBq6W8MKLWhTcaRw_m6K8ug%3D)

**Additionally, I just received work that a generous Heritage member has agreed to offer a $500,000 matching gift. Thanks to this match, your gift 's impact will be doubled.**

You're the key to ensuring we remain on offense for our country.

Sincerely,

Kevin D. Roberts, Ph.D.
President, The Heritage Foundation

If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this | | Dear Fellow American, It's time for the administrative state to go. The administrative state has become too large, too powerful, and far too costly. Even worse, they push destructive leftist policies even when the American people elect conservative candidates like President Trump. We witnessed the administrative state directly sabotage conservative policies during the first Trump administration. Your Giving Tuesday gift will help The Heritage Foundation: Replace Washington's leftist bureaucrats with loyal patriots so they can dismantle the administrative state from within. Create and promote conservative policies that will restore the federal government to its proper size and save the American Dream. Promote the Good Life for all American families. The war to rescue our republic will continue until we dismantle the administrative state and restore self-governance. That 's why I need you to make your most generous Giving Tuesday gift to The Heritage Foundation today using the secure link below. Additionally, I just received work that a generous Heritage member has agreed to offer a $500,000 matching gift. Thanks to this match, your gift 's impact will be doubled. name: PramilaForCongress.com
subject: Nobody should go hungry.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Food Lifeline provides meals for more than 1.3 million people each year.
#
Peter,
As a people-powered grassroots campaign, mutual aid is a critical part of how we strengthen our movement _and_ our communities. And with costs soaring higher than ever, more and more people need the help to make ends meet.
[**That’s why today, on Giving Tuesday, we’re asking you to pitch in to support Food Lifeline’s mission to end hunger in Washington.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20241203?refcode=em20241203-4561&amount=3&refcode2=4561_420207_r43lKY&akid=4561%2E420207%2Er43lKY)
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20241203?refcode=em20241203-4561&amount=3&refcode2=4561_420207_r43lKY&akid=4561%2E420207%2Er43lKY)**
**Access to food is a basic human right, and nobody should go hungry.** Yet every day, millions throughout Washington and the country experience food insecurity.
Food Lifeline helps by providing meals to thousands of people in Western Washington each day. With a network of over 350 food banks, shelters, and meal programs, they are able to provide an equivalent of more than **282,000 meals per day.** And in total, they provide meals for more than **1.3 million people each year.**
But that’s just one part of their work. Through advocacy and on-the-ground organizing, they also work to shape local, state, and federal policy by partnering with community-based programs and services.
[You can click here to learn more](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47661?t=1&akid=4561%2E420207%2Er43lKY) about the incredible work Food Lifeline is doing in Western Washington.
[**And when you’re done, please make a contribution to Food Lifeline today to support their efforts to feed our communities and end hunger.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20241203?refcode=em20241203-4561&amount=3&refcode2=4561_420207_r43lKY&akid=4561%2E420207%2Er43lKY)
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20241203?refcode=em20241203-4561&amount=3&refcode2=4561_420207_r43lKY&akid=4561%2E420207%2Er43lKY)**
Together, we can advance a broad social movement to end hunger this holiday season.
In solidarity,
Team Pramila

---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=2&akid=4561%2E420207%2Er43lKY)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=4561%2E420207%2Er43lKY)

Paid for by Pramila for Congress

name: Gene Karpinski, LCV
subject: MIDNIGHT DEADLINE: Help STOP Trump’s anti-environmental agenda this Giving Tuesday.
body:
To view this mail in a browser, copy https://links.messages.lcv.org/servlet/MailView?ms=MTE4NDI2NjES1&r=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&j=MjEwMDUwNjg5OAS2&mt=1&rt=0 into your browser.
Peter — Earlier this month, we got the incredibly welcome news that a
major donor agreed to put up a $100,000 challenge grant to help fund LCV’s
pro-environment campaigns into the new year. With Trump headed back to the White House in just a few weeks and promising to
pursue a dangerous anti-environmental agenda — meeting this goal matters tremendously. To unlock those funds, we need 1,000 LCV supporters to make a contribution
before midnight on Giving Tuesday — that’s tonight, just a few hours away, and
we haven’t heard from you yet, Peter. Defeating Trump’s dirty and dangerous agenda is going to take all of us. Please, renew your membership now for just $5 to help us reach our Giving Tuesday goal >> https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/L6b_ To help us reach this critical goal, we’ll send a free tote bag to LCV members who start an annual gift of $19 or more this Giving Tuesday. NAME EMAIL YOUR STATUS P. FRENCH - Current Peter Willis dpwillis67@gmail.com RENEW NOW FOR $5 >> https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/rNykfEmx- M. BLAKE - Current With Trump headed back to the White House in just a few weeks, this year’s
Giving Tuesday goal is even more important than usual. It’s going to take everyonein our movement standing together to disrupt his dangerous anti-environmental
agenda. Here are just a few reasons why your Giving Tuesday gift is EXTRA important
right now: Because we’re up against a critical deadline to secure environmental progress before Trump takes office. Right now, we’re campaigning for the Biden administration to protect clean air and public lands, and for the Senate to confirm pro-environment judges before Trump’s inauguration in January. We’re counting on your support to safeguard environmental progress. Renew your membership now for just $5 >> https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/X6bzs~w_
Because we’re fighting back against Donald Trump’s most extreme anti-science nominees. By nominating climate change deniers like Chris Wright — a Big Oil CEO — to lead federal agencies, Trump is putting polluters’ profits before people like you and me. We’re leading the fight to keep them from key positions. We can block these nominations, but only if the environmental movement shows up >> https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/w_
Because we need to be ready on DAY ONE to oppose Trump’s dangerous Project 2025 agenda. From abolishing the National Weather Service, to gutting environmental enforcement and allowing more toxic pollution into our air and water, to allowing more oil and gas drilling and infrastructure, Trump has laid out a blueprint for environmental disaster. We’re ready to fight this pro-polluter agenda in Congress, in the states, and the courts — but we need your help >> https://links.messages.lcv.
Because a group of donors has offered $100,000 in matching gift funds. Bottom line: Your contribution goes further to support environmental campaigns that matter if you give now and help unlock this critical funding. Renew your LCV membership now for just $5 >> https://links.messages.lcv. Meeting our Giving Tuesday goal matters — now more than ever.I hope you’ll pitch in: Our match unlock goal is 1,000 donors, but it ends at
midnight tonight. Renew your membership now for just $5 >> https://links.messages.lcv. And remember: if you start an annual gift of $19 or more by this Giving Tuesday,
you’ll receive a free tote bag from LCV to show your support for the environment year-round. https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/- I hope you’ll respond before midnight tonight, Peter. With your help, I
know that we can make this Giving Tuesday matter for our environment. Onward, Gene Karpinski
President
League of Conservation Voters This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you,update your contact information https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/ContactInformation?spMailingID=11842661&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MjEwMDUwNjg5OAS2&spReportId=MjEwMDUwNjg5OAS2.Click here to unsubscribe https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/Unsubscribe?spMailingID=11842661&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MjEwMDUwNjg5OAS2&spReportId=MjEwMDUwNjg5OAS2 from our supporter list.Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback here mailto:feedback@lcv.org?subject=, or just reply to this email! Thanks for your support.

740 15th St NW, Suite 700
Washington, DC 20005
202-785-8683 DONATE https://links.messages.lcv.

Hey there, it's Lisa. After the Thanksgiving festivities, we enter the busiest time of the holiday season. And today marks one of the days that make the holidays so special: **Giving Tuesday**. Giving Tuesday is dedicated to giving back to organizations and our local communities. When the world feels dark and scary with Trump coming into office and MAGA Republicans in the majority, we need to do everything – supporting other campaigns, continuing our voter outreach effort, and more to remind people it’s possible to put more good out in the world. There’s so much work left to be done in the weeks and months ahead – and we need to act and fight for our fundamental freedoms. And that starts with envisioning a world of **Bright Hope** for all Americans. [**So team, can you spare a few dollars to help us put our mission of Bright Hope front and center in the U.S. Senate?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98090784/515528622/-103748983?source=LOC_EM_FR_2024.12.03_GivingTuesday_B1_F1_S1_C1_30OP_N-T1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YjA2MTU2Yy1hMGIxLWVmMTEtODhjZi02MDQ1YmRmZThkMjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3dew04q04rdsGDnwKFIIE3F2H8P6mGlxX2m-KpngOxc=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | **[**CHIP IN $15 »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98090787/515528646/-103748983?express_lane=true&amount=15&refcode2=EL15&source=LOC_EM_FR_2024.12.03_GivingTuesday_B1_F1_S1_C1_30OP_N-T1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YjA2MTU2Yy1hMGIxLWVmMTEtODhjZi02MDQ1YmRmZThkMjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3dew04q04rdsGDnwKFIIE3F2H8P6mGlxX2m-KpngOxc=)**

name: DC Daily Journal
subject: Peter Berkowitz on Socialism and Capitalism
body:
Please read the following message from our sponsor.

Dear Friend,

In recent years, there has been a noticeable shift among young
Americans who increasingly favor socialism over capitalism. This
trend raises a critical question: do they fully understand these
two systems' historical contexts and real-world outcomes?

To address this, we have created a new eBook, The History of
Socialism and Capitalism, authored by two of the most prominent
voices in today's political discourse, Hoover Institution senior
fellows Niall Ferguson and Victor Davis Hanson.

This new eBook offers a deep dive into the origins,
development, and impacts of socialism and capitalism. Each
scholar presents an in-depth analysis through two different
lenses. It's hard to overstate the relevance of this eBook in
today's policy debates, where radical proposals are gaining
traction.

Understanding the historical and practical implications of
socialism and capitalism is crucial for making informed decisions
about our economic and political future. The insights provided by
Ferguson and Hanson will equip you with the knowledge to
critically evaluate these competing ideologies and their
potential impact on society.

Don't miss this opportunity to enhance your understanding of
these pivotal economic systems. Click here to request your free
copy of The History of Socialism and Capitalism today.

Greg

Greg Stamps | Online Development

Hoover Institution | Stanford University

With its eminent scholars and world-renowned Library and
Archives, the Hoover Institution is a non-partisan, data-driven
policy research organization that seeks to improve the human
condition by advancing ideas that promote economic prosperity,
national security, and democratic governance. Over more than one
hundred years, Hoover's work has directly led to policies that
have produced greater freedom, democracy, and opportunity in the
United States and around the world.

Hoover Institution 434 Galvez Mall Stanford University Stanford
CA USA 94305

name: NEXTGENAMERICA.ORG
subject: Housing is a RIGHT, not a privilege
body:
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98093589/515537240/240436357?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZWZhYjdhMS1hM2IxLWVmMTEtODhjZi02MDQ1YmRmZThkMjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7_f-GSBou8UgnQ6HBoGq3HQOrr7vQJzTwNaKHn6Jt30=&emci=c7bc8b57-9fb1-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&emdi=0efab7a1-a3b1-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&ceid=6787172)
---
Hey Team,
Just a few months ago, a revolutionary bill was introduced to Congress that could completely reinvent housing in America. **The Homes Act** could help build and preserve as many as _1.3 million homes_ in small towns, big cities, and rural communities, and help families everywhere find a quality, affordable place to call home.
That sounds _amazing_ , so why aren’t we celebrating?
**It hasn’t passed yet.**
But just look at the numbers; if this bill passes, we could:
* **Build 1,252,000 new homes**
* **Generate 427,000 new jobs _annually_**
* **Help millions of minimum-wage workers find affordable places to live**

Every day, families nationwide are grappling with the housing crisis. All too often, people are forced to choose between paying rent and paying for food or medication. **_All of that could change if the Homes Act passes._** Housing is a basic human right, end of story. That's why it's mission critical that young voters like us step up and make our voices heard. So we have to ask:
[Will you add your name TODAY to tell Congress it's time to pass the Homes Act?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98093590/515537241/1501547521?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZWZhYjdhMS1hM2IxLWVmMTEtODhjZi02MDQ1YmRmZThkMjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7_f-GSBou8UgnQ6HBoGq3HQOrr7vQJzTwNaKHn6Jt30=&emci=c7bc8b57-9fb1-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&emdi=0efab7a1-a3b1-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&ceid=6787172)

_**OUTRAGEOUS!**_
Trump hasn’t even set foot in the Oval Office yet, and the Democrats are already in a state of absolute panic.
Gavin Newsom just proposed a staggering $25 MILLION to ram through legislation that will SABOTAGE Trump’s agenda before it even begins.
He’s not hiding it, either. In his own words, they want to “Trump-proof” the entire state.
**This is a direct assault on the WILL OF THE PEOPLE.**
_Let’s not sugarcoat it:_ California Democrats have declared war on the nearly 40% of Californians who voted for Trump.
And this isn’t their first rodeo - remember, California sued the first Trump administration over 120 times.
They’re gearing up to do it again, and they won’t stop until they’ve crushed EVERY Republican value under the weight of their far-Left agenda.
But this time, it’s worse.
Newsom’s proposed legislation is just the FIRST WAVE of his all-out assault to block Trump’s policies.
We cannot sit back and watch as Gavin Newsom and his radical allies trample on our votes, our values, and our vision for America.
This is a DIRECT threat to every Republican, every conservative, and every patriot who believes in free and fair governance.
Join the California GOP in DEMANDING that Newsom HALT his radical efforts to block Trump’s agenda.

Today is Giving Tuesday — our first since the launch of **Their Future Fund** and our **BIGGEST** fundraising opportunity of the year!

We started this **_Kids First movement_** because kids don’t have lobbyists or lawyers fighting for them in DC. Now, we’ve set a bold goal to raise **$25,000 by MIDNIGHT** to help get our nonprofit off the ground and ready to make a real impact, especially in the face of the incoming administration.

As an organization dedicated to education, advocacy, and real solutions for America’s kids, the work we’ll do is fully funded by supporters like you — that's why we need your help.

Your gift today will directly support the work we’re doing to:
✅ **Break down policies** that impact children’s health, safety, and education.
✅ **Empower families and caregivers** to get involved
✅ **Raise awareness** about critical issues
✅ **Advocate for action** by connecting communities with lawmakers
As we lay the foundation for the important work ahead, every dollar will help build a future where every child has a genuine opportunity to thrive. We’ve got big plans for next year, **but we can’t do it without you.**

name: Jeremiah Regan
subject: Access “C.S. Lewis on Christianity”
body:
_**A message from our sponsor...**_ | | | [](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=276789d75a56473b8618bf31e7d5f8f5&_e=n2OQgU7dPruFeRM-QmA9HSwmanQ5QXuyFuuem7Fcp0C1Nwz7_X0VDGmyBBpY_0w4s_DVVJN9eXagb3O4Vv3kDMfOfuAqJ0UXBJ4IrrgagaKFftVxZ49IXjwdjdyeVQntS1Mf3YVJDU3kDH_cQ9eOMbT7fJ1y_VZ6T248QsfhWgEjJDfMtJXMFfNxcnIp6hEVyw_IIMYdIIWGKof1wA_Bp0vmNgL7NrWGSTKg-PN3wNKojvCT9r-lKoXVpo9hBEuaNQas8PWq3LalSRTDdZt1ahrbsiHPlVo5bJJQQJdPhy8HN-hkurliIqJJB_gEONfeGAHwaZzKsUtK1oQA7P20F95NrcOY-fm1wO6TKAF5Ed2_BdAz3IIQw9uIF9PVea82EyYtFuYM74RGfoo_YZ0HpvyOn6ShMhE0T5l_P3E8D1PPf2ZCzgYiEz5tFNheMwJh)
---
| | Dear Friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

To help you learn more about Lewis, we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=276789d75a56473b8618bf31e7d5f8f5&_e=n2OQgU7dPruFeRM-QmA9HSwmanQ5QXuyFuuem7Fcp0C1Nwz7_X0VDGmyBBpY_0w4s_DVVJN9eXagb3O4Vv3kDMfOfuAqJ0UXBJ4IrrgagaKFftVxZ49IXjwdjdyeVQntS1Mf3YVJDU3kDH_cQ9eOMbT7fJ1y_VZ6T248QsfhWgEjJDfMtJXMFfNxcnIp6hEVyw_IIMYdIIWGKof1wA_Bp0vmNgL7NrWGSTKg-PN3wNKojvCT9r-lKoXVpo9hBEuaNQas8PWq3LalSRTDdZt1ahrbsiHPlVo5bJJQQJdPhy8QzLm6T7en6xnL5DKQZpty4U6vcAK1EDGy5NIKcuYLIL6JwGOBge7jtUsLkXXDfAX17DtAfXEt-yYkAjdjEdfnHqkBlDnp6D6g-CIfoxhLcMXKDicu32h37QZL-nIuwucIGHLXqBhJ4Gg1_Wci3vAQ)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=276789d75a56473b8618bf31e7d5f8f5&_e=n2OQgU7dPruFeRM-QmA9HSwmanQ5QXuyFuuem7Fcp0C1Nwz7_X0VDGmyBBpY_0w4s_DVVJN9eXagb3O4Vv3kDMfOfuAqJ0UXBJ4IrrgagaKFftVxZ49IXjwdjdyeVQntS1Mf3YVJDU3kDH_cQ9eOMbT7fJ1y_VZ6T248QsfhWgEjJDfMtJXMFfNxcnIp6hEVyw_IIMYdIIWGKof1wA_Bp0vmNgL7NrWGSTKg-PN3wNKojvCT9r-lKoXVpo9hBEuaNQas8PWq3LalSRTDdZt1ahrbsiHPlVo5bJJQQJdPhy_KvAMQf1bqATGDhfyWUscQe2aMaM8BjEo7cOvUbzpS3tDK837AxUuDn1ITCu4qi2JCD4bCGdi77m72tdbgoHQwPFD9TaK6grQNE76R9SlOX3Erxm9JO38MQCDENIc3efdLXkpnTReHQL_69k-ZRxEn)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

The instructor, Dr. Michael Ward, is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful DVD box set](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=276789d75a56473b8618bf31e7d5f8f5&_e=n2OQgU7dPruFeRM-QmA9HSwmanQ5QXuyFuuem7Fcp0C1Nwz7_X0VDGmyBBpY_0w4s_DVVJN9eXagb3O4Vv3kDMfOfuAqJ0UXBJ4IrrgagaKFftVxZ49IXjwdjdyeVQntS1Mf3YVJDU3kDH_cQ9eOMbT7fJ1y_VZ6T248QsfhWgEjJDfMtJXMFfNxcnIp6hEVyw_IIMYdIIWGKof1wA_Bp0vmNgL7NrWGSTKg-PN3wNKojvCT9r-lKoXVpo9hBEuaNQas8PWq3LalSRTDdZt1ahrbsiHPlVo5bJJQQJdPhy-Hvk5OjA98ALYnNJ8VeIW_WqIn54xO0cKKcPiE607jatR0UDHVYBcV_ncMZuAPtpgUHWR3tvObob-73vgMBPwnQ2TtIlJWI8RMsQnk0S4ewlVzZzgKVC9OcTp7mUeI8jyHLiDojccC8KbU_bZIubOU).

clean_body: A message from our sponsor... | | | | | Dear Friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read. His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century. To help you learn more about Lewis, we produced "" which you can now own on DVD. | | | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including: good and evil, conversion and faith, prayer and the Bible, suffering and death, * heaven and hell, and much more. The instructor, Dr. Michael Ward, is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis and After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man, and the co-editor of The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns! This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity. That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with . Best regards, Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D. Executive Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College

name: The Texas Flyover
subject: Today is Giving Tuesday, check out a great opportunity to give back...
body:
On this Giving Tuesday, we're sharing an urgent message from our partner, [World Concern](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx8z0FqAyEUANDT6C6DfrWTWbjIoi4KyaaUdDf8-H-MYMbgyCS9faEH6AUevPNxPmIueUknvLPvr2udiSlH7Eyzhp0yO7CzleQviiYt2evRGHAAk5M3D3ilSSlHhkZLyKj3GJ2eDEfrRowye1BgNSij906BGvSEDsDZC-JomZywiin32oZ-484vXK_lp27chljvsvhb749VmIOAICCkvOUlDc_aCsW6RG7LUFsSEB6YWEAIX6fz8f3z4_sQZPP0eOZS8vo2CqvSHXP5U_s_0c3DbwAAAP__LwFW0Q).

| | |
---
| | |
# TUESDAY, December 3, 2024
---|---
**Good Afternoon!** On this Giving Tuesday, we're sharing an urgent message from our partner, [World Concern](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx8z0FqAyEUANDT6C6DfrWTWbjIoi4KyaaUdDf8-H-MYMbgyCS9faEH6AUevPNxPmIueUknvLPvr2udiSlH7Eyzhp0yO7CzleQviiYt2evRGHAAk5M3D3ilSSlHhkZLyKj3GJ2eDEfrRowye1BgNSij906BGvSEDsDZC-JomZywiin32oZ-484vXK_lp27chljvsvhb749VmIOAICCkvOUlDc_aCsW6RG7LUFsSEB6YWEAIX6fz8f3z4_sQZPP0eOZS8vo2CqvSHXP5U_s_0c3DbwAAAP__LwFW0Q). As millions around the world come together for this global day of giving, we have an opportunity to make a real difference in the lives of those facing severe crisis in Somalia. _The Flyover_ is matching the first $5,000 of donations as well. We hope you'll take a moment to read their critical message below. -Cole, _CEO_
* * *

East Africa has just endured its worst drought in 40 years, leaving tens of millions without access to clean water, wiping out millions of livestock, and destroying crops. With domestic food production crippled, Somalia has relied heavily on imports--90% of its wheat coming from Russia and Ukraine--until those shipments stopped. Now, two in five children in Somalia suffer from acute malnutrition, and cholera is spreading in some regions. The food crisis, compounded by global humanitarian aid being redirected to Europe and the Middle East, has created a perfect storm, leading to a sharp rise in child malnutrition. [Be Doers](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx8z0FqAyEUANDT6C6DfrWTWbjIoi4KyaaUdDf8-H-MYMbgyCS9faEH6AUevPNxPmIueUknvLPvr2udiSlH7Eyzhp0yO7CzleQviiYt2evRGHAAk5M3D3ilSSlHhkZLyKj3GJ2eDEfrRowye1BgNSij906BGvSEDsDZC-JomZywiin32oZ-484vXK_lp27chljvsvhb749VmIOAICCkvOUlDc_aCsW6RG7LUFsSEB6YWEAIX6fz8f3z4_sQZPP0eOZS8vo2CqvSHXP5U_s_0c3DbwAAAP__LwFW0Q) We're asking the Flyover Community to join us in partnering with World Concern to help get emergency nutrition packs (a peanut paste fortified with nutrients), water, and hygiene products to those with the most need. Every $12 feeds a child for a month. [We're matching the first $5,000; just give through this link](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx8z0FqAyEUANDT6C6DfrWTWbjIoi4KyaaUdDf8-H-MYMbgyCS9faEH6AUevPNxPmIueUknvLPvr2udiSlH7Eyzhp0yO7CzleQviiYt2evRGHAAk5M3D3ilSSlHhkZLyKj3GJ2eDEfrRowye1BgNSij906BGvSEDsDZC-JomZywiin32oZ-484vXK_lp27chljvsvhb749VmIOAICCkvOUlDc_aCsW6RG7LUFsSEB6YWEAIX6fz8f3z4_sQZPP0eOZS8vo2CqvSHXP5U_s_0c3DbwAAAP__LwFW0Q).

name: Larry Cohen, Our Revolution
subject: Our Chance to Transform the DNC
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

Peter Willis,

In the next 90 days, we have a strategic opportunity to transform the
Democratic Party.

On February 1, over 400 DNC members will meet outside Washington DC to
elect a new Chair and other top officers who will lead us through the 2026
midterms. And we will be there!

After a disastrous election, the Democratic National Committee faces a
critical choice: Embrace transformative reforms or risk losing the trust
of the working class voters and losing more elections to the GOP. As
highlighted in a recent Sludge article, Our Revolution leaders — who are
also DNC members — are advocating for major changes at the DNC.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20602?t=1011&akid=7343%2E5885482%2E5s86XU ]With the elections for NEW DNC leadership coming up fast after the
holidays, sign your name to show support for our DNC REFORM AGENDA!

1. Ban Dark Money in Primaries: One of my top priorities — along with our
founder Bernie Sanders — is to eliminate Big Money groups like AIPAC
and CRYPTO in the candidate nominating process. This move would ensure
that elections are decided by voters, not influenced by hidden
corporate financiers.
2. Invest in State Parties and Grassroots Organizing: Jane Kleeb, chair
of the Nebraska Democratic Party and board member of Our Revolution,
is calling on the DNC to invest in state parties for grassroots
organizing, instead of giving lucrative contracts to out-of-touch
political consultants in DC.
3. Make the DNC Budget Transparent & Hold Consultants Accountable: Nina
Turner and Jim Zogby, founding Our Revolution board members, are
demanding the DNC disclose the money it gets from grassroots Democrats
and how it’s spent. There needs to be clear reporting and
accountability to prevent conflicts of interest and ensure our money
isn’t spent on crony consultants who fail to deliver and lose
elections. Zogby is also running for vice chair of the DNC on that
platform.
4. Recommit to a Progressive Platform and Small Donor Democracy: The DNC
must end its reliance on large corporate donors in favor of
small-dollar contributions to align the DNC's fundraising practices
with its stated values to fight for working class Americans.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20602?t=1012&akid=7343%2E5885482%2E5s86XU ]Add your name so we can show the DNC candidates that there is strong
grassroots support for adopting our DNC REFORM AGENDA.

Thank you for your commitment to our shared progressive values. Together,
we can drive the Democratic Party toward a future that genuinely reflects
the will and needs of We the People.

In solidarity,

Larry Cohen,
DNC member & Our Revolution Board Chair

P.S. Please share this message with fellow progressives who are angry
about the election. Our collective voice is our strongest asset in this
fight for meaningful change.

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9?t=1001&akid=7343%2E5885482%2E5s86XU ]Facebook | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10?t=1002&akid=7343%2E5885482%2E5s86XU ]Twitter | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/11?t=1003&akid=7343%2E5885482%2E5s86XU ]Instagram | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2355?t=1004&akid=7343%2E5885482%2E5s86XU ]Youtube | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2356?t=1005&akid=7343%2E5885482%2E5s86XU ]Website |
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10247?t=1006&akid=7343%2E5885482%2E5s86XU ]Sign Up

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13119?c0=email-20241203.oAZRU9&t=1007&akid=7343%2E5885482%2E5s86XU ]Our membership swag

Our Revolution is the largest entirely grassroots funded progressive
group in America.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13120?c0=email-20241203.WcgyKb&t=1008&akid=7343%2E5885482%2E5s86XU ]Help us defend democracy and take the fight directly to the
establishment by committing to be a 2024 Movement Builder with a
recurring donation of just $5 or more a month!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13121?c0=email-20241203.23Tgcx&t=1009&akid=7343%2E5885482%2E5s86XU ]GIVE MONTHLY

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13122?c0=email-20241203.Gz0JKH&t=1010&akid=7343%2E5885482%2E5s86XU ]GIVE ONCE

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.ourrevolution.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-2/?akid=7343%2E5885482%2E5s86XU

Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe

PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
PO Box 66208
WASHINGTON, DC, 20035

Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. Our Revolution is a
501(c)(4) organization. Donations to Our Revolution are not deductible as
charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. All donations are
made to support Our Revolution’s general mission and are not designated for
any specific activity.

body:
https://freedomva.org/ [https://freedomva.org/]
Friends-
This Giving Tuesday, there are so many reasons to give. We appreciate contributions from our supporters all year round, but especially right now as we prepare for the General Assembly legislative session.
As Virginians face a rising cost of living and struggle to find childcare, pay for prescription medications, and choose between caring for their loved ones and getting a necessary paycheck, we’re continuing the fight in the General Assembly for an affordable Virginia.
Join us this Giving Tuesday; chipping in just $5 makes a huge difference [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/freedom-virginia-1?refcode=directory] as we prepare for the upcoming General Assembly session.

name: Wesley Bell
subject: I’m beyond lucky to have this grassroots team fighting by my side
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BELL FOR MISSOURI
body:
Thank you for always showing up. As we close out another month, I just want to take a moment to say **thank you,** Peter.

Thanks to this team, we’ve reached our end-of-month fundraising goal for November and are in a great spot to hit the ground running in December!

I’m more ready than ever to roll up my sleeves and get to work fighting for you in Congress next year. From protecting reproductive rights to addressing economic inequality to ensuring our communities are safe and thriving, **I’ll take on the tough fights because you deserve a leader who will put your interests first.**

While I know that our work is far from over, as long as I have you by my side, I’ll always be ready to fight for a better tomorrow — where every voice is heard, every community thrives, and every St. Louisan has a fair shot.

Thank you,

Wesley | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98096489/515546123/1027040668?refcode=em24_241203_eomty_enask_gq_act___WB_ettx&utm_campaign=em24_241203_eomty_enask_gq_act___WB_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=570833cc-a8b1-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYzODkiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTcwODMzY2MtYThiMS1lZjExLTg4Y2YtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZDI5IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=zavZB5l-Q3Yihn1zsgW5kNVRdqq4kHIgL0a87C_WatY=)

body:
On this Giving Tuesday, we're sharing an urgent message from our partner, [World Concern](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0zzFuwyAUgOHTwBYLHhDIwJChDJWSparSzaLwIFTYWAQ56u2rdu9_gF_6bpf54ksta776Be1IbY4YS_AD48zhwMQB5CxptAkRUFC0XAsBShy5ondrFDeofjP4GQxLLEIM5uiVPiWlGS0WGEgOTPAT4wwmkU7BK6GkDlInZohkGMtoffpqZR13TPW77din0BZa7X2M7UHEmYAj4HLZy5qnZ-s1hrYG7OvUeibgNp-RgHPv19vl5e314-xot3F7llrL46iJZHnxpf5dx__O3cJPAAAA___TBlUQ).

# TUESDAY, December 3, 2024
---|---
**Good Afternoon!** On this Giving Tuesday, we're sharing an urgent message from our partner, [World Concern](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0zzFuwyAUgOHTwBYLHhDIwJChDJWSparSzaLwIFTYWAQ56u2rdu9_gF_6bpf54ksta776Be1IbY4YS_AD48zhwMQB5CxptAkRUFC0XAsBShy5ondrFDeofjP4GQxLLEIM5uiVPiWlGS0WGEgOTPAT4wwmkU7BK6GkDlInZohkGMtoffpqZR13TPW77din0BZa7X2M7UHEmYAj4HLZy5qnZ-s1hrYG7OvUeibgNp-RgHPv19vl5e314-xot3F7llrL46iJZHnxpf5dx__O3cJPAAAA___TBlUQ). As millions around the world come together for this global day of giving, we have an opportunity to make a real difference in the lives of those facing severe crisis in Somalia. _The Flyover_ is matching the first $5,000 of donations as well. We hope you'll take a moment to read their critical message below. -Cole, _CEO_
* * *
[](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0zzFuwyAUgOHTwBYLHhDIwJChDJWSparSzaLwIFTYWAQ56u2rdu9_gF_6bpf54ksta776Be1IbY4YS_AD48zhwMQB5CxptAkRUFC0XAsBShy5ondrFDeofjP4GQxLLEIM5uiVPiWlGS0WGEgOTPAT4wwmkU7BK6GkDlInZohkGMtoffpqZR13TPW77din0BZa7X2M7UHEmYAj4HLZy5qnZ-s1hrYG7OvUeibgNp-RgHPv19vl5e314-xot3F7llrL46iJZHnxpf5dx__O3cJPAAAA___TBlUQ) Somalia is facing a devastating combination of natural disasters, global conflicts, widespread poverty, and disease outbreaks. East Africa has just endured its worst drought in 40 years, leaving tens of millions without access to clean water, wiping out millions of livestock, and destroying crops. With domestic food production crippled, Somalia has relied heavily on imports--90% of its wheat coming from Russia and Ukraine--until those shipments stopped. Now, two in five children in Somalia suffer from acute malnutrition, and cholera is spreading in some regions. The food crisis, compounded by global humanitarian aid being redirected to Europe and the Middle East, has created a perfect storm, leading to a sharp rise in child malnutrition. [Be Doers](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0zzFuwyAUgOHTwBYLHhDIwJChDJWSparSzaLwIFTYWAQ56u2rdu9_gF_6bpf54ksta776Be1IbY4YS_AD48zhwMQB5CxptAkRUFC0XAsBShy5ondrFDeofjP4GQxLLEIM5uiVPiWlGS0WGEgOTPAT4wwmkU7BK6GkDlInZohkGMtoffpqZR13TPW77din0BZa7X2M7UHEmYAj4HLZy5qnZ-s1hrYG7OvUeibgNp-RgHPv19vl5e314-xot3F7llrL46iJZHnxpf5dx__O3cJPAAAA___TBlUQ) We're asking the Flyover Community to join us in partnering with World Concern to help get emergency nutrition packs (a peanut paste fortified with nutrients), water, and hygiene products to those with the most need. Every $12 feeds a child for a month. [We're matching the first $5,000; just give through this link](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0zzFuwyAUgOHTwBYLHhDIwJChDJWSparSzaLwIFTYWAQ56u2rdu9_gF_6bpf54ksta776Be1IbY4YS_AD48zhwMQB5CxptAkRUFC0XAsBShy5ondrFDeofjP4GQxLLEIM5uiVPiWlGS0WGEgOTPAT4wwmkU7BK6GkDlInZohkGMtoffpqZR13TPW77din0BZa7X2M7UHEmYAj4HLZy5qnZ-s1hrYG7OvUeibgNp-RgHPv19vl5e314-xot3F7llrL46iJZHnxpf5dx__O3cJPAAAA___TBlUQ).
[](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0zzFuwyAUgOHTwBYLHhDIwJChDJWSparSzaLwIFTYWAQ56u2rdu9_gF_6bpf54ksta776Be1IbY4YS_AD48zhwMQB5CxptAkRUFC0XAsBShy5ondrFDeofjP4GQxLLEIM5uiVPiWlGS0WGEgOTPAT4wwmkU7BK6GkDlInZohkGMtoffpqZR13TPW77din0BZa7X2M7UHEmYAj4HLZy5qnZ-s1hrYG7OvUeibgNp-RgHPv19vl5e314-xot3F7llrL46iJZHnxpf5dx__O3cJPAAAA___TBlUQ) Somalia faces a crisis from natural disasters, conflict, poverty, and disease. The worst drought in 40 years devastated crops and livestock, while food imports from Russia and Ukraine halted. Two in five Somali children now suffer from acute malnutrition. Two in five Somali children now suffer from acute malnutrition. . $12 feeds a child for a month. | | The Flyover, LLC 1910 Thomes Ave. Cheyenne, WY 82001-3527 | ---|---

name: North Carolina Voter Action Project
subject: Blatant post-election power grab
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Voter Action Project Logo [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=120324_1&amount=25]
News & Observer: As protesters shout, NC Senate Republicans override Cooper veto of powers-stripping bill [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=120324_1&amount=25]
Opponents of voting rights are already assaulting our democracy, Team. Vote suppressors here in North Carolina are doing all they can to strip the incoming governor of power and codify their control before they lose their legislative supermajority, all because they didn't win all the elections they wanted.
Check out what this bill does:
* Transfers the power to appoint members of the State Board of Elections from incoming Gov-elect Josh Stein (D) to incoming State Auditor-elect Dave Boliek (R).
* Restricts the governor's ability to fill judicial vacancies, forcing them to choose from a list provided by the unelected officials of the departing judge's party.
* Removes the seats of two County Superior Court judges (in Wake and Forsyth counties) after those judges repeatedly ruled against suppressive election law changes.
* Prohibits the State Attorney General from participating in lawsuits that would invalidate action by the state Assembly, even in the defense of citizen's rights.
* Reduces the ballot "curing" time -- where ballots with simple mistakes can be corrected by the voter -- from nine days to three.
That's not all -- t his bill attacks the roles of the state education superintendent and the lieutenant governor, makes the State Highway Patrol an independent agency that the legislature controls, and more -- but you get the idea. If opponents of voting rights can't win at the ballot box they'll codify their power however else they can .
Please, we have to fight this bill on the ground and in the courts, plus be ready for whatever suppressive bills come when new legislative sessions start in less than a month. Will you chip in $25 or whatever you can right now? >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=120324_1&amount=25]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=120324_1&amount=25]
Donate Now [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=120324_1&amount=25]

subject: My thoughts on the Hunter Biden pardon.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Hawley Victory Committee
body:
| | | [](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=172dd427a8d149a79b3656fbf1023db5&_e=viZMTwJ08xuj9sqRa55wlsfdLAzYiBq-ihQo_fbcXmYODaoKtvyT2v7i-K-B3uLl1_RBvlyPxL-q0Tj2pRl9Cfa2VRQ5tQB3hQBoYkI_at1wTNlqg7HM0S2zuiZJp_O-rDI0u9Zm9krC6nkgkgSRLKL8TDCAiLsFF0nsn5H-lbmzkB5fjeP0uEyq6RxeOEb6bZJkH04JYNfgVYDYpngh_JredNpBWFZ8UKMpU27494b5UR93QP-1kR3jQcdKKYTW7uTrn9tyflrcuBeL-_TGIcQYYaVIikqg-eFXYAMQ0OxSUs4SVxxYiW1mFDuGqoXcUYdzY5HmpoiXMOAnmYbcAsmdYde0aDVI06WI9Tyco1h1CVmAJrOsrm9-e3EyC0vthYLdi4l1WK0DDzNlXQv73w%3D%3D)
---
Peter,
---
What we are witnessing from the Biden Administration defies all belief. This is the most lawless administration in history. Joe Biden's decision to pardon his son is an outrageous abuse of the rule of law. Hunter sold access to “the big guy,” — a slap in the face to law-abiding Americans and an unfathomable abuse of power. Pardoning him protects the Biden family business of selling access & influence. And while Hunter Biden was peddling access to his father, the Department of Justice was weaponized against conservatives. He sent SWAT teams to the homes of pro-lifer leaders, recruited spies in Catholic parishes, treated concerned parents like domestic terrorists, and relentlessly prosecuted Donald Trump. Despite the pardon, this is far from over. The Biden Administration is _STILL_ the most corrupt in history, and their crimes _MUST _be accounted for. I won't stop fighting for the _TRUTH_ _and_ _will continue_ to hold the Biden crime family accountable!!
---

name: The Liberty Ledger
subject: Trump Is Expected To Visit Notre Dame Re-Opening
body:
Donald Trump is heading to Paris, and for once, it’s not to negotiate a trade deal or make headlines about tariffs—it’s to attend the grand reopening of the historic Notre Dame Cathedral. After five years of painstaking restoration following the devastating 2019 fire, the iconic Paris landmark is ready to welcome visitors once again. And [...] | [](http://trk.libertyledger.)
---

Virginia is a battleground state, and in 2025, only two states across the country will have gubernatorial elections — New Jersey and Virginia.

Our race to flip Virginia’s Governorship will be the bellwether race for the country, especially in advance of the 2026 midterms. This race is going to attract massive national attention — and with that comes huge spending from Republican super PACs, pouring millions of dollars into this race in an effort to keep the Governor’s seat red.

To win in 2025, we need to build a grassroots campaign that can outmatch their spending and show that Virginians are committed to progress, fairness, and opportunity for all. clean_body: Our race to flip Virginia’s Governorship will be the bellwether race for the country, especially in advance of the 2026 midterms. | = | Peter, The New York Times called the Virginia Governor’s race a national bellwether and one to watch next year! ⬇️ ⬇️ = | = Virginia is a battleground state, and in 2025, only two states across the country will have gubernatorial elections — New Jersey and Virginia. Our race to flip Virginia’s Governorship will be the bellwether race for the country, especially in advance of the 2026 midterms. This race is going to attract massive national attention — and with that comes huge spending from Republican super PACs, pouring millions of dollars into this race in an effort to keep the Governor’s seat red. To win in 2025, we need to build a grassroots campaign that can outmatch their spending and show that Virginians are committed to progress, fairness, and opportunity for all. But to do that, we need your support. Every dollar you contribute will go directly into our efforts to mobilize voters, reach every corner of our Commonwealth, and make sure we have the resources to push back against the flood of negative ads and misinformation.= | = | = | = | = | = Thank you, Spanberger for Governor HQ * | | Paid for by Spanberger for Governor Spanberger for Governor P.O. Box 3121 Glen Allen, VA 23058 United States | = =

# FROM THE DESK OF LARRY KUDLOW
---
| | Peter,**I am pleased to share with you that The New York Sun, one of my daily must-read papers, is now the exclusive publisher of my regular columns.

I invite you to consider joining the Sun to receive unlimited access to my latest commentary, alongside some of the finest American journalism.

**But there's also far more to what the Sun is building.

As you know, journalism isn't what it used to be.

I've been in the business for decades, and never before have I seen this once noble profession so abused. The major papers are no longer on the side of the American people, and we are right to withhold our trust.

The impact on our democracy is considerable. Without real accountability, the worst actors in government and at corporate institutions have free reign, and patriotic, hard-working Americans are being sidelined and ignored.

The antidote is to join the movement to build a better alternative. That's the American way.

**The charge to restore American journalism is being led by the Sun.** A proudly all-American, principled publication that has plenty of room for conservative thought and conservative writers, the Sun has upheld the highest journalistic standards since 1833. That's 18 years before the New York Times published its first number.**My decision for the New York Sun to become the exclusive publisher of my regular columns was not taken lightly.**

I value their work and have been impressed by their team, but I know they have a hell of a battle ahead. They are the David facing many Goliaths.

They will only succeed if we join with them in this grassroots national effort. Joining the Sun costs as little as a penny a day. I encourage you to sign up today. Every single person counts.

name: COURIER
subject: Your chance to fight right-wing lies this Giving Tuesday
body:
This Giving Tuesday: Fund Democracy’s Newsroom.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98097844/515550095/2130526953?refcode=emwrapper&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNmE0ZmZiNzctYWFiMS1lZjExLTg4Y2YtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZDI5IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=yqQliG9EAwBQ8iKPPfQN62cpfbtiE4Mt9G2WqZVP1vI=&emci=624ffb77-aab1-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&emdi=6a4ffb77-aab1-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&ceid=14016711)
Peter **–**
This Giving Tuesday, the stakes couldn’t be higher. Right-wing media continues to dominate, spreading lies and fueling extremism. But with your help, we can fight back by building a strong, progressive alternative that puts truth and democracy first.
[**Can you chip in $25 to power COURIER’s fight for truth?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98097847/515550097/-593472309?refcode=20241203-EM-GivingTuesday&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNmE0ZmZiNzctYWFiMS1lZjExLTg4Y2YtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZDI5IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=yqQliG9EAwBQ8iKPPfQN62cpfbtiE4Mt9G2WqZVP1vI=)
Unlike legacy media outlets, every dollar you give supports a better kind of journalism—one that challenges propaganda, empowers communities, and counters the growing power of the right-wing disinformation machine.
At COURIER, we don’t bow to Trump or the far right. Instead, we’re building a progressive media network that meets voters where they are and delivers factual, community-centered reporting where it’s needed most.
**With your support, COURIER has already:**
* Established newsrooms in 11 battleground states, providing trusted news in communities vulnerable to right-wing disinformation.
* Published free, factual, values-driven reporting on the issues that matter most to voters.
* Reached millions of Americans on social media and in inboxes, countering lies and changing false narratives and conspiracy theories in real time.

And we do it all without paywalls or subscriptions—because the truth should be accessible to everyone.
But we can’t do it without grassroots support. To keep our journalists on the front lines of the fight for democracy, we need your help today.
**[This Giving Tuesday, will you stand with us? Chip in $25 or whatever you can to power COURIER’s mission.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98097850/515550123/-593472309?refcode=20241203-EM-GivingTuesday&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNmE0ZmZiNzctYWFiMS1lZjExLTg4Y2YtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZDI5IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=yqQliG9EAwBQ8iKPPfQN62cpfbtiE4Mt9G2WqZVP1vI=)**

name: Allison Riddle
subject: There are no off years.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by One Pennsylvania
body:
We’re exactly one month out from Election Day. I’m sure you’re tired and possibly scared. Or you’re steeling yourself for the fights ahead. Or you might be feeling cynical.

Every one of those feelings is reasonable.

But slumlords and polluters have no off years.

Price-gouging corporations keeping the costs of basic goods sky high don’t take a year off.

Billionaires and right-wing ideologies trying to criminalize our neighbors, enshrine wealth inequality and remake our government take no off years.

That’s why at One PA, we don’t — we can’t — take an off year either. Elections — both wins and losses — are simply one moment in our movement, not the end goal.

Long after ballots are counted, One PA continues to build community power and grow our movement of working-class Pennsylvanians fighting alongside one another to fight for better wages, better living conditions, affordable and accessible healthcare, LGBTQ+ rights, reproductive freedoms, and much, much more.

In 2025, we’ll:
→ Follow the money and shine a light on the wealthiest Pennsylvanians like Jeffrey Yass using their billions to privatize our schools and bankroll the most extreme far-right politicians.
→ Fight gentrification, displacement, and radical redevelopment of Chinatown for a taxpayer-funded sports arena in Philadelphia.
→ Provide tangible workshops, trainings, and community meetings to help you know your rights, build community, and more.
→ Push back on the worst of the incoming Trump Administration’s policies.

And by making a monthly, recurring donation, you’re ensuring that we can continue to do the critical, movement-building work needed to make sure all Pennsylvanians are able to thrive. So, if you’re able, please make a recurring donation this Giving Tuesday and fuel One PA’s work ahead: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/onepa_ye2024?refcode=EM_FL_OPA_20241203_fr_givingtuesday_fd_nc_act_xx_l1&recurring=1&amounts=3,5,7,10,15,20,25]

Chip in $3 a month [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/onepa_ye2024?refcode=EM_FL_OPA_20241203_fr_givingtuesday_fd_nc_act_xx_abt3&recurring=1&amount=3&amounts=3,5,7,10,15,20,25]

Chip in $15 a month [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/onepa_ye2024?refcode=EM_FL_OPA_20241203_fr_givingtuesday_fd_nc_act_xx_abt15&recurring=1&amount=15&amounts=3,5,7,10,15,20,25]
Other Amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/onepa_ye2024?refcode=EM_FL_OPA_20241203_fr_givingtuesday_fd_nc_act_xx_abto&recurring=1&amounts=3,5,7,10,15,20,25]

Thank you for your support and generosity,

Allison Riddle
Development Team
One Pennsylvania

OnePA is a grassroots movement for racial, economic, and social justice in Pennsylvania. We empower Black communities through voter education, endorse candidates who share our values, and prioritize leadership development. Our commitment is to challenge political disillusionment, protect and expand democracy, and unite everyday people to have a voice in our political system.

name: Kevin Roberts
subject: It’s Giving Tuesday – help save our country
body:
It’s time for the administrative state to go.

| | | | _Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=29bc9815846f49728b1d374165de7bf2&_s=a6056936d0ed49ac8ea8d0a1058062b0&_t=o6OZDHyoa7mgsBl3Tx6hsKGZaVcBk1UMZeLtzfzKPYkzgoepgBSsenpbxLQ2-GAN7H-WtLrPoglI1Y6MCxuqahF2duc5wu6t4Q3YWd8FKjcuIuh2_THX7m3aPpbNdakz)_
---
[](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/u/click?_t=29bc9815846f49728b1d374165de7bf2&_m=a6056936d0ed49ac8ea8d0a1058062b0&_e=vSepV7f9YP8nJtWfKWQUwWqXpgMfpbUDDjlrPeLX_gq_reWjdoZZDVngHEaI91Apb50wz7VeJwvU-3Vc9pI7RhhstdQCMdrpIARU-jiLHFHFWszx8fN91Dypr99UqgKu1tH-QUlZ_S36yaOeez-7Uo0s05t0LFhhbAUugAI-oEN8VOqD1pVRPylqEN61e-2hNREO-MwJ-ulg0uE9Ebe1E4ZJnFMAuP5bOG69FXpzEujQokLLY-u-QM7WZ3lCqYAvXwfU3K8mv_xfvWGIYlsqnQ52-j18cJLvKtKhZyP_Vg4rzWcypa3JQDqlGtDF8sBUvy7za7Ksz9jOArtMJQxWFTWuBHjPaFsjCzkiudxkmvY%3D)
---
| | Dear Fellow American,

It's time for the administrative state to go.

The administrative state has become too large, too powerful, and far too costly.

Even worse, they push destructive leftist policies even when the American people elect conservative candidates like President Trump. We witnessed the administrative state directly sabotage conservative policies during the first Trump administration.

[**That 's why on this Giving Tuesday, I need your help to dismantle the administrative state.**](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/u/click?_t=29bc9815846f49728b1d374165de7bf2&_m=a6056936d0ed49ac8ea8d0a1058062b0&_e=vSepV7f9YP8nJtWfKWQUwWqXpgMfpbUDDjlrPeLX_gq_reWjdoZZDVngHEaI91Apb50wz7VeJwvU-3Vc9pI7RhhstdQCMdrpIARU-jiLHFHFWszx8fN91Dypr99UqgKu1tH-QUlZ_S36yaOeez-7Uo0s05t0LFhhbAUugAI-oEN8VOqD1pVRPylqEN61e-2hNREO-MwJ-ulg0uE9Ebe1ExgrYxqfhYlbVSZdI1vape4DKY-Zw9_qM2R6B7ZNepW2uF34mmPrmsjcOhiQpkydk5vSAkTrQ31SkCBJEELZER1FC4sYpKZZB9pWgauz1DV17D8I7i8b7P3Kos95npSe1XpSpEbIcWKL93Jh92uY2XM%3D)

Your Giving Tuesday gift will help The Heritage Foundation:
* Replace Washington's leftist bureaucrats with loyal patriots so they can dismantle the administrative state from within.
* Create and promote conservative policies that will restore the federal government to its proper size and save the American Dream.
* Promote the Good Life for all American families.

The war to rescue our republic will continue until we dismantle the administrative state and restore self-governance.

**That 's why I need you to make your most generous Giving Tuesday gift to The Heritage Foundation today using the secure link below. **

[**http://secured.heritage.org/thf-giving-tuesday/**](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/u/click?_t=29bc9815846f49728b1d374165de7bf2&_m=a6056936d0ed49ac8ea8d0a1058062b0&_e=vSepV7f9YP8nJtWfKWQUwWqXpgMfpbUDDjlrPeLX_gq_reWjdoZZDVngHEaI91Apb50wz7VeJwvU-3Vc9pI7RhhstdQCMdrpIARU-jiLHFHFWszx8fN91Dypr99UqgKu1tH-QUlZ_S36yaOeez-7Uo0s05t0LFhhbAUugAI-oEN8VOqD1pVRPylqEN61e-2hNREO-MwJ-ulg0uE9Ebe1Ezbqaa9fgGK_QNuem_IGvdE3g8AHBPppYQw0uz38NiTNALQoDF5OsYshreUPSWQ90QXW2XrvjqRn203BuwA-3l5XTuhfrVQ-3IMLwvnAX2Vb7CLShkBVqyBzjbQJN3Qtspcx9EzjDhHu2ddpdUW3750%3D)

**Additionally, I just received work that a generous Heritage member has agreed to offer a $500,000 matching gift. Thanks to this match, your gift 's impact will be doubled.**

You're the key to ensuring we remain on offense for our country.

Sincerely,

Kevin D. Roberts, Ph.D.
President, The Heritage Foundation

**P.S. It 's time to dismantle the administrative state once and for all. This critical effort is the perfect time to activate your Heritage Foundation membership with your Giving Tuesday gift: [http://secured.heritage.org/thf-giving-tuesday/](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/u/click?_t=29bc9815846f49728b1d374165de7bf2&_m=a6056936d0ed49ac8ea8d0a1058062b0&_e=vSepV7f9YP8nJtWfKWQUwWqXpgMfpbUDDjlrPeLX_gq_reWjdoZZDVngHEaI91Apb50wz7VeJwvU-3Vc9pI7RhhstdQCMdrpIARU-jiLHFHFWszx8fN91Dypr99UqgKu1tH-QUlZ_S36yaOeez-7Uo0s05t0LFhhbAUugAI-oEN8VOqD1pVRPylqEN61e-2hNREO-MwJ-ulg0uE9Ebe1ExldR3TqZ0e3d6qJV6c0pQAIryE84T5BGBQ0f7S6PUmXAQo8ef4GSDRVVuvt2mPXYEb_NMCXLB2upcCS7YMCsBafh_WEoDaXnQa-sGMz0qMfh6H_RiprI3K_EVkCGBRR6JriCG_kD7fdAWEcuhANbWs%3D)**

The Heritage Foundation 214 Massachusetts Avenue NE Washington D.C. 20002

name: Team AOC
subject: Giving Tuesday
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
We’re launching a fundraiser to support those the MAGA movement won’t.
#
For Giving Tuesday, we’re launching a fundraiser for four organizations that are fighting for immigrants rights, environmental justice, and against food insecurity across NYC — and **who will receive no support from the Trump administration**.
100% of your donation will go to these four community organizations — CIANA, Throggs Neck Community Alliance, Bronx River Alliance, and the Jackson Heights Immigrant Center — to **support the fight for these communities to thrive**.
[If you’re able to lend a hand this giving season, please chip in $4 — $1 for each organization — to help these incredible groups ramp up their efforts.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20241203._1MdOo&refcode=em20241203-7689-P_FND_CHA_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=7689%2E2526796%2E8g01Yk)
**[Contribute $4](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20241203._1MdOo&refcode=em20241203-7689-P_FND_CHA_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=7689%2E2526796%2E8g01Yk)**
[](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20241203._1MdOo&refcode=em20241203-7689-P_FND_CHA_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=7689%2E2526796%2E8g01Yk)
**_100% of your contribution will be split between these four organizations:_**
* The **Center for the Integration and Advancement of New Americans (CIANA)** aims to prevent the growing marginalization of new immigrants and refugees by facilitating their successful integration into American society, with English classes, after-school homework help, and case management in over 10 different languages.

* The **Bronx River Alliance** is working to improve and restore NYC’s only freshwater river so that the working-class families living near it can be relieved of the decades of pollution dumped into the Bronx River.

* **Jackson Heights Immigrant Center** is a student- and volunteer-led group that works one-on-one with newly arrived migrant families in the United States to guide them through the asylum process.

* **Throggs Neck Community Alliance** provides rapid emergency relief, regular food distributions, community and cultural events to working class families in The Bronx without easy access to resources.

[We’ve seen this movement step up to achieve incredible things before. Together we’ve raised over $8 million for mutual aid groups, relief programs, and more.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20241203._1MdOo&refcode=em20241203-7689-P_FND_CHA_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=7689%2E2526796%2E8g01Yk)
**[Contribute $4](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20241203._1MdOo&refcode=em20241203-7689-P_FND_CHA_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&akid=7689%2E2526796%2E8g01Yk)**
Whether or not you can contribute today, **thank you for standing with us**.
Wishing you and your loved ones a happy holiday season,
Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20241203?refcode=em20241203-7689-P_FND_CHA_GOL&t=24&refcode2=7689_2526796_8g01Yk&akid=7689%2E2526796%2E8g01Yk)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20241203-7689-P_FND_CHA_GOL&t=25&akid=7689%2E2526796%2E8g01Yk)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=26&akid=7689%2E2526796%2E8g01Yk) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=27&akid=7689%2E2526796%2E8g01Yk) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=28&akid=7689%2E2526796%2E8g01Yk)
---|---|---
Email us: [speak@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=29&akid=7689%2E2526796%2E8g01Yk)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=30&akid=7689%2E2526796%2E8g01Yk)

Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress

## Pardon Me?
Sunday night, as many of us were getting ready to transition from a holiday weekend back into the work week President Biden dropped a bombshell before getting on a plan and heading out of the country.
After months of denying he would pardon his son Hunter for gun and tax crimes he had been convicted of, he reversed course and gave him a full and unconditional pardon.
But it was much worse than first met the eye...

subject: From Special Agent to FBI Whistleblower
body:
[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=b50a64e4db7e40608cf3518d0431da82&_e=uRXpXiC6ZeBFtphNtKjJIrqKuNK1Tilgub19a_uHxavDFkP162G2XJnfBGMqF4cUqLu7qm9nNGCstDVC8icWLasWwAj_h3nNWinZdXuYsq4IthTzedqscIGSXYfsUYLhY1DqSHjv5D9WnNEFidnyOE8xQyHXL0WXXXHX-iw0ucSQXKQeaWbuGrh2hyGftUGjqNinHUjAp_cwx4pPQgHgKhomqQXU-cqAXEaD9VgwQDf9tJKzbehDbJ-VQ1Y5VDjLJK4zZ_OSSmq9ztVbkqUZGE-llUWK-jGYy_c7Zoe6A3s80mskVx83h_dOzUE7I01roY09Ua7JxpU9sI0rU-3SFQ%3D%3D)

Patriot,

Working as an FBI special agent was my dream job. But when I became an agent, I swore an oath to protect and defend the United States Constitution against all enemies -- both foreign and domestic.

When I discovered the FBI's National Security Branch had refocused counterterrorism from legitimate foreign actors to political opponents within our borders, I knew I had to say something.

In August 2022, I made protected whistleblower disclosures about my concerns regarding the January 6th investigations assigned to my office.

**My whistleblowing was apolitical and in the spirit of upholding my oath._However, it nearly cost me everything._**

Thanks to the Kash Foundation, I was able to stand up to the Deep State and expose their efforts to villainize patriots. The Kash Foundation offers legal and financial help to whistleblowers, veterans, and American patriots who come forward with evidence against the Deep State's actions.

To thank him for his efforts, I told Kash Patel that I would help him raise $20,000 before the end of the week to help the Kash Foundation take on the Deep State.

[You can help the Kash Foundation support whistleblowers and expose Deep State corruption by donating today.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=b50a64e4db7e40608cf3518d0431da82&_e=uRXpXiC6ZeBFtphNtKjJIrqKuNK1Tilgub19a_uHxavDFkP162G2XJnfBGMqF4cUqLu7qm9nNGCstDVC8icWLasWwAj_h3nNWinZdXuYsq4IthTzedqscIGSXYfsUYLhY1DqSHjv5D9WnNEFidnyOEA-s-x4aCH2Pza5-sZ7Z-c0shEcR53LtMTtc_CRIOzoKtH8okVUa4DaEjnsZIUjzBPv5xFnZBjof3lvOJy7_rm-PKvfl5yr_L7hgssmkX5lh9X_Qro3P7Af0OTUQNBCM3RmxPrVx_WkzOR9pqlkefW_PxBLx1RU6J_P6Zj62xFhgF68WNo4Y6auJAFkWC_AA9ILcB3IqmAxH-B0l_eksTA%3D)

[Donate](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=b50a64e4db7e40608cf3518d0431da82&_e=uRXpXiC6ZeBFtphNtKjJIrqKuNK1Tilgub19a_uHxavDFkP162G2XJnfBGMqF4cUqLu7qm9nNGCstDVC8icWLasWwAj_h3nNWinZdXuYsq4IthTzedqscIGSXYfsUYLhY1DqSHjv5D9WnNEFidnyOB0uVy3bo6UhxU2HsWqeGCsUPLu7fPt2bSFB_tGKqupekKSVQnUzGMoXHMJhZd3TMfxP0Mrz0RbFccSbzbRJ72FqmnRHaWbNMwflqAMoaTr4Vu6WSdIHvJdFD8v9I122ozINNXnYudAmvfTGvxmwDY8o_8kVrIaIDaj7UNR3fbaB76JAAlK4tdcmdUsO3RrCy6OP2Mixi1O64IRfG__2Lfk%3D)

I was a special agent for the Federal Bureau of Investigation for eight and a half years. During that time, I investigated approximately 200 violent crimes, such as aggravated assaults, murder, child abuse, rape, robbery, child molestation, child pornography, and human trafficking.

**Eventually, I was reassigned to the FBI 's unprecedented investigation of the political unrest at the United States Capitol on January 6, 2021.**

It didn't take me long to uncover efforts by the FBI and Department of Justice to manipulate statistics and exaggerate the nationwide threat of domestic terrorism. I witnessed overzealous practices to harass American patriots and realized the FBI was turning its investigative processes into a punishment.

_I had no choice but to blow the whistle on the politicized FBI_.

At each level of my chain of command, leadership cautioned that despite my exemplary work performance, whistleblowing placed my otherwise bright future with the FBI at risk.

I knew my decision would ultimately cost me my dream career. As a married father of two, I knew it would affect my family, but I also knew this was important, so I stuck by my convictions.

The FBI cynically elected to close ranks and attack the messenger.

Within one month of my disclosures, the FBI weaponized the security clearance processes to remove me from active duty.

I was an unpaid, indefinitely suspended man trying to feed his family when Kash Patel reached out to me and said he wanted to help support my efforts to fight back.

[Thanks to the Kash Foundation, I was able to speak about against the weaponizing of our justice system. You can help other whistleblowers come forward against the Deep State by donating $10, $50, or even $100 today. >>>](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=b50a64e4db7e40608cf3518d0431da82&_e=uRXpXiC6ZeBFtphNtKjJIrqKuNK1Tilgub19a_uHxavDFkP162G2XJnfBGMqF4cUqLu7qm9nNGCstDVC8icWLasWwAj_h3nNWinZdXuYsq4IthTzedqscIGSXYfsUYLhY1DqSHjv5D9WnNEFidnyOGy-5ESWtWNe8XHfOGwL6ndYNXGGvk7-8AadDkmta4D3FDJfk0WC0nu9GogapRWZr5TAAE5Y82ZJzCFNxbe0QumHHebg2Fi0Fb4zMwr45ubFHRH43A2YxAjdUqcgrlwWLrhJQuLQ8quYXKnPvjsfA_rW1WFYoRBbP7LnueXQ0yJrjyQNKGhHMO5dvO2aERsQZzWR5yQq17TzznGwSvJcEQg%3D)

The FBI was hell-bent on suppressing me from exposing the truth.

**In addition to an indefinite, unpaid suspension, the FBI initiated a campaign of humiliation and intimidation to punish and pressure me to resign.**
* Individuals at the FBI leaked my private medical information to a reporter at _The New York Times_.
* The FBI denied my request to seek outside employment in an obvious attempt to deprive me of the ability to support my family.
* Finally, the FBI Inspection Division imposed an illegal gag order in an attempt to prevent me from communicating with my family and attorneys.

But thanks to the support provided by The Kash Foundation, I was able to withstand these attacks and stand up to the Government Gangsters who are weaponizing our government.

* **TOP NEWS**

"**Texas looking at 'several' more tracts for Trump's mass deportations,** " Houston Chronicle's **Benjamin Wermund** -- "Land Commissioner **Dawn Buckingham** said on Tuesday she was looking to offer "several" other tracts of state land to the incoming Trump administration for its [mass deportation efforts](https://substack.com/redirect/cda603a5-c5cb-4998-98aa-0c7796992bf8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).

"I meant it when I said that I will do everything in my power to help this administration," Buckingham said, standing on the 1,400-acre ranch she recently offered President-elect **Donald Trump** to house immigrants with removal orders. "And that is why I'm announcing our offer has been extended beyond this property."

Buckingham officially unveiled the "Jocelyn Initiative," an effort by the General Land Office to find more tracts of land to aid Trump's deportations, named for **Jocelyn Nungaray** , a Houston girl who was killed earlier this year.

Trump has not officially accepted Buckingham's first offer. Buckingham said she had not heard directly from anyone in Trump's camp after sending a letter last week offering the farmland near Rio Grande City, which the state bought last month for $3.8 million.
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $7/mo](https://substack.com/redirect/f1b5c7ac-cc34-4cdf-9387-0e2d973a7839?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
"I mean, they're obviously super busy, and so we're letting them do their thing. We just want to signal out that we're happy to be here and be a good partner," Buckingham said in an interview with Hearst Newspapers. "We've seen their public statements that they're interested and we'll have those talks when they're ready to have them."

Buckingham said in an interview that she imagined the administration would lease the land from the state for the operation, and that the federal payments would help fund education in Texas, "which is a win-win, making Texas safer and funding education."

**Tom Homan** , who Trump tapped to oversee the mass deportations, has said the administration would "absolutely" use the land. But Homan did not take the General Land Office up on an invitation to tour the property with Buckingham on Tuesday, even as he was in South Texas for two separate stops along the border with Gov. **Greg Abbott** -- including one in nearby Edinburg.

The dueling events offered a glimpse into how Texas Republican leaders are jockeying to demonstrate their willingness to aid the incoming president in his border crackdown and deportation efforts.
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $70/yr](https://substack.com/redirect/f1b5c7ac-cc34-4cdf-9387-0e2d973a7839?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Abbott -- who has drawn frequent praise from Trump and Homan for overseeing an $11 billion border security initiative over the last four years -- has been publicly quiet about Buckingham's offer to use the land for deportations.

Buckingham said in an interview that Abbott's opinion on her offer "doesn't matter."

"It's our land," Buckingham said, later clarifying she was "sort of teasing."

She noted that the governor appoints members of the Texas Facilities Commission, which works with the General Land Office. But asked about conversations with the governor about the property in question, Buckingham responded: "We steward the 13 million acres of state land. It's in our purview."

Abbott's spokesman **Andrew Mahaleris** shot back later that afternoon, saying in a statement, "Actually, under the Texas Constitution, any effort to lease or donate Texas land to the federal government must be conducted through the Governor's Office. We look forward to working with the Trump Administration and Texas state officials to find the best use of that land to further protect Texas and the nation."" [Houston Chronicle](https://substack.com/redirect/7c40643f-226c-48ec-8a56-5b95dac39d21?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) ($)
