($5/mo or $50/yr or $199 lifetime) TOP NEWS "Texas looking at 'several' more tracts for Trump's mass deportations, " Houston Chronicle's Benjamin Wermund -- "Land Commissioner Dawn Buckingham said on Tuesday she was looking to offer "several" other tracts of state land to the incoming Trump administration for its . "I meant it when I said that I will do everything in my power to help this administration," Buckingham said, standing on the 1,400-acre ranch she recently offered President-elect Donald Trump to house immigrants with removal orders. "And that is why I'm announcing our offer has been extended beyond this property." Buckingham officially unveiled the "Jocelyn Initiative," an effort by the General Land Office to find more tracts of land to aid Trump's deportations, named for Jocelyn Nungaray , a Houston girl who was killed earlier this year. Trump has not officially accepted Buckingham's first offer. Buckingham said she had not heard directly from anyone in Trump's camp after sending a letter last week offering the farmland near Rio Grande City, which the state bought last month for $3.8 million. "I mean, they're obviously super busy, and so we're letting them do their thing. We just want to signal out that we're happy to be here and be a good partner," Buckingham said in an interview with Hearst Newspapers. "We've seen their public statements that they're interested and we'll have those talks when they're ready to have them." Buckingham said in an interview that she imagined the administration would lease the land from the state for the operation, and that the federal payments would help fund education in Texas, "which is a win-win, making Texas safer and funding education." Tom Homan , who Trump tapped to oversee the mass deportations, has said the administration would "absolutely" use the land. But Homan did not take the General Land Office up on an invitation to tour the property with Buckingham on Tuesday, even as he was in South Texas for two separate stops along the border with Gov. Greg Abbott -- including one in nearby Edinburg. The dueling events offered a glimpse into how Texas Republican leaders are jockeying to demonstrate their willingness to aid the incoming president in his border crackdown and deportation efforts. Abbott -- who has drawn frequent praise from Trump and Homan for overseeing an $11 billion border security initiative over the last four years -- has been publicly quiet about Buckingham's offer to use the land for deportations. Buckingham said in an interview that Abbott's opinion on her offer "doesn't matter." "It's our land," Buckingham said, later clarifying she was "sort of teasing." She noted that the governor appoints members of the Texas Facilities Commission, which works with the General Land Office. But asked about conversations with the governor about the property in question, Buckingham responded: "We steward the 13 million acres of state land. It's in our purview." Abbott's spokesman Andrew Mahaleris shot back later that afternoon, saying in a statement, "Actually, under the Texas Constitution, any effort to lease or donate Texas land to the federal government must be conducted through the Governor's Office. We look forward to working with the Trump Administration and Texas state officials to find the best use of that land to further protect Texas and the nation."" ($) FREE SUBSCRIPTIONS HAVE ENDED : As of July 11, 2022, we have moved to a paywall for free subscribers. Free subscribers will only receive the top story in their morning email. * **TOP NEWS**

"**Texas looking at 'several' more tracts for Trump's mass deportations,** " Houston Chronicle's **Benjamin Wermund** -- "Land Commissioner **Dawn Buckingham** said on Tuesday she was looking to offer "several" other tracts of state land to the incoming Trump administration for its [mass deportation efforts](https://substack.com/redirect/655c3c4b-824c-4800-b234-213cceaf0885?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).

"I meant it when I said that I will do everything in my power to help this administration," Buckingham said, standing on the 1,400-acre ranch she recently offered President-elect **Donald Trump** to house immigrants with removal orders. "And that is why I'm announcing our offer has been extended beyond this property."

Buckingham officially unveiled the "Jocelyn Initiative," an effort by the General Land Office to find more tracts of land to aid Trump's deportations, named for **Jocelyn Nungaray** , a Houston girl who was killed earlier this year.

Trump has not officially accepted Buckingham's first offer. Buckingham said she had not heard directly from anyone in Trump's camp after sending a letter last week offering the farmland near Rio Grande City, which the state bought last month for $3.8 million.
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $7/mo](https://substack.com/redirect/916d2aa5-1f23-49f0-9952-de7509ac0106?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
"I mean, they're obviously super busy, and so we're letting them do their thing. We just want to signal out that we're happy to be here and be a good partner," Buckingham said in an interview with Hearst Newspapers. "We've seen their public statements that they're interested and we'll have those talks when they're ready to have them."

Buckingham said in an interview that she imagined the administration would lease the land from the state for the operation, and that the federal payments would help fund education in Texas, "which is a win-win, making Texas safer and funding education."

**Tom Homan** , who Trump tapped to oversee the mass deportations, has said the administration would "absolutely" use the land. But Homan did not take the General Land Office up on an invitation to tour the property with Buckingham on Tuesday, even as he was in South Texas for two separate stops along the border with Gov. **Greg Abbott** -- including one in nearby Edinburg.

The dueling events offered a glimpse into how Texas Republican leaders are jockeying to demonstrate their willingness to aid the incoming president in his border crackdown and deportation efforts.
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $70/yr](https://substack.com/redirect/916d2aa5-1f23-49f0-9952-de7509ac0106?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Abbott -- who has drawn frequent praise from Trump and Homan for overseeing an $11 billion border security initiative over the last four years -- has been publicly quiet about Buckingham's offer to use the land for deportations.

Buckingham said in an interview that Abbott's opinion on her offer "doesn't matter."

"It's our land," Buckingham said, later clarifying she was "sort of teasing."

She noted that the governor appoints members of the Texas Facilities Commission, which works with the General Land Office. But asked about conversations with the governor about the property in question, Buckingham responded: "We steward the 13 million acres of state land. It's in our purview."

Abbott's spokesman **Andrew Mahaleris** shot back later that afternoon, saying in a statement, "Actually, under the Texas Constitution, any effort to lease or donate Texas land to the federal government must be conducted through the Governor's Office. We look forward to working with the Trump Administration and Texas state officials to find the best use of that land to further protect Texas and the nation."" name: Mike Pompeo
subject: I wrote you a letter.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHAMPION AMERICAN VALUES
body:
Our Conservative champions need help.

| |
---
| | | | | |
Hello,

I write to you today with a sense of gratitude and purpose. As we celebrate the victories of the faith-driven Conservatives I endorsed in the 2024 Election, I am reminded that our work is far from over.

As a Christian, I believe that our nation's founding was a miracle and that we have a sacred duty to uphold the values that make America great. That's why I was proud to endorse men and women of faith who share this vision.

But as we rejoice in their victories, we must not forget that the forces of darkness are still at work in our nation. The enemies of faith are relentless, and they will stop at nothing to undermine our values. That's why it's more important than ever that we continue to support our faith-driven leaders as they take on the tough battles ahead.

_**As the Good Book says, "For we wrestle not against flesh and blood, but against principalities, against powers, against the rulers of the darkness of this world, against spiritual wickedness in high places." (Ephesians 6:12)**_

I urge you to continue to stand with me in support of these faith-driven Conservatives. Their work is just beginning, and they will need our prayers, our encouragement, and our support to succeed.

---
| | | | [STAND WITH OUR FAITH-DRIVEN LEADERS](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=6b7e3c71d4ab4f17b0bf038d3850fbe7&_e=68iXeyt0i6AgT-JOc2UTcDCpk6p7cljyHvMAqRY8UmdZSnDJ6pBrJrvtL9Tv_bldR1xb6DNTbVKAY6Qlg4wUofKPVJY9t2qqm65PoUAeSMyGe8fDlurosHo8x4yZXtxocuqwWrdRgFstJf51Np7D1NBj3nVt_5UmJ6vgIvHhWDkBfiz_WFcFarbeIxajA4qAC9li0rNx4RDFSl965sUogvUZkL2DjW1NRuo-quruFY1TQ1nPe1ZeBWiwh_stcCHx7a88mTU-YPTrn34qDiN4V8KsEYhjFO40oDKfjwzPbzbt4zDg5wWbqWSZMF2yOjIkX00XOzyGqCAhe8vU5dHfBJSzYK9wHfFPAmOcWkdWiPcJqycEuJuUmryf6UFmA6MEbphNkwPZCisM6tFJWkrANQ5hVKcq-x0ya9ZHUlOCBShJ-zqPs6AfNjgl4_9BCjHG)
---

Together, we can ensure that our nation remains a beacon of hope and freedom for generations to come.

May God bless America,

Mike Pompeo

name: Special Election Alert (via DLCC.org)

body:
With the Virginia House and governorship at stake next November, it’s crucial that Democrats come out on top in these three upcoming special elections. | | |
---
| |
---|---
📅 On January 7th, Democrats will face three must-win special elections in Virginia. [To help position our candidates for victory in Virginia and beyond, we’re counting on our grassroots supporters in your state to chip in $3 today. Will you step up right now?](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqsOpbiH4z4INAYfLFgFMiGKluwFkSI-FIFj_tOVeSwTNAao0eDb5wO-h0OIpYV_Z7379y-j8KOa5mNcE7xwYst4Y8AzNgb_LJELMGW3Q3hkrzCOJowX7j3VPXE42RIRjCS0DJdnZ32GpolgXOFLjWI9hkLOsL521VAGcLB32Rg0cE6WXJYA9D1eXyWpzv6O0tAxYezg0dQFAimAg11CLjRbtcJ9eKPfJ8-GoX6b-Q-bx2Qf1qwKk9NK516aUBdPMsQweej0_wzSbnnB6VvYKsdzpP-IN7Zx3Bk8scdunK5RcqfCQZfiZCBY9hAgSE8VVEkG8Hb81Y8cKqQ3uGfbK6MoRFs0jB3uJqhsymKLoQ-FhGp42Bj0O8JdrxRKGb4go9A/4bz/AqDUVWG7QA21t8i0CrN4oQ/h0/h001.Vwm2VyDvBBzAtDdw5R_asVqizVwtwy1LaYV9AjrHxmc) | **Date** | **State** | **Chamber** | **District**

Democrats hold majorities in the Virginia House and Senate by ultra-thin margins – we’re up by just _one seat_ in each chamber.
These three special elections are vital opportunities for our party to regain momentum after federal-level setbacks on Election Day. And with the Virginia House and governorship at stake in 2025, it’s crucial that Democrats come out on top in these special elections.
[Will you rush $3 today to help Democrats WIN in places like Virginia in 2025, 2026, and beyond? ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqsOpbiH4z4INAYfLFgFMiGKluwFkSI-FIFj_tOVeSwTNAao0eDb5wO-h0OIpYV_Z7379y-j8KOa5mNcE7xwYst4Y8AzNgb_LJELMGW3Q3hkrzCOJowX7j3VPXE42RIRjCS0DJdnZ32GpolgXOFLjWI9hkLOsL521VAGcLB32Rg0cAvpSrSuh9qZqeDcuDi5_UolZobtoNng3AwSpnvNQ1HMwGWgFeECi6UPsUeAHbbDNooua1NnJrnGZTW1l7ol4mUmwmKjLDQPjr3UmFuImtSiLmEw2LUowqKWUD6_ag4c9HVKKuOxqNbnd58-7eQCSM0Mpl4ZyZ4xZG2weLeXVoIc4JaGYP8VxS9dD2S-aa7Z5UxpAJ7N3z-mcMVRUBVJ81M/4bz/AqDUVWG7QA21t8i0CrN4oQ/h2/h001.KPDQnD6UPpSuUmNbgKEBWkURdxc6UwW5YKtjPr6lrew)

subject: Giving Tuesday
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ken Mitchell for Virginia**
body:
| | | | |
---
| | | |
---
| Today is **Giving Tuesday** —a day to come together and support causes that inspire hope and drive change. Our campaign is built on the power of people like you—passionate supporters who believe in a brighter, more equitable future for all.
---
| We’re running a grassroots campaign that refuses to bow to corporate PACs and special interests. That means every dollar we raise comes from everyday people like you, chipping in what you can to make our shared vision a reality.
---
| Here’s the truth: the stakes couldn’t be higher. To take on powerful opponents and ensure we have the resources to reach every voter, we need your help today.
---
[Donate Now!](https://kenmitchellforvirginia.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=435990a56c5fdf5272fa9ea86&id=5ea46d8797&e=0fced71d8c)
| Drawing on detailed data analysis and insights from their previous race, our team has already begun laying the groundwork for a comprehensive field strategy. This grassroots approach is aimed at engaging with voters directly, knocking on doors, hosting community events, and ensuring that the concerns of the people are heard loud and clear in Washington. I plan to spend 2025 rebuilding connections throughout the sixth congressional district and being at each and every community event possible.
---
| Can we count on you to [**contribute just $10, $25, or whatever you can**](https://kenmitchellforvirginia.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=435990a56c5fdf5272fa9ea86&id=ac3833373c&e=0fced71d8c) to fuel this movement? Every donation goes directly toward knocking on doors, running ads, and spreading our message of hope and progress.
---
| Let’s make this **Giving Tuesday** a turning point in our fight for justice, fairness, and opportunity. Together, we can win this.
---
[Donate Now!](https://kenmitchellforvirginia.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=435990a56c5fdf5272fa9ea86&id=8bb58dcc1e&e=0fced71d8c)
| [**Can you donate $50, $100, or $250 dollars to help us defeat Ben Cline and reach more voters?**](https://kenmitchellforvirginia.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=435990a56c5fdf5272fa9ea86&id=3a0402b8f7&e=0fced71d8c)
Join me in defeating Ben Cline and bringing real representation to the sixth congressional district.
**—Ken Mitchell, Democratic Candidate for Virginia’s 6th Congressional District**

Hello Friend. How is your day today? We've been super busy over here with our Giving Tuesday fundraising efforts.

That's right...it's Giving Tuesday. So, I thought I'd give you a quick update on our progress. Thanks for opening my email and sparing a few moments to read it.

We have a rare opportunity to restore liberty in the coming year. I know you know sound education is essential to liberty...

...But when bureaucratic elites continue to enforce the latest leftist orthodoxy--no matter who is elected to office--the fight on the battlefield of education is more important than ever.

**And thanks to you, Hillsdale College is the only institution that reaches and teaches millions in defense of liberty.**

[Will you please give your best tax-deductible gift to help us reach our **$250,000 goal**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=9e8e277b87784e34a01cab47b48e1447&_e=_ycDCSmxeq8A_0XZJW9DOZ_twrQJp92A6pNK7_TsAuQVa4tU247NqtgrMTJvGCVKXiDpphMeS0MfqzbQ8yBMTCEVQeUPL-TSWjaCgn-Gfb4D6_9PL0bnMzFqbjoLzNTWOwkFxTqKLi-LwsvesEQAhPkGn4C2s_aBI5e4Prbi8CDelK-HJXzBPLTDoeGXQmPYpEPa1OPBb2YK5ICwMURcsmnEQutaxSa_-dH7s6C2yFeg0ed666ya2cE2jB0Td99XKfvtH0I3lblSl_HKj7d-EPQBB3U5doEYvQkAnq4WASXV2m1ZuP-Ld4hwJKoksuOwo9KTrdt_pUWQgRn0IpFaEHrK0HxRLeNyKAfBYo22xap-m69cMXMTPDFXXGJaF-oRsPwPT09Qt0vKiQxIS9jP_1SUNwkcRH8JdsAuLABVK9M%3D)?

Our deadline is **midnight** tonight!

And if you've already given, THANK YOU for answering the call and trusting us with your hard-earned money.

Here's a secure way for you to make your special tax-deductible Giving Tuesday gift to help **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans next year: [https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/giving-tuesday-2024](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=9e8e277b87784e34a01cab47b48e1447&_e=_ycDCSmxeq8A_0XZJW9DOZ_twrQJp92A6pNK7_TsAuQVa4tU247NqtgrMTJvGCVKXiDpphMeS0MfqzbQ8yBMTCEVQeUPL-TSWjaCgn-Gfb4D6_9PL0bnMzFqbjoLzNTWOwkFxTqKLi-LwsvesEQAhPkGn4C2s_aBI5e4Prbi8CDelK-HJXzBPLTDoeGXQmPYpEPa1OPBb2YK5ICwMURcsmnEQutaxSa_-dH7s6C2yFeg0ed666ya2cE2jB0Td99XZ1C3fB9_pYR-xsS62KCQNEYadtJDWValrNvIj5ubDNqQv2doIT7IqdAvgt7k-f45M4CHS6GF5rFFMg1TKTJ9y0w_WAtZNPNIZg2PLApnLQkn8cuArT7QKlV-AfejcJGUGskEslD3LP-Nb1K_tAa-ct0pKt3cKxyTKo9lDpKmiyU%3D)

Thanks in advance for your support and your help this Giving Tuesday. All of us really appreciate everything you do. I'm so thankful to count you as one of our dedicated friends.

Bill Gray, '01
Vice President
Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale College

name: Dan Goldman
subject: My Republican colleagues took an oath to the Constitution — not to Donald Trump
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dan Goldman for New York**
body:
|
#
---
Peter, The last Congress — led by the Republican House majority — was the most inept and ineffective Congress in modern history. Between their political infighting and their surrender to Donald Trump’s every whim, the past two years showed unequivocally that we cannot trust Republican leadership to uphold our democratic principles and tackle the issues that matter to the American people. **Well, Peter, just like me, every single one of my Republican colleagues took an oath to support and defend the Constitution — not Donald Trump.** Now that Republicans will control the majority in both the Senate and the House — meaning that Democrats have no subpoena power to conduct meaningful oversight — they must remember that they are ultimately responsible for ensuring that our democracy survives Trump’s worst instincts. **[Will you add your name to my petition to call on Republicans to stand by their oaths to the Constitution and get to work for the American people — not for Donald Trump?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98100537/515558919/1972650391?refcode=AU_DSG_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20241203_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDA4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YzlhNTIyZC1iMWIxLWVmMTEtODhjZi02MDQ1YmRmZThkMjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6XTYoIniedGJrCfj5GfTHnfbgnwhOLbc3C2NoalfzGA=&emci=6514b02b-e1b0-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&emdi=9c9a522d-b1b1-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&ceid=13556823)** | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98100538/515558920/1972650391?refcode=AU_DSG_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20241203_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDA4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YzlhNTIyZC1iMWIxLWVmMTEtODhjZi02MDQ1YmRmZThkMjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6XTYoIniedGJrCfj5GfTHnfbgnwhOLbc3C2NoalfzGA=&emci=6514b02b-e1b0-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&emdi=9c9a522d-b1b1-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&ceid=13556823)

Dan

Take action before Republicans take control

| **In one month,** the Republican trifecta in the House, Senate and White House will officially take control in Washington.

Peter, I know I usually ask you for money. But today, I’m asking for something else: [**I need your personal endorsement.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98101233/515560577/79150689?source=20241203_em_pet_b1_raja_main_rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzE2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMDZhZDM5NS1iMWIxLWVmMTEtODhjZi02MDQ1YmRmZThkMjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XrTauKGxOsfZ4b5eBHauAIWhKdiiy8VielzDtFyJd-Y=&emci=3b00310e-1bac-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&emdi=206ad395-b1b1-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&ceid=21346897) **[_If you already believe in me and my campaign, you can go ahead and sign your name here. If you’re not sure yet, let me explain and fight for your support. >>_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98101234/515560579/79150689?source=20241203_em_pet_b1_raja_main_rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzE2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMDZhZDM5NS1iMWIxLWVmMTEtODhjZi02MDQ1YmRmZThkMjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XrTauKGxOsfZ4b5eBHauAIWhKdiiy8VielzDtFyJd-Y=&emci=3b00310e-1bac-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&emdi=206ad395-b1b1-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&ceid=21346897)** Peter, I want you to know my story: When my parents first arrived in the United States, they faced prejudice and economic hardship. They relied on public housing and food assistance when times were tough. They worked hard to achieve the American Dream — and give me the opportunity to become who I am today. But now, MAGA extremists are fighting to destroy the programs that made my story possible. So when I talk about taking back our House Majority, it isn’t just about politics. It’s deeply personal. **[_It’s because of my upbringing that I believe all Americans deserve a fighting chance. That’s why I’m leading the charge to make sure our hardworking Democrats take back the House in this next election — but I need to make sure my supporters have my back as I do. So please, Peter, will you take 30 seconds, add your name now, and become one of the 300 supporters I need to stand with me before midnight? >>_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98101237/515560581/79150689?source=20241203_em_pet_b1_raja_main_rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzE2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMDZhZDM5NS1iMWIxLWVmMTEtODhjZi02MDQ1YmRmZThkMjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XrTauKGxOsfZ4b5eBHauAIWhKdiiy8VielzDtFyJd-Y=&emci=3b00310e-1bac-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&emdi=206ad395-b1b1-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&ceid=21346897)** | [Endorse Raja!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98101239/515560583/79150689?source=20241203_em_pet_b1_raja_main_rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzE2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMDZhZDM5NS1iMWIxLWVmMTEtODhjZi02MDQ1YmRmZThkMjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XrTauKGxOsfZ4b5eBHauAIWhKdiiy8VielzDtFyJd-Y=&emci=3b00310e-1bac-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&emdi=206ad395-b1b1-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&ceid=21346897)

subject: update for you
body:
Hello Friend. How is your day today? We’ve been super busy over here with our Giving Tuesday fundraising efforts.

| | | | _Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.redconservatives.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=66ce1250519441959ebe70cf27686494&_s=8a3e740658694e8eaf747577528a2d85&_t=2V6K0T2110hZB8MEDsBOsspsaKEfaAE00I5cxed2LVJ1Mp1O3dGIYn-wTH0NzFL-BvikY3lQFTIRQRZ7as1qJb5g-FiI6zyTVOgTOVIV9VH8bUOJHudgBC3UOgBBSDVu)_
---
[](http://links.redconservatives.com/u/click?_t=66ce1250519441959ebe70cf27686494&_m=8a3e740658694e8eaf747577528a2d85&_e=GDHOi8cvW3ENT0h8PKyKKXXqKb67jaaLDPXxpaV9Beewl66ih6HKbAAWG6kOyWM-MPBns_1VYiq80zUiIVHmPRhL6LHLi-ir6AjPz-yDz0rcvCQWUFFDYZaeNGVjISWt-EMlzv0fVKnRjkGORbesCR5hi9xCP6xWpvZM2VWD8hpIRwJ2Qqm8-e3McrVmidpvULNfeVro_IPluQdKWCkquLnSkr60G236druL_qHjqj4IE9sczadx3-q1pLOPES3XEdh3nclC0CVhcicFU6MgBPIQCYnWvpD2r2AwnTFM0VPs6zguN5nMT6H_bo5vVO2gzFh0biZOY1hN5Dw0bu_R6E6uX3iENB5vJnPSWJvzklTQi5CqYgDIlrI1QM5NXbDbKe8soKPfNN5d9SP4TAhC8YEkvVGnGyiCBiG1q1sGbhE%3D)
| |
Hello Friend. How is your day today? We've been super busy over here with our Giving Tuesday fundraising efforts.

That's right...it's Giving Tuesday. So, I thought I'd give you a quick update on our progress. Thanks for opening my email and sparing a few moments to read it.

We have a rare opportunity to restore liberty in the coming year. I know you know sound education is essential to liberty...

...But when bureaucratic elites continue to enforce the latest leftist orthodoxy--no matter who is elected to office--the fight on the battlefield of education is more important than ever.

**And thanks to you, Hillsdale College is the only institution that reaches and teaches millions in defense of liberty.**

[Will you please give your best tax-deductible gift to help us reach our **$250,000 goal**](http://links.redconservatives.com/u/click?_t=66ce1250519441959ebe70cf27686494&_m=8a3e740658694e8eaf747577528a2d85&_e=GDHOi8cvW3ENT0h8PKyKKXXqKb67jaaLDPXxpaV9Beewl66ih6HKbAAWG6kOyWM-MPBns_1VYiq80zUiIVHmPRhL6LHLi-ir6AjPz-yDz0rcvCQWUFFDYZaeNGVjISWt-EMlzv0fVKnRjkGORbesCR5hi9xCP6xWpvZM2VWD8hpIRwJ2Qqm8-e3McrVmidpvULNfeVro_IPluQdKWCkquLnSkr60G236druL_qHjqj4IE9sczadx3-q1pLOPES3XlZY8KFLGstoSOd-9jzRDoxIYk4bYahQebG4D8pYFvynot-rz8Ocfp_RC3X-_6aZAJP5xdA0vnvl49fINLeWTY-M_GOzgEgTQf56Qa2n6KpkR3vhxtK9tvrCS9bWYT46XTE96dAUXOqDbrHQ9djODKrjtrzT7kL0ZsXZrmw1sRKI%3D)?

Our deadline is **midnight** tonight!

And if you've already given, THANK YOU for answering the call and trusting us with your hard-earned money.

Here's a secure way for you to make your special tax-deductible Giving Tuesday gift to help **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans next year: [https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/giving-tuesday-2024](http://links.redconservatives.com/u/click?_t=66ce1250519441959ebe70cf27686494&_m=8a3e740658694e8eaf747577528a2d85&_e=GDHOi8cvW3ENT0h8PKyKKXXqKb67jaaLDPXxpaV9Beewl66ih6HKbAAWG6kOyWM-MPBns_1VYiq80zUiIVHmPRhL6LHLi-ir6AjPz-yDz0rcvCQWUFFDYZaeNGVjISWt-EMlzv0fVKnRjkGORbesCR5hi9xCP6xWpvZM2VWD8hpIRwJ2Qqm8-e3McrVmidpvULNfeVro_IPluQdKWCkquLnSkr60G236druL_qHjqj4IE9sczadx3-q1pLOPES3XyuDLm7Z_ZM00r3ARh-xji9UIda00iyjsYaVzedOqitHEix18c9v9461XoCXSr0vuRhTtp8xBPhi8CYKLPai5EIBL4H3J9Kr_0Eqz_bs7ifI6xhFb06TMCNBNwZ4ddtZ3PbKTGgI0uCdi6tXYflUp9nae6MnSQuwFvk1cceISjg8%3D)

Thanks in advance for your support and your help this Giving Tuesday. All of us really appreciate everything you do. I'm so thankful to count you as one of our dedicated friends.

Bill Gray, '01
Vice President
Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale College

---

[Unsubscribe from all communications](http://links.redconservatives.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=66ce1250519441959ebe70cf27686494&_s=8a3e740658694e8eaf747577528a2d85&_t=2V6K0T2110hZB8MEDsBOsspsaKEfaAE00I5cxed2LVJ1Mp1O3dGIYn-wTH0NzFL-BvikY3lQFTIRQRZ7as1qJb5g-FiI6zyTVOgTOVIV9VH8bUOJHudgBC3UOgBBSDVu).

subject: 12 hours left: Enter to win an Owyhee swag package!
body:
It’s Giving Tuesday, help us reach our goal and enter our raffle. | | Hi Peter, I want to make sure you saw Sarah’s email. Today’s Giving Tuesday and there’s only 12 hours left for us to reach our goal and get all donations matched! **If you give $50 now, you’re giving $100, and if you give $100, you’re giving $200.** Any contribution you make now will be doubled once we reach our goal. Gifts of $50 provide us the resources to recruit 1 new volunteer, so imagine what we can accomplish together once we reach our goal. [Make sure that you don’t miss out on the chance to win an Owyhee swag package (gifts of $500 will enter your name twice in the raffle) and to have your gifts matched by a generous donor!](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98102077/515562983/-1596352716?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjZhNWMwMzNlLWIzYjEtZWYxMS04OGNmLTYwNDViZGZlOGQyOSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=GiZfI9j1hMgc2WHMLhV5Nn3D-OGzgfv2mf-iPLcA7Nw=&emci=bf58750c-08b1-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&emdi=6a5c033e-b3b1-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&ceid=2107230) **[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98102078/515562990/-1596352716?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjZhNWMwMzNlLWIzYjEtZWYxMS04OGNmLTYwNDViZGZlOGQyOSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=GiZfI9j1hMgc2WHMLhV5Nn3D-OGzgfv2mf-iPLcA7Nw=&emci=bf58750c-08b1-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&emdi=6a5c033e-b3b1-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&ceid=2107230)****[Will you help us get there?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98102079/515562991/-1596352716?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjZhNWMwMzNlLWIzYjEtZWYxMS04OGNmLTYwNDViZGZlOGQyOSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=GiZfI9j1hMgc2WHMLhV5Nn3D-OGzgfv2mf-iPLcA7Nw=&emci=bf58750c-08b1-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&emdi=6a5c033e-b3b1-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&ceid=2107230)** Sincere gratitude,
April Christensen
OLCV Development Director | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98102080/515562992/-1596352716?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjZhNWMwMzNlLWIzYjEtZWYxMS04OGNmLTYwNDViZGZlOGQyOSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=GiZfI9j1hMgc2WHMLhV5Nn3D-OGzgfv2mf-iPLcA7Nw=&emci=bf58750c-08b1-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&emdi=6a5c033e-b3b1-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&ceid=2107230) Hi Peter, Today’s the day. Only 24 hours left to help us reach our goal of $10k! A generous donor will be matching all gifts once we hit our goal, so now is the time to give and have your gift be doubled. [**Get into the giving spirit and make your gift now to have it doubled tomorrow!**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98102081/515562993/-1596352716?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjZhNWMwMzNlLWIzYjEtZWYxMS04OGNmLTYwNDViZGZlOGQyOSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=GiZfI9j1hMgc2WHMLhV5Nn3D-OGzgfv2mf-iPLcA7Nw=&emci=bf58750c-08b1-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&emdi=6a5c033e-b3b1-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&ceid=2107230) [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98102082/515562994/-1596352716?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjZhNWMwMzNlLWIzYjEtZWYxMS04OGNmLTYwNDViZGZlOGQyOSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=GiZfI9j1hMgc2WHMLhV5Nn3D-OGzgfv2mf-iPLcA7Nw=&emci=bf58750c-08b1-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&emdi=6a5c033e-b3b1-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&ceid=2107230)For Giving Tuesday only, all donors will be entered to win an Owyhee swag package, which includes a copy of the Owyhee art book, a shirt, hat, and pin. Check out the sneak peak of the front cover of the Owyhee art book. **[Are you ready to donate for climate action and be entered to win?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98102083/515562995/-1596352716?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjZhNWMwMzNlLWIzYjEtZWYxMS04OGNmLTYwNDViZGZlOGQyOSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=GiZfI9j1hMgc2WHMLhV5Nn3D-OGzgfv2mf-iPLcA7Nw=&emci=bf58750c-08b1-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&emdi=6a5c033e-b3b1-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&ceid=2107230)** We’ve been fighting for Oregon’s clean air and water, public lands, wildlife, and climate for over 50 years. We never stopped being Oregon’s political arm for the environment through Donald Trump’s last presidency, ensuring that Oregon’s clean air and water standards remained at the level they were before Trump took office. With your help, we can do it all again, and even better. If you make your contribution now, together we can ensure Oregon is still a leader on climate, regardless of threats at the federal level. [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98102088/515562998/-1596352716?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjZhNWMwMzNlLWIzYjEtZWYxMS04OGNmLTYwNDViZGZlOGQyOSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=GiZfI9j1hMgc2WHMLhV5Nn3D-OGzgfv2mf-iPLcA7Nw=&emci=bf58750c-08b1-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&emdi=6a5c033e-b3b1-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&ceid=2107230)While Donald Trump and a Republican dominated Congress are in office, our work these next few years are made more imperative. Especially in 2025. We must start out strong so we can continue to lead on issues like environmental transportation, affordable clean energy, climate resiliency within communities, and for our sustaining essentials like clean air and water. There’s nothing we cannot accomplish without a strong member base. Raising enough member dollars is the first step to further building up our member base. **A gift of $50 is enough to provide us the resources to recruit 1 new volunteer, $100 allows us to recruit 2 new volunteers, and a gift of $500 equates to 10 new volunteers.** These are the faces of our fight, the ones that will go out and speak to elected officials during town halls and lobby days. They’ll help us get petition signatures and speak to voters. [**Will you make your gift of $100 today and help us recruit 2 volunteers? If you’re feeling extra generous, a contribution of $500 will enter you in the Owyhee swag package raffle twice!**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98102096/515563007/-1596352716?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjZhNWMwMzNlLWIzYjEtZWYxMS04OGNmLTYwNDViZGZlOGQyOSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=GiZfI9j1hMgc2WHMLhV5Nn3D-OGzgfv2mf-iPLcA7Nw=&emci=bf58750c-08b1-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&emdi=6a5c033e-b3b1-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&ceid=2107230) No matter what happens at the federal level, we are committed to making sure Oregon remains the green state that it is, and continues to be a leader across the country for climate action. We cannot do this without you - we’re strong together and together we can get the job done. **[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98102103/515563013/-1596352716?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjZhNWMwMzNlLWIzYjEtZWYxMS04OGNmLTYwNDViZGZlOGQyOSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=GiZfI9j1hMgc2WHMLhV5Nn3D-OGzgfv2mf-iPLcA7Nw=&emci=bf58750c-08b1-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&emdi=6a5c033e-b3b1-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&ceid=2107230)** Your gift this Giving Tuesday will not only be doubled by a generous donor, but it is one that will continue to give back to the climate movement. Each contribution will compound over time, creating an immeasurable impact on our work. Not to mention, you’ll be entered to win an exclusive Owyhee swag package. Don’t wait. [**Make your mark in the climate movement this Giving Tuesday and have your gift doubled!**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98102110/515563024/-1596352716?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjZhNWMwMzNlLWIzYjEtZWYxMS04OGNmLTYwNDViZGZlOGQyOSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=GiZfI9j1hMgc2WHMLhV5Nn3D-OGzgfv2mf-iPLcA7Nw=&emci=bf58750c-08b1-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&emdi=6a5c033e-b3b1-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&ceid=2107230) With gratitude,
Sarah Kline
OLCV Communications & Membership Coordinator _P.S.: Daunted by a large donation? No worries! clean_body: It’s Giving Tuesday, help us reach our goal and enter our raffle. | | Hi Peter, I want to make sure you saw Sarah’s email. Today’s Giving Tuesday and there’s only 12 hours left for us to reach our goal and get all donations matched! If you give $50 now, you’re giving $100, and if you give $100, you’re giving $200. Any contribution you make now will be doubled once we reach our goal. Gifts of $50 provide us the resources to recruit 1 new volunteer, so imagine what we can accomplish together once we reach our goal. Sincere gratitude, April Christensen OLCV Development Director | Hi Peter, Today’s the day. Only 24 hours left to help us reach our goal of $10k! A generous donor will be matching all gifts once we hit our goal, so now is the time to give and have your gift be doubled. Giving Tuesday only, all donors will be entered to win an Owyhee swag package, which includes a copy of the Owyhee art book, a shirt, hat, and pin. Check out the sneak peak of the front cover of the Owyhee art book. We’ve been fighting for Oregon’s clean air and water, public lands, wildlife, and climate for over 50 years. We never stopped being Oregon’s political arm for the environment through Donald Trump’s last presidency, ensuring that Oregon’s clean air and water standards remained at the level they were before Trump took office. With your help, we can do it all again, and even better. If you make your contribution now, together we can ensure Oregon is still a leader on climate, regardless of threats at the federal level. Donald Trump and a Republican dominated Congress are in office, our work these next few years are made more imperative. Especially in 2025. We must start out strong so we can continue to lead on issues like environmental transportation, affordable clean energy, climate resiliency within communities, and for our sustaining essentials like clean air and water. There’s nothing we cannot accomplish without a strong member base. Raising enough member dollars is the first step to further building up our member base. A gift of $50 is enough to provide us the resources to recruit 1 new volunteer, $100 allows us to recruit 2 new volunteers, and a gift of $500 equates to 10 new volunteers. These are the faces of our fight, the ones that will go out and speak to elected officials during town halls and lobby days. They’ll help us get petition signatures and speak to voters. No matter what happens at the federal level, we are committed to making sure Oregon remains the green state that it is, and continues to be a leader across the country for climate action. We cannot do this without you - we’re strong together and together we can get the job done. Your gift this Giving Tuesday will not only be doubled by a generous donor, but it is one that will continue to give back to the climate movement. Each contribution will compound over time, creating an immeasurable impact on our work. Not to mention, you’ll be entered to win an exclusive Owyhee swag package. Don’t wait. With gratitude, Sarah Kline OLCV Communications & Membership Coordinator P.S.: Daunted by a large donation? No worries! name: Judicial Watch Action
subject: NEW Episode of Chris Farrell's On Watch Podcast w/ Mark Houck!
body: Mark Houck is a pro-life activist from Bucks County, Pennsylvania, who was arrested in 2022 in a pre-dawn raid for a 2021 incident in Philadelphia, where he defended his then 12-year-old son from an aggressive Planned Parenthood clinic escort. In early 2023, Houck was acquitted of charges that he violated a federal law protecting access to abortion clinics. Houck was facing up to 11 years in federal prison. [Action] Chris Farrell's On Watch Podcast Mark Houck: Biden's FBI Held My Wife and Kids at Gunpoint! [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=71362&L=34042&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly95b3V0dS5iZS9FMTBIeEJibEQ5UT91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1hY3Rpb24rYWxlcnQmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=fbbd838751527b9d2a6b33f9f909211181e0d7dedf9529eed57d35af962c0143] Mark Houck is a pro-life activist from Bucks County, Pennsylvania, who was arrested in 2022 in a pre-dawn raid for a 2021 incident in Philadelphia, where he defended his then 12-year-old son from an aggressive Planned Parenthood clinic escort. In early 2023, Houck was acquitted of charges that he violated a federal law protecting access to abortion clinics. Houck was facing up to 11 years in federal prison. Houck is also the Founder and President of The King’s Men. name: Sarah McBride
subject: This organization is targeting the root causes of poverty in Delaware
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McBride for Delaware
body:
The First State Community Action Agency provides essential services and programs that target the root causes of poverty.
#
The **First State Community Action Agency** provides essential services and programs that target the root causes of poverty here in Delaware. So today, in honor of Giving Tuesday, I wanted to put their work in the spotlight and [**ask you to pitch in to support everything they do for our communities.**](https://www.paypal.com/donate?token=vzp8uJNT6XvTSt7G8fRxQ9pNSXJsaUhlVY310WcImBnv_T_0UzwsfOQ4f_YPh4wjkO7XNOYV-e3VlxqJ)
First, FSCAA helps families facing financial hardship with **food, rental, and utility assistance,** providing an important safety net for our most vulnerable neighbors in their time of need.
Second, they help people build a brighter future with programs like **job training, financial literacy, and education,** empowering Delawareans to achieve self-sufficiency and get ahead.
Third, they create stronger communities with initiatives to address **food insecurity, homelessness, and healthcare access,** making sure none of our neighbors go without some of the most basic necessities.
Founded nearly 59 years ago in 1965, FSCAA has been serving Delaware for generations. But in order to keep it up, they rely on generous donations from people like you and me.
[**So will you join me in supporting the important work the First State Community Action Agency does here in Delaware by donating today in honor of Giving Tuesday?**](https://www.paypal.com/donate?token=vzp8uJNT6XvTSt7G8fRxQ9pNSXJsaUhlVY310WcImBnv_T_0UzwsfOQ4f_YPh4wjkO7XNOYV-e3VlxqJ)
**[Donate »](https://www.paypal.com/donate?token=vzp8uJNT6XvTSt7G8fRxQ9pNSXJsaUhlVY310WcImBnv_T_0UzwsfOQ4f_YPh4wjkO7XNOYV-e3VlxqJ)**
Thank you,
Sarah McBride
* * *

* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/receive_fewer_emails/?t=1&akid=1595%2E21716%2E5NOjLY)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/update_your_information/?t=2&akid=1595%2E21716%2E5NOjLY)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=1595%2E21716%2E5NOjLY)

Email us: [info@sarahmcbride.com](mailto:info@sarahmcbride.com)

body:
| | | Today is Giving Tuesday — and every gift, no matter the amount, helps give us a head start on reaching our year-end fundraising goal. **[If you are able, make a gift today to help the Working Families Party hit the ground running in 2025 to organize working people against the Trump agenda and keep growing our movement:](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfquqxZ_WMtWQ5nsYnjR236T9bOOf1rOFD9wykrZh5ogixjLSwWGGYRHmtc8FgFaReDkQ5UQ2i4eD5Uk3QkNrizOdCbdT4lecFT67V5L7nQEFmCFvjI0hj-BPeBA57oLFkbEZQhPoJ3UdPOaqrvJZ_m_Sg_UiC3qPbCdeSbeQFB7Ip3SNgv4nGgD0_vJsUrR-Fe3XViiliqEdDPk9MTE5f8WatIFxEP1M0s4d-hYAzSiRZCoqV111ufuaJ_TGBXGvJ1TMPZdW5a_keP_bD1VFRMX3EpjmSTAKsvDE5Bh8uvrPGTLg-QGNaRJXze_ztiXhbehFeDQt2cPWMig7yvONFkFlekqvGCWEZ1VJQY8BZFtksyO-6ZDxXBnIYY-HV9CaRWg/4bz/opTeAYosTVC_gYAJy2a7Lg/h0/h001.Fuu8eRFxOOV6sDFm3USQc86wbk_XKKFXwOZr1-YkNr4)** **[Donate »](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfquqxZ_WMtWQ5nsYnjR236T9bOOf1rOFD9wykrZh5ogixjLSwWGGYRHmtc8FgFaReDkQ5UQ2i4eD5Uk3QkNrizOdM9nP0Zw_wmzDPm5xbCQetHgNiYEhCTz5gp820FHDZzEnK2Z96SXOdCF8bMtmkmCoGA2HVxcxo3sxKd9_9e3xGNLXvfMYas8DalDQtckMfV4hFNtFV9rvIOQnxJJzLkiuKO57y85hlgV9-p4Xgbxlq8_VCbZlW27aN8txiWZlqe6Qe_I3RtOTbZGO32d33pEjG2lfk78ddryIPsAZsYU-gIJ4kaYjjHMZg7uWB2zToiwKMdEmz8axlIR0w14yWCx-4qfA1bXZwKAPfIXahmhS0qCs887Khyec4B-z1eyp0mU/4bz/opTeAYosTVC_gYAJy2a7Lg/h1/h001.LTCuG40UP3NZxuXDBJ477VdWu8q7OinQq9X4VjUQu38)** Dear Peter, It’s been four weeks since Election Day. And everything we’ve learned about the plans of Trump and Republicans so far tells us one thing: **Republicans are dead serious about trying to implement their Project 2025 agenda to seize control of every aspect of the government and enrich their billionaire friends, all while throwing regular working people under the bus.**
* Of the people Trump has nominated to be part of his administration so far, _at least 17_ are directly associated with Project 2025 or the America First Policy Institute.1
* That includes the “architect” of Project 2025 Russell Vought, who wrote the chapter that detailed plans for greatly expanding the powers of the presidency.2
* For key posts in law enforcement, the Defense Department, and intelligence agencies, Trump has chosen corrupt unqualified loyalists who have proclaimed out loud their willingness to abuse their positions and exact revenge against political opponents.3
* He’s also elevated multi-billionaires like Elon Musk, giving them license to enrich themselves even further all while calling for the elimination of entire agencies that protect working people.4
* All of this as Republicans in Congress show no sign of standing in the way, and every sign that they plan to help Trump enact the full Project 2025 agenda — starting with more tax cuts for billionaires.5

We had a good sense of what was coming months ago if Republicans were to win control of the government — because they told us in detail in a 922-page document. And everything we’re seeing so far shows us they were dead serious. **But we also know what we need to do to fight back:** First, we need to defend against hopelessness and cynicism. That’s exactly what authoritarian Republicans want us to be feeling right now. Then, we need to focus on organizing a multiracial, working class movement to thwart their plans in 2025 — because we know their playbook, and we know their agenda has no actual answers for working people. And finally, we need to prepare now to win back power for working people in 2026 and 2028. **2025 doesn’t need to look like “Project 2025.”** But in order to fight back and win, we need the resources to keep organizing in key communities nationwide — even during electoral “off years” like the one coming up. [**Can you pitch in today to make sure we can hit the ground running in 2025 to organize working people against the Trump agenda?**](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfquqxZ_WMtWQ5nsYnjR236T9bOOf1rOFD9wykrZh5ogixjLSwWGGYRHmtc8FgFaReDkQ5UQ2i4eD5Uk3QkNrizOdjD8TVT1GFUZS8K8EWOYtHkrkrDCOn8KwLek-BzQVkbsIOAs9d9oUQpoEyuHm65M7HNTocrz5DgcavyescoHWQ8sDj9_GnJbDI7D7ww0xhjsvLMMWDFYRXhNxaHeA65W5jlUN_cz6xuuIlPmrySTUz5RAJzjSu_HYsjmr4fr7k0CzRDgKCw6PstDvJRd1FdmbjZ6Kjzz58W3lwfxxWXSFIArO72gjxBto2E9uvh7hbaytB0gMCZux_SQkAUrweR_eMNBJH8rBaoUeZGl0hJpyej1wPe5P9oBLM259wxDN1tA/4bz/opTeAYosTVC_gYAJy2a7Lg/h2/h001.PqhzALIVGecVDGsLBJbhMLj_bQ8mnZQJ50Yz_V8EhpQ) **[Contribute $10 »](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfquqxZ_WMtWQ5nsYnjR236T9bOOf1rOFD9wykrZh5ogixjLSwWGGYRHmtc8FgFaReDkQ5UQ2i4eD5Uk3QkNrizOdIADzDv7Pb6QrSEeVrWAcyLj8TAtzU7C9o1dEptWOkC8fB5h4jaRmzO5Kach-obmSNPCLq5wBpXiyo_dd8TjpqyHCewmE0BLFAYV-g54a7fS8T3SRuizcpHEXo7mscGs8PG3Rh7HMypsBxqoaDQ5mPmLEFngKoJSbNk0k4h8NCRe9eqBq582eQ7Ua2UwQpBdKpOPeWr6npXlyGtym-kaCKZuCvpJ_WDNWhp5KjBuAXF4jukykzn3XkiNQ936Ziw1JfraxaV7Gp772LV1UrNlXz2UanhXMddSAwENcXwMdUFs/4bz/opTeAYosTVC_gYAJy2a7Lg/h3/h001.5vg4VRXjbir4yTVUTZwJ3gUnPHOcxr2hKAj6KLAJV8M)** Thank you for being in this fight with us. clean_body: | | | Today is Giving Tuesday — and every gift, no matter the amount, helps give us a head start on reaching our year-end fundraising goal. Dear Peter, It’s been four weeks since Election Day. And everything we’ve learned about the plans of Trump and Republicans so far tells us one thing: Republicans are dead serious about trying to implement their Project 2025 agenda to seize control of every aspect of the government and enrich their billionaire friends, all while throwing regular working people under the bus. Of the people Trump has nominated to be part of his administration so far, at least 17 are directly associated with Project 2025 or the America First Policy Institute.1 That includes the “architect” of Project 2025 Russell Vought, who wrote the chapter that detailed plans for greatly expanding the powers of the presidency.2 For key posts in law enforcement, the Defense Department, and intelligence agencies, Trump has chosen corrupt unqualified loyalists who have proclaimed out loud their willingness to abuse their positions and exact revenge against political opponents.3 He’s also elevated multi-billionaires like Elon Musk, giving them license to enrich themselves even further all while calling for the elimination of entire agencies that protect working people.4 All of this as Republicans in Congress show no sign of standing in the way, and every sign that they plan to help Trump enact the full Project 2025 agenda — starting with more tax cuts for billionaires.5 We had a good sense of what was coming months ago if Republicans were to win control of the government — because they told us in detail in a 922-page document. And everything we’re seeing so far shows us they were dead serious. But we also know what we need to do to fight back: First, we need to defend against hopelessness and cynicism. That’s exactly what authoritarian Republicans want us to be feeling right now. Then, we need to focus on organizing a multiracial, working class movement to thwart their plans in 2025 — because we know their playbook, and we know their agenda has no actual answers for working people. And finally, we need to prepare now to win back power for working people in 2026 and 2028. 2025 doesn’t need to look like “Project 2025.” But in order to fight back and win, we need the resources to keep organizing in key communities nationwide — even during electoral “off years” like the one coming up. Thank you for being in this fight with us. In solidarity, Team WFP Sources: 1\. , New York Times, December 3rd, 2024 2\. , Washington State Standard, December 1st, 2024 3\. , Minnesota Star Tribune, November 30th, 2024 4\. , MSNBC, Decmeber 3rd, 2024 5\. , AP News, November 30th, 2024 Thoughts? Feedback? We want to hear it. Reply directly to this email and let us know. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you received this email as a forward and want to get the latest updates from the Working Families Party directly, The Working Families Party is the party of the multiracial working class, fighting for a nation that cares for all of us. Wanna learn more? And if you need to update your contact information, Other political groups have corporate donors. But we can pool our resources too. ** Paid for by Working Families Party PAC (77 Sands St. #6, Brooklyn, NY, 11201). | | Sent via . name: Kirk Cameron
subject: I knew I had a duty to take action.
body:
Radical librarians call Adventure of Huckleberry Finn and To Kill a Mockingbird “racist.” They’ve stripped Laura Ingalls Wilder’s name from a prestigious book award because of her “problematic” Little House series. | | | If you haven’t heard about the “See You at the Library Day” on Fox News or Newsmax or your other favorite news sources, please let me tell you why it’s so critical.

| | Fellow Conservative,Back when you were growing up, you may remember lazy Saturdays at the library with a kind but stern librarian. She would fill your mind with classics like _Pat the Bunny_ and _The Little Engine That Could_. And eventually you got old enough to roam by yourself and discover adventures like the _Three Musketeers_ , _Treasure Island_ and _Charlotte’s Web_.But today, all that has changed.The president of the American Library Association (ALA) is a self-described “Marxist lesbian.”Radical librarians call _Adventure of Huckleberry Finn_ and _To Kill a Mockingbird_ “racist.” They’ve stripped Laura Ingalls Wilder’s name from a prestigious book award because of her “problematic” _Little House_ series.And they bring men in wearing full makeup, dresses, and high heels for “Drag Queen Story Hours” where books like these are read to children of all ages... A is for Activist. An ABC board book for “families who want their kids to grow up in a space that is unapologetic about activism, environmental justice, civil rights, LGBTQ rights, and everything else that activists believe in and fight for...”

| | For decades, the ultra-liberal Bill and Melinda Gates Foundation and George Soros’ Open Society have spent millions radicalizing the ALA. And as a result, a new generation of pink-haired, activist librarians have made it their mission to fill library shelves with anti-American, LGBTQ-friendly, and explicitly sexual content.Maybe you’ve noticed all the displays at your own library celebrating Pride Month or elevating “the environment” to a type of religion. The “Teen Zone” is filled with books like: _Rick_ about a cross-dressing Grandpa, _Melissa_ filled with graphic nudity, and _Darkstalker_ featuring gory violence and domestic abuse.But here’s what’s really alarming.We can’t just sit back and say, “Well, I’ll just make sure my family doesn’t go to “Drag Queen Story Hour” and we won’t check out those inappropriate books.”That may be good for your family – for now.But meanwhile, the ALA uses our taxpayer-funded libraries to lure in millions of other children who grow up to be the very activists who are destroying our country and conservative values! **[**I hope you see why I need your help today to TAKE BACK OUR LIBRARIES.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=faddb572454d481680128dbd3320accc&_e=esMaMIEgJbGduZuyOS7hq_lPBK59oG-7esIxnBc5PHBlD1eQl0YR2fEHGQfuM3bfbutkK-rATxFVuQWiQjHvxB_eaU-aUIUWLdumS-muLZQGZZwId0QcPaLrMDAK06oAT9-Wo4txYSzFsC0y9BsnVwtsl6kVzJe-WG0qkcUKYIgFr1lHU7HhYYHVGQTFQoU2mAJjUudCVTK4689Zwmq8jkJsZJFvKFd8IIgixY8sxYlaf26xlB9yGOIUOsQ8gr5JvSU9FthINu9Vk-MYLeaqKx8QxpncLJW3sBOtkqUjCFsS5prELSiiIrpsr3LfLhJ1lT6vM4fhlHeYBhaDJ4BFhEEE7ZUPJJQROj3ZG54FJVvqZj7MONCeROyYdezTTU63zYwrYVMDdUwfAAyzzKW76g%3D%3D)** My name is Kirk Cameron. Maybe you recognize me from the 1980’s family sitcom “Growing Pains” or from my work in inspirational movies like “Fireproof” and “Left Behind.”I know firsthand how dangerous it is to be indoctrinated by leftist values. Pride almost took me down as a young actor in Hollywood.But the gospel saved me. I love being an actor, but what’s far more important is being a husband, dad, grandad, and a Christian.When I saw what book publishers and libraries were doing to indoctrinate children with anti-God, anti-family, anti-America messages, I knew I had a duty to take action. So together with a small Christian book publisher aptly named **Brave Books** , I wrote “As You Grow” to teach children how to grow in wisdom through the fruit of the spirit.And then we decided to go one step further and counter those awful “Drag Queen Story Hours” with a wholesome Story Hour of our own. Our idea was to read the classic books you and I grew up with plus new wholesome Brave Books that captivate children with lessons in bravery, honesty, kindness, and patriotism.And boy, the ALA and radical librarians didn’t like that one bit.>> Over 50 libraries rejected our request to host our Story Hour. >> The ALA helped local libraries scheme ways to keep us out including booking all the event rooms for themselves.>> Social media blew up with attacks: I was compared to a Nazi (that’s original), Brave Books was accused of trying to “confuse and demoralize children,” our supporters were described as “bored moms/busybodies who need something to feel good about,” and on and on. I can’t even print most things these radicals said because it’s so vile.In the end we got two libraries to reverse course by reminding them that their censorship violated the Constitution of the United States.And thousands of parents and grandparents brought their little ones to those Story Hours where we pledged allegiance to the flag, sang “God Bless America,” and read wholesome and Godly books.It was incredible.But here’s the greatest part...From there, parents and grandparents started asking Brave Books how they could host Story Hours of their own.So Brave Books has organized a nationwide grassroots “See You at the Library” movement to take back our libraries. Now with the guidance of Brave Books, committed conservatives just like you book event rooms at their local library for conservative Story Hours that fill children’s hearts with goodness, gratitude, and God.And whenever we can, Brave Books authors like swimmer Riley Gaines, TV personality Missy Robertson, and myself stand shoulder-to-shoulder with conservative parents, grandparents, and patriots at these Story Hours......for a very simple mission – to reject the Left’s radical ideas and reclaim childhood innocence in America’s libraries.And our ambitious goal is to expand our “See You at the Library” movement to reach over 100,000 children in the next year.Which is why we need you! __**[_I hope you’ll be able to give a sponsorship gift of $35, $50, $75, $100, $150 or more today._..](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=faddb572454d481680128dbd3320accc&_e=esMaMIEgJbGduZuyOS7hq_lPBK59oG-7esIxnBc5PHBlD1eQl0YR2fEHGQfuM3bfbutkK-rATxFVuQWiQjHvxB_eaU-aUIUWLdumS-muLZQGZZwId0QcPaLrMDAK06oAT9-Wo4txYSzFsC0y9BsnVwtsl6kVzJe-WG0qkcUKYIgFr1lHU7HhYYHVGQTFQoU2mAJjUudCVTK4689Zwmq8jkJsZJFvKFd8IIgixY8sxYmioH68wqXg6G37AnM-1ALXmQCN7IyocEPJZe52Af65n8AjduBvC7CmWfg4oilDV2AOoJseuGVkenWdAbZghk5WHbdu9N2gE-rhCUzpqVU3LTsG1yHscsNKYq0ItuAA1T8bMnmyExJocVoq1_iKKexEGiJfpkKaH93pfCV7f0YqBw%3D%3D)**Your sponsorship gift will be used to send a “Story Hour Kit” to every parent, grandparent, and patriot who’s organizing an event at their library.The kit includes everything they need to bring your conservative values back into our public libraries: instructions for booking their library space and running their Story Hour, small American flags for the little ones, fun stickers, wholesome books, Bible memory verse cards, and other specialty items. Brave Books is a small Christian company. They don’t have the millions behind them like the giant taxpayer-funded ALA.Your sponsorship gift is the only way we can fund our Story Hours for over 100,000 children to counter the radical leftists who’ve taken control of our libraries. Knowing that, **_[_please consider a sponsorship gift of $175._](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=faddb572454d481680128dbd3320accc&_e=esMaMIEgJbGduZuyOS7hq_lPBK59oG-7esIxnBc5PHBlD1eQl0YR2fEHGQfuM3bfbutkK-rATxFVuQWiQjHvxB_eaU-aUIUWLdumS-muLZQGZZwId0QcPaLrMDAK06oAT9-Wo4txYSzFsC0y9BsnVwtsl6kVzJe-WG0qkcUKYIgFr1lHU7HhYYHVGQTFQoU2mAJjUudCVTK4689Zwmq8jkJsZJFvKFd8IIgixY8sxYm-IvIX0rZJT3dNSY6O7NSRFhGrG1dvbItyqSDJMEI1tdWOpMrJi-MJFVi5DWPKw-HvJF0SonHXXhDDup-WDXGlKGfkgv6d3owle12a4vfECRPBoTzaVe50yIlk16RaNrOCAY01U7bbLx1eRSO7AU7-ctL7ZaVkzjFRUmYoFEiymA%3D%3D)_** That’s enough to sponsor one entire “Story Hour Kit” yourself. Singlehandedly, you’ll be reaching 50 children with our wholesome, Godly, and patriotic message. **_[Whatever you can give whether it’s $35, $175, or anything higher or lower will be necessary for the success of the next “Story Hour Kit” to be sent.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=faddb572454d481680128dbd3320accc&_e=esMaMIEgJbGduZuyOS7hq_lPBK59oG-7esIxnBc5PHBlD1eQl0YR2fEHGQfuM3bfbutkK-rATxFVuQWiQjHvxB_eaU-aUIUWLdumS-muLZQGZZwId0QcPaLrMDAK06oAT9-Wo4txYSzFsC0y9BsnVwtsl6kVzJe-WG0qkcUKYIgFr1lHU7HhYYHVGQTFQoU2mAJjUudCVTK4689Zwmq8jkJsZJFvKFd8IIgixY8sxYnGk7UViZqwLRntKbSSN1lckHT4PuN6Duilg8trwEFUy458WLcMobzPlcSMIibU3YRgMZr4pxlQkgF7zX2axD2ZoayMLXOiDncwfAEuWTgvC6cCSkJ-gqrJp_hmmFuKsUHkGr5gCf6laYgHbVTg3CHVr24dygWa7YqkgVqBoOzLeA%3D%3D)_**

| | Peter, my heart breaks for the millions of Floridians who will continue to be affected by Ron DeSantis’ abortion ban. Over 6 million Floridians – 57% of ballots cast – voted YES to codify the right to an abortion into law. But DeSantis had set a 60% threshold to pass. We won on the merits, and lost on a fascist technicality. But let’s make one thing clear, Peter: I know in my heart that this fight is not over. **A clear majority of voters made their voices heard,_in favor of freedom_. Countless organizers, volunteers, and activists poured their heart and souls into restoring rights for millions of Floridians. We can’t give up on them.** Our fight for reproductive freedom in Florida goes on. And it can start with a wave of donations to folks doing the direct, on-the-ground work of providing care. **Organizations like Florida Access Network are advocating for reproductive justice, providing Floridians with logistical support and pathways to abortion access. After this week, they need our support now more than ever.** [**_That's why today, on Giving Tuesday, I’m asking you to donate to the Florida Access Network so they can continue providing critical resources to Floridians in need. Can you rush a donation right now? >>_**](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/A9rjS_Z2mjq6bU39-Oczuw~~/AAPPAAA~/RgRpMfYKP0SUaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZmxhY2Nlc3NuZXR3b3JrLm9yZy9kb25hdGU_Y2RtYz0ycGlwbTAybEJRWlRnUTZKVllPQXpuUDRFdlgmcmVmY29kZTI9MnBpcG0wMmxCUVpUZ1E2SlZZT0F6blA0RXZYJnJlZmNvZGVjZG1jPTJwaXBtMDJsQlFaVGdRNkpWWU9Bem5QNEV2WFcDc3BjQgpnRgpxT2cdsHWJUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAaQ~~) Thank you, Maxwell Frost

We can’t give up on them. Our fight for reproductive freedom in Florida goes on. And it can start with a wave of donations to folks doing the direct, on-the-ground work of providing care. Organizations like Florida Access Network are advocating for reproductive justice, providing Floridians with logistical support and pathways to abortion access. After this week, they need our support now more than ever. ~~ Thank you, Maxwell Frost | ~ Maxwell Alejandro Frost is an organizer representing Florida's 10th Congressional District. In 2022, he made history to become the first member of Gen Z elected to Congress. Maxwell isn't taking any corporate PAC, big sugar, or fossil fuel contributions. He needs your help to protect this seat for poor and working-class people. Will you join our historic movement today? | ~~ ~~ ~ | PAID FOR BY MAXWELL FROST FOR CONGRESS Maxwell Frost for Congress PO Box 772671 Orlando, FL 32877-2671 United States | Email is an important way for us to communicate with our supporters. You can .

name: Michael Baumgartner
subject: You helped make us one of the top performing campaigns in the country
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vote Baumgartner for Congress | (509) 370-8398 | www
body:
We won by almost 21.5% | | | | |
---
| | | | | Friends,
All the votes have been counted and I’m thrilled to report that we won our election for Congress in Eastern Washington by nearly 21.5%.
---
| To put this result in perspective, consider that President Trump won the district by only 7%. Pundits routinely rate the district as “R+8” and our result makes this campaign one of the top performing ones in the country. I cannot tell you the difference it makes in DC to join the Conference with such a big win. IT WOULD NOT HAVE HAPPENED WITHOUT YOUR HELP. Thank you!
We are at a crossroads in our nation’s history. With Republicans in control of the White House, the Senate and the House, we have a rare opportunity to advance an agenda that secures the border, unleashes American Energy, reduces job-killing regulations and fights back against the woke agenda. **I’m thrilled at what we are going to be able to do in the first 100 days of the new Congress for our country.**
[But, now I need your help again.](https://hotmail.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=91b93e6889137ccb3f3fef037&id=95e81b975b&e=5a45b9550e) We had to spend heavily to achieve our victory, drawing down our campaign funds to a low level. **It’s imperative that we begin to fundraise NOW to protect Eastern Washington in the next election cycle.**
_But there’s another task before us_. Republicans will hold a razor thin 2-vote majority in the House of Representatives next year. And, if history is any guide, it will be hard to keep that majority in the 2026 midterm elections. That’s why we’re scouring the country for seats that are winnable for Republicans.
Two of those seats are here in Washington. I intend to help raise the funding necessary for Republicans to win back Congressional seats in CD3 (Southwest Washington near Vancouver) and CD 8 (the area spanning the Cascades). Both districts were held by Republicans recently, but are now held by Democrats.
**We can win them back!** Our campaign has shown how the right Republican candidate with the right strategy can far outperform national trends. We will help put this together.
[But, winning also requires strong financial support and I need you to help me raise the funding needed to show folks across the nation that Republicans can and will win in Washington.](https://hotmail.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=91b93e6889137ccb3f3fef037&id=fa83b0a5f5&e=5a45b9550e)
I also intend to help raise funding that will benefit legislative and local races as well. It’s not that long ago that I helped Republicans win the majority and take control of the State Senate. I know that we can do it again.
[Can you help the winning continue by becoming one of my first donors to help defend my seat and to help go on offense here in Washington?](https://hotmail.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=91b93e6889137ccb3f3fef037&id=cb4858d1f3&e=5a45b9550e)
Please consider donating today [here](https://hotmail.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=91b93e6889137ccb3f3fef037&id=13c9f2688a&e=5a45b9550e).
**Please help me stay on offense.**
_With Gratitude,_ Michael
---
[DONATE](https://hotmail.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=91b93e6889137ccb3f3fef037&id=e9e031d51a&e=5a45b9550e)
|

Our mailing address is: Vote Baumgartner for Congress, PO Box 8508, Spokane, WA 99203

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98105499/515573802/-926250309?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NWVhM2E5MS1iOWIxLWVmMTEtODhjZi02MDQ1YmRmZThkMjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fHXzbTAGp27T9YwQ_NbBKJY0JxGqdwXS8dIzE4CDNJI=&emci=94ecf1a4-b7b1-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&emdi=95ea3a91-b9b1-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&ceid=24635485)
Hi friend, I’m proud to announce that Maryland has been named the **top state in the country for minority-owned small businesses.** Thanks to programs we’ve established, like the Small, Minority, and Women-Owned Business Account, we’ve supported over 170 businesses and nearly 2,600 jobs. This is only the beginning, friend. To continue making this Maryland’s decade, we’re continuing to fight for economic growth all across the state. We’re about to hit a significant challenge, however — a fundraising freeze that begins in January. This means that we are relying solely on the money that we can raise between now and January 10th to power our work, and we need to raise as much as possible. [**Friend, will you please make a contribution to my campaign so we can power the future of our state?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98105507/515573811/1674579968?refcode=em20241203-1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NWVhM2E5MS1iOWIxLWVmMTEtODhjZi02MDQ1YmRmZThkMjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fHXzbTAGp27T9YwQ_NbBKJY0JxGqdwXS8dIzE4CDNJI=) | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

clean_body: Hi friend, I’m proud to announce that Maryland has been named the top state in the country for minority-owned small businesses. Thanks to programs we’ve established, like the Small, Minority, and Women-Owned Business Account, we’ve supported over 170 businesses and nearly 2,600 jobs. This is only the beginning, friend. To continue making this Maryland’s decade, we’re continuing to fight for economic growth all across the state. We’re about to hit a significant challenge, however — a fundraising freeze that begins in January. This means that we are relying solely on the money that we can raise between now and January 10th to power our work, and we need to raise as much as possible. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Elevate, Wes

name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: A verse-by-verse explanation of Revelation
body:
Do you ever despair that Jesus will never return?
| | | [](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=27bc193bfaa6419987b4d9578ba67615&_e=PypTk5uCaGP8vIwPBtdHtEb3NkQuKmlBEz-We8lo6HaKDSQQgbNx1q3o-Yo70aKs-HhBACxdW_U7MyyuAXbENmcCI_IQzv6D5AhbgmI5DLcZAMD_HQ-VaJDEu5HLbxGIu4OQ7zn2G4pkxc76qn_OIiLuP29Ete-VwfGjqqbXRsEka3dDA7gFWIwybI9YFb9w3iK6_hCLx2FZ2ipzLW9orDos86HyiCsB2j1xz-XvQvGkp6NqCfn40G2DPOLrra3NLc_npLUa4DwQm7TG4IVYdFNSQmjaE_I4DdoULc06G5OJgvXOxco6x9o5MzAWenyX7C8uVS_s46S97yFYgp-ronyUzgo_17endHfYLso9Ehd_blUMxLQx7NC9hA2u-cqwVbc15y43f0XzMqzHT3LhEQ%3D%3D)
---
Hello Friend, Do you ever despair that Jesus will never return? _When we all get to Heaven, what a day of rejoicing that will be!_ _When we all see Jesus, we’ll sing and shout the victory!_ The words of this old hymn say it perfectly ... Christ’s return is going to be glorious! **But between now and then, how should we live**? What does God’s Word say about end times? As the world grows increasingly sinful ... **what should our response be?**
---
| | When I have those kinds of questions, I turn to the book of Revelation, which I’ve found helps provide answers and strength in these dark days. And today, I’m pleased to offer you my verse-by-verse study of the book of Revelation entitled _Final Conquest._ Final Conquest is my first commentary on the book of Revelation. It’s all about the return of Jesus Christ, the most hope-filled event in human history. This book will help you face the future with confidence! God doesn’t want you to live in fear. Final Conquest will unpack God’s plan as never before — you’ll be encouraged!
---
| [](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=27bc193bfaa6419987b4d9578ba67615&_e=PypTk5uCaGP8vIwPBtdHtEb3NkQuKmlBEz-We8lo6HaKDSQQgbNx1q3o-Yo70aKs-HhBACxdW_U7MyyuAXbENmcCI_IQzv6D5AhbgmI5DLcZAMD_HQ-VaJDEu5HLbxGIu4OQ7zn2G4pkxc76qn_OIiLuP29Ete-VwfGjqqbXRsEka3dDA7gFWIwybI9YFb9w3iK6_hCLx2FZ2ipzLW9orDos86HyiCsB2j1xz-XvQvHxcDeDmd62uRCup6meXArGQBIgOMomACPLR-qLFLMSf1nMGTaEcM1Mej96z-3xtcMTycaTctUtDR75aRzzWbvjRgGYir0nwpu_-LoslwOSkWNFXOW86Xze51fmn1exIBIi_ueRlu0vHdh9Q4hlWQB4o_onO0JR58S-H8XU1EhFcg%3D%3D)
---
| | With your generous donation to _Pathway to Victory_ \-- to help keep our ministry strong, for you and your family, and for listeners and viewers across the country--I will send you a copy of _Final Conquest_ for free! You can make your most generous donation here: [https://secure.ptv.org/final-conquest-generous-gift-kit-1](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=27bc193bfaa6419987b4d9578ba67615&_e=PypTk5uCaGP8vIwPBtdHtEb3NkQuKmlBEz-We8lo6HaKDSQQgbNx1q3o-Yo70aKs-HhBACxdW_U7MyyuAXbENmcCI_IQzv6D5AhbgmI5DLcZAMD_HQ-VaJDEu5HLbxGIu4OQ7zn2G4pkxc76qn_OIiLuP29Ete-VwfGjqqbXRsEka3dDA7gFWIwybI9YFb9w3iK6_hCLx2FZ2ipzLW9orDos86HyiCsB2j1xz-XvQvEEc_EFmVW_U6LOYDOeC3jTku8kZt0nI3y7dtwXswF5bfjSqUFViYX2zlyWkgFtkXa7G8iyleerao_hHjLe0zwW9vmFaJuX1S2ZG3WrM7h82fdeL-e9d8o4mUyMJneixljogc5QzYHOzKpr9J7MH0q1cCqEdxdggdg9A7yIotfDug%3D%3D) One day soon the darkness will pass...and our long-awaited King of kings and Lord of lords will return and make His final conquest. Until that moment, we are focusing our hope on Christ and working together to proclaim the gospel and expand His coming kingdom. Sincerely, Dr. Robert Jeffress Senior Pastor, First Baptist Dallas

Dear Peter,
**Imagine:** a flourishing forest, where ancient redwoods stand side-by-side with young saplings. The smell of salt air, the sound of birds overhead, animals scurry beneath the canopy. An extension of the California Coastal Trail that will allow residents and visitors alike to enjoy the uniquely Californian views of the Sonoma Coast Redwoods.
**Now, think of the alternative:** harmful development destroying the unique biodiversity and stunning beauty of Sonoma Coast Redwoods. Private coastal homes cutting off access to these lands to all but a privileged few.
**We have the power to choose the future of this iconic place. We have the power to save Sonoma Coast Redwoods—forever.[Make your Giving TREESday gift to Save the Redwoods League and it will be matched 2 to 1, up to $100,000.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98106196/515575728/471999250?contactdata=/rFKePorfXyFWTalTWYUvJrzaYCtn5FKUl8hdP81+Bzo+sL3aD5AQxWCkr2ZWJJqa2pQbjn6g1FVh9tc+N75YP+vh7oac8MpEHg/JDrSlZuaPMtY5YeHYQ/4NTp5vRKwNwU6RFQlVPRboCpVKAYP18V1CaR+UWY+ghidadxO99w=&ms=GT24_EM6_Link1&sourceid=1166159&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9TVFJXTC9TVFJXTC8xLzg5NTc0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjViNTc2NDNiLWJiYjEtZWYxMS04OGNmLTYwNDViZGZlOGQyOSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=KKtu4KBAJuN9CPyx-BzQB4-Hzcfxk4OohgdyemhpC34=&emci=d90ede28-ccac-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&emdi=5b57643b-bbb1-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&ceid=1504551)**

clean_body: 🌲 + 🌊 + YOU = 😍 Dear Peter, Imagine: a flourishing forest, where ancient redwoods stand side-by-side with young saplings. The smell of salt air, the sound of birds overhead, animals scurry beneath the canopy. An extension of the California Coastal Trail that will allow residents and visitors alike to enjoy the uniquely Californian views of the Sonoma Coast Redwoods. Now, think of the alternative: harmful development destroying the unique biodiversity and stunning beauty of Sonoma Coast Redwoods. Private coastal homes cutting off access to these lands to all but a privileged few. We have the power to choose the future of this iconic place. We have the power to save Sonoma Coast Redwoods—forever. Your gift today matters more than you may realize. For starters, the property the League is seeking to acquire is more than 1,600 acres — twice the size of Central Park. That’s a lot of land, filled to the brim with valuable and unique biodiversity, and 836 acres of redwood forests that store massive amounts of planet-warming carbon. These forests are of the highest conservation priority and set to thrive in the decades to come— Saving the Sonoma Coast Redwoods would protect our past, enrich the present, and safeguard our future with critical climate benefits. But with the threat of encroaching development, we must act NOW. Don’t miss out on this opportunity to help save and protect a truly iconic redwood landscape along California's rugged coast Sincerely, | Kate Berry Director of Annual Giving ---|--- P.S. Giving TREESday is a special day of giving to the redwood forests we all love. Thank you for being as generous as you can to help protect Sonoma Coast Redwoods. | Save the Redwoods League 111 Sutter Street, 11th Floor San Francisco, CA 94104 United States tel:415-362-2352 | | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- |

name: Sarah McBride
subject: My husband, Andy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
I know with your help, we can overcome the challenges in front of us and deliver for working people.
Hi Peter, it’s Sarah McBride.
**I didn’t run for Congress to talk about which bathroom I use.** I ran to advocate for the people who are facing life’s biggest challenges and those who love them.
**People like my husband, Andy.**
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/84436?refcode=em20241203-8685&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=8685%2E614464%2E-PsXuo)
When Andy was diagnosed with cancer just one year into our relationship, I became his primary caregiver — with him through the ups and the downs, making sure that he had everything he needed, and in the end, holding his hand as he passed away.
I know how difficult it is to balance a full-time job with taking care of someone I love because I lived it. Being a caregiver is the most important role I’ve ever had. In many ways, we were lucky.
Paid leave allowed him to focus on the full-time job of getting care. And my employer’s flexibility allowed me to be there by his side to care for him.
Through our struggle, and sharing with others, I came across so many other families who simply didn’t have that same benefit. Patients who were forced to choose between their job and their health care. Parents going back to work days after giving birth. Family members who had to choose between their paycheck and their loved one’s needs.
My experience with Andy anchored so much of my work as a state senator in Delaware — from getting paid leave passed to expanding healthcare in rural communities.
But there is so much more our government must do to support people when hard times hit and to do something about the very real pain so many feel across our country.
That’s why I ran for Congress, and that’s what you can count on me to fight for in Washington — and I won’t get distracted by the people who are trying to divide our country with their agenda of hate.
**[I know with your help, we can overcome the challenges in front of us and deliver for working people. If you’re with me, please split a $10 contribution between my campaign and Lucas Kunce today.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/84436?refcode=em20241203-8685&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=8685%2E614464%2E-PsXuo)**

clean_body: I know with your help, we can overcome the challenges in front of us and deliver for working people. Hi Peter, it’s Sarah McBride. I didn’t run for Congress to talk about which bathroom I use. I ran to advocate for the people who are facing life’s biggest challenges and those who love them. People like my husband, Andy. When Andy was diagnosed with cancer just one year into our relationship, I became his primary caregiver — with him through the ups and the downs, making sure that he had everything he needed, and in the end, holding his hand as he passed away. I know how difficult it is to balance a full-time job with taking care of someone I love because I lived it. Being a caregiver is the most important role I’ve ever had. In many ways, we were lucky. Paid leave allowed him to focus on the full-time job of getting care. And my employer’s flexibility allowed me to be there by his side to care for him. Through our struggle, and sharing with others, I came across so many other families who simply didn’t have that same benefit. Patients who were forced to choose between their job and their health care. Parents going back to work days after giving birth. Family members who had to choose between their paycheck and their loved one’s needs. My experience with Andy anchored so much of my work as a state senator in Delaware — from getting paid leave passed to expanding healthcare in rural communities. But there is so much more our government must do to support people when hard times hit and to do something about the very real pain so many feel across our country. That’s why I ran for Congress, and that’s what you can count on me to fight for in Washington — and I won’t get distracted by the people who are trying to divide our country with their agenda of hate. If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: Thank you, Sarah McBride Delaware’s Congresswoman-elect Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri

| Hi—

We're down to the wire. [**This Giving Tuesday ends tonight at midnight, and so does your chance to TRIPLE your impact for the climate.**](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3104589/87SdQ4wZ) |
| [](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3104590/87SdQ4wZ) |
