| **Here's why your gift matters:** We're at a pivotal moment for the future of climate action. While polluters and climate deniers plot their comeback, Evergreen Action is cementing progress that will be almost impossible to undo. And we're not the only ones saying that.

**The Atlantic** describes Evergreen as "very influential, in terms of figuring out how to take the broader ideas of the progressive climate movement and turn [them] into actual laws that can be passed." And Giving Green agrees, calling Evergreen "an excellent choice" for donors like you, because of our "impressive achievements" and record of "strong work" driving U.S. climate policy forward.

With your help, we're not just winning—we're ensuring those wins last.

[**Triple your gift before midnight to make sure no progress is left on the table.**](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3104591/87SdQ4wZ)

Every dollar you give tonight fuels our strategy: |
---
|
* **Defending the Inflation Reduction Act** , the biggest climate law in U.S. history, from industry attacks and climate deniers in Congress.
* **Supercharging state-level leadership** with strategic policy roadmaps and strong advocacy rooted in local partnerships and coalitions.
* **Holding Big Oil accountable** —from the boardrooms to the streets.
* **Building coalitions that can't be ignored** to protect our wins and make them stick for decades to come.

|
---
| Big Oil and its allies are counting on us to falter, but they've underestimated the strength of this movement. **With your tripled support, we can outlast them, outwork them, and outsmart them.** Together, we'll show President Biden and lawmakers across the country that the public mandate for bold climate action is unshakable.

**But it starts with you—and it has to happen now.**

This is your last chance to make your gift go three times as far. Let's show the world what’s possible when we fight like our future depends on it. [**Triple your impact before midnight!**](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3104592/87SdQ4wZ) |
[ ](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3104593/87SdQ4wZ)
---
---
| Thank you for being part of this movement. You're the reason we've been able to achieve historic victories—and why we'll keep fighting until every battle is won.

In solidarity, |
---
| | |

### Beth Poole
Senior Director of Fundraising
Evergreen Action

name: Wiley Nickel
subject: Peter, can you please read my op-ed about the damage GOP gerrymandering has done in NC — and how we can fight back?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wiley Nickel for North Carolina**
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98106871/515577842/-488448398?refcode=AU_GWN_CL_GEN_GEN_AC_20241203_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODMxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNGI3YjgwZC1iZGIxLWVmMTEtODhjZi02MDQ1YmRmZThkMjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3U9oxcTua2ZfN0mCHs3nr-9OmYDZ6GrPJFwCFeaZU7A=)
---
Peter, MAGA Republicans will hold their razor-thin US House majority — giving Donald Trump unified control of government — by just 3 seats. _The number of seats Raleigh Republicans flipped red through partisan gerrymandering? 3 seats._ In other words, our Republican-led legislature’s manipulation of North Carolina’s congressional maps directly upended the balance of power in Washington. I wrote an **[op-ed in Raleigh News& Observer](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98106872/515577843/2018678611?refcode=AU_GWN_CL_GEN_GEN_AC_20241203_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODMxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNGI3YjgwZC1iZGIxLWVmMTEtODhjZi02MDQ1YmRmZThkMjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3U9oxcTua2ZfN0mCHs3nr-9OmYDZ6GrPJFwCFeaZU7A=&emci=30a5807a-ddb0-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&emdi=a4b7b80d-bdb1-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&ceid=28008880)** outlining how we got here and how we can fight back. It's copied below, and I hope you'll take a moment to read it. — Wiley
| **RALEIGH NEWS & OBSERVER**
**[NC Congressman: Republicans stole fairness from the nation in giving GOP a House majority](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98106873/515577844/2018678611?refcode=AU_GWN_CL_GEN_GEN_AC_20241203_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODMxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNGI3YjgwZC1iZGIxLWVmMTEtODhjZi02MDQ1YmRmZThkMjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3U9oxcTua2ZfN0mCHs3nr-9OmYDZ6GrPJFwCFeaZU7A=&emci=30a5807a-ddb0-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&emdi=a4b7b80d-bdb1-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&ceid=28008880)**
Opinion | Wiley Nickel North Carolina is a state of balance, a true purple state. With our nearly 50-50 split between Democrats and Republicans, North Carolinians expect fairness when it comes to how their voices are represented in Congress. But the Republican-controlled legislature’s latest gerrymandered election maps did more than just silence voters in North Carolina. They reshaped the balance of power in Washington D.C., costing Democrats control of the U.S. House of Representatives. Here’s the reality: the congressional map we used to have, with a 7-7 Republican-Democratic split, reflected the true political makeup of our state. It was fair. It gave voters on both sides confidence that their voices mattered. But that wasn’t good enough for legislative Republicans in Raleigh. They threw fairness out the window, forcing through a mid-decade map that handed Republicans an unfair 10-4 advantage in the next Congress. That’s 71% of North Carolina’s seats in the U.S. House going to Republicans and those 10 bright red districts were not even close. It doesn’t take a mathematician to see what’s wrong with that. And now, with Adam Gray’s apparent victory in California’s 13th District giving Republicans a bare three-seat majority in the U.S. House, it’s clear that gerrymandering in North Carolina tipped the scales in their favor and cost Democrats control of the US House of Representatives. My district along with the districts of Jeff Jackson and Kathy Manning were turned into safe Republican seats where Democrats had zero chance to win. Had North Carolina sent the three of us back to Washington, under fair maps, then New York Rep. Hakeem Jeffries would be our next Speaker of the House with a one seat Democratic majority at 218-217. Let’s be clear. This wasn’t an accident. This was by design. Republicans in Congress can give North Carolina Speaker Tim Moore a big wet kiss when he gets to Washington. Not only did he draw himself a safe Republican seat, but he gave Republicans the three House seats that became the difference in control of Congress. The MAGA Republicans in Raleigh who drew these maps didn’t care about reflecting the will of the people. They cared about power. They used the redistricting process to rig the system, taking advantage of their supermajority to draw lines that would give them three more seats — no matter what the voters wanted. But voters deserve better. They deserve a system where their voices are heard, where their votes matter, and where their representatives are chosen by the people — not by politicians drawing lines behind closed doors. That’s why I’m fighting for my bill, [_the Fair Maps Act_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98106874/515577845/-2044248125?DocumentID=812&refcode=AU_GWN_CL_GEN_GEN_AC_20241203_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODMxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNGI3YjgwZC1iZGIxLWVmMTEtODhjZi02MDQ1YmRmZThkMjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3U9oxcTua2ZfN0mCHs3nr-9OmYDZ6GrPJFwCFeaZU7A=&emci=30a5807a-ddb0-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&emdi=a4b7b80d-bdb1-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&ceid=28008880), which would establish independent, nonpartisan redistricting commissions in every state across the country. These commissions would take the power out of politicians’ hands and ensure that congressional maps are drawn fairly and transparently. The research proves it works. Studies from [Duke University](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98106875/515577846/-389133240?refcode=AU_GWN_CL_GEN_GEN_AC_20241203_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODMxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNGI3YjgwZC1iZGIxLWVmMTEtODhjZi02MDQ1YmRmZThkMjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3U9oxcTua2ZfN0mCHs3nr-9OmYDZ6GrPJFwCFeaZU7A=&emci=30a5807a-ddb0-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&emdi=a4b7b80d-bdb1-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&ceid=28008880) and other nonpartisan institutions show that independent redistricting will create maps that better reflect the actual political makeup of North Carolina. This isn’t about giving one party an advantage. It’s about fairness. It’s about restoring trust in our democracy. When gerrymandering silences voters, the consequences are devastating. Look no further than this year’s election. A gerrymandered North Carolina map didn’t just strip fair representation from our state’s voters — it changed the course of history by giving control of the U.S. House of Representatives to Republicans instead of Democrats. We can’t let this happen again. While I won’t be going back to Congress because of extreme, partisan gerrymandering, I’m not giving up or going out quietly in the fight for fair voting maps. The people of North Carolina and across the country deserve better. They deserve fair maps, a fair system, and a democracy they can trust. It’s time to end gerrymandering once and for all.
---
**HERE'S WHAT'S NEXT:**
North Carolina Democrats have a lot of work ahead of us. We need to organize against the dangerous Trump Administration — from forming a Democratic Shadow Cabinet, to fighting in the courts, to organizing communities on the ground — and we need to get ready to win big in 2026.

clean_body: | = Peter, MAGA Republicans will hold their razor-thin US House majority — giving Donald Trump unified control of government — by just 3 seats. The number of seats Raleigh Republicans flipped red through partisan gerrymandering? 3 seats. In other words, our Republican-led legislature’s manipulation of North Carolina’s congressional maps directly upended the balance of power in Washington. I wrote an outlining how we got here and how we can fight back. It's copied below, and I hope you'll take a moment to read it. — Wiley | RALEIGH NEWS & OBSERVER Opinion | Wiley Nickel North Carolina is a state of balance, a true purple state. With our nearly 50-50 split between Democrats and Republicans, North Carolinians expect fairness when it comes to how their voices are represented in Congress. But the Republican-controlled legislature’s latest gerrymandered election maps did more than just silence voters in North Carolina. They reshaped the balance of power in Washington D.C., costing Democrats control of the U.S. House of Representatives. Here’s the reality: the congressional map we used to have, with a 7-7 Republican-Democratic split, reflected the true political makeup of our state. It was fair. It gave voters on both sides confidence that their voices mattered. But that wasn’t good enough for legislative Republicans in Raleigh. They threw fairness out the window, forcing through a mid-decade map that handed Republicans an unfair 10-4 advantage in the next Congress. That’s 71% of North Carolina’s seats in the U.S. House going to Republicans and those 10 bright red districts were not even close. It doesn’t take a mathematician to see what’s wrong with that. And now, with Adam Gray’s apparent victory in California’s 13th District giving Republicans a bare three-seat majority in the U.S. House, it’s clear that gerrymandering in North Carolina tipped the scales in their favor and cost Democrats control of the US House of Representatives. My district along with the districts of Jeff Jackson and Kathy Manning were turned into safe Republican seats where Democrats had zero chance to win. Had North Carolina sent the three of us back to Washington, under fair maps, then New York Rep. Hakeem Jeffries would be our next Speaker of the House with a one seat Democratic majority at 218-217. Let’s be clear. This wasn’t an accident. This was by design. Republicans in Congress can give North Carolina Speaker Tim Moore a big wet kiss when he gets to Washington. Not only did he draw himself a safe Republican seat, but he gave Republicans the three House seats that became the difference in control of Congress. The MAGA Republicans in Raleigh who drew these maps didn’t care about reflecting the will of the people. They cared about power. They used the redistricting process to rig the system, taking advantage of their supermajority to draw lines that would give them three more seats — no matter what the voters wanted. But voters deserve better. They deserve a system where their voices are heard, where their votes matter, and where their representatives are chosen by the people — not by politicians drawing lines behind closed doors. That’s why I’m fighting for my bill, , which would establish independent, nonpartisan redistricting commissions in every state across the country. These commissions would take the power out of politicians’ hands and ensure that congressional maps are drawn fairly and transparently. The research proves it works. Studies from and other nonpartisan institutions show that independent redistricting will create maps that better reflect the actual political makeup of North Carolina. This isn’t about giving one party an advantage. It’s about fairness. It’s about restoring trust in our democracy. When gerrymandering silences voters, the consequences are devastating. Look no further than this year’s election. A gerrymandered North Carolina map didn’t just strip fair representation from our state’s voters — it changed the course of history by giving control of the U.S. House of Representatives to Republicans instead of Democrats. We can’t let this happen again. While I won’t be going back to Congress because of extreme, partisan gerrymandering, I’m not giving up or going out quietly in the fight for fair voting maps. The people of North Carolina and across the country deserve better. They deserve fair maps, a fair system, and a democracy they can trust. It’s time to end gerrymandering once and for all. HERE'S WHAT'S NEXT: North Carolina Democrats have a lot of work ahead of us. We need to organize against the dangerous Trump Administration — from forming a Democratic Shadow Cabinet, to fighting in the courts, to organizing communities on the ground — and we need to get ready to win big in 2026. Your continued support is critical as America starts this trying new chapter.= If you've saved payment information with ActBlue, your donation to Wiley Nickel will process immediately: ** | = = | = = | = = Wiley Nickel for North Carolina PO Box 563 Raleigh, NC 27602 United States ** | mailto:info@wileynickel.com | Paid for by Wiley Nickel for North Carolina

| | **Budzinski Calls Out Predatory Drug Middlemen for Squeezing Out Rural Community Pharmacists**
_— RiverBender.com, November 20, 2024_
* * *
_Congresswoman Budzinski is a cosponsor of the bipartisan Pharmacists Fight Back Act, which would remove the ability of PBMs to restrict patient choice through network exclusions and protects community pharmacists by prohibiting PBMs from steering patients toward PBM-affiliated pharmacies. She is also a cosponsor of the Drug Price Transparency in Medicaid Act and voted to help pass the Lower Costs, More Transparency Act, both of which would ban spread pricing and require price transparency for PBMs._ | [SIGN ON](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98106974/515578204/-848322083?refcode=AU_NJB_EG_GEN_PET_AC120_20241203_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MGVmMmE2OS1iZGIxLWVmMTEtODhjZi02MDQ1YmRmZThkMjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eLng9afOzkjN5eBLwx5ii4v279FNk0V-h5kvzPbOd_4=&emci=46ef2a69-bdb1-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&emdi=50ef2a69-bdb1-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&ceid=13891387)
---
Last month was Rural Health Month, and Nikki took the House floor to stand in support of the bipartisan _Pharmacists Fight Back_ to help small and rural pharmacists fight back against unfair and anticompetitive business practices by huge, predatory drug middlemen called Pharmacy Benefit Managers (PBMs).
PBMs act as middlemen and inflate drug prices, hurting the pockets of everyday folks who are relying on affordable prescriptions. PBMs have forced independent pharmacies that have operated for decades to close, expanding care deserts, and leaving folks high and dry.
**[If you’re with us and want to put an end to this predatory practice, will you add your name and support the Pharmacists Fight Back Act?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98106975/515578205/-848322083?refcode=AU_NJB_EG_GEN_PET_AC120_20241203_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MGVmMmE2OS1iZGIxLWVmMTEtODhjZi02MDQ1YmRmZThkMjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eLng9afOzkjN5eBLwx5ii4v279FNk0V-h5kvzPbOd_4=&emci=46ef2a69-bdb1-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&emdi=50ef2a69-bdb1-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&ceid=13891387)**

clean_body: | = | | Budzinski Calls Out Predatory Drug Middlemen for Squeezing Out Rural Community Pharmacists — RiverBender.com, November 20, 2024 Congresswoman Budzinski is a cosponsor of the bipartisan Pharmacists Fight Back Act, which would remove the ability of PBMs to restrict patient choice through network exclusions and protects community pharmacists by prohibiting PBMs from steering patients toward PBM-affiliated pharmacies. She is also a cosponsor of the Drug Price Transparency in Medicaid Act and voted to help pass the Lower Costs, More Transparency Act, both of which would ban spread pricing and require price transparency for PBMs. | Last month was Rural Health Month, and Nikki took the House floor to stand in support of the bipartisan Pharmacists Fight Back to help small and rural pharmacists fight back against unfair and anticompetitive business practices by huge, predatory drug middlemen called Pharmacy Benefit Managers (PBMs). PBMs act as middlemen and inflate drug prices, hurting the pockets of everyday folks who are relying on affordable prescriptions. PBMs have forced independent pharmacies that have operated for decades to close, expanding care deserts, and leaving folks high and dry. — Team Nikki | = Nikki for Congress PO Box 5171 Springfield, IL 62705 United States | mailto:info@nikkiforcongress.com Paid for by Nikki Budzinski for Congress

| | On this important day of giving, we hope you’ll support Fair Fight Action’s work to protect voting rights here in Georgia and across the country. When we have the freedom to take our seat at the table and our place at the ballot box, we can elect leaders who govern in our interests, ensure every voice is heard, and make the promise of democracy real for us all. [**Here are three things your Giving Tuesday donation to Fair Fight Action’s Civic Education and Voter Protection Fund can help achieve:**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98107341/515579529/297579042?refcode=bsc_emm_ffa_20241203_f_GivingTuesday1winner_v1s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNmM2MGFlNS1iZGIxLWVmMTEtODhjZi02MDQ1YmRmZThkMjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Dz_nlOyyImfZ9qeeS574hwN4tIS5AFeucPw6VuCCpzA=)
1. De-escalating threats, harassment, and intimidation around elections in Georgia and across the country — including convening a national coalition around de-escalation.
2. Ensuring that Georgia voters have accurate, up-to-date information about vote-by-mail procedures and early in-person voting locations, through an online one-stop-shop and voter education efforts focused on Black, brown, and young Georgia voters.
3. Providing voting rights and voter protection partners, as well as the public, with up-to-date information about the impact of voting-related laws and litigation.

| [DONATE NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98107342/515579530/297579042?refcode=bsc_emm_ffa_20241203_f_GivingTuesday1winner_v1s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNmM2MGFlNS1iZGIxLWVmMTEtODhjZi02MDQ1YmRmZThkMjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Dz_nlOyyImfZ9qeeS574hwN4tIS5AFeucPw6VuCCpzA=)

[**What do you say? Can voters count on your support today to help make their voices heard in 2025 and beyond? **$5.**
That’s the amount I’m asking you to contribute to my campaign today.
$5, because the GOP now controls the White House, Senate, AND the House.
$5, because the moment they regain power, they’ll push forward with their full-blown agenda: banning abortion, gutting Social Security and Medicare, and attacking our fundamental rights.
$5, because with far-right extremists now in a position to implement their ultraconservative agenda, it’s never been more critical to have progressive attorneys general like me standing in their way.
**I know $5 might not seem like much, but if every fearless fighter on this team contributes, we can continue to fight back against this dangerous far-right plan.**
**[So please, donate $5, or whatever you can, toward my $10,000 goal before midnight. Together, we can stop extremism from taking over our country.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98107401/515579875/-2022193277?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1765-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZmMyMWU3NC1iZWIxLWVmMTEtODhjZi02MDQ1YmRmZThkMjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YLlZ8_NCKTMifGSpXs_iR-axZT4JsPnCoMBtSbSvcW8=)**

clean_body: Anything we raise together up to $50,000 will be matched. | Peter, Did you catch Brianna’s note from earlier today? We have a generous donor who is matching all Giving Tuesday donations up to $50,000. = And here’s an exciting update: We just unlocked an additional $10,000 for the match fund. So, that means anything we raise together up to $60,000 will be matched, dollar for dollar. With so much at stake these next few years, we can’t afford to fall short today.= Thank you, Team All On The Line \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Brianna Shamsuddoha, AOTL <info@democraticredistricting.com> Date: Tues, Dec 3, 2024 Subject: Twice the impact for democracy this Giving Tuesday (2x match) Team, I’m writing today to ask you to include All On The Line in your Giving Tuesday plans. We have a huge opportunity to take advantage of, but we need your help. A generous donor has committed to matching all Giving Tuesday donations [[up to $50,000]]. That means whatever this community raises today — up to $50,000 — will be matched dollar for dollar. Essentially, your donation will have double the impact on efforts to safeguard and strengthen our democracy. = --- = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: --- = | = = | = = | = The investments in this movement to end gerrymandering and restore democracy are paying off: This election, in both Louisiana and Alabama, thanks to the fair maps that were finally put in place after the Allen v. Milligan decision, voters elected two Black members of Congress — ensuring both states are far closer to representation that truly reflects their voters. And in Arizona, the work we did to educate voters helped defeat a ballot initiative that would have essentially ended term limits for state supreme and appellate court judges and locked in extreme partisan court majorities for decades. The months ahead might be even tougher. We need to be ready for concrete threats ahead like Donald Trump and his MAGA allies undermining the census, more attacks on the Voting Rights Act, and ongoing attempts to gerrymander at the state level. We've taken on challenges like this before. Our track record is proof that we know how to effectively fight back — but it's only possible with supporters like you. = Thanks so much, Brianna Shamsuddoha Director of Mobilization is the grassroots advocacy campaign supported by the National Redistricting Action Fund. body:
| | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98107724/515580878/855222454?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTVAvMS85MjA2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMzU4NDFiMy1iZmIxLWVmMTEtODhjZi02MDQ1YmRmZThkMjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zcK9qy0RIsZ6VHMwXKvcisFCuf5I0hwZL18sS3DosBs=&emci=67f60db7-b0b1-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&emdi=335841b3-bfb1-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&ceid=5534179)
---

| | **Next year, every state and local office will become a critical barrier between the rule of law and "anything goes."** Presidential immunity, weakened federal agencies, and appointing friends to positions of power mean that folks like our local state reps and district attorneys and mayors must step up as the last check on corruption and abuse of power. **It's up to all of us – citizens and elected officials alike – to say "we will not comply."** Who we put in local office matters because our local elected officials have the power to decide if they will arrest the homeless for having no shelter, if they will prosecute officials guilty of fraud, bribery, or misconduct, and if they will bar women from crossing state lines to seek an abortion. We are counting on them to uphold the rule of law. And that's why the local elections happening around the country this coming spring are crucial. In fact, the first filing deadlines for local races start as early as next month – that's why we've already begun the work to recruit new candidates so that no race goes uncontested. Action is our only option. _Sarah_ Sarah Long
Director of Development

clean_body: | | | | Next year, every state and local office will become a critical barrier between the rule of law and "anything goes." Presidential immunity, weakened federal agencies, and appointing friends to positions of power mean that folks like our local state reps and district attorneys and mayors must step up as the last check on corruption and abuse of power. It's up to all of us – citizens and elected officials alike – to say "we will not comply." Who we put in local office matters because our local elected officials have the power to decide if they will arrest the homeless for having no shelter, if they will prosecute officials guilty of fraud, bribery, or misconduct, and if they will bar women from crossing state lines to seek an abortion. We are counting on them to uphold the rule of law. And that's why the local elections happening around the country this coming spring are crucial. In fact, the first filing deadlines for local races start as early as next month – that's why we've already begun the work to recruit new candidates so that no race goes uncontested. Action is our only option. Sarah Sarah Long Director of Development Movement Labs | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution to Movement Labs instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | | Paid for by Rapid Resist Action. Contributions to Rapid Resist Action, a 501(c)(4), are not tax deductible for income tax purposes. |

name: David Horowitz Freedom Center
subject: America is on the brink of destruction
body:
When you think of “the enemy within” you may think of Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi or even Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez...and you wouldn’t be wrong.| |
---
| | Fellow Patriot, America is on the brink of destruction. I don’t say this to shock or scare you – I say it because it’s true. _What we see today didn’t happen overnight. It’s the result of a movement that began with the Communist revolution in Russia and has been 100 years in the making..._ **...and Barack Obama hit the accelerator button, fast tracking their agenda.** I’d know better than most. When I was a young man, I was one of the leaders of the movement destroying America today. 50 years ago, I was a Marxist revolutionary bent on bringing America as we know it to an end. I stood side by side with Huey Newton and the leaders of the Black Panthers. I edited _Ramparts_ – radical Left's largest magazine. I marched, wrote manifestos, and attacked America whenever and however I could. Then the Panthers murdered my friend, and the Left helped the Communists win the war in Vietnam. My eyes opened to the incredible destruction and evil my “comrades” made possible. So I left and never looked back. I cast my 1984 ballot for Ronald Reagan – then I started the David Horowitz Freedom Center to fight the Left and I’ve dedicated the last 40 years to exposing them. Why? Because I knew first-hand the threat our country was facing. I knew what was at stake and I knew if I didn’t tell the American people what I knew, we would lose our country forever. That’s why I spent 6 months writing** _The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America_** – and I want you to have your very own copy of it. **[So I’m asking you to stand with me and make a generous, tax-deductible donation of $35 or more to my Freedom Center. As a thank you, I’ll send you a complimentary copy of The Enemy Within.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=97f6d38615524a11a1c0ac5ba8bf373a&_e=K4HL6wNcxnPRtHjW_NQCEYZnIvhKmRD7RzozNJhPCqMB_Ej-Za0nAlWrLtyhxlq8Hd99IpWeQ94AMdnaIWVVA17Yw9rt7cYGAmBq2TqbULCwqSORkU-3BNUwZW40d29Oi9aNS9pQub-EXgh9pBOSagQEuvGAnAfmTXoo_wEdSmaAAPfnTZ0o4XwXcvnVPfY-WZaLNfr-BDMpZ6_-RIESn2jZQ8F2FlsuovGAve4BWG7gl3t5nr_NTdYqDMTmZP66Arr2KT_Xn0rPe-B67kfylAsdXtqXuoV_J_qYvSwvmyaOMgARI8B1N9ExASy61qyJjnUwbtFP-Dm8z33wduJxzYwBriYGOjUyemhXeqI5nsobn6vKOF6tyk7OXDu0QqoLA7hQN-E1o8Uiwi-nDstYgA%3D%3D)** When you think of “the enemy within” you may think of Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi or even Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez...and you wouldn’t be wrong. But make no mistake: **The real mastermind is Barack Obama.** Barack Obama laid the groundwork for everything we’ve seen since 2020 back in 2008. Barack Obama led the destruction of our cities, cozying up to Black Lives Matter radicals and siding with criminals over police upholding the rule of law. Barack Obama championed the castration of our military, making us a laughingstock on the world stage. And Barack Obama was the true architect behind the bogus Russian collusion witch hunt. The devastation and destruction we see today has been over a decade in the making – but most of the American people have no clue what we’re up against. **That’s why I wrote _The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America_ to explain how communist and fascist Leftists infiltrated and overtook the Democrat Party...** ...how it has become a party of racism and hatred attacking the very foundations of our country... ... and how their ultimate goal is to create a one-party state – and cancel, deplatform and silence every last one of their political opponents by slandering them as “white supremacists” and worse. The reviews speak for themselves... “A Great Book” – Dinesh D’Souza “ _The Enemy Within_ is a book for all patriots who understand that our country is in a fight for its life.” – Mark Levin “David Horowitz does it again in a must-read for any American concerned about where we are headed as a nation.” Laura Ingraham I wrote _The Enemy Within_ because... I know if our country stands a chance, Americans must understand exactly how sinister and dangerous the new Democrat Party actually is. I was the enemy within — and I know in my bones what it will take to defeat them. We’ve reached the point in our history that will decide our future – and we either win these political battles or lose everything that makes us prosperous and free. **[That’s why I’ll send you a complimentary copy of The Enemy Within when you donate $35 or more to the Freedom Center today and give us the ammunition we need to expose the Left’s evil agenda to every American patriot.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=97f6d38615524a11a1c0ac5ba8bf373a&_e=K4HL6wNcxnPRtHjW_NQCEYZnIvhKmRD7RzozNJhPCqMB_Ej-Za0nAlWrLtyhxlq8Hd99IpWeQ94AMdnaIWVVA17Yw9rt7cYGAmBq2TqbULCwqSORkU-3BNUwZW40d29Oi9aNS9pQub-EXgh9pBOSagQEuvGAnAfmTXoo_wEdSmaAAPfnTZ0o4XwXcvnVPfY-WZaLNfr-BDMpZ6_-RIESn2jZQ8F2FlsuovGAve4BWG7gl3t5nr_NTdYqDMTmZP666kuDYTcKzeXV-XxmNXU9WRO2sbdp4gN_72RHjNfwpouBY9yBoCDVOf6UFQj0wqbRyn0UWZ2My7dwj6Ea3TL_8mwaUMwdFTnEZAgQCJx0TEY8xQxw5G3sDqUtDyQU71qay7txaDZUP8_itMJwKkPwZw%3D%3D)** The Left is at war with America. They don’t simply disagree with us about how to make our country better – they want to destroy it to make way for their Marxist dystopia. Or in Obama’s own words “radically transform” America. **And they don’t care how much they have to lie, cheat or steal to achieve it.** So it’s up to patriots like you and me to expose the truth about the Left to our fellow Americans while we still can.
---
| | Sincerely,
---
---
David Horowitz
---
P.S. I know how we got to this point in our country, and I know how we get out. But the clock is ticking and our country is hanging by a thread. **[Please make a generous donation of $35 or more to the Freedom Center today and as a thank you, I’ll rush a complimentary copy of my book The Enemy Within to you.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=97f6d38615524a11a1c0ac5ba8bf373a&_e=K4HL6wNcxnPRtHjW_NQCEYZnIvhKmRD7RzozNJhPCqMB_Ej-Za0nAlWrLtyhxlq8Hd99IpWeQ94AMdnaIWVVA17Yw9rt7cYGAmBq2TqbULCwqSORkU-3BNUwZW40d29Oi9aNS9pQub-EXgh9pBOSagQEuvGAnAfmTXoo_wEdSmaAAPfnTZ0o4XwXcvnVPfY-WZaLNfr-BDMpZ6_-RIESn2jZQ8F2FlsuovGAve4BWG7gl3t5nr_NTdYqDMTmZP660KD96ZKQLr9aZRIURkNn_EX99fmloLlE-1IFAgUcmsf4vE12nSh9iK-WDq8HehOd3zY7gVBt1olTj93DjHyyLwXcYQFmHhhH4xExN--vhuOrfSx-PnYPjoKhg9wxfVGGRDZPxlrzukK1DJ-uSF0e_Q%3D%3D)**
---
| | [](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=97f6d38615524a11a1c0ac5ba8bf373a&_e=K4HL6wNcxnPRtHjW_NQCEYZnIvhKmRD7RzozNJhPCqMB_Ej-Za0nAlWrLtyhxlq8Hd99IpWeQ94AMdnaIWVVA17Yw9rt7cYGAmBq2TqbULCwqSORkU-3BNUwZW40d29Oi9aNS9pQub-EXgh9pBOSagQEuvGAnAfmTXoo_wEdSmaAAPfnTZ0o4XwXcvnVPfY-WZaLNfr-BDMpZ6_-RIESn2jZQ8F2FlsuovGAve4BWG7gl3t5nr_NTdYqDMTmZP66-OLZ8L8v-eK3C7JHYRl4QRj67JDkSsHcE_hq86dfekcKnjpCQX9QHtPnRi5GK3H3ElukkG_FIe3kPN5uianTvV8IN1WDiy0UEwOLboYL8q6YVJW5OjaQ7s_c-CzCEi3sl0bu05NRNRuioxWIR9AACQ%3D%3D)

subject: Republicans must vote NO to this massive spending bill
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ROYCE WHITE FOR SENATE
body:
This is what happens when RINOs and the Radical Left have the keys
|
Peter,

It should come as no surprise that career Radical Left and RINO politicians are threatening to push a huge omnibus bill through Congress right before President Trump takes office. This omnibus bill is a MASSIVE waste of taxpayer money. [**I need YOUR help to KILL THE BILL!**](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=d13a818f7e56434aa41272af42bba619&_e=AzkM81w81Lm-U1qLwVxvcp4FuHBInmDNg33OosVFXhyzwD9MC--07hRW6UHDYUdBQ5bsEy4QbGG3vXghv0jXUn3g87Z7q4_a6d8Jnzvvdm-ZQIjOqhCj8yQ6wpYThf4r5OhfFd_BhmkvvBru4ehllT5rBpBWyIlDvzxZiQSrVrz1TkDmq42tSuVAsC-ir3I92oLjjYshDQAIUp-8lsSaorGhmykhcqfbXwRYMbY7fmGp_Gp7bKkWbi4fzioC9dwmISsHCXJLByV7oStOr5uRVJoxV7eRc1vmDPRV3_Nx8O6O4NS4AhGS5RZ9vrR0gbwHSimScXJEMhXRdiRtH90i2A%3D%3D)

Some have been calling it the Christmas "Swampbus," as the DC Swamp is attempting one last effort to sabotage President Trump's administration before it even begins.

If it passes, the Swampbus will:

* _PREVENT President Trump from cutting wasteful spending with Elon Musk and Vivek Ramaswamy 's DOGE_
* _Pass a stopgap spending bill for an ENTIRE YEAR_
* _SUSPEND the debt limit, allowing Neocons and Radical Leftists to spend tax dollars with no end in sight_
* _SEND BILLIONS OVERSEAS!!_

This is what happens when RINOs and Radical Leftists are given the keys. President Trump would NEVER approve of this.

**All we can do is make our voices heard. This is supposed to be a Democracy.**

_That 's why I'm organizing a grassroots effort to amplify the mandate given to MAGA Republicans on November 6th._

[**I 'm looking for 250 Patriots to stand with me to plead with elected officials to KILL THIS BILL!**](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=d13a818f7e56434aa41272af42bba619&_e=AzkM81w81Lm-U1qLwVxvcp4FuHBInmDNg33OosVFXhyzwD9MC--07hRW6UHDYUdBQ5bsEy4QbGG3vXghv0jXUn3g87Z7q4_a6d8Jnzvvdm-ZQIjOqhCj8yQ6wpYThf4r5OhfFd_BhmkvvBru4ehllT5rBpBWyIlDvzxZiQSrVrz1TkDmq42tSuVAsC-ir3I9KNeC2hRtSbt7aPHMncU3PEQ1fzT4-iKd-yfuiJzBPJv1mTPskmRBM1G-wIJRF89aTF2QECHlCKI8vSIBWSWUty4L7L0iTXkS4gghedPJCHrSQ4MZaLBWjbngnmMJUyAzfvv12eiuluFbwADDQ2ohFg%3D%3D)

| [ **KILL THE SWAMPBUS BILL** ](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=d13a818f7e56434aa41272af42bba619&_e=AzkM81w81Lm-U1qLwVxvcp4FuHBInmDNg33OosVFXhyzwD9MC--07hRW6UHDYUdBQ5bsEy4QbGG3vXghv0jXUn3g87Z7q4_a6d8Jnzvvdm-ZQIjOqhCj8yQ6wpYThf4r5OhfFd_BhmkvvBru4ehllT5rBpBWyIlDvzxZiQSrVrz1TkDmq42tSuVAsC-ir3I9tyr5uutUnW5mpyTRwE-30yDzLyIvQ9IQlT5lC2kCStU58FDGU93sOkK77sZ7hlaelBnxRK7EwO7WqDLl50ShACrTHZv_Ispm06yzGY58ziFTNage8q59fc0ot8SYwFJzWX8ePOr4VZFpf9Oyslcx1Q%3D%3D)
---

[**Can I count on you, Peter?**](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=d13a818f7e56434aa41272af42bba619&_e=AzkM81w81Lm-U1qLwVxvcp4FuHBInmDNg33OosVFXhyzwD9MC--07hRW6UHDYUdBQ5bsEy4QbGG3vXghv0jXUn3g87Z7q4_a6d8Jnzvvdm-ZQIjOqhCj8yQ6wpYThf4r5OhfFd_BhmkvvBru4ehllT5rBpBWyIlDvzxZiQSrVrz1TkDmq42tSuVAsC-ir3I9bmQHg5q9s19y_Q5rudfmQYFxOS6BgttxagB_MVeTI7H1tLYfxbDMCUWSsqKeioLYxKUlPKqin9m74H0SKi3_2abtO_GaMG318Ws817JIA2_Dqu-BhLtNy334ig7u-haVJcHlBRgWCDVjxbwjQBkBQQ%3D%3D)

Royce White

name: LCV Membership Team
subject: FWD: There’s still time to make a difference for the environment this Giving Tuesday. [MATCH ACTIVE]
body:
To view this mail in a browser, copy https://links.messages.lcv.org/servlet/MailView?ms=MTE4NDM0OTYS1&r=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&j=MjEwMDUwODQ2OAS2&mt=1&rt=0 into your browser.
Peter — Earlier, we shared the news that for Giving Tuesday, a major
donor had pledged to contribute a $100,000 gift to LCV to help power our
campaigns to disrupt Trump’s dangerous anti-environmental agenda. There’s a catch. We only get this gift IF — and only IF — 1,000 supporters like
you pitch in by midnight tonight. Right now, we aren’t on track to meet that goal. Hearing from you would really help, Peter. This is important: What we
raise today will impact how hard we can fight for our environment and our
democracy next year. We’re asking everyone to pitch in: Renew your LCV membership for just $5 in honor of Giving Tuesday and help unlock $100,000 more to fund our critical work >> https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/x_ And remember: if you start an annual gift of $19 or more this Giving Tuesday,
you’ll receive a free tote bag from LCV so you can show your support for the environment year-round. RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP >> https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/Ap9dcpdP_ Onward, LCV Membership Team Peter — Earlier this month, we got the incredibly welcome news that a
major donor agreed to put up a $100,000 challenge grant to help fund LCV’s
pro-environment campaigns into the new year. With Trump headed back to the White House in just a few weeks and promising to
pursue a dangerous anti-environmental agenda — meeting this goal matters tremendously. To unlock those funds, we need 1,000 LCV supporters to make a contribution
before midnight on Giving Tuesday — that’s tonight, just a few hours away, and
we haven’t heard from you yet, Peter. Defeating Trump’s dirty and dangerous agenda is going to take all of us. Please, renew your membership now for just $5 to help us reach our Giving Tuesday goal >> https://links.messages.lcv. To help us reach this critical goal, we’ll send a free tote bag to LCV members who start an annual gift of $19 or more this Giving Tuesday. NAME EMAIL YOUR STATUS P. FRENCH - Current Peter Willis dpwillis67@gmail.com RENEW NOW FOR $5 >> https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/- M. BLAKE - Current With Trump headed back to the White House in just a few weeks, this year’s
Giving Tuesday goal is even more important than usual. It’s going to take everyonein our movement standing together to disrupt his dangerous anti-environmental
agenda. Here are just a few reasons why your Giving Tuesday gift is EXTRA important
right now: Because we’re up against a critical deadline to secure environmental progress before Trump takes office. Right now, we’re campaigning for the Biden administration to protect clean air and public lands, and for the Senate to confirm pro-environment judges before Trump’s inauguration in January. We’re counting on your support to safeguard environmental progress. Renew your membership now for just $5 >> https://links.messages.lcv.
Because we’re fighting back against Donald Trump’s most extreme anti-science nominees. By nominating climate change deniers like Chris Wright — a Big Oil CEO — to lead federal agencies, Trump is putting polluters’ profits before people like you and me. We’re leading the fight to keep them from key positions. We can block these nominations, but only if the environmental movement shows up >> https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/~
Because we need to be ready on DAY ONE to oppose Trump’s dangerous Project 2025 agenda. From abolishing the National Weather Service, to gutting environmental enforcement and allowing more toxic pollution into our air and water, to allowing more oil and gas drilling and infrastructure, Trump has laid out a blueprint for environmental disaster. We’re ready to fight this pro-polluter agenda in Congress, in the states, and the courts — but we need your help >> https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/k_ypT7_
Because a group of donors has offered $100,000 in matching gift funds. Bottom line: Your contribution goes further to support environmental campaigns that matter if you give now and help unlock this critical funding. Renew your LCV membership now for just $5 >> https://links.messages.lcv. Meeting our Giving Tuesday goal matters — now more than ever.I hope you’ll pitch in: Our match unlock goal is 1,000 donors, but it ends at
midnight tonight. Renew your membership now for just $5 >> https://links.messages.lcv. And remember: if you start an annual gift of $19 or more by this Giving Tuesday,
you’ll receive a free tote bag from LCV to show your support for the environment year-round. https://links.messages.lcv. I hope you’ll respond before midnight tonight, Peter. With your help, I
know that we can make this Giving Tuesday matter for our environment. Onward, Gene Karpinski
President
League of Conservation Voters This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you,update your contact information https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/ContactInformation?spMailingID=11843496&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MjEwMDUwODQ2OAS2&spReportId=MjEwMDUwODQ2OAS2.Click here to unsubscribe https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/Unsubscribe?spMailingID=11843496&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MjEwMDUwODQ2OAS2&spReportId=MjEwMDUwODQ2OAS2 from our supporter list.Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback here mailto:feedback@lcv.org?subject=, or just reply to this email! Thanks for your support.

740 15th St NW, Suite 700
Washington, DC 20005

body:

| Friend — | The LaRouche Organization is happy to announce this weekend's Dec. 7-8 online Schiller Institute conference [**“In the Spirit of Schiller and Beethoven: All Men Become Brethren!**](https://laroucheorganization.nationbuilder.com/r?u=oofl1HGLX0JcKJlk0_5f-97yOHs-L49FaxEo6sWjJlnqmSE3rC1ZEU2FJXHms1oR69yvMjQ0Bw5gsDtdf7s97AZOeVlA1tQQKKGFGzGbN8DwGXr5IrJAlsPgrJfTkmerfSrW5_MQtqQBVGPbZQ4Vvz8hT0LcjEBqnRyinWOg5iJU3xgkMoEKiAd2yCXS_Inw4xtsPilG5kqn1imEbgPBwowsvrW8P-QoXMgzExJ29ehZA8EUp419Nj82So_mJ-beDwlVzQ-6g2xVbcdlV80nKg&e=8fa7b86c85d8b09f0015ebe544605791&utm_source=laroucheorganization&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20241203_conf_invite_2&n=2) Please register today using the links below. We've included the list of speakers in this email to give you a sense of the high level of participation organized by the Schiller Institute. The list is a very unique combination of leaders from around the world, all who share an intention of steering the world towards a spirit of cooperation and away from WW3. We ask you to share the invitation with your family, friends and political contacts to build the largest possible audience!

International Conference of the Schiller Institute
December 7-8, 2024
## **“In the Spirit of Schiller and Beethoven: All Men Become Brethren!”**
_Celebrating the 40th Anniversary of the Schiller Institute_
---
| [](https://laroucheorganization.nationbuilder.com/r?u=oofl1HGLX0JcKJlk0_5f-97yOHs-L49FaxEo6sWjJlnqmSE3rC1ZEU2FJXHms1oRATsvQeci60XPtz4KxPlr-Q&e=8fa7b86c85d8b09f0015ebe544605791&utm_source=laroucheorganization&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20241203_conf_invite_2&n=5 "Register Today") [Register Today](https://laroucheorganization.nationbuilder.com/r?u=oofl1HGLX0JcKJlk0_5f-97yOHs-L49FaxEo6sWjJlnqmSE3rC1ZEU2FJXHms1oRATsvQeci60XPtz4KxPlr-Q&e=8fa7b86c85d8b09f0015ebe544605791&utm_source=laroucheorganization&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20241203_conf_invite_2&n=5)
---
**Preliminary Schiller Institute Conference Program
** **Saturday, Dec. 7** (all times are U.S. Eastern Time) **Panel 1** (9 a.m.-12 noon): _“The Strategic Crisis: New and Final World War, or a New Paradigm of the One Humanity?”_ Moderator: **Dennis Speed** (U.S.), Schiller Institute: Welcome and Introduction
1. Keynote: **Helga Zepp-LaRouche** (Germany), Founder of the Schiller Institute
2. **H.E. Naledi Pandor** (South Africa), former Minister of International Relations and Cooperation, South Africa; _“How Should the South Respond?”_
3. **Dmitri Trenin** (Russia), Professor, Academic Supervisor of the Institute of World Military Economy and Strategy at the Higher School of Economics University (Moscow)
4. **H.E. Donald Ramotar** (Guyana), former President of Guyana
5. **H.E. Ján Čarnogurský** (Slovakia), former Prime Minister of Slovakia
6. **Ambassador Chas W. Freeman, Jr.**(U.S.), former U.S. Assistant Secretary of Defense for International Security Affairs, 1993-1994
7. **Former U.S. State Department Official** (U.S.)

_Question & Answer Session_ **Panel 2** (1 p.m.-4 p.m.): _“The Great Projects To Overcome the Migrant Crisis; The New, Quality Productive Forces; A New Just World Economic Order”_ Moderator: **Stephan Ossenkopp** (Germany), Schiller Institute: Welcome and Introduction
1. Keynote: **Dennis Small** (U.S.), head of the Ibero-America desk, Schiller Institute
2. **Chinese Economist** (China)
3. **H.E. Prof. Dr. Manuel Hassassian** (Palestine), Palestinian Ambassador to Denmark
4. **Alexander K. Bobrov** (Russia), Associate Professor at the Department of Diplomacy, MGIMO University, Moscow
5. **Chandra Muzaffar** (Malaysia), Founder and President of the International Movement for a Just World (JUST)
6. **Glenn Diesen** (Norway), Professor and Author
7. **German Economist** (Germany)
8. **Bob Baker** (U.S.), Schiller Institute and **U.S. Farm leaders** (U.S.)

_Question & Answer Session_ **Sunday, December 8** (all times are U.S. Eastern Time) **Panel 3** (9 a.m.-12 noon): _“The Science Drivers of Physical Economy Today”_ Moderator: **Jason Ross** (U.S.), Science Advisor to the Schiller Institute: Welcome and Introduction
1. Keynote: **Jacques Cheminade** (France), Former Presidential Candidate, President of Solidarité et Progrès
2. **Theodore Postol** (U.S.), Professor Emeritus of Science, Technology and National Security at the Massachusetts Institute of Technology
3. **Michael Limburg** (Germany), Master in Engineering, Vice President EIKE (European Institute for Climate and Energy)
4. **Michele Geraci** (Italy), Former Under Secretary of State, Ministry of Economic Development
5. **Chinese Expert** (China)
6. **Sergey Pulinets** (Russia), Principal Research Scientist, Space Research Institute, Russian Academy of Sciences, Moscow
7. **Jürgen Schöttle** (Germany), Master in Engineering, Power Plant Construction
8. **Space Historian** (Europe)

_Question & Answer Session_ **Panel 4** (1 p.m.-4 p.m.): _“The Beauty of the Cultures of the World: A Dialogue Among Civilizations”_ Moderator: **Harley Schlanger** : Welcome and Introduction
1. Keynote: **Diane Sare **(U.S.), former candidate for U.S. Senate from New York, President of The LaRouche Organization
2. **Helga Zepp-LaRouche** (Germany), Founder, Schiller Institute
3. **William Ferguson** (U.S.), Schiller Institute
4. **Paul Gallagher** (U.S.), Schiller Institute
5. **John Sigerson** (U.S.), Musical Director, Schiller Institute
6. **Liliana Gorini** (Italy), Chairwoman of Movisol, and **Sebastiano Brusco** (Italy), Pianist
7. **Nader Majd** (Iran/U.S.), President and Director, Center for Persian Classical Music, Vienna, VA

_Question and Answer Session_

* * *
**Conference Invitation** International Conference of the Schiller Institute, December 7-8, 2024
## **“In the Spirit of Schiller and Beethoven: All Men Become Brethren!”**
_Celebrating the 40th Anniversary of the Schiller Institute_
---
The reported decision by the lame duck President Biden administration to allow Ukraine to use American ATACMS ballistic missiles for strikes into Russian territory, starting with the targeting of the Kursk region, brings the world into the immediate range of being possibly a few days away from a strategic, unstoppable escalation. Given the fact that these missiles, like the German Taurus and the British Storm Shadow missiles, technically cannot be operated by the Ukrainians, but must be aided by specialists from NATO countries, this means that the moment they are deployed, we are in a full war of NATO against Russia. It was exactly in response to such escalations, including the deployment by the nations of the Collective West of increasingly powerful weapons to Ukraine, that in September 2024 Russian President Putin announced proposed changes in Moscow’s “nuclear doctrine” to include the possible use of nuclear weapons in response to an attack that poses a critical threat to the sovereignty of Russia, including attacks by a non-nuclear state when backed by a nuclear state. [Putin explained this change](https://laroucheorganization.nationbuilder.com/r?u=oofl1HGLX0JcKJlk0_5f-97yOHs-L49FaxEo6sWjJllQ_XVJMXuUzUx-r5A21n0bs9W9AHqL6bRbWfqTDZ3hM0JNctcBn8PCzckLWZorBYtgp0Cmz7f56YA5B8QHEuSe41ZZdDypJggnJrrljEOIwH91eKSl4O57JPoWQaj5Y6uwWLhtmLfhQ7vFLZ438a53tCL2v_HzKwtasmLzw5UPuKYVRn2jgAD91nWX1mCiVf6bZpifJe0WqkWq_SDPCDrSC0gakDMatnVRFoRV9xt1SPVgBDfRqWN6A1Uex_vU0QPl1Qc10iHTeka8eYuwhzINO6eMR4XyxtIFse_6r_l2vPKOMw4lZrWoPOhP0KXQqSE&e=8fa7b86c85d8b09f0015ebe544605791&utm_source=laroucheorganization&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20241203_conf_invite_2&n=7) in the following, very precise way: “The updated version of the [Basic Principles] document is supposed to regard an aggression against Russia from any non-nuclear state but involving or supported by any nuclear state as their joint attack against the Russian Federation. ...“We will consider such a possibility once we receive reliable information about a massive launch of air and space attack weapons and their crossing our state border.” He added: “I mean strategic and tactical aircraft, cruise missiles, UAVs, hypersonic and other aircraft. We reserve the right to use nuclear weapons in the event of aggression ... Including the case when the enemy, using conventional weapons, creates a critical threat to our sovereignty.” The widely reported announcement of the Biden administration ATACMS decision clearly crosses that red line. Nevertheless, Western politicians and so-called military experts keep ignoring the Russian warning, and continually talk about “Russia is bluffing,” “defeating Russia militarily,” etc. In a delusionary way, they ignore the fact that Russia is presently the strongest nuclear power and therefore cannot be defeated on the battlefield. What can very well happen in the short term, instead, is that all life on the planet could be annihilated in a global thermonuclear war. We have at the same time the escalation of the crisis in Southwest Asia. The Israeli military action in Gaza, which the International Court of Justice (ICJ) and the International Criminal Court (ICC) have characterized as ongoing genocide, has led to catastrophic hunger, which threatens the lives of 400,000 Palestinians. The international community has essentially remained idle while watching this. Lebanon is now experiencing a similar fate. If this war were to expand to Iran, targeting its nuclear facilities, that war would quickly draw in larger powers. We would then be at the cusp of a global nuclear war. The previously dominant unipolar world has crumbled, and the effort to prevent a multipolar world from establishing itself is futile. That is the main reason for the strategic crisis. In October of this year, the annual summit of the BRICS took place in Kazan, Russia with the participation of the 9 BRICS member states and 13 new partner states (as well as additional guests), representing 4.7 billion people, or 57% of the world population. These countries are determined to overcome 500 years of colonialism and establish a new just world economic order, new development platforms, and a new credit system and trade mechanism, in order to stop being raw materials exporting countries, develop the full value chain in their own countries, and overcome poverty and underdevelopment forever. Why do the forces in the West not rejoice at this fantastic perspective? Because the West is experiencing a profound cultural crisis; the West has lost its way; and because the Western financial system is laboring under a deadly $2 quadrillion speculative bubble that demands global genocide. If we don’t overcome the evil of geopolitics, which resulted in two world wars in the 20th century, there is the danger of the world dividing into two separate blocs: a Global NATO on the one side, and a BRICS-Plus Global Majority on the other side. In that case, we will face not only economic chaos, but also the immediate danger of a global nuclear conflagration. The obvious and easy way to overcome the danger of war and confrontation is to convince the countries of the Collective West—the European nations and even the U.S.—to stop confrontation and adopt a mode of cooperation with this growing Global Majority. If the West would join hands with the BRICS and help the Global South to industrialize, we could not only stop the geopolitical competition, but we could also start to overcome the migrant crisis in the only human way possible: namely to create conditions where the people who are now refugees, instead have a perspective to be involved in the buildup of their own home countries. Rather than condemning millions of people to go on death marches through the Sahara to then drown in mass graves in the Mediterranean, or end up in refugee camps, which Pope Francis has called concentration camps; or to cross many countries, facing hunger, drug gangs and terrorism, to then be pushed back at the Mexican-American border; we must help them to industrialize their nations. We are calling on the UN or the BRICS to initiate a working dialogue between the BRICS and the countries of the West (since the G20 neglects this urgent challenge), to declare their intent to create 1.5-2 billion new productive jobs in the countries of the Global South in the short term, and to create a total of 3 billion new productive jobs by 2050. Such an announcement, followed by concrete steps to ensure the complete electrification of all the countries of Africa, Asia and Latin America, as well as the immediate beginning of the realization of game-changer infrastructure and other development projects, would be a powerful message to announce an era of hope. The building of the largest deepwater port in Latin America, the Chancay port in Peru, with the prospect of building a bi-oceanic railway connecting the Atlantic and the Pacific, is such a project. Likewise, the building of the Grand Inga Dam and the Transaqua project, which will help to irrigate and industrialize several countries in the heart of Africa, are such projects. In order to overcome the danger of war for good, we need to establish a new international security and development architecture, which takes into account the interests of every single country on the planet. This should be done in the tradition of the Peace of Westphalia, which ended 150 years of religious wars in Europe, because the warring parties realized that there would be nobody left alive if the fighting continued. How much more is that true in the age of thermonuclear weapons! In order to put such a new architecture before humanity, the Schiller Institute plans to convene an international online conference on Dec. 7-8, with leading representatives and experts of the Collective West and the Global South to discuss the principles on which such a new architecture must be based. We will also provide an example of the dialogue of cultures and civilizations, with beautiful samples of great art from various nations, to show the way to establish a civilization based on, not hatred, but love.
---

clean_body: Major international conference to stop nuclear war and usher in a spirit of cooperation! | | | Friend — | The LaRouche Organization is happy to announce this weekend's Dec. 7-8 online Schiller Institute conference Please register today using the links below. We've included the list of speakers in this email to give you a sense of the high level of participation organized by the Schiller Institute. The list is a very unique combination of leaders from around the world, all who share an intention of steering the world towards a spirit of cooperation and away from WW3. We ask you to share the invitation with your family, friends and political contacts to build the largest possible audience! | "Register Today" International Conference of the Schiller Institute December 7-8, 2024 “In the Spirit of Schiller and Beethoven: All Men Become Brethren!” Celebrating the 40th Anniversary of the Schiller Institute | "Register Today" Preliminary Schiller Institute Conference Program Saturday, Dec. 7 (all times are U.S. Eastern Time) Panel 1 (9 a.m.-12 noon): “The Strategic Crisis: New and Final World War, or a New Paradigm of the One Humanity?” Moderator: Dennis Speed (U.S.), Schiller Institute: Welcome and Introduction 1. Keynote: Helga Zepp-LaRouche (Germany), Founder of the Schiller Institute 2. H.E. Naledi Pandor (South Africa), former Minister of International Relations and Cooperation, South Africa; “How Should the South Respond?” 3. Dmitri Trenin (Russia), Professor, Academic Supervisor of the Institute of World Military Economy and Strategy at the Higher School of Economics University (Moscow) 4. H.E. Donald Ramotar (Guyana), former President of Guyana 5. H.E. Ján Čarnogurský (Slovakia), former Prime Minister of Slovakia 6. Ambassador Chas W. Freeman, Jr.(U.S.), former U.S. Assistant Secretary of Defense for International Security Affairs, 1993-1994 7. Former U.S. State Department Official (U.S.) Question & Answer Session Panel 2 (1 p.m.-4 p.m.): “The Great Projects To Overcome the Migrant Crisis; The New, Quality Productive Forces; A New Just World Economic Order” Moderator: Stephan Ossenkopp (Germany), Schiller Institute: Welcome and Introduction 1. Keynote: Dennis Small (U.S.), head of the Ibero-America desk, Schiller Institute 2. Chinese Economist (China) 3. H.E. Prof. Dr. Manuel Hassassian (Palestine), Palestinian Ambassador to Denmark 4. Alexander K. Bobrov (Russia), Associate Professor at the Department of Diplomacy, MGIMO University, Moscow 5. Chandra Muzaffar (Malaysia), Founder and President of the International Movement for a Just World (JUST) 6. Glenn Diesen (Norway), Professor and Author 7. German Economist (Germany) 8. Bob Baker (U.S.), Schiller Institute and U.S. Farm leaders (U.S.) Question & Answer Session Sunday, December 8 (all times are U.S. Eastern Time) Panel 3 (9 a.m.-12 noon): “The Science Drivers of Physical Economy Today” Moderator: Jason Ross (U.S.), Science Advisor to the Schiller Institute: Welcome and Introduction 1. Keynote: Jacques Cheminade (France), Former Presidential Candidate, President of Solidarité et Progrès 2. Theodore Postol (U.S.), Professor Emeritus of Science, Technology and National Security at the Massachusetts Institute of Technology 3. Michael Limburg (Germany), Master in Engineering, Vice President EIKE (European Institute for Climate and Energy) 4. Michele Geraci (Italy), Former Under Secretary of State, Ministry of Economic Development 5. Chinese Expert (China) 6. Sergey Pulinets (Russia), Principal Research Scientist, Space Research Institute, Russian Academy of Sciences, Moscow 7. Jürgen Schöttle (Germany), Master in Engineering, Power Plant Construction 8. Space Historian (Europe) Question & Answer Session Panel 4 (1 p.m.-4 p.m.): “The Beauty of the Cultures of the World: A Dialogue Among Civilizations” Moderator: Harley Schlanger : Welcome and Introduction 1. Keynote: Diane Sare (U.S.), former candidate for U.S. Senate from New York, President of The LaRouche Organization 2. Helga Zepp-LaRouche (Germany), Founder, Schiller Institute 3. William Ferguson (U.S.), Schiller Institute 4. Paul Gallagher (U.S.), Schiller Institute 5. John Sigerson (U.S.), Musical Director, Schiller Institute 6. Liliana Gorini (Italy), Chairwoman of Movisol, and Sebastiano Brusco (Italy), Pianist 7. Nader Majd (Iran/U.S.), President and Director, Center for Persian Classical Music, Vienna, VA Question and Answer Session | "Register Today" Conference Invitation International Conference of the Schiller Institute, December 7-8, 2024 “In the Spirit of Schiller and Beethoven: All Men Become Brethren!”** Celebrating the 40th Anniversary of the Schiller Institute The reported decision by the lame duck President Biden administration to allow Ukraine to use American ATACMS ballistic missiles for strikes into Russian territory, starting with the targeting of the Kursk region, brings the world into the immediate range of being possibly a few days away from a strategic, unstoppable escalation. Given the fact that these missiles, like the German Taurus and the British Storm Shadow missiles, technically cannot be operated by the Ukrainians, but must be aided by specialists from NATO countries, this means that the moment they are deployed, we are in a full war of NATO against Russia. It was exactly in response to such escalations, including the deployment by the nations of the Collective West of increasingly powerful weapons to Ukraine, that in September 2024 Russian President Putin announced proposed changes in Moscow’s “nuclear doctrine” to include the possible use of nuclear weapons in response to an attack that poses a critical threat to the sovereignty of Russia, including attacks by a non-nuclear state when backed by a nuclear state. in the following, very precise way: “The updated version of the [Basic Principles] document is supposed to regard an aggression against Russia from any non-nuclear state but involving or supported by any nuclear state as their joint attack against the Russian Federation. ...“We will consider such a possibility once we receive reliable information about a massive launch of air and space attack weapons and their crossing our state border.” He added: “I mean strategic and tactical aircraft, cruise missiles, UAVs, hypersonic and other aircraft. We reserve the right to use nuclear weapons in the event of aggression ... Including the case when the enemy, using conventional weapons, creates a critical threat to our sovereignty.” The widely reported announcement of the Biden administration ATACMS decision clearly crosses that red line. Nevertheless, Western politicians and so-called military experts keep ignoring the Russian warning, and continually talk about “Russia is bluffing,” “defeating Russia militarily,” etc. In a delusionary way, they ignore the fact that Russia is presently the strongest nuclear power and therefore cannot be defeated on the battlefield. What can very well happen in the short term, instead, is that all life on the planet could be annihilated in a global thermonuclear war. We have at the same time the escalation of the crisis in Southwest Asia. The Israeli military action in Gaza, which the International Court of Justice (ICJ) and the International Criminal Court (ICC) have characterized as ongoing genocide, has led to catastrophic hunger, which threatens the lives of 400,000 Palestinians. The international community has essentially remained idle while watching this. Lebanon is now experiencing a similar fate. If this war were to expand to Iran, targeting its nuclear facilities, that war would quickly draw in larger powers. We would then be at the cusp of a global nuclear war. The previously dominant unipolar world has crumbled, and the effort to prevent a multipolar world from establishing itself is futile. That is the main reason for the strategic crisis. In October of this year, the annual summit of the BRICS took place in Kazan, Russia with the participation of the 9 BRICS member states and 13 new partner states (as well as additional guests), representing 4.7 billion people, or 57% of the world population. These countries are determined to overcome 500 years of colonialism and establish a new just world economic order, new development platforms, and a new credit system and trade mechanism, in order to stop being raw materials exporting countries, develop the full value chain in their own countries, and overcome poverty and underdevelopment forever. Why do the forces in the West not rejoice at this fantastic perspective? Because the West is experiencing a profound cultural crisis; the West has lost its way; and because the Western financial system is laboring under a deadly $2 quadrillion speculative bubble that demands global genocide. If we don’t overcome the evil of geopolitics, which resulted in two world wars in the 20th century, there is the danger of the world dividing into two separate blocs: a Global NATO on the one side, and a BRICS-Plus Global Majority on the other side. In that case, we will face not only economic chaos, but also the immediate danger of a global nuclear conflagration. The obvious and easy way to overcome the danger of war and confrontation is to convince the countries of the Collective West—the European nations and even the U.S.—to stop confrontation and adopt a mode of cooperation with this growing Global Majority. If the West would join hands with the BRICS and help the Global South to industrialize, we could not only stop the geopolitical competition, but we could also start to overcome the migrant crisis in the only human way possible: namely to create conditions where the people who are now refugees, instead have a perspective to be involved in the buildup of their own home countries. Rather than condemning millions of people to go on death marches through the Sahara to then drown in mass graves in the Mediterranean, or end up in refugee camps, which Pope Francis has called concentration camps; or to cross many countries, facing hunger, drug gangs and terrorism, to then be pushed back at the Mexican-American border; we must help them to industrialize their nations. We are calling on the UN or the BRICS to initiate a working dialogue between the BRICS and the countries of the West (since the G20 neglects this urgent challenge), to declare their intent to create 1.5-2 billion new productive jobs in the countries of the Global South in the short term, and to create a total of 3 billion new productive jobs by 2050. Such an announcement, followed by concrete steps to ensure the complete electrification of all the countries of Africa, Asia and Latin America, as well as the immediate beginning of the realization of game-changer infrastructure and other development projects, would be a powerful message to announce an era of hope. The building of the largest deepwater port in Latin America, the Chancay port in Peru, with the prospect of building a bi-oceanic railway connecting the Atlantic and the Pacific, is such a project. Likewise, the building of the Grand Inga Dam and the Transaqua project, which will help to irrigate and industrialize several countries in the heart of Africa, are such projects. In order to overcome the danger of war for good, we need to establish a new international security and development architecture, which takes into account the interests of every single country on the planet. This should be done in the tradition of the Peace of Westphalia, which ended 150 years of religious wars in Europe, because the warring parties realized that there would be nobody left alive if the fighting continued. How much more is that true in the age of thermonuclear weapons! In order to put such a new architecture before humanity, the Schiller Institute plans to convene an international online conference on Dec. 7-8, with leading representatives and experts of the Collective West and the Global South to discuss the principles on which such a new architecture must be based. We will also provide an example of the dialogue of cultures and civilizations, with beautiful samples of great art from various nations, to show the way to establish a civilization based on, not hatred, but love. | "Register Today" The LaRouche Organization | The LaRouche Organization · 2 University Plaza Dr, Suite 100, Hackensack, NJ 07601, United States

Ritchie Torres represents the future of the Democratic Party. Raised by a single mother in public housing, Ritchie personally understands the hardships that working families endure. At age 25, Ritchie made history as the youngest elected official to serve on the New York City Council. He fought tirelessly for the working families of The Bronx, and now, he's fighting for those families and for progressive values in Congress. He is the first openly gay Afro Latino ever elected to Congress. Ritchie is a champion for progressive policies to fight poverty and to improve the lives of families just like the one he was raised in.

clean_body: | = Hey Peter, I have a favor to ask of you: = | = Our campaign is run by grassroots donors just like you, Peter. With your help, we were able to win this seat and send the first openly gay, Afro-latino man to Congress – and it’s been the honor of my life. But MAGA Republicans have put a target on common-sense progressive movements like ours, Peter. They’ve been crystal clear that they will use their trifecta in the House, Senate, and White House to go after those they don’t agree with, so building up our people-powered movement is critical. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = Thank you, Ritchie | | Paid for by Torres For Congress PO Box 580303, Bronx, NY 10458 www.torres.nyc Ritchie Torres represents the future of the Democratic Party. Raised by a single mother in public housing, Ritchie personally understands the hardships that working families endure. At age 25, Ritchie made history as the youngest elected official to serve on the New York City Council. He fought tirelessly for the working families of The Bronx, and now, he's fighting for those families and for progressive values in Congress. He is the first openly gay Afro Latino ever elected to Congress. Ritchie is a champion for progressive policies to fight poverty and to improve the lives of families just like the one he was raised in. Peter, please, consider making a =. To make the most powerful lasting impact and to join Ritchie in the fight for progressive values in Congress, make a=. Click here to . Click here to . | | = =

subject: Do you know what EMILYs List stands for?
body:
|
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98108992/515585678/162262288?refcode=WTEFEX05_20241203_Yeast_ALL_v1s1&sourceid=1055469&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNDk5ODBmMi1jMWIxLWVmMTEtODhjZi02MDQ1YmRmZThkMjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gIGwO1_6pq_C8wSkjveQiZsRgm3UkqoYIP7MvTpQR1s=) Do you know what the EMILY in EMILYs List stands for, Peter?

**The acronym spells out "Early Money is Like Yeast" — because _it makes the dough rise_. In other words, _investing early pays off_.**

Our organization was built on the premise that early donations are the most critical for Democratic pro-choice women, because early investment helps launch strong, viable campaigns that will attract more donors down the line. So while it may seem early, we've already started preparing for the 2026 midterm elections. | [DONATE NOW](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98108998/515585684/162262288?refcode=WTEFEX05_20241203_Yeast_ALL_v1s1&sourceid=1055469&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNDk5ODBmMi1jMWIxLWVmMTEtODhjZi02MDQ1YmRmZThkMjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gIGwO1_6pq_C8wSkjveQiZsRgm3UkqoYIP7MvTpQR1s=)
---
We need to recruit strong candidates who can help shape the national conversation around Democratic values — and then we need to give those candidates as _much_ support as possible as _early_ as possible. That's how **Rep. Emilia Sykes (OH-13)** , **Sen.-elect Elissa Slotkin (MI)** , and dozens of other women built their winning campaigns in the years leading up to 2024.

There's no such thing as an "off year" in politics, Peter. The investments we make _right now_ will build the foundation for success in 2026 — a year when we need to take back the U.S. House and Senate, win and defend critical governors' seats, and shore up pro-choice majorities in state legislatures nationwide. The work doesn't stop, and neither do we.
[**In short, your dollar goes the furthest right now. So today, on Giving Tuesday, donate toward our $75,000 Grassroots Giving Fund to invest early in Democratic pro-choice women running in 2026 and beyond:**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98109004/515585690/-1512887892?refcode=WTEFEX05_20241203_Yeast_ALL_v1s1&sourceid=1055469&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNDk5ODBmMi1jMWIxLWVmMTEtODhjZi02MDQ1YmRmZThkMjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gIGwO1_6pq_C8wSkjveQiZsRgm3UkqoYIP7MvTpQR1s=)

body:
We're jumping for joy!
| [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/85229?t=6&akid=18124%2E878179%2EQik77-) | [**FLIP THE HOUSE LAUNCH FUND: RUSH $7 TO TAKE BACK THE MAJORITY! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/85230?t=7&akid=18124%2E878179%2EQik77-)
---
**_FIRST_** Republicans secured a NARROW House majority on November 5, falling far below electoral expectations!

**_THEN_** Donald Trump issued a HUGE blow to their already razor-thin majority by appointing several MAGA members to his cabinet!

**__AND NOW__ more and more battleground races are being called for Democrats or headed to recounts — _the GOP is PANICKING!!!_**
[**We’re just inches away from flipping the House BLUE and STOPPING Project 2025 dead in its tracks! DON’T LET THIS MOMENT PASS US BY: Do your part to SAVE democracy and rush $7 towards our $25,000 Flip the House Fund »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/85229?t=8&akid=18124%2E878179%2EQik77-)

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=18124%2E878179%2EQik77-). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=18124%2E878179%2EQik77-).**

name: Geoff Simpson
subject: Our future will be determined by what we do here and now
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

This Giving Tuesday, Justice Democrats is in the middle of scoping out our
plans to recruit and elect the next generation of working class,
progressive leaders to Congress in 2026 — and we truly can’t do it without
you.

Since we’re a people-powered organization that depends on contributions
from emails like this one rather than big checks from corporations or
billionaires, the number of candidates we’re able to find and support
directly depends on the success of our grassroots fundraising efforts.

As we speak, our team is figuring out our budget and strategizing for the
2026 primaries, where we can support everyday working class people to
challenge billionaire- and corporate-backed Democrats who’ve lost touch
with the people they serve.

Our success in the future will be determined by how much we raise here and
