| | Dear Fellow Conservative,
---
| | I'm writing to ask you to stand beside me at the top of a very slippery slope.Actually, in my case, it's a slippery _slide_. My name is Riley Gaines and I'm the University of Kentucky swimmer who had to compete against a fully intact 6'4" _male_ swimmer dressed in a women's bathing suit.And after he stole the victory I had worked for my entire life, I had to go back to the women's locker room and undress out of my wet bathing suit while he did the same next to me.
---
| [](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=537365ec39734a23b9bc944ef03e4112&_e=9z6PwsXE8HGIVVlo-lDEqYVH4a2pmqOAMLvf9MkvWXrfOG5OX9y7FHi57XJx1l42K3sxNDzpwT2lpw77Tt2rDoLuljIgM8HXW6SZwufcnwVq2WM1uukBFd3MVQsC8vglYYHZ36GsNMLUl06spCc8n-VBDDdq_YN4BlArH39N-1o2p5I2w1oKLjugW_s4T6ttxaFEec3FsQ6mS-gzagKMygjdXXTd2iyyHfvoWGtd87GeSi91-krhtBq5TpzuoybOyo0nZ9j9Qx9omlfeji8LA5-Ek0jYNj-MddnLmIwOvg6ACmYbyYKfIeRuSanP3otmvoiXvwJKgjmkx1QnQKUxcb0Cgukdcl74XKyXzEdYwcQJglqHS-6QViIhYtFekbdeaPjbSNpRHOGjDW4EIzo28Q%3D%3D)
---
| | I know the images I'm bringing up are horrible. But please don't stop reading -- because God-fearing, faith-filled people like you and me have a job to do today. We can't retreat into our homes and hope our government's evil culture just passes us by. **[That's why I'm asking you to stand with me today -- before it's too late.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=537365ec39734a23b9bc944ef03e4112&_e=9z6PwsXE8HGIVVlo-lDEqYVH4a2pmqOAMLvf9MkvWXrfOG5OX9y7FHi57XJx1l42K3sxNDzpwT2lpw77Tt2rDoLuljIgM8HXW6SZwufcnwVq2WM1uukBFd3MVQsC8vglYYHZ36GsNMLUl06spCc8n-VBDDdq_YN4BlArH39N-1o2p5I2w1oKLjugW_s4T6ttxaFEec3FsQ6mS-gzagKMygjdXXTd2iyyHfvoWGtd87GeSi91-krhtBq5TpzuoybOIbelvvYwdoTveu4sqGXbYkGrQs8otGzRZ7BMT9UfsfixiLGrXJs5H8mY19mboaZwhopnBHN_MAIvu-4Mtb4fDJBk0egvHalJIta11iznw7GhyM4-r_iWPs5bXwME7BqmBuftzMJtC3Ok22vDmuhXYA%3D%3D)** My fellow conservative, you know this slippery slide.It's the same one you got pushed down when the Left told you abortion was going to be "safe, legal, and rare."_Now abortion is a "right" and "women’s healthcare." And if you don’t support it up until the moment of birth, you must "hate women."_ It's the same slippery slide you got pushed down when the Left told you limiting gay couples to civil unions was "mean." You were told, "They just want to use the word "marriage" like everyone else. It's just a word."_Now if you don't fully embrace a homosexual lifestyle by displaying rainbows and celebrating gay pride, you're a "hate-filled bigot."_ Enough with their lies. We have Truth on our side. And we need to start acting like it.**God created man. And God created woman. It isn't any more complicated than that.** Letting men believe they are women... letting girls believe they are boys... is a bold-faced rejection of God’s truth. And if we give this deranged movement one more inch, a year from now when you're forced by law to call boys "she"... when it becomes normal for kids to be taken away from parents who oppose this evil... I don't want you looking back with regret wishing you had done something when you still had a chance.**Your chance is right now -- and right by my side.** **[Please stand with me against the radical transgender movement by making an urgent tax-deductible donation today -- before it's too late.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=537365ec39734a23b9bc944ef03e4112&_e=9z6PwsXE8HGIVVlo-lDEqYVH4a2pmqOAMLvf9MkvWXrfOG5OX9y7FHi57XJx1l42K3sxNDzpwT2lpw77Tt2rDoLuljIgM8HXW6SZwufcnwVq2WM1uukBFd3MVQsC8vglYYHZ36GsNMLUl06spCc8n-VBDDdq_YN4BlArH39N-1o2p5I2w1oKLjugW_s4T6ttxaFEec3FsQ6mS-gzagKMygjdXXTd2iyyHfvoWGtd87GeSi91-krhtBq5TpzuoybOPTCEs8wlTNuITgZUK_OH9oyA69a0oOFcZgJ9K_2UUMZ4gTOOYXEJRLGOS8VxSvnTHY9HND_GqUJfI17Lh072YCQ2sUJrwxFxANuTdsxmmkZtKw9sm65gftloC1QBuf2REUTBquYRHNmy5Q39sN0l-g%3D%3D) ** Maybe you're thinking like so many, "Riley, adults are free to do whatever they want. And children should be kept away from this evil by their parents."I agree this problem would have less traction if parents just said, "No."
---
>> But parents in MD had their child taken away because they refused to let their son transition to a "girl." >> Parents in Vermont are seeing their foster care licenses revoked because they admit they would not help a child who may be assigned to their home get puberty blockers or have sex change surgery.>> Parents in California got themselves elected to the school board, passed guidelines to protect their children from the transgender movement, and now the state of California is suing them. >> And Illinois is considering a bill that would change the definition of "child abuse" to include parents who oppose puberty blocking drugs and sex change operations.

The radical transgender movement has parents backed into a corner. But when I'm speaking around the country, I meet so many seniors who say, "I wish someone had told me about this sooner." The good news is that right now, you still have a chance to help me stop the radical transgender movement before they push us down their slippery slide.And today I'm writing you on behalf of a group that is doing more work to block the transgender movement than anyone I know. **It's the legal non-profit the Center for American Liberty.** **[And your tax-deductible gift today is going straight to help them.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=537365ec39734a23b9bc944ef03e4112&_e=9z6PwsXE8HGIVVlo-lDEqYVH4a2pmqOAMLvf9MkvWXrfOG5OX9y7FHi57XJx1l42K3sxNDzpwT2lpw77Tt2rDoLuljIgM8HXW6SZwufcnwVq2WM1uukBFd3MVQsC8vglYYHZ36GsNMLUl06spCc8n-VBDDdq_YN4BlArH39N-1o2p5I2w1oKLjugW_s4T6ttxaFEec3FsQ6mS-gzagKMygjdXXTd2iyyHfvoWGtd87GeSi91-krhtBq5TpzuoybOyXxqKyuk9jaNYY31p-Q_s2c1bTfjv3mesHo9q5p1pfyql_9ZOcHkfwK2hMema8l_fvAUZImC0v1I3Q4WrRTBiCWmwHozCLLVus9mRZ5GeNLpnpwDfbNRVgraG1m-mohWmyhQjycgefQfAvcdFOjsFw%3D%3D)** With the help of patriots like you, the _Center for American Liberty_ fights the transgender movement _in the courts_ because that’s the only way to stop them. And the _Center for American Liberty_ is attacking this evil from all sides with their comprehensive three-pronged approach.
---
**#1. They're fighting radical schools**.
---
I know it may sound crazy to you but in today's taxpayer-funded schools, teachers and counselors _encourage_ young children to socially "transition" at school and then facilitate the "transition" by giving children new names and even giving them new clothes so they can dress as the opposite sex.And they keep it all a secret from parents! The _Center for American Liberty_ is taking these radicals to court in multiple cases. And they already have one major win! **[When you make your tax-deductible gift today](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=537365ec39734a23b9bc944ef03e4112&_e=9z6PwsXE8HGIVVlo-lDEqYVH4a2pmqOAMLvf9MkvWXrfOG5OX9y7FHi57XJx1l42K3sxNDzpwT2lpw77Tt2rDoLuljIgM8HXW6SZwufcnwVq2WM1uukBFd3MVQsC8vglYYHZ36GsNMLUl06spCc8n-VBDDdq_YN4BlArH39N-1o2p5I2w1oKLjugW_s4T6ttxaFEec3FsQ6mS-gzagKMygjdXXTd2iyyHfvoWGtd87GeSi91-krhtBq5TpzuoybOFxEWwRVIOouwehkW4Nf7fegeRGAHEwwYwtJYAvynVMhdbkt7K3RmlahtvcgErtVV2WQyTywsxSL68nrKbVSm7eF1hV9prSDEJB_e66ur1xzpoGFjHA_Fy9U0e6Sg8Lj6OP1YqRk_19ijEa6AeiI_HQ%3D%3D), **you're making sure PARENTS have the final word in guiding their children -- not school radicals!
---
**#2. They're fighting radical doctors.**
---
There are doctors who mutilate children for profit in the name of transgender "care." They use their "expertise" to convince _even_ _conservative_ _parents_ that if they oppose "transition," their child will commit suicide.Then these doctors pump children full of dangerous puberty blockers and perform gruesome surgeries to remove children's healthy breasts and other parts. Maybe you've seen a girl named Chloe Cole on Fox News. In a landmark case, the _Center for American Liberty_ is helping her sue the radical doctors and hospital that gave her a double mastectomy at age 15. **[**When you make your tax-deductible gift today**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=537365ec39734a23b9bc944ef03e4112&_e=9z6PwsXE8HGIVVlo-lDEqYVH4a2pmqOAMLvf9MkvWXrfOG5OX9y7FHi57XJx1l42K3sxNDzpwT2lpw77Tt2rDoLuljIgM8HXW6SZwufcnwVq2WM1uukBFd3MVQsC8vglYYHZ36GsNMLUl06spCc8n-VBDDdq_YN4BlArH39N-1o2p5I2w1oKLjugW_s4T6ttxaFEec3FsQ6mS-gzagKMygjdXXTd2iyyHfvoWGtd87GeSi91-krhtBq5TpzuoybOXzYZojYE8-fsaVbOv-WjrAHO89hIkmGchZKbJ0FSHMjMizDJm9CO8wKODw5l2TE41JY6BSbG8u_GVnWl-G-P2mKT0xjNGCoHzvsIlY2S9EkZaChmIKedI1a0bGqpAyYOYebHOaH0LHjZUyOIqWFj-w%3D%3D)** , you're helping Chloe and the _Center for American Liberty_ make sure this never happens to another child!
---
**#3. They're fighting for _your_ right to speak out against this evil.**
---
Fighting for Freedom of Speech is one of the _Center for American Liberty's_ specialties and they've notched plenty of victories in this space. Their next one is going to be fighting for an 82-year-old grandmother who got banned for life from the YMCA.This grandma raised the alarm that a grown man dressed in a women's bathing suit was in the women's locker room "helping" two little girls get ready to use the bathroom.And she was the one punished!**[**When you make your tax-deductible gift today**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=537365ec39734a23b9bc944ef03e4112&_e=9z6PwsXE8HGIVVlo-lDEqYVH4a2pmqOAMLvf9MkvWXrfOG5OX9y7FHi57XJx1l42K3sxNDzpwT2lpw77Tt2rDoLuljIgM8HXW6SZwufcnwVq2WM1uukBFd3MVQsC8vglYYHZ36GsNMLUl06spCc8n-VBDDdq_YN4BlArH39N-1o2p5I2w1oKLjugW_s4T6ttxaFEec3FsQ6mS-gzagKMygjdXXTd2iyyHfvoWGtd87GeSi91-krhtBq5TpzuoybOyDHhGjL4xOUv_xuZzQJLWnY9y5K2jhvorueXbsAeXtQJLiARJxOr9Mtw4jWoGoWS7OkQEths7L0oAE0K2X3nckVvkZsxYwGmDErZMTCyStyDegq1LAzr2rMf9_WKtykHoZiwl-pzbISNqsBzBhHorg%3D%3D)** , you're helping the _Center for American Liberty_ protect every American's right to speak out against this evil! I know you'd probably love to fund an entire court case on your own after all I've told you.**[But all I'm asking you to do is make a tax-deductible gift of $30, $50, $75, $100 or even $250 or more today -- before it's too late.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=537365ec39734a23b9bc944ef03e4112&_e=9z6PwsXE8HGIVVlo-lDEqYVH4a2pmqOAMLvf9MkvWXrfOG5OX9y7FHi57XJx1l42K3sxNDzpwT2lpw77Tt2rDoLuljIgM8HXW6SZwufcnwVq2WM1uukBFd3MVQsC8vglYYHZ36GsNMLUl06spCc8n-VBDDdq_YN4BlArH39N-1o2p5I2w1oKLjugW_s4T6ttxaFEec3FsQ6mS-gzagKMygjdXXTd2iyyHfvoWGtd87GeSi91-krhtBq5TpzuoybOws6KNzPgo-oD2KM9UbM1spZahCyG76v0aUs7AhGTqtGyJgpSkwHtChoKH6Dy9tQTrkeWb8rwj10CyJgHOvEa1AteIEGwj949ngt7QsPSUogXxR_1tUqRZT4nqDWFgmJcjczHwb3TaSiELtjzJL28kA%3D%3D)** Please donate whatever amount is right for you whether it's smaller or larger. _The Center for American Liberty_ needs and appreciates every dollar that comes in.And because I believe so strongly in the work they're doing -- and because they are one of the few groups who've stood shoulder-to-shoulder with me in this fight... I**t will be my honor to send you my new book _Swimming Against the Current: Fighting for Common Sense in a World That's Lost Its Mind_ as my free gift** **[**when you donate $100 or more to the Center for American Liberty.**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=537365ec39734a23b9bc944ef03e4112&_e=9z6PwsXE8HGIVVlo-lDEqYVH4a2pmqOAMLvf9MkvWXrfOG5OX9y7FHi57XJx1l42K3sxNDzpwT2lpw77Tt2rDoLuljIgM8HXW6SZwufcnwVq2WM1uukBFd3MVQsC8vglYYHZ36GsNMLUl06spCc8n-VBDDdq_YN4BlArH39N-1o2p5I2w1oKLjugW_s4T6ttxaFEec3FsQ6mS-gzagKMygjdXXTd2iyyHfvoWGtd87GeSi91-krhtBq5TpzuoybOARRQF46Riy9YYzgWwQIYAOhqEPYtR4JXvViBhsJbbfHExU1L5UgA37FBlv5AH-IwD4LB66YFrWVt9iefOWwvANpXPBj1t3gwm0ff6N9dbbppAJweCxxXVUrDI9npdJGha2Kl3-iUGTgyePeKr4s0cA%3D%3D)** Before I go, please let me share one last thought with you.Every morning as a competitive swimmer, I would get up and think of this verse: _For I consider that the sufferings of the present time are not worthy to be compared to the glory that is about to be revealed to us. Romans 8:18_ I applied it to my swimming: work hard now and wins come later. But now I see that God has a much bigger plan for my life just as He does for yours.Thank you for reading my letter all the way to the end. I'm praying for you, and I hope you'll pray for me too.

Sincerely,

clean_body: There are doctors who mutilate children for profit in the name of transgender "care." They use their "expertise" to convince even conservative parents that if they oppose "transition," their child will commit suicide. | | | | I’m writing to ask you to stand beside me at the top of a very slippery slope. | | | | | | Dear Fellow Conservative, | | I'm writing to ask you to stand beside me at the top of a very slippery slope.Actually, in my case, it's a slippery slide. My name is Riley Gaines and I'm the University of Kentucky swimmer who had to compete against a fully intact 6'4" male swimmer dressed in a women's bathing suit.And after he stole the victory I had worked for my entire life, I had to go back to the women's locker room and undress out of my wet bathing suit while he did the same next to me. | | | I know the images I'm bringing up are horrible. But please don't stop reading -- because God-fearing, faith-filled people like you and me have a job to do today. We can't retreat into our homes and hope our government's evil culture just passes us by. My fellow conservative, you know this slippery slide.It's the same one you got pushed down when the Left told you abortion was going to be "safe, legal, and rare."Now abortion is a "right" and "women’s healthcare." And if you don’t support it up until the moment of birth, you must "hate women." It's the same slippery slide you got pushed down when the Left told you limiting gay couples to civil unions was "mean." You were told, "They just want to use the word "marriage" like everyone else. It's just a word."Now if you don't fully embrace a homosexual lifestyle by displaying rainbows and celebrating gay pride, you're a "hate-filled bigot." Enough with their lies. We have Truth on our side. And we need to start acting like it.God created man. And God created woman. It isn't any more complicated than that. Letting men believe they are women... letting girls believe they are boys... is a bold-faced rejection of God’s truth. And if we give this deranged movement one more inch, a year from now when you're forced by law to call boys "she"... when it becomes normal for kids to be taken away from parents who oppose this evil... I don't want you looking back with regret wishing you had done something when you still had a chance.Your chance is right now -- and right by my side. Maybe you're thinking like so many, "Riley, adults are free to do whatever they want. And children should be kept away from this evil by their parents."I agree this problem would have less traction if parents just said, "No." > But parents in MD had their child taken away because they refused to let their son transition to a "girl." >> Parents in Vermont are seeing their foster care licenses revoked because they admit they would not help a child who may be assigned to their home get puberty blockers or have sex change surgery.>> Parents in California got themselves elected to the school board, passed guidelines to protect their children from the transgender movement, and now the state of California is suing them. >> And Illinois is considering a bill that would change the definition of "child abuse" to include parents who oppose puberty blocking drugs and sex change operations. The radical transgender movement has parents backed into a corner. But when I'm speaking around the country, I meet so many seniors who say, "I wish someone had told me about this sooner." The good news is that right now, you still have a chance to help me stop the radical transgender movement before they push us down their slippery slide.And today I'm writing you on behalf of a group that is doing more work to block the transgender movement than anyone I know. It's the legal non-profit the Center for American Liberty. With the help of patriots like you, the Center for American Liberty fights the transgender movement in the courts because that’s the only way to stop them. And the Center for American Liberty is attacking this evil from all sides with their comprehensive three-pronged approach. #1. They're fighting radical schools. I know it may sound crazy to you but in today's taxpayer-funded schools, teachers and counselors encourage young children to socially "transition" at school and then facilitate the "transition" by giving children new names and even giving them new clothes so they can dress as the opposite sex.And they keep it all a secret from parents! The Center for American Liberty is taking these radicals to court in multiple cases. And they already have one major win! , you're making sure PARENTS have the final word in guiding their children -- not school radicals! #2. They're fighting radical doctors. There are doctors who mutilate children for profit in the name of transgender "care." They use their "expertise" to convince even conservative parents that if they oppose "transition," their child will commit suicide.Then these doctors pump children full of dangerous puberty blockers and perform gruesome surgeries to remove children's healthy breasts and other parts. Maybe you've seen a girl named Chloe Cole on Fox News. In a landmark case, the Center for American Liberty is helping her sue the radical doctors and hospital that gave her a double mastectomy at age 15. , you're helping Chloe and the Center for American Liberty make sure this never happens to another child! #3. They're fighting for your right to speak out against this evil. Fighting for Freedom of Speech is one of the Center for American Liberty's specialties and they've notched plenty of victories in this space. Their next one is going to be fighting for an 82-year-old grandmother who got banned for life from the YMCA.This grandma raised the alarm that a grown man dressed in a women's bathing suit was in the women's locker room "helping" two little girls get ready to use the bathroom.And she was the one punished! , you're helping the Center for American Liberty protect every American's right to speak out against this evil! I know you'd probably love to fund an entire court case on your own after all I've told you. Please donate whatever amount is right for you whether it's smaller or larger. The Center for American Liberty needs and appreciates every dollar that comes in.And because I believe so strongly in the work they're doing -- and because they are one of the few groups who've stood shoulder-to-shoulder with me in this fight... It will be my honor to send you my new book Swimming Against the Current: Fighting for Common Sense in a World That's Lost Its Mind as my free gift Before I go, please let me share one last thought with you.Every morning as a competitive swimmer, I would get up and think of this verse: For I consider that the sufferings of the present time are not worthy to be compared to the glory that is about to be revealed to us. Romans 8:18 I applied it to my swimming: work hard now and wins come later. But now I see that God has a much bigger plan for my life just as He does for yours.Thank you for reading my letter all the way to the end. I'm praying for you, and I hope you'll pray for me too. Sincerely, | | Riley Gaines | | | P.S. God made man and God made woman. The attempts to deny those basic truths, are attempts to deny the truth of God. Your help is so critical to the Center for American Liberty's work, Please hurry. It's getting hard to hold back this evil without you. I don't want you to look back a year from now and say, "I wish I had done something when I had the chance." | | | | | | | ---|---|--- The Center For American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization fighting against growing anti-free speech and anti-civil liberties trends. © The Center for American Liberty | PO Box 200942, Pittsburgh, PA 15251

subject: 1,076 a day . . .
body:
[](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?xtl=6v37dssxmfjxechm4wvkv5lilhftet5kn1qpuo0d0zrh7sk4quoz2z9kirjd6xpow6gack2k66ar0j3tb0xwjy7zs3v2e79tfmpqgtvtzyz6ehpdisj0m0bmnjzmtegm991&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=snxvil&__onlt=h) [unsubscribe](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?xul=o5pvyewrzrxe8xql6qc10lt9b3ahbti88rar1b8qwnzgphwf4dci53ctsrq6cbnro7avyc1c4qn6gzkujy96zshukwnefzczrhartbj&__stmp=snxvil&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh)
---
Please read the message below from our sponsor, Students for Life of America.

* * *

| Dear Pro-Life Friend,

Will college administrators **_BAN_** one of THE most effective tools you and I have in exposing the Abortion Lobby’s brutality?

[](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?xtl=8i1i4lrw7dfdoz0hq5y5k5o4hohvwsz1ph7frbf8ssrvr4bsr7kxvatdtfmni9jds3wlqi0t76qdbtadfwpy0u9618dqvj2gp3omcxyiznsqw22g4alkd8ia311tvde64p6ks5aa3xzs8pw0c50w9skliufcvlcung2d6a8cce1gzfvprwto5y8fkft1mw5g0ewzq5m&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=snxvil&__onlt=h) **Without your action today,_I’m worried that’s exactly what will happen_.**

You see, Students for Life’s 1,500 campus chapters are preparing to place **1,076 bright pink crosses** right smack in the middle of college campuses nationwide.

Each **pink cross** represents the life of each precious preborn boy or girl Planned Parenthood aborts every day.

These **_“Cemetery of Innocents”_** displays are a PROVEN way to turn young people against abortion as it shows the depths of Planned Parenthood’s grave evil.

But after the results of the 2024 elections, radical leftists on college campuses are lashing out against anyone who opposes their extreme views – resorting to _threats_ , _vandalism_ , _intimidation tactics_ , and even _physical violence_.

**I’m worried – without your help – college administrators will start appeasing these pro-abortion radicals by censoring our pro-life students!**

**[That’s why I’m hoping you’ll agree to sign your NON-INTERFERENCE NOTICE TODAY](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?xtl=8i1i4lrw7dfdoz0hq5y5k5o4hohvwsz1pin9iv97j51hb6pv9k0lwcgqc7olp5e6fbmkqka4ynudghc8hmjnr6hxgnwyc2j337bnx1ijx6glq2rng2u8ou8s51hqj6uovdozzv4o2sg9jv96pzxbsk66oa65gwg723yhp58h9oves32cxahp640ul4minuh9ie2ff9u&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=snxvil&__onlt=h)!**

**[After you complete your petition, please consider making a tax-deductible donation of $10, $25, $50, or even $100 to support Students for Life’s important efforts today](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?xtl=8i1i4lrw7dfdoz0hq5y5k5o4hohvwsz1pjqcpob7pfa7l81y4a3pxf71kxryg1yy7n0jr1ne1sye09dbj1t0fhu1zqpgi8dnfo2oru6kv29w82dfvs0tjdw872bomx8ul5uogiw01o13yako166garpoefux55jhep6lvy8ldj1c8oy3df9q6xe7lr4dotwbedx08p8&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=snxvil&__onlt=h).**

**Thanks to our #GivingTuesday Matching Challenge, every gift we receive before the deadline will be matched dollar-for-dollar up to $175,000!**

As you’ll see, your **[NON-INTERFERENCE NOTICE](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?xtl=8i1i4lrw7dfdoz0hq5y5k5o4hohvwsz1pku6g656gumw99balq5dyhvb6lummjt1wicir3lrsxce5zf6ke0c8w4tst732qxwvsrp9kslsja5234n8fudv0i093v9zlkbqva229la077jngztaadlhiwv8kh0rd1wuyd3c394mtva0y5sjjzr73vilbkypsm5ad36zt6&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=snxvil&__onlt=h)** insists that college administrators in your state DO NOT attempt to CANCEL or CENSOR our **_Cemetery of Innocents_** display.
[](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?xtl=8i1i4lrw7dfdoz0hq5y5k5o4hohvwsz1vtlrh0kt6l8z1bs4n68b0dt5y4ijzjmeoc1gevvg0rlvqz9pclz6t1wqsakq7jtaxu9z895cbbpsdg9fv3h906rgtmflssn784tto76g9hc2uzg2wzanagh4hlankraxmks8s1hk648sig21i4wvajwousjt8iitq8lz1ba&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=snxvil&__onlt=h)
My name is Kristan Hawkins, and I’m President of Students for Life of America. With the help of good folks like you, Students for Life works to turn young people against abortion – the very demographic Planned Parenthood depends on for both their bloody business and their political power – _saving preborn lives now and paving the way for abortion to be abolished in the United States_.

Our work could not be more important as college students are the Abortion Lobby’s top target.

_In fact, a whopping 90% of Planned Parenthoods are located within walking distance of a college campus_!

The good news is, our **_Cemetery of Innocents_** displays are one of the most powerful tools you and I have in converting young people to the pro-life cause.

While these displays make pro-abortion radicals FURIOUS, after seeing our displays:
**> >>** Pregnant mothers who are considering abortions decide to choose Life;

**> >>** Women who are being coerced into abortions by their abusive boyfriends gain the courage to stand up for themselves; and

**> >>** Pro-abortion and “on-the-fence” college change their minds after grasping the sheer number of preborn babies butchered by Planned Parenthood every day.
[](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?xtl=8i1i4lrw7dfdoz0hq5y5k5o4hohvwsz1vv2ingqszzglnd475in31ffegulx4f57cndfey7trx3vw1mgec6hhc6g9ddyq3njnyya2brdzwe1xgyn8tpuxrdyvnzifh1pzuz6vwyu8cii7fv8869sio2no50d90em180oyui2aacqb3xr28kwbro1uddo9hxjm8tfsfg&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=snxvil&__onlt=h)
But sadly, our displays aren’t always welcome on campus . . .

In fact, our displays have drawn in violent protestors who _stomp on_ , _spit on_ , _tear up_ , _steal_ , and _vandalize_ them.

At the _University of Texas-San Antonio_ a group of pro-abortion protesters stomped through our **_Cemetery of Innocents_** shouting:

“I HAD AN ABORTION! I’M EXTREMELY PROUD OF IT!”

**One even said, “ _LOOK, THERE’S MINE RIGHT THERE_ ,” pointing to one of the crosses in the ground.**

Recently, our Northeast Field Operations Coordinator, Savannah Craven, set up our **_Cemetery of Innocents_** display at _Onondaga Community College_ (OCC) in Syracuse, New York.

Within minutes of setting up the display, Savannah’s materials, meant to educate and uplift women, **_were torn up right in front of her by protesters_.**

Campus police did nothing to stop it.

Not only do many school administrations turn a blind eye to this outright vandalism, they actually have tried to CENSOR us!

Now, with tensions on college campuses reaching a boiling point after the 2024 election, _I can’t predict the lengths pro-abortion protesters and school administrations will go to stop our** _Cemetery of Innocents_** displays_.

That’s why I’m asking for your IMMEDIATE action.

**_FIRST_ ,** **[please sign your NON-INTERFERENCE NOTICE to help me send a LOUD-AND-CLEAR message to college administrators in your state](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?xtl=8i1i4lrw7dfdoz0hq5y5k5o4hohvwsz1vw6oezgs4otnxeem0ypt2i6s2j28xalz3jteeah4gc7vbrongscxmqfm2gwgw9661claj5bexs6yrgkejghe6b3qxotg79dw2iehck267y3bil8phagy3f9temp6vxhkdtwseli7798otp4e8poxbj3cv2x7mgnp67llhjm&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=snxvil&__onlt=h).**

Even the most rabid pro-abortion school administrators try to pull their “funny business” in secret because they care first and foremost about money.

They know much of their funding is dependent on bipartisan agreement from state legislators, which could go away if they make enough people angry.

If I can deliver a FLOOD of these **[signed NON-INTERFERENCE NOTICES](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?xtl=8i1i4lrw7dfdoz0hq5y5k5o4hohvwsz1vx9f9tmrx13zhgsohorh3kv3nn4i2wg2tv7dedue9hnvgfpei7mmb3rbhjq2cr0qdhobdxlfvnx79hnmz8q1dkr6zpndwatcumkwkntg6tmvy4jvv7rdnmsa8rbxg6lztd4wlsinbfcm9ya5qtcycqhrvpr2nf0f27u6n1o&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=snxvil&__onlt=h),** it will prove pro-lifers are still prepared to hold them accountable!

**_SECOND_ ,** please prayerfully consider making a generous tax-deductible contribution to sponsor Students for Life’s **_Cemetery of Innocents_** display.

**Thanks to our #GivingTuesday Matching Challenge, every gift we receive before the deadline will be matched dollar-for-dollar up to $175,000!**

Of course, a monumental task like this takes resources – resources I just don’t have lying around in the bank after everything we did in the lead up to November.

As each cross costs roughly $10 to make a ship to our student groups, their destruction at the hands of pro-abortion radicals can cost us bigtime.

But the only other choice is remaining silent . . . which is something Students for Life will NEVER do!

**[So, after you sign your NON-INTERFERENCE NOTICE, could I count on you to sponsor 10 crosses with a contribution of $100](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?xtl=8i1i4lrw7dfdoz0hq5y5k5o4hohvwsz1vyp9cmcr1bc05i4rc2u950hcvb7vvsath4jceg6rb0rw07r9jjg03e25b07miwgztlbcy29gt6le3hzeoxinp7ckbq5ak37ijb4m5aju5otpnmyb6c0iudzgax214e3o80ab5jis8q881i7uwy4zciz4va8jodc8k70oc5v&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=snxvil&__onlt=h)?**

**[Or, if that’s too much, could you sponsor five with a contribution of $50? Even if you could just sponsor one cross with a contribution $10, it would be a big help](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?xtl=8i1i4lrw7dfdoz0hq5y5k5o4hohvwsz1vzsc746quqoorjeuwewz638pe3m70ouj8czbeig345vw5xsclapbusaxu30v2cai842dsuvhr2qoji0m1lqwkt2cdqlyntk3p39lp2p647a70sngg8y1c8h14cqsrp70km8foqiwckc5g5chccuadqqfvl2epcrag6uv59l&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=snxvil&__onlt=h)!**

For Life,

Kristan Hawkins
President, Students for Life of America

P.S. Pro-abortion protesters and college administrators are doing everything in their power to SHUT DOWN Students for Life’s **_Cemetery of Innocents_** display.

They know this powerful display of bright pink crosses commemorating the 1,076 precious little boys and girls aborted every day by Planned Parenthood is an instant mind-changer.

So, please help me FIGHT BACK by signing **[your NON-INTERFERENCE NOTICE](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?xtl=8i1i4lrw7dfdoz0hq5y5k5o4hohvwsz1vaw6zjypl2kablsxruz175x10togt8poyopaeltcvmzwmlu81qjqj5n1n5fd8iv4k8remkfiojejdioddoigvcqufrfvaia9etrawreg32h0by10td76jc27whchbkmbavejuhib9v83yrm8igibdi6uw9izqb54c60bwpf&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=snxvil&__onlt=h)** insisting they don’t attempt to CANCEL or CENSOR our **_Cemetery of Innocents_** events and chip in $10 or more to help us reach more students with this pro-life message!

**Thanks to our #GivingTuesday Matching Challenge, every gift we receive before the deadline will be matched dollar-for-dollar up to $175,000!**
[](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?xtl=8i1i4lrw7dfdoz0hq5y5k5o4hohvwsz1vbzz4d2prdx1014am8br87ja8hrtk47dlk3zf25pkrdwspvb35t4nfjt48ylr2ppaoef5r3jmf7uxib9scr44lcmhszt2nqs7hxpdf8u1k1gqdc659eo579q113n0vqqqfp1boife3c1qafy2lmcepk7wwcurzgwy5uhlt1&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=snxvil&__onlt=h)

clean_body: Please read the message below from our sponsor, Students for Life of America. | Dear Pro-Life Friend, Will college administrators BAN one of THE most effective tools you and I have in exposing the Abortion Lobby’s brutality? Without your action today,I’m worried that’s exactly what will happen. You see, Students for Life’s 1,500 campus chapters are preparing to place 1,076 bright pink crosses right smack in the middle of college campuses nationwide. Each pink cross represents the life of each precious preborn boy or girl Planned Parenthood aborts every day. These “Cemetery of Innocents” displays are a PROVEN way to turn young people against abortion as it shows the depths of Planned Parenthood’s grave evil. But after the results of the 2024 elections, radical leftists on college campuses are lashing out against anyone who opposes their extreme views – resorting to threats , vandalism , intimidation tactics , and even physical violence. I’m worried – without your help – college administrators will start appeasing these pro-abortion radicals by censoring our pro-life students! ! . Thanks to our #GivingTuesday Matching Challenge, every gift we receive before the deadline will be matched dollar-for-dollar up to $175,000! As you’ll see, your insists that college administrators in your state DO NOT attempt to CANCEL or CENSOR our Cemetery of Innocents display. My name is Kristan Hawkins, and I’m President of Students for Life of America. With the help of good folks like you, Students for Life works to turn young people against abortion – the very demographic Planned Parenthood depends on for both their bloody business and their political power – saving preborn lives now and paving the way for abortion to be abolished in the United States. Our work could not be more important as college students are the Abortion Lobby’s top target. In fact, a whopping 90% of Planned Parenthoods are located within walking distance of a college campus! The good news is, our Cemetery of Innocents displays are one of the most powerful tools you and I have in converting young people to the pro-life cause. While these displays make pro-abortion radicals FURIOUS, after seeing our displays: >> Pregnant mothers who are considering abortions decide to choose Life; >> Women who are being coerced into abortions by their abusive boyfriends gain the courage to stand up for themselves; and >> Pro-abortion and “on-the-fence” college change their minds after grasping the sheer number of preborn babies butchered by Planned Parenthood every day. But sadly, our displays aren’t always welcome on campus . . . In fact, our displays have drawn in violent protestors who stomp on , spit on , tear up , steal , and vandalize them. At the University of Texas-San Antonio a group of pro-abortion protesters stomped through our Cemetery of Innocents shouting: “I HAD AN ABORTION! I’M EXTREMELY PROUD OF IT!” One even said, “ LOOK, THERE’S MINE RIGHT THERE ,” pointing to one of the crosses in the ground. Recently, our Northeast Field Operations Coordinator, Savannah Craven, set up our Cemetery of Innocents display at Onondaga Community College (OCC) in Syracuse, New York. Within minutes of setting up the display, Savannah’s materials, meant to educate and uplift women, were torn up right in front of her by protesters. Campus police did nothing to stop it. Not only do many school administrations turn a blind eye to this outright vandalism, they actually have tried to CENSOR us! Now, with tensions on college campuses reaching a boiling point after the 2024 election, I can’t predict the lengths pro-abortion protesters and school administrations will go to stop our Cemetery of Innocents displays. That’s why I’m asking for your IMMEDIATE action. FIRST , . Even the most rabid pro-abortion school administrators try to pull their “funny business” in secret because they care first and foremost about money. They know much of their funding is dependent on bipartisan agreement from state legislators, which could go away if they make enough people angry. If I can deliver a FLOOD of these , it will prove pro-lifers are still prepared to hold them accountable! SECOND , please prayerfully consider making a generous tax-deductible contribution to sponsor Students for Life’s Cemetery of Innocents display. Thanks to our #GivingTuesday Matching Challenge, every gift we receive before the deadline will be matched dollar-for-dollar up to $175,000! Of course, a monumental task like this takes resources – resources I just don’t have lying around in the bank after everything we did in the lead up to November. As each cross costs roughly $10 to make a ship to our student groups, their destruction at the hands of pro-abortion radicals can cost us bigtime. But the only other choice is remaining silent . . . which is something Students for Life will NEVER do! ? ! For Life, Kristan Hawkins President, Students for Life of America P.S. Pro-abortion protesters and college administrators are doing everything in their power to SHUT DOWN Students for Life’s Cemetery of Innocents display. They know this powerful display of bright pink crosses commemorating the 1,076 precious little boys and girls aborted every day by Planned Parenthood is an instant mind-changer. So, please help me FIGHT BACK by signing insisting they don’t attempt to CANCEL or CENSOR our Cemetery of Innocents events and chip in $10 or more to help us reach more students with this pro-life message! Thanks to our #GivingTuesday Matching Challenge, every gift we receive before the deadline will be matched dollar-for-dollar up to $175,000!** Students for Life of America (SFLA) is a 501(c)3 organization. All donations are 100% tax-deductible. body:

Please read the message below from our sponsor, Students for Life of America.

Steve Thompson, Editor

* * *

| Dear Pro-Life Friend,

_“I want a Lamborghini.”_

I’ll never forget watching those undercover videos from the _Center for Medical Progress_ showing a Planned Parenthood executive bragging about all the money she was making selling off body parts from recently aborted babies.

Last year, Planned Parenthood put to death 392,715 little preborn boys and girls.

**_This is as evil as evil gets_!**

But that hasn’t stopped the Presidents of 83 Christian colleges and universities from developing ties to Planned Parenthood.

I know Planned Parenthood and their pals in the press love this!

**They know, if even a sliver of American Christians make peace with abortion, than abortion will NEVER be ended in the United States.**

I need to know what you think about all of this . . .

So, can I count on you please **[fill out this brief survey I’ve created](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?xtl=8i1i0tq7xbjkk11t76nh8i3fmoh91dpih5uqrw5yeg22s6za89kfsy5ec8urr0awwwu8hopvlcqxx96p8w6a5oh1lkr3br1nkdl1n8fwln3guou0daa58ier6c2gg4y28sqwztgvbs86gngfeg50ezjxtgpf2n6ay3wk6bf2n1mhftk0pjkoya8l5r0j7jbrcpw8l1b&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=snxvlv&__onlt=h)** for grassroots patriots like you, and let me know your thoughts?
## **[SHOULD CHRISTIAN COLLEGES KICK
PLANNED PARENTHOOD OFF THEIR CAMPUSES](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?xtl=8i1i0tq7xbjkk11t76nh8i3fmoh91dpih6xgipxy9uaqc8nd3017taurkyx2hiulk687hr17qhuxcz7gmmcpw1ttf18nhwhwaio25b3xj6uroogut26qg6478cie7vo8zgw9ghm7anr0vtvlsoc6054djlc8oimpop52p6f6fxefxdtpw2opz60a5bge8iqhyp2rq5k&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=snxvlv&__onlt=h)?**
The fact is, if we lose this battle for the heart and soul of American Christianity, literally nothing else the pro-life movement does will matter.

It’s that simple.

**[So, please take your survey and let me know where you stand](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?xtl=8i1i0tq7xbjkk11t76nh8i3fmoh91dpih7bnp71xc7md09lfjc3xuch370zcoeprndk6htagg0yxi19no1m2kc3jy41w1cbfr0b305pyh1j06p706raarrrlmdcbwk2r38bl28bhz6xg8z953hnn7ynkq52zztq22yb6vzfno6mdq10cc6cqzzep60az9h4nuowxf96&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=snxvlv&__onlt=h)!**

For Life,

Kristan Hawkins
President, Students for Life of America
[](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?xtl=8i1i0tq7xbjkk11t76nh8i3fmoh91dpih8edg0tx6hj3mnzies5lvf7crqcpfa7gbpa5hwou95cy1rmepdfepqcpr6ge7iw25523gxzzejnx0pvthf6k0addoewykoexuyha9y5vy1ezjekmdpisr3v4gmr2k2tcei9mc4frgceb6mw3in4ra5w26nuumffdqo2e8pk&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=snxvlv&__onlt=h)

name: Sean Feucht
subject: FWD: Today is Giving Tuesday
body:
See what God has in store for Let Us Worship| | | This is Sean Feucht with an update on Giving Tuesday. We announced what Let Us Worship will undertake in 2025, bringing revival to America's most broken cities. We are taking with us the Isaiah 61 mandate, "They will rebuild the ancient ruins and restore the places long devastated; they will renew the ruined cities that have been devastated for generations." As we ask for Believers to partner with us and help fund this next move of God, we are praying that today will jumpstart our fundraising goal for next year! What we raise today will let us lay the groundwork for REVIVE IN 25! **[If you feel led, please donate here](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=dcac8242330e4c15a55d3b915d5debd3&_m=159ad609e2b9448e8e5a0a0343b64c4f&_e=A7Z3NwWHBcUX5xx0rX0M9E8kzACVh8gVUI_ARDFd6wH2tkm7IB-A3hBO1zUTLu4zaP9UViN5NHE90GbmKCaeY7dPQjodCyAljAYYd5ERrM4fVkb8dSyf0ZHWdt2H8tncmDiR69MJ-K-4dOMLngiE4g9H8DbSOzvyUu23nXWj_u4dq_Nuh1E7VbBiqrO2hVhFGCICs54Gf9xrGSdrtC2zrS6auPeAEq9jLsZZA9UyEUOR7Rw98QkSp3Ye0wb3w1GLjrcSTj-4VPxOZmgLkE9AkK_JpUNF0uLaEtP0MZl5GmOdUFxdub_yi0koSC6dWtNThj3to58h1o-VQykhB20Y-Q%3D%3D)** , and make sure to check out the video below to hear my heart behind this calling! God Bless, Sean
---
\-------Forwarded message-------
From: Sean Feucht
Date: Tuesday, December 3, 2024
To: dpwillis67@gmail.com
Subject: Today is Giving Tuesday
---
[](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=dcac8242330e4c15a55d3b915d5debd3&_m=159ad609e2b9448e8e5a0a0343b64c4f&_e=A7Z3NwWHBcUX5xx0rX0M9E8kzACVh8gVUI_ARDFd6wH2tkm7IB-A3hBO1zUTLu4zaP9UViN5NHE90GbmKCaeY7dPQjodCyAljAYYd5ERrM4fVkb8dSyf0ZHWdt2H8tncmDiR69MJ-K-4dOMLngiE4g9H8DbSOzvyUu23nXWj_u4dq_Nuh1E7VbBiqrO2hVhFCHfevLlTvQdlApEtdGHBRY1BSaf8a0BlDgijUMKgEx2dUaF7cqZc7vCDEigArAKuW5XeZyXCafYyiyljLDLcBK9dE-8Hx9AbSPhy4sIk_JYNwgXUmavigod1fN9h0Z05lMQqX7cwUmnLLBMukOHBkQ%3D%3D)
---
Dear Friend,
---
Around the world today, non-profits are raising money for the specific charities they represent for Giving Tuesday. Let Us Worship is a Kingdom-First ministry, and we seek to see revival sweep across America and the world. We see Giving Tuesday as _Kingdom Tuesday_!
---
[**CONTRIBUTE TO GIVING TUESDAY >>> **](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=dcac8242330e4c15a55d3b915d5debd3&_m=159ad609e2b9448e8e5a0a0343b64c4f&_e=A7Z3NwWHBcUX5xx0rX0M9E8kzACVh8gVUI_ARDFd6wH2tkm7IB-A3hBO1zUTLu4zaP9UViN5NHE90GbmKCaeY7dPQjodCyAljAYYd5ERrM4fVkb8dSyf0ZHWdt2H8tncmDiR69MJ-K-4dOMLngiE4g9H8DbSOzvyUu23nXWj_u4dq_Nuh1E7VbBiqrO2hVhFlFUQLm5lb5IuvxjNCzWBq0PQwjiBONddjm6ZAGvgrnF4x4vHGeDRqb2krlxRrsDaDWGDjRRbxVjl5tox6fmvcMtjtVGmBZGKIvcAxksWs-AZrL8MDyWHGcoUK7mFSNooAYEiUHNQD2jLTUtEGdhQ8w%3D%3D)
---
We just announced what's next for Let Us Worship—REVIVE IN 25!!! Let Us Worship is heading across America to bring LIGHT into some of America's darkest cities; cities overrun with crime, drug-addiction, homelessness and hopelessness. We know the power of the Gospel is the answer, and we are called to be the messengers. _**WATCH THE GIVING TUESDAY MESSAGE ↓↓↓**_
---
[](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=dcac8242330e4c15a55d3b915d5debd3&_m=159ad609e2b9448e8e5a0a0343b64c4f&_e=A7Z3NwWHBcUX5xx0rX0M9E8kzACVh8gVUI_ARDFd6wH2tkm7IB-A3hBO1zUTLu4zaP9UViN5NHE90GbmKCaeY7dPQjodCyAljAYYd5ERrM4fVkb8dSyf0ZHWdt2H8tncmDiR69MJ-K-4dOMLngiE4g9H8DbSOzvyUu23nXWj_u4dq_Nuh1E7VbBiqrO2hVhFKW-Yt605QmaZksWRDUwLW3oMDcaW2EGyc-KpunhXDqlGwMHtTgQY0CKnyPx41HmyKHyDMdtyLDMquh_TvxMSbB5uq48W3XZ7zX6kd-40MB3zOUiPeRvFAfcvvGqIcYWx7S0OmpI7aR9ZWeF2yLCRlQ%3D%3D)
---
Let Us Worship always has been and always will be an organic, grassroots ministry. We aren't bankrolled by a single benefactor, but rather an army of Believers, who like us, are desperate to see revival sweep across our land. We announced what Let Us Worship will undertake in 2025, bringing revival to America's most broken cities. We are taking with us the Isaiah 61 mandate, "They will rebuild the ancient ruins and restore the places long devastated; they will renew the ruined cities that have been devastated for generations." As we ask for Believers to partner with us and help fund this next move of God, we are praying that today will jumpstart our fundraising goal for next year! What we raise today will let us lay the groundwork for REVIVE IN 25! , and make sure to check out the video below to hear my heart behind this calling! God Bless, Sean \-------Forwarded message------- From: Sean Feucht Date: Tuesday, December 3, 2024 To: dpwillis67@gmail.com Subject: Today is Giving Tuesday Dear Friend, Around the world today, non-profits are raising money for the specific charities they represent for Giving Tuesday. Let Us Worship is a Kingdom-First ministry, and we seek to see revival sweep across America and the world. We see Giving Tuesday as Kingdom Tuesday! We just announced what's next for Let Us Worship—REVIVE IN 25!!! Let Us Worship is heading across America to bring LIGHT into some of America's darkest cities; cities overrun with crime, drug-addiction, homelessness and hopelessness. We know the power of the Gospel is the answer, and we are called to be the messengers. WATCH THE GIVING TUESDAY MESSAGE ↓↓↓ Let Us Worship always has been and always will be an organic, grassroots ministry. **We won’t sugarcoat this, Peter – we only have until January 3rd to take action to reverse course and make sure NO ONE, much less someone like Donald Trump, is above the law.**

Which is why it is CRITICAL that Congress take action to pass the No Kings Act to undo the Supreme Court’s disastrous ruling that would give the President unlimited authority and be free from accountability or consequences. name: Senate Republicans
subject: We want to let President Trump know how thankful we are
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
We are sending this letter to President Trump at midnight. We want him to know we are standing with him! | Peter,

We've written a letter to President Trump to thank him for all his hard work in winning the campaign, congratulate him on winning the election, and express our excitement for him to get to work Making America Great Again.

[**The letter is only available for you to sign until midnight, so please sign now to help show President Trump that America is with him in restoring our country.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=7ead4aace82445ff99839a3ac96cc0da&_e=qhEaveEUYVeMGM2J5fuIenF29mkfd-WLtZxTsYPO8-cHI3QsC4p00icECC0f6zum54DPc-xHE0a6B5v-NKBwPKKaaKJQzOpAWpy6Zq8OrlbIUcHNNLP9b1jHSG2WS7krxWrPEDOvjYBX1XZX0w0ah4W-7vQ8fzcXgMtrlyupNthUEYSvMiWy4cSxXNA6EbyOGkxNcLRpJUGRD7SxuQo8JPEEAgLqZGTTbhaGjmtB6Uxg_uL1hS51VbnJn6bY65-W-zyZMTYnbqPiF_BTX43t694wWxFEXNFG85EXLXFMmIqIYbkN0pyf1ZryGUahGIAxYv3lE85wyI-BvNGB_9sVONEc2oDEaeQABT473zbBFP7URbYoo-FIa5qCmVulNI6RoCBmnYXIKHuP13vkpT6mmdq59YQR5mL7RA3MeM77GwB2d_e9ZE2ci0PYoaLuviPv)

_**Honorable President Donald J. Trump,**

We thank you for your tireless efforts and dedication, which led to your campaign's decisive victory. We look forward to your success in rebuilding our country after Joe Biden's failed presidency weakened it.

Congratulations, President Trump, on winning a second term! We are excited to see the incredible progress our country will make thanks to your steadfast leadership.

Thank you once again for taking action to Make America Great Again.

Mr. President, you can count on us to stand with you to save our country. _

name: Team McBride
subject: [Corrected Link] This organization is targeting the root causes of poverty in Delaware
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McBride for Delaware
body:
The First State Community Action Agency provides essential services and programs that target the root causes of poverty.
#
Hi,
It’s Giving Tuesday, and earlier today Sarah emailed you to ask you to support the First State Community Action Agency’s work to combat poverty here in Delaware. Unfortunately, the links in that email have since broken!
**We wanted to make sure you’re still able to support all the awesome work FSCAA does for our neighbors up and down the state,[so click here for the corrected link and pitch in whatever you can today.](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/go/1133?t=1&akid=1597%2E21716%2E2Xl4ix)**
And if you didn’t catch Sarah’s email from earlier, make sure to read below to learn more about the work FSCAA does to help Delawareans facing financial hardship get back on their feet.
Thanks again,
Team McBride
\-------- Forwarded message --------
From: Sarah McBride
Subject: This organization is targeting the root causes of poverty in Delaware
Date: December 3, 2024
The **First State Community Action Agency** provides essential services and programs that target the root causes of poverty here in Delaware. So today, in honor of Giving Tuesday, I wanted to put their work in the spotlight and [**ask you to pitch in to support everything they do for our communities.**](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/go/1133?t=2&akid=1597%2E21716%2E2Xl4ix)
First, FSCAA helps families facing financial hardship with **food, rental, and utility assistance,** providing an important safety net for our most vulnerable neighbors in their time of need.
Second, they help people build a brighter future with programs like **job training, financial literacy, and education,** empowering Delawareans to achieve self-sufficiency and get ahead.
Third, they create stronger communities with initiatives to address **food insecurity, homelessness, and healthcare access,** making sure none of our neighbors go without some of the most basic necessities.
Founded nearly 59 years ago in 1965, FSCAA has been serving Delaware for generations. But in order to keep it up, they rely on generous donations from people like you and me.
[**So will you join me in supporting the important work the First State Community Action Agency does here in Delaware by donating today in honor of Giving Tuesday?**](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/go/1133?t=3&akid=1597%2E21716%2E2Xl4ix)
**[Donate »](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/go/1133?t=4&akid=1597%2E21716%2E2Xl4ix)**
Thank you,
Sarah McBride
* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/receive_fewer_emails/?t=5&akid=1597%2E21716%2E2Xl4ix)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/update_your_information/?t=6&akid=1597%2E21716%2E2Xl4ix)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=7&akid=1597%2E21716%2E2Xl4ix)

Email us: [info@sarahmcbride.com](mailto:info@sarahmcbride.com)
Paid for by McBride for Delaware

name: Heidi Ganahl
subject: The Giving Season is Here!
body:
Giving Tuesday
| | | | [](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-KXA/sdo3b36affd)
---
| | |
---
| | Peter,
Today is [_Giving Tuesday_](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-KXA/s4v70773d5a)! The Rocky Mountain Voice is excited to participate in this unique opportunity with other non-profits around the globe. Giving Tuesday is a worldwide effort to inspire people to boost their favorite charitable organizations before the end of the year.
During the holiday season, money can get tight, but we hope you will help us be merry and bright by contributing to The Rocky Mountain Voice so we can keep bringing you the stories that matter on a daily basis.
It has been our pleasure to serve the people of Colorado this year by covering stories that affect our everyday lives. With so many changes coming our way in 2025, RMV is looking forward to continuing our mission to build trust by telling the truth!
---
[Give Now!](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-KXA/s1q86794f19)
Remember, [all donations are tax-deductible](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-KXA/s2j2c3beee8), and the end of the year is quickly approaching!
With a gift of [$250, $100, or even $25](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-KXA/s1sd2550d75), you can preserve Colorado’s culture of rugged individualism that makes us unique and keeps us strong even in the most trying storms.
Sincerely,
Heidi Ganahl

| | |
---
| | | **For Colorado,**
**Heidi Ganahl** **CEO, Rocky Mountain Voice**
---
| | P.S. Help RMV be the voice of truth-seeking Coloradans by making a donation today!
---

name: Texas Organizing Project
subject: It’s Giving Tuesday!
body:
Texas Organizing Project's aim is to further push the state toward a progressive future that will deliver substantive change and shift more power into the hands of Black and Latino Texans. Peter, it’s Giving Tuesday! Since the election, we’ve been reflecting, recharging, and building a plan for the road ahead — all with organizing in mind. If you’re with us, can you make a split contribution between our organization and Florida Rising before our midnight deadline? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/top-em-fr-flrising24?amount=]

SPLIT A DONATION » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/top-em-fr-flrising24?amount=]

🙌 Giving Tuesday is one of the biggest days for fundraising, and we’re celebrating by teaming up with our partners in the movement for justice and liberation, Florida Rising!

Our organizations recently got together on Instagram Live [https://www.instagram.com/reel/DBhGK0WSyMJ/?igsh=MWE4dG0zOThrdXNoMg==] to talk about our shared values and everything that’s on the line in 2025.

https://www.instagram.com/reel/DBhGK0WSyMJ/?igsh=MWE4dG0zOThrdXNoMg== [https://www.instagram.com/reel/DBhGK0WSyMJ/?igsh=MWE4dG0zOThrdXNoMg==]Now, we’re gearing up for this next phase and building a plan for the road ahead.

But we both rely on the grassroots power of donors like you to keep our movement going. We have to raise $5,000 by midnight tonight to get back into the fight in 2025, and we need your help to reach our goal.

That’s why we’re reaching out to you today. Peter, can we count on you to make a split donation to Texas Organizing Project and Florida Rising before our midnight deadline? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/top-em-fr-flrising24?amount=]

If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately and be split between Texas Organizing Project and Florida Rising.

**We’re not just talking about solutions — we’re building the platform to make them happen, but we need your help.****[Before we close the books on Giving Tuesday 2024, can you make a donation of $5 or whatever you can to support Their Future Fund?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqtp_gPQ8YxNWLpLEnIZqVkAkFWJjEd44pnRHDT3Qea9uQJG4Q9oqZu0fWLv6aq0Mz15rOj7VUAcd-vd-WcIrZrb4gMyUM95YP0T9iG_WttuhIi3fPlr41TktTf71bc9Ytcy5HAXZfIAWLJq3TIaD2mSncz6W-ZQaqrDB0V_N6H5sIVQcaovzsDm17leR2YqxraVyUQuhxvGomWjmk2_ePCC1eHVyo-_vNG_mVp0bRntWsrb6SgRw5UbQJ5YnfXMDMTdz3mTzhUppDG0HwmH9r6Sn8t1g9Z1-SjJKLdMs7uA0YLsDq47bPIyhXcqfkzJYHvgKYr9tHJ6ybTi0b2HJ4hVxnf9U829I4rtYGvELTY_y1r9ubthdSnfNoQWv76Zt-M/4bz/GTxpMf_RQgShayBA8f92jA/h3/h001.3SX9iT2EwCD5q2gEELM7QYkHwCXivJPfzh4Qf3R8Dq4)**

Annie & Renee

name: John Fetterman
subject: Two organizations close to my heart
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
Running for office isn’t the only way to make a positive difference in your community.
#
Believe it or not, Derek, running for office isn’t the only way to make a positive difference in your community. 🤯 Every day, there are people working at charities and nonprofits that do really amazing work across PA + the whole country.
**So since today is Giving Tuesday, I wanted to shout out two organizations close to my heart: Harmony Dog Rescue and Grow Pittsburgh.**[**You can click here to pitch in and support the work they’re doing across Western PA now.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20241203-1?refcode=em20241203-9652&refcode2=9652_434096_JkdekB&akid=9652%2E434096%2EJkdekB)
**Harmony Dog Rescue** 🐕 helps make sure dogs aren’t left in dangerous situations or surrendered to shelters. They provide boarding and veterinary treatment for dogs whose owners are dealing with homelessness or other emergencies.
**Grow Pittsburgh** 🪴 is equally awesome. They build school and community gardens across the Pittsburgh region and teach people how to grow their own food. What’s not to love about that?
But neither of those organizations can do the work they’re doing without grassroots support. As nonprofits, they rely on our donations to fund their efforts.
[**So Derek, in honor of Giving Tuesday, will you join me in supporting Harmony Dog Rescue + Grow Pittsburgh by splitting a donation between them today?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20241203-1?refcode=em20241203-9652&refcode2=9652_434096_JkdekB&akid=9652%2E434096%2EJkdekB)
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20241203-1?amount=5&refcode=em20241203-9652&refcode2=9652_434096_JkdekB&akid=9652%2E434096%2EJkdekB)**
Thanks,
John ❤️
John Fetterman
U.S. Senator from Pennsylvania
P.S. — I couldn’t send an email about nonprofits without shouting out For Good PGH. They’re doing really important work like supporting families who have lost kids to gun violence and distributing donated goods to families in need, and I couldn’t be prouder that Gisele is one of the co-founders.

---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=1&akid=9652%2E434096%2EJkdekB)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.
clean_body: Running for office isn’t the only way to make a positive difference in your community. Believe it or not, Derek, running for office isn’t the only way to make a positive difference in your community. 🤯 Every day, there are people working at charities and nonprofits that do really amazing work across PA + the whole country. So since today is Giving Tuesday, I wanted to shout out two organizations close to my heart: Harmony Dog Rescue and Grow Pittsburgh. Harmony Dog Rescue 🐕 helps make sure dogs aren’t left in dangerous situations or surrendered to shelters. They provide boarding and veterinary treatment for dogs whose owners are dealing with homelessness or other emergencies. Grow Pittsburgh 🪴 is equally awesome. They build school and community gardens across the Pittsburgh region and teach people how to grow their own food. What’s not to love about that? But neither of those organizations can do the work they’re doing without grassroots support. As nonprofits, they rely on our donations to fund their efforts. Thanks, John ❤️ John Fetterman U.S. Senator from Pennsylvania P.S. — I couldn’t send an email about nonprofits without shouting out For Good PGH. They’re doing really important work like supporting families who have lost kids to gun violence and distributing donated goods to families in need, and I couldn’t be prouder that Gisele is one of the co-founders. | | Email us: info@johnfetterman.com

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98112753/515598187/1096283482?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDE4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjlmYTA1NWEtY2FiMS1lZjExLTg4Y2YtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZDI5IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=P1EZSU0FYB4LR9r-hfundBs9-RpgeZRAu6oFHurkNjM=&emci=3a972809-beb1-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&emdi=69fa055a-cab1-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&ceid=16746905)

Hi Friend,
In four years, Donald Trump was able to appoint three radical right-wing justices to the Supreme Court.
President Biden appointed one justice.
Now, Trump will likely get at least two more picks that will cement the radical MAGA majority on the court for decades to come.
Unless we act now.
This is Alan Cohn from Term Limit the Court. We’re the national campaign working with 75 members of the House and Senate, including Adam Schiff, Hakeem Jeffries, and Sheldon Whitehouse, to end lifetime appointments to SCOTUS and enact 18-year term limits.
We’ve built a movement that can withstand the disappointment over the election. Two in three Americans support SCOTUS term limits.
Our game plan is to support candidates in the mid-term who pledge to support the TERM Act and mount a public pressure campaign forcing Congress to Act.
If you agree with us, join our movement. Help us win the seats in Congress needed to get this done!
[**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/term-limits-yes-inc-1**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98112754/515598188/-859072474?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDE4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjlmYTA1NWEtY2FiMS1lZjExLTg4Y2YtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZDI5IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=P1EZSU0FYB4LR9r-hfundBs9-RpgeZRAu6oFHurkNjM=)

Help us send Clarence Thomas and Samuel Alito into retirement!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98112755/515598189/-859072474?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDE4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjlmYTA1NWEtY2FiMS1lZjExLTg4Y2YtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZDI5IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=P1EZSU0FYB4LR9r-hfundBs9-RpgeZRAu6oFHurkNjM=)**
Alan Cohn
Term Limit the Court

* * *
The American people have lost confidence in the Supreme Court after a series of rulings that strike at the core of our freedoms. _There are term limits for a President. Term limits for many governors and state legislators. And the time has come for term limits for members of the Supreme Court._

**Now, we're counting on your help to provide the resources we need to work directly with members of Congress and their staff to support the introduction of term-limit legislation and raise awareness about this legislative solution to the growing distrust in the Supreme Court.**

We missed our end-of-month fundraising goal by a hair. We can’t let this become a trend, so I’m reaching out to you because I know you’ll step up and help. = = By no means were the results of my reelection strong enough for us to feel safe or comfortable going into 2026. In fact, ours was the closest race in Florida at the federal level — that was with us running a fully-funded, aggressive campaign. If we don’t put up a strong showing in early months like these, our defeat is all but certain. I don’t mean to be a Debbie downer, but it’s the truth. name: Kari Lake
subject: A Personal and Urgent Message
disclaimer_text: Paid for by American Media Council
body:
Watching Arizona botch yet another election, while silencing my legitimate questions about fraud, is a slap in the face to every Arizona voter and conservative American.| | |
---
| |
---
| |
---
#
---
From the Desk of
---
# **[Kari Lake](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=bfc3db43e05a48749feab5d7dac674b0&_e=YLkmfJLttagF7RsOlLC9ZBNVX7Xce8sG6Si2NYtLViOeJAPAkqt0CbUMx8AeEYfch5AdwqnukHUIHUstWdcLayo4KldykOZoxOf3QmpmD-vfFvNuyME7cOYcVIXOsqrdCtKlE2BmDU_T5jAesRLTKXMuZoc9Lsnqou2sJ1t4ezB6gfuqZ5m_oVq-_aJOGcpLm0QeFCre4prB0T3l0hcTeMkZ4sCDu1Thzc4GzTOUqszsQpqPkJ52e3BbXlL-hwg-6_-TF3bCt9L_JrXF5KwzMlw9fw-puVVwFcJ9U-CWqa0jgag4QmYAHbkGO-1GYNcSkgL3NEp4fKhA5ySMVOnPSmcUROSddhcbnQA3GoSvxDv82CdeQPoDr1hnxqaw8hxJUS3N_JBVz70T7n3d1sm5DhrbEcLAKUjRSopIERZRD2I%3D)**
---
|
---
| | Dear Friend, Today I need your help to defend myself against the Left’s “lawfare” before they can financially destroy my family.All I ask is that you **[Rush a “FIRST AMENDMENT FUND” Emergency contribution before midnight tonight.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=bfc3db43e05a48749feab5d7dac674b0&_e=YLkmfJLttagF7RsOlLC9ZBNVX7Xce8sG6Si2NYtLViOeJAPAkqt0CbUMx8AeEYfch5AdwqnukHUIHUstWdcLayo4KldykOZoxOf3QmpmD-vfFvNuyME7cOYcVIXOsqrdCtKlE2BmDU_T5jAesRLTKXMuZoc9Lsnqou2sJ1t4ezB6gfuqZ5m_oVq-_aJOGcpLm0QeFCre4prB0T3l0hcTeMkZ4sCDu1Thzc4GzTOUqszsQpqPkJ52e3BbXlL-hwg-6_-TF3bCt9L_JrXF5KwzMql2Z7UMrfNFrvM_clkoAFOJ19Ww_3N6UTy6I5wRMxkCHXQIFWGcu_XimaFup8Bui_XSdS8RshHWezapGXMG0dPuP72xx2CHzYNv0K6j4oiLYi_z9z8BWKYx_aSzMlQeEXBkJRsnLQeiw_WQ_J6eI2M%3D)** When an Arizona Election Official went on the record promising to _“Make life hell”_ for me, I could have never imagined it would have been this bad...I incurred hundreds of thousands of dollars in expenses to defend myself in this defamation case – and I'm afraid this battle is only getting started. Think about it. The Left wanted to force me to pay a multi-million-dollar legal judgment because I told the truth and called out election fraud.Everything I’ve done has been for election integrity.Watching Arizona botch yet another election, while silencing my legitimate questions about fraud, is a slap in the face to every Arizona voter and conservative American. It’s a national embarrassment. We have to change it.But if standing up and demanding change means you’re going to be personally and financially destroyed, we are never going to fix our elections.That’s what happened to me. Each day that the weight of this lawfare feels too much to bear, I think about President Trump and how he takes every attack head-on and never once thinks about backing down.Just think about what’s happening to him.Radical Never-Trump prosecutors and judges threatened to take everything away from him -- his businesses, his buildings, his homes, and even his freedom. **And he fights on.** So, if the Left thinks that some liberal-packed court threatening me with a hundred-million-dollar fine will get me to back down from this fight, **then they know _nothing_ about me.**And they know nothing about _you_ , too.I’m in this fight for my kids, Ruby and Leo, and my husband, Jeff.This is about protecting their rights, giving them a prosperous America to live in, and defending our family name.To me, that was worth the millions of dollars this could have cost.Because nothing in this world can come between me and my family.Not the Left’s lawfare. Not power-drunk liberal prosecutors.Not litigious, partisan hacks who hate the truth.Thankfully, a generous group has stepped up and is willing to help me cover my legal expenses.So today, I must ask you to contribute to this new**“First Amendment Fund”** to help me defeat the Left’s sham lawfare. [**My friend, could you rush back a generous, tax-deductible gift of $35, $50, $100, $250, or more to help me cover the court fees, lawyers, expert witnesses, counsels, and so much more?**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=bfc3db43e05a48749feab5d7dac674b0&_e=YLkmfJLttagF7RsOlLC9ZBNVX7Xce8sG6Si2NYtLViOeJAPAkqt0CbUMx8AeEYfch5AdwqnukHUIHUstWdcLayo4KldykOZoxOf3QmpmD-vfFvNuyME7cOYcVIXOsqrdCtKlE2BmDU_T5jAesRLTKXMuZoc9Lsnqou2sJ1t4ezB6gfuqZ5m_oVq-_aJOGcpLm0QeFCre4prB0T3l0hcTeMkZ4sCDu1Thzc4GzTOUqszsQpqPkJ52e3BbXlL-hwg-6_-TF3bCt9L_JrXF5KwzMpCQmTyeQOGCEoMwAvEzMts-JgHW3MJiQhKAiRkR2wW0kHQSMIvjbYuYotAO22TGfsrFTCvdPUZDsF2Hrl04MMnFOqzXzzx6Sv13oAFCbW7ESWGt6ckZaRUb_vNbLMQ7JnMlLYej4M6oc4MotQM3lsc%3D) The Left wanted this case to destroy my name and credibility. They also wanted to force me and my family into bankruptcy.
---
[ **DONATE **](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=bfc3db43e05a48749feab5d7dac674b0&_e=YLkmfJLttagF7RsOlLC9ZBNVX7Xce8sG6Si2NYtLViOeJAPAkqt0CbUMx8AeEYfch5AdwqnukHUIHUstWdcLayo4KldykOZoxOf3QmpmD-vfFvNuyME7cOYcVIXOsqrdCtKlE2BmDU_T5jAesRLTKXMuZoc9Lsnqou2sJ1t4ezB6gfuqZ5m_oVq-_aJOGcpLm0QeFCre4prB0T3l0hcTeMkZ4sCDu1Thzc4GzTOUqszsQpqPkJ52e3BbXlL-hwg-6_-TF3bCt9L_JrXF5KwzMiFIQ9I2hyr_ldb9lHn-yZSvGLC2PIsYsEG_ghvQiaCPH3Z7Zp8J1-CJ-F65sqSCE5h_5MDSL4T4wGV5gtjKML6Eus8NcZ9agyAZPjsWHnEDXLcCR-aBd8Nf8Tbgx7kSPo3OsCa58_mXYQK947MSIqs%3D)
---
Every dollar given to this **“First Amendment Fund”** will help me finish this fight – without financially destroying my family.Together, we can win this battle in court. And we can send the message that the Left’s lawfare will not crush us.Thank you for always being there for me. Please know that I’m still fighting because I want _you_ to live in a free and prosperous America.Yours Truly,
---
| |
---
---
Kari Lake

Kari Lake

Arrested Pro-Life protestors. **And sued me for defamation.** Now, I’m facing hundreds of thousands of dollars in legal fees all for speaking the truth and calling out election fraud.The Left’s goal? Financially destroy me and my family.Today I’m asking you to join me and build the **“First Amendment Fund”** that will help me win my case. With enough grassroots firepower, we will end this lawfare and take back our country. **[Please, rush your most generous, tax-deductible donation of $35, $50, $100, $250, $500, or more. Thank you for your support during this difficult time.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=bfc3db43e05a48749feab5d7dac674b0&_e=YLkmfJLttagF7RsOlLC9ZBNVX7Xce8sG6Si2NYtLViOeJAPAkqt0CbUMx8AeEYfch5AdwqnukHUIHUstWdcLayo4KldykOZoxOf3QmpmD-vfFvNuyME7cOYcVIXOsqrdCtKlE2BmDU_T5jAesRLTKXMuZoc9Lsnqou2sJ1t4ezB6gfuqZ5m_oVq-_aJOGcpLm0QeFCre4prB0T3l0hcTeMkZ4sCDu1Thzc4GzTOUqszsQpqPkJ52e3BbXlL-hwg-6_-TF3bCt9L_JrXF5KwzMvrNtPfqsHmBiTtyHCjUfYR0hDaHXgpAaU7Z0hO1ycITEhwoqfyrfbR7A3wWB7OEVIsKM1oWm16LDVmAJ2_JtgeS9q4yTlUeM97AOb4RA7Vdfd6Hop6EslAsavMg0c0p3Pw5m_xti10VsxUG_cnSjHE%3D)**

body:
With your help, Republicans achieved victories that will define the future of our country, restoring conservative leadership to the White House and holding our control in Congress.
Our official 2024 Majority Ornament is officially out!

Friend, 2024 has been nothing short of historic for Republicans.

This was the year we fired Joe Biden, and put America back on the path to greatness!

To celebrate this incredible year, we're offering our exclusive **[2024 Commemorative Ornament](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=d99cbc4fa86748a19abee8c56c1ea269&_e=rp3wNSJxaYUOGNvGwZv_LK6qVe-y9AmwML7GoCP2QLRTf8fwlyfTnZzeD4iSOa_k3ipzSP6-RAymxh0nBLZJbaWlB4PB0komk_vhPJ8P9Hj4chPYY9kbM8bGXeGGvpJEdTL8tgbXMNY27HFgGQ07s-ngA-ZQaum-MXcO0hG9SWgiKBILhrUW6i8ly0agsq8AFD-oKBp1RqJIyMbyFGPp_8YXoXhB2GkbuzFCDO1qvoWN3mZjpMo2ZX23aOIv17nN1uS_ItB9zgtV4xtcWJzhL9XLmedqS6LBuDRIwICJKZt52lVro4S5vMBRlUqbwGlg0c33tdQ7AxWn2pDS0DIliprcmh7pgH0ift_yCLyxCJND1M8gtoVl1yoXNqAq1gz15784aSNrv9ygssCCP8vdtVLnVWvu0oqptwhyjfzwnOE%3D "2024 Commemorative Ornament")** to our most dedicated supporters like you.

With your help, Republicans achieved victories that will define the future of our country, restoring conservative leadership to the White House and holding our control in Congress.

| **Peter, today is one of the most important fundraising days for Emerge.**

This Giving Tuesday is your opportunity to continue your support for Democratic women and contributing to Emerge is one of the best choices you can make!
---
| [MATCH NOW! ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98113313/515600097/-247203143?refcode=BLU_EM_EMRG_2024-12-03_2&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImEwYzdjZGQzLWNjYjEtZWYxMS04OGNmLTYwNDViZGZlOGQyOSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=7PyFQlITy88qTkZ0404IEMccR-FLxs4kdcx_O8mC7OU=)

_Here’s why:_

We have been doing this for over 20 years – recruiting, training, and helping women win at all levels of office across the country.

Emerge alums are on the frontlines of Congress and state and local governments, ready to act as a firewall to protect our most critical freedoms. But these trailblazing candidates count on Emerge for the tools, training, and support they need to run for office, win crucial races, and fight back against the MAGA agenda. _**And our work is year over year — not just during a presidential election — to help women get elected from school boards to Congress and support them after they run.**_

_Last month, Emerge women achieved major victories in bellwether states and our candidates’ overall win rate is a whopping 70%! _That means our strategy to build women-led Democratic majorities is working, but our work does not end here.

We need your support before _MIDNIGHT TONIGHT_ to power our movement forward and help recruit and train more Democratic women. We’re still _$9,283_ away from our Giving Tuesday fundraising goal and we can’t let up now!

**Giving Tuesday ends at _11:59 PM TONIGHT!_ [_A generous donor will MATCH contributions – dollar for dollar – up to $50,000! Will you contribute today to show your support for Emerge and help us reach our $50,000 Giving Tuesday fundraising goal?_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98113315/515600100/-247203143?refcode=BLU_EM_EMRG_2024-12-03_2&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImEwYzdjZGQzLWNjYjEtZWYxMS04OGNmLTYwNDViZGZlOGQyOSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=7PyFQlITy88qTkZ0404IEMccR-FLxs4kdcx_O8mC7OU=)**
| [MATCH MY CONTRIBUTION! ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98113317/515600102/-247203143?refcode=BLU_EM_EMRG_2024-12-03_2&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImEwYzdjZGQzLWNjYjEtZWYxMS04OGNmLTYwNDViZGZlOGQyOSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=7PyFQlITy88qTkZ0404IEMccR-FLxs4kdcx_O8mC7OU=)

A’shanti F. Gholar

| During this season of gratitude and reflection, I wanted to take a moment to convey my heartfelt thanks and admiration for Congressman John Sarbanes. Over the last year, I’ve had the privilege of sitting down with Rep. John Sarbanes to hear his advice and guidance in advance of my new role representing Maryland’s Third Congressional District.
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98113517/515600572/-1719677217?refcode=BLU_EM_SEFC_2024-12-03_2&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTI0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YzA4Yzc2MC1jZGIxLWVmMTEtODhjZi02MDQ1YmRmZThkMjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-Gdl-Fq_3nY66e-RrXeddKxoGt27nqF50NgS8iJYKJs=)
Rep. John Sarbanes leaves behind a legacy of getting things done. Here are just a few highlights of his 18-year career serving our community in Congress:

✅ He understood that the fabric of our democracy lies in ensuring everyone has an equal and fair opportunity to vote. That’s why he led the For The People Act and the John R. Lewis Voting Rights Act to strengthen our institutions.

✅ He not only led on protecting and restoring our Chesapeake Bay but also championed legislation such as the No Child Left Inside Act to ensure children had greater access to enjoy and benefit from our natural resources.

✅ He authored the law that created the Public Service Loan Forgiveness program, which delivered life-changing student debt relief to a record of over one million teachers, nurses, first responders, social workers, and other public service workers.

I am deeply humbled and grateful for this opportunity to represent Maryland’s 3rd District in Congress. As Rep. Sarbanes passes the baton, I’m honored to carry his legacy forward and continue his important work to reform and strengthen our democratic institutions, our natural world, and our people.

Thank you for your dedication, Rep. Sarbanes!

Sincerely,
Sarah Elfreth

* * *

clean_body: Background on pardon Joe Biden gave to son Hunter [NEWSLINK] BREAKING NEWS... [image] [] RIGHTS AND FREEDOMS IN PERIL "When it comes to fighting for the American people’s ‘right to know,’ no one holds a candle to Tom Fitton and his team at Judicial Watch" - SEAN HANNITY Tom Fitton returns with an exhaustive investigation into the progressive movement’s efforts to dismantle the venerable institutions of American rights and freedoms. Order Tom Fitton's Must-Read Today! [] [600x300] [] We haven’t seen a pardon as sweeping as Hunter Biden’s in generations [] Source: Politico [] Experts on pardons said they could think of only one other person who has received a presidential pardon so sweeping in generations: Nixon, who was given a blanket pardon by Gerald Ford in 1974. [13x13x1] [] READ MORE [] Background Notes from Judicial Watch [180x150x1] [] June 11, 2024 The Inaugural Felony Conviction of a First Family Member [] Source: Judicial Watch [] "The Bidens are going down in the history books with the inaugural felony conviction of a First Family member," Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton said. [13x13x1] [] READ MORE [] [180x150x2] [] December 02, 2024 The Biden Family's Arc of Corruption [] Source: Judicial Watch [] Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton: "The pardon seems to be all about protecting Joe Biden and helping ensure his son will be less likely to testify against him." [13x13x1] [] READ MORE [] [180x150x3] [] May 31, 2024 Judicial Watch Sues CIA for Records on Hunter Biden Investigation [] Source: Judicial Watch [] Two House committees are investigating, among other things, whether President Biden “abuse[d] his power as President to impede, obstruct, or otherwise hinder investigations or the prosecution of Hunter Biden.” [13x13x1] [] READ MORE [] [Contribute] [] [32x32x1] [] [32x32x2] [] [32x32x3] [] [32x32x3] [] Judicial Watch, Inc. 425 3rd St Sw Ste 800 Washington, DC 20024 202.646.5172 © 2017 - 2024, All Rights Reserved Manage Email Subscriptions [] |

In a month’s time, I will be sworn in to Congress to represent New York’s Fourth Congressional District.

I’m ready to bring our message of common sense and common ground to work in a bipartisan manner to deliver progress for Long Island families. But it’s important now more than ever to build a solid foundation to start off strong and help us keep up the fight.

body:
[](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=012509073fd0468aa866d7563d92e1d9&_e=JltifN5PXAgaw9ZRpcndPJPEZl9VhIZZkGVkJVUfgPomeuEnAH8dxXdYNkYvar40odbJQqp-nU-SxzkvzBidLrZQemQWoPZ0Btp4ErjH6ZaS7ZhAEFbp2V9RWd2TK8QUTM5XAisHW0DeMlpXZhFUHJApHkKmhkvWx38Y_7_fZwKoFgCUbFcm_GLpNN7qUaVnNfpK1AfbXgMgZOTLeBW7ELjtZRnqXg9Gm_7kI08CbdY10N-aYVbJIC1pGTqjkaiujpJ58DmRcVEz_2Qac-FdtoMRnZjly6mIjAUC-FYpiU3qwvvpBecR3KZFkbm69zzxtfmBik_eurmG1BKU9dA4OQ%3D%3D)

Patriot,

Working as an FBI special agent was my dream job. But when I became an agent, I swore an oath to protect and defend the United States Constitution against all enemies -- both foreign and domestic.

When I discovered the FBI's National Security Branch had refocused counterterrorism from legitimate foreign actors to political opponents within our borders, I knew I had to say something.

In August 2022, I made protected whistleblower disclosures about my concerns regarding the January 6th investigations assigned to my office.

**My whistleblowing was apolitical and in the spirit of upholding my oath._However, it nearly cost me everything._**

Thanks to the Kash Foundation, I was able to stand up to the Deep State and expose their efforts to villainize patriots. The Kash Foundation offers legal and financial help to whistleblowers, veterans, and American patriots who come forward with evidence against the Deep State's actions.

To thank him for his efforts, I told Kash Patel that I would help him raise $20,000 before the end of the week to help the Kash Foundation take on the Deep State.

body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/9?t=1&akid=39335%2E3422442%2Eu0ujFH)
Derek,
Many of us are disappointed in the overall results of November’s elections, but we also want to highlight how YOUR grassroots action helped get down-ballot anti-corruption champions into office. Thanks to you, candidates endorsed by Truth to Power were elected with a mandate to fight for our democracy and protect our fundamental freedoms.
Today, we’re celebrating these people-first leaders winning their elections:
1. Josh Harder, CA-09
2. Derek Tran, CA-45
3. Dave Min, CA-47
4. Sarah McBride, DE-AL
5. Amy Klobuchar, MN-Sen
6. Maggie Goodlander, NH-02
7. Josh Riley, NY-19
8. Chris Deluzio, PA-17
9. Marie Gluesenkamp Perez, WA-03
10. Emily Randall, WA-06

Katie and Truth to Power endorsed these champions and supported their campaigns. This was only possible because of grassroots supporters like you and thousands of small-dollar donations.
We know that these next four years are going to be difficult, and we’re preparing to do whatever we can to fight back against Trump’s corruption. But, we also know that thanks to you and your support, we’ll have 10 leaders in Congress who will be there to carry on Katie’s fights in Washington.
Thank you,
Truth to Power

* By owning this limited edition tumbler, you're not just acquiring a piece of merchandise; you're acquiring a symbol of an era, a testament to your support for a unique political figure.

* Each sip from this tumbler represents a pledge of support, a declaration of your unwavering belief in the values and ideals represented by the true American leader.
